category.name: Finance English
category.description: Finance and banking terminology for capital markets, corporate finance, accounting standards and fintech operations.
category.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework

terms.definition: A method of accounting in which revenues and expenses are recorded when they are earned or incurred, regardless of when cash is received or paid, aligning financial reporting with underlying economic activity.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Under accrual accounting, revenue is recognized when earned even if the cash is received later.

termTranslations.th: บัญชีคงค้าง

usageTranslations.en: Under accrual accounting, revenue is recognized when earned even if the cash is received later.
usageTranslations.tr: Tahakkuk esaslı muhasebede, gelir nakit daha sonra alınsa bile kazanıldığı anda kaydedilir.
usageTranslations.fr: En comptabilité d’exercice, le revenu est comptabilisé lorsqu’il est gagné, même si le paiement est différé.
usageTranslations.de: Bei der Periodenabgrenzung wird der Umsatz erfasst, wenn er verdient ist, selbst wenn der Zahlungseingang später erfolgt.
usageTranslations.es: En la contabilidad por devengo, los ingresos se reconocen cuando se generan, aunque el efectivo se reciba posteriormente.
usageTranslations.zh: 在权责发生制会计下，收入在获得时确认，即使现金稍后收到。
usageTranslations.ar: في المحاسبة على أساس الاستحقاق، يتم الاعتراف بالإيرادات عند تحقيقها حتى إذا استلم النقد لاحقًا.
usageTranslations.pt: Na contabilidade de competência, a receita é reconhecida quando auferida, mesmo que o recebimento do caixa ocorra depois.
usageTranslations.ru: По методу начисления выручка признаётся в момент её возникновения, даже если деньги поступают позже.
usageTranslations.ja: 発生主義会計では、現金の受領が後でも収益は発生時点で認識されます。
usageTranslations.it: Nella contabilità per competenza, il ricavo si rileva al momento della maturazione anche se l’incasso avviene successivamente.
usageTranslations.vi: Trong kế toán dồn tích, doanh thu được ghi nhận khi phát sinh, dù tiền về sau.
usageTranslations.hi: आवधिक लेखांकन में, नकद बाद में मिलने पर भी राजस्व तब दर्ज होता है जब वह अर्जित होता है।
usageTranslations.th: ภายใต้บัญชีคงค้าง รายได้จะบันทึกเมื่อเกิดขึ้น แม้จะได้รับเงินสดในภายหลังก็ตาม
usageTranslations.id: Dalam akuntansi akrual, pendapatan diakui saat diperoleh meskipun kas diterima kemudian.

terms.definition: A liability account representing income received before the related goods or services have been delivered, requiring recognition as revenue in future periods per IFRS 15 and US GAAP.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Deferred revenue is recorded when payment is received in advance of delivering products or services, in compliance with accrual accounting standards.

termTranslations.th: รายได้รอการรับรู้

usageTranslations.en: Deferred revenue is recorded when payment is received in advance of delivering products or services, in compliance with accrual accounting standards.
usageTranslations.tr: Ertelenmiş gelir, ürün veya hizmet sunulmadan önce ödeme alındığında ve tahakkuk esasına uygun olarak kaydedilir.
usageTranslations.fr: Les produits constatés d’avance sont comptabilisés lorsqu’un paiement est reçu avant la livraison de biens ou services, conformément aux normes d’exercice.
usageTranslations.de: Abgegrenzte Erlöse werden erfasst, wenn Zahlungen vor der Leistungserbringung eingehen, gemäß dem Periodenabgrenzungsprinzip.
usageTranslations.es: Los ingresos diferidos se registran cuando se recibe el pago antes de entregar bienes o servicios, según la contabilidad de devengo.
usageTranslations.zh: 递延收入是在收到提前付款但尚未交付商品或服务时，根据权责发生制会计准则入账的。
usageTranslations.ar: تُسجل الإيرادات المؤجلة عند استلام الدفعة قبل تسليم السلع أو الخدمات وفقًا لمعايير الاستحقاق.
usageTranslations.pt: A receita diferida é registrada quando o pagamento é recebido antecipadamente à entrega dos bens ou serviços, conforme a competência.
usageTranslations.ru: Отложенная выручка признаётся при получении аванса до поставки товаров или услуг, согласно принципу начисления.
usageTranslations.ja: 前受収益は、製品やサービスの提供前に支払いを受けた場合に発生し、発生主義会計基準に従って処理されます。
usageTranslations.it: I ricavi differiti vengono rilevati quando il pagamento è ricevuto prima della consegna di beni o servizi, secondo il principio della competenza.
usageTranslations.vi: Doanh thu chưa thực hiện được ghi nhận khi nhận trước thanh toán mà chưa cung cấp hàng hóa hoặc dịch vụ, phù hợp với chuẩn mực dồn tích.
usageTranslations.hi: स्थगित राजस्व तब दर्ज किया जाता है जब उत्पाद या सेवा की आपूर्ति से पूर्व भुगतान प्राप्त होता है, संचयी लेखा मानकों के अनुसार।
usageTranslations.th: รายได้รอการรับรู้จะถูกบันทึกเมื่อได้รับเงินล่วงหน้าก่อนส่งมอบสินค้า/บริการ ตามมาตรฐานบัญชีคงค้าง
usageTranslations.id: Pendapatan ditangguhkan dicatat saat pembayaran diterima sebelum barang atau jasa diserahkan, sesuai prinsip akrual.

terms.definition: A non-GAAP performance metric reflecting earnings before interest, taxes, depreciation, and amortization, further adjusted for non-recurring, irregular, or non-operational items to better represent core operating profitability.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: The company's adjusted EBITDA excludes restructuring charges and one-time legal expenses for greater comparability between periods.

termTranslations.zh: 调整后息税折旧摊销前利润
termTranslations.ar: إجمالي الأرباح قبل الفوائد والضرائب والاستهلاك والإطفاء المعدل
termTranslations.th: EBITDA ที่ปรับปรุงแล้ว

usageTranslations.en: The company's adjusted EBITDA excludes restructuring charges and one-time legal expenses for greater comparability between periods.
usageTranslations.tr: Şirketin düzeltilmiş FAVÖK’ü, dönemler arası daha iyi karşılaştırılabilirlik için yeniden yapılandırma giderleri ve tek seferlik hukuki masrafları hariç tutar.
usageTranslations.fr: L’EBITDA ajusté de la société exclut les coûts de restructuration et les frais juridiques ponctuels pour améliorer la comparabilité entre les périodes.
usageTranslations.de: Das bereinigte EBITDA des Unternehmens schließt Restrukturierungskosten und einmalige Rechtskosten aus, um eine bessere Vergleichbarkeit der Zeiträume zu ermöglichen.
usageTranslations.es: El EBITDA ajustado de la empresa excluye los cargos de reestructuración y los gastos legales únicos para una mejor comparabilidad entre períodos.
usageTranslations.zh: 公司的调整后EBITDA排除了重组费用和一次性法律费用，以便于各期间的可比性。
usageTranslations.ar: يستثني EBITDA المعدل للشركة رسوم إعادة الهيكلة والمصاريف القانونية لمرة واحدة لتحقيق قابلية المقارنة الأفضل بين الفترات.
usageTranslations.pt: O EBITDA ajustado da empresa exclui encargos de reestruturação e despesas jurídicas pontuais para maior comparabilidade entre períodos.
usageTranslations.ru: Скорректированная EBITDA компании исключает расходы на реструктуризацию и разовые юридические издержки для повышения сопоставимости между периодами.
usageTranslations.ja: 当社の調整後EBITDAは、期間間の比較可能性向上のため、リストラクチャリング費用や一時的な法的費用を除外しています。
usageTranslations.it: L’EBITDA rettificato della società esclude oneri di ristrutturazione e spese legali straordinarie per una maggiore comparabilità tra i periodi.
usageTranslations.vi: EBITDA điều chỉnh của công ty loại trừ chi phí tái cấu trúc và chi phí pháp lý một lần nhằm so sánh các giai đoạn tốt hơn.
usageTranslations.hi: कंपनी का समायोजित EBITDA पुनर्गठन शुल्क और एक-बार की कानूनी व्यय को बाहर करता है ताकि अवधियों के बीच तुलनीयता बेहतर हो।
usageTranslations.th: EBITDA ที่ปรับปรุงแล้วของบริษัทไม่รวมค่าใช้จ่ายในการปรับโครงสร้างและค่าใช้จ่ายทางกฎหมายครั้งเดียวเพื่อเปรียบเทียบระหว่างงวดได้ดียิ่งขึ้น
usageTranslations.id: EBITDA yang disesuaikan perusahaan mengecualikan biaya restrukturisasi dan biaya hukum satu kali untuk meningkatkan keterbandingan antar periode.

terms.definition: A credit-strength and bankruptcy risk indicator for companies, calculated using a weighted combination of financial ratios. Widely applied in financial analysis for distress prediction and credit risk assessment.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: The company’s Altman Score fell below 1.8, indicating a heightened risk of bankruptcy according to standard credit analysis benchmarks.

termTranslations.th: คะแนนอัลท์แมน

usageTranslations.en: The company’s Altman Score fell below 1.8, indicating a heightened risk of bankruptcy according to standard credit analysis benchmarks.
usageTranslations.tr: Şirketin Altman Skoru 1,8’in altına düştü ve bu, standart kredi analiz ölçütlerine göre iflas riskinin arttığını gösteriyor.
usageTranslations.fr: Le score d’Altman de la société est passé sous 1,8, indiquant un risque de faillite élevé selon les normes d’analyse du crédit.
usageTranslations.de: Der Altman-Z-Score des Unternehmens fiel unter 1,8, was nach gängigen Kreditbenchmarks ein erhöhtes Insolvenzrisiko signalisiert.
usageTranslations.es: La puntuación de Altman de la empresa cayó por debajo de 1,8, indicando un mayor riesgo de quiebra según los parámetros estándar.
usageTranslations.zh: 该公司的阿尔特曼得分降至1.8以下，按照标准信用分析基准表明破产风险上升。
usageTranslations.ar: انخفضت نتيجة ألتمان للشركة إلى أقل من 1.8، مما يشير إلى زيادة مخاطر الإفلاس وفقًا لمعايير التحليل الائتماني.
usageTranslations.pt: A pontuação Altman da empresa caiu abaixo de 1,8, indicando maior risco de falência segundo os padrões de análise de crédito.
usageTranslations.ru: Показатель Альтмана компании опустился ниже 1,8, что свидетельствует о повышенном риске банкротства по стандартам кредитного анализа.
usageTranslations.ja: 当社のアルトマン・スコアは1.8を下回り、標準的な信用分析ベンチマークによると破綻リスクが高まっています。
usageTranslations.it: Il punteggio Altman della società è sceso sotto 1,8, segnalando un rischio di insolvenza secondo i parametri standard.
usageTranslations.vi: Điểm Altman của công ty xuống dưới 1,8, báo hiệu rủi ro phá sản tăng theo tiêu chuẩn phân tích tín dụng.
usageTranslations.hi: कंपनी का अल्टमैन स्कोर 1.8 से नीचे चला गया है, जो मानक क्रेडिट विश्लेषण मानकों के अनुसार दिवालियापन का उच्च जोखिम दर्शाता है।
usageTranslations.th: คะแนนอัลท์แมนของบริษัทลดลงต่ำกว่า 1.8 แสดงถึงความเสี่ยงล้มละลายที่สูงขึ้นตามเกณฑ์มาตรฐานการวิเคราะห์เครดิต
usageTranslations.id: Skor Altman perusahaan turun di bawah 1,8, menandakan risiko kebangkrutan yang meningkat menurut tolok ukur analisis kredit standar.

terms.definition: A financial ratio measuring the efficiency with which a company uses its assets to generate sales, calculated as total revenue divided by average total assets for the period.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: A high asset turnover ratio indicates that the company is effectively utilizing its assets to generate sales revenue.

termTranslations.th: อัตราหมุนเวียนสินทรัพย์

usageTranslations.en: A high asset turnover ratio indicates that the company is effectively utilizing its assets to generate sales revenue.
usageTranslations.tr: Yüksek varlık devir hızı, şirketin varlıklarını satış geliri üretmekte etkin kullandığını gösterir.
usageTranslations.fr: Un taux élevé de rotation des actifs indique que l’entreprise utilise efficacement ses actifs pour générer des revenus.
usageTranslations.de: Ein hoher Anlagenumschlag zeigt, dass das Unternehmen seine Vermögenswerte effektiv zur Umsatzgenerierung einsetzt.
usageTranslations.es: Una alta rotación de activos indica que la empresa utiliza eficientemente sus activos para generar ingresos.
usageTranslations.zh: 高资产周转率表明公司有效利用其资产来产生销售收入。
usageTranslations.ar: يشير ارتفاع معدل دوران الأصول إلى أن الشركة تستخدم أصولها بفعالية لتوليد الإيرادات.
usageTranslations.pt: Um alto giro dos ativos indica que a empresa está usando bem seus ativos para gerar receita.
usageTranslations.ru: Высокая оборачиваемость активов свидетельствует об эффективном использовании активов компанией для получения выручки.
usageTranslations.ja: 資産回転率が高いほど、企業が資産を効果的に活用し売上を生み出していることを示します。
usageTranslations.it: Un’alta rotazione degli attivi indica un uso efficiente degli asset per generare ricavi.
usageTranslations.vi: Vòng quay tài sản cao cho thấy doanh nghiệp sử dụng tài sản hiệu quả để tạo ra doanh thu.
usageTranslations.hi: उच्च संपत्ति टर्नओवर अनुपात यह दर्शाता है कि कंपनी अपनी संपत्तियों का कुशलतापूर्वक उपयोग कर रही है।
usageTranslations.th: อัตราหมุนเวียนสินทรัพย์สูงบ่งชี้ว่าบริษัทใช้สินทรัพย์ได้อย่างมีประสิทธิภาพในการสร้างรายได้
usageTranslations.id: Rasio perputaran aset yang tinggi menunjukkan perusahaan memanfaatkan aset secara efektif untuk menghasilkan pendapatan.

terms.definition: The quantitative or qualitative threshold in an audit below which misstatements are considered not to affect the fair presentation of financial statements, as determined by the auditor according to professional standards.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Audit materiality is set at a level where individual or aggregate misstatements would not influence users’ decisions.

termTranslations.th: สาระสำคัญในการตรวจสอบบัญชี

usageTranslations.en: Audit materiality is set at a level where individual or aggregate misstatements would not influence users’ decisions.
usageTranslations.tr: Denetim önemlilik düzeyi, bireysel veya toplam yanlışlıkların kullanıcı kararlarını etkilemeyeceği seviyede belirlenir.
usageTranslations.fr: Le seuil de significativité d’audit est fixé à un niveau où les anomalies n’influencent pas les décisions des utilisateurs.
usageTranslations.de: Die Prüfungswesentliche Wesentlichkeit wird so festgelegt, dass einzelne oder aggregierte Fehler die Entscheidungen der Abschlussadressaten nicht beeinflussen.
usageTranslations.es: La materialidad de auditoría se fija de forma que errores individuales o agregados no influyan en las decisiones de los usuarios.
usageTranslations.zh: 审计重要性水平的设定是使得个别或总计错报不会影响使用者的决策。
usageTranslations.ar: يتم تحديد أهمية التدقيق عند مستوى بحيث لا تؤثر الأخطاء الفردية أو المجمعة على قرارات المستخدمين.
usageTranslations.pt: A materialidade de auditoria é definida para que distorções individuais ou agregadas não influenciem as decisões dos usuários.
usageTranslations.ru: Аудиторская существенность устанавливается на таком уровне, при котором ошибки не повлияют на решения пользователей.
usageTranslations.ja: 監査上の重要性は、個別または総合的な虚偽記載が利用者の意思決定に影響を与えない水準で設定されます。
usageTranslations.it: La materialità di revisione è fissata a un livello tale che errori singoli o aggregati non influenzino le decisioni degli utenti.
usageTranslations.vi: Ngưỡng trọng yếu kiểm toán được đặt ở mức mà các sai sót riêng lẻ hoặc tổng thể không ảnh hưởng đến quyết định của người dùng.
usageTranslations.hi: ऑडिट भौतिकता इस स्तर पर निर्धारित होती है कि व्यक्तिगत या समग्र गलतियाँ उपयोगकर्ताओं के निर्णयों को प्रभावित न करें।
usageTranslations.th: สาระสำคัญในการตรวจสอบบัญชีถูกกำหนดไว้ในระดับที่ข้อผิดพลาดรายบุคคลหรือรวมกันจะไม่ส่งผลต่อการตัดสินใจของผู้ใช้
usageTranslations.id: Materialitas audit ditetapkan pada tingkat di mana kesalahan individu atau agregat tidak memengaruhi keputusan pengguna.

terms.definition: Total costs incurred by an entity for employee services, including salaries, wages, bonuses, stock options, and related benefits, recognized in the period when earned in accordance with accrual accounting principles.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Compensation expense includes salaries, bonuses, and share-based payments recorded under IFRS 2 and ASC 718.

termTranslations.th: ค่าใช้จ่ายพนักงาน

usageTranslations.en: Compensation expense includes salaries, bonuses, and share-based payments recorded under IFRS 2 and ASC 718.
usageTranslations.tr: Personel gideri, maaş, ikramiye ve hisse bazlı ödemeleri kapsar ve IFRS 2 ile ASC 718 kapsamında kaydedilir.
usageTranslations.fr: Les charges de personnel comprennent salaires, primes et paiements fondés sur des actions enregistrés selon IFRS 2 et ASC 718.
usageTranslations.de: Personalaufwand umfasst Gehälter, Boni und aktienbasierte Vergütungen nach IFRS 2 und ASC 718.
usageTranslations.es: Los gastos de personal incluyen salarios, bonificaciones y pagos basados en acciones según IFRS 2 y ASC 718.
usageTranslations.zh: 薪酬费用包括根据IFRS 2和ASC 718记账的工资、奖金及股权支付。
usageTranslations.ar: تشمل مصروفات التعويضات الرواتب والمكافآت والمدفوعات القائمة على الأسهم بموجب IFRS 2 وASC 718.
usageTranslations.pt: A despesa com pessoal inclui salários, bônus e pagamentos baseados em ações registrados segundo IFRS 2 e ASC 718.
usageTranslations.ru: Расходы на оплату труда включают зарплаты, бонусы и выплаты на основе акций в соответствии с IFRS 2 и ASC 718.
usageTranslations.ja: 人件費にはIFRS 2およびASC 718に基づく給与、賞与、株式報酬が含まれる。
usageTranslations.it: Le spese per il personale comprendono stipendi, bonus e pagamenti in azioni secondo IFRS 2 e ASC 718.
usageTranslations.vi: Chi phí nhân sự gồm lương, thưởng và thanh toán cổ phiếu theo IFRS 2 và ASC 718.
usageTranslations.hi: कर्मचारी व्यय में IFRS 2 और ASC 718 के तहत वेतन, बोनस और शेयर आधारित भुगतान शामिल हैं।
usageTranslations.th: ค่าใช้จ่ายพนักงานรวมถึงเงินเดือน โบนัส และผลตอบแทนตามหุ้นตาม IFRS 2 และ ASC 718
usageTranslations.id: Beban imbalan kerja meliputi gaji, bonus, dan pembayaran berbasis saham menurut IFRS 2 dan ASC 718.

terms.definition: The risk of legal or regulatory sanctions, material financial loss, or reputational damage an organization may suffer as a result of failing to comply with laws, regulations, codes of conduct, or standards of practice.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Banks must assess compliance risk related to anti-money laundering laws and report breaches to regulators per Basel III and FATF recommendations.

termTranslations.ja: コンプライアンスリスク
termTranslations.th: ความเสี่ยงด้านการปฏิบัติตาม

usageTranslations.en: Banks must assess compliance risk related to anti-money laundering laws and report breaches to regulators per Basel III and FATF recommendations.
usageTranslations.tr: Bankalar, kara para aklamayla ilgili uyum riskini değerlendirmeli ve Basel III ile FATF tavsiyelerine göre ihlalleri düzenleyicilere bildirmelidir.
usageTranslations.fr: Les banques doivent évaluer le risque de conformité lié à la lutte contre le blanchiment d’argent et signaler toute violation conformément à Bâle III et aux recommandations du GAFI.
usageTranslations.de: Banken müssen das Compliance-Risiko im Zusammenhang mit Geldwäschegesetzen einschätzen und Verstöße gemäß Basel III und FATF melden.
usageTranslations.es: Los bancos deben evaluar el riesgo de cumplimiento relacionado con las leyes contra el lavado de dinero y reportar infracciones según Basilea III y FATF.
usageTranslations.zh: 银行必须评估与反洗钱法律相关的合规风险，并根据巴塞尔协议III和FATF建议向监管机构报告违规行为。
usageTranslations.ar: يجب على البنوك تقييم مخاطر الامتثال المتعلقة بقوانين مكافحة غسل الأموال والإبلاغ عن المخالفات للجهات التنظيمية وفقًا لبازل 3 وتوصيات FATF.
usageTranslations.pt: Os bancos devem avaliar o risco de conformidade relacionado às leis de combate à lavagem de dinheiro e reportar violações conforme Basel III e FATF.
usageTranslations.ru: Банки должны оценивать риск несоблюдения законодательства по борьбе с отмыванием денег и сообщать о нарушениях регуляторам согласно Базель III и FATF.
usageTranslations.ja: 銀行はマネーロンダリング防止法関連のコンプライアンスリスクを評価し、バーゼルIIIおよびFATFの勧告に基づき違反を報告する必要があります。
usageTranslations.it: Le banche devono valutare il rischio di conformità relativo alle leggi antiriciclaggio e segnalare le violazioni secondo Basilea III e le raccomandazioni GAFI.
usageTranslations.vi: Các ngân hàng phải đánh giá rủi ro tuân thủ liên quan đến luật chống rửa tiền và báo cáo vi phạm cho cơ quan quản lý theo Basel III và khuyến nghị của FATF.
usageTranslations.hi: बैंकों को मनी लॉन्ड्रिंग कानूनों से संबंधित अनुपालन जोखिम का मूल्यांकन करना और Basel III व FATF सिफारिशों के अनुसार उल्लंघनों की रिपोर्ट करनी होती है।
usageTranslations.th: ธนาคารต้องประเมินความเสี่ยงด้านการปฏิบัติตามที่เกี่ยวข้องกับกฎหมายฟอกเงินและรายงานการละเมิดต่อหน่วยงานตาม Basel III และคำแนะนำ FATF
usageTranslations.id: Bank harus menilai risiko kepatuhan terkait hukum anti pencucian uang dan melaporkan pelanggaran ke regulator sesuai Basel III dan rekomendasi FATF.

terms.definition: A potential obligation that may arise depending on the outcome of a future event, recognized in the notes to financial statements when not probable or measurable, and as a liability when probable and estimable, under IAS 37 and ASC 450.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: A contingent liability is disclosed when a company is a defendant in a lawsuit and the outcome is uncertain at the reporting date.

termTranslations.th: หนี้สินที่อาจเกิดขึ้น

usageTranslations.en: A contingent liability is disclosed when a company is a defendant in a lawsuit and the outcome is uncertain at the reporting date.
usageTranslations.tr: Bir şirket davalı olduğunda ve sonucun belirsiz olduğu durumlarda koşullu yükümlülük finansal tablo dipnotlarında açıklanır.
usageTranslations.fr: Un passif éventuel est mentionné lorsqu’une entreprise est défenderesse dans un procès à l’issue incertaine à la date de clôture.
usageTranslations.de: Eine Eventualverbindlichkeit wird offengelegt, wenn ein Unternehmen in einem Rechtsstreit ist und das Ergebnis zum Bilanzstichtag unsicher ist.
usageTranslations.es: Un pasivo contingente se revela cuando una empresa es demandada y el resultado es incierto en la fecha de reporte.
usageTranslations.zh: 如果公司作为被告卷入诉讼且结果在报告日不确定，应披露或有负债。
usageTranslations.ar: يتم الإفصاح عن الالتزام المحتمل عندما تكون الشركة مدعى عليها في دعوى قضائية والنتيجة غير مؤكدة في تاريخ التقرير.
usageTranslations.pt: O passivo contingente é divulgado quando a empresa é ré em ação judicial e o desfecho é incerto na data do relatório.
usageTranslations.ru: Условное обязательство раскрывается, если компания участвует в судебном процессе с неопределённым исходом на отчетную дату.
usageTranslations.ja: 訴訟で被告となり決算日時点で結果が不明な場合、偶発債務として開示されます。
usageTranslations.it: Una passività potenziale viene indicata quando una società è convenuta in una causa e l’esito è incerto alla data di bilancio.
usageTranslations.vi: Nợ tiềm tàng được trình bày khi doanh nghiệp là bị đơn trong vụ kiện và kết quả chưa xác định tại thời điểm báo cáo.
usageTranslations.hi: कंपनी मुकदमे में प्रतिवादी हो और परिणाम रिपोर्ट तिथि पर अनिश्चित हो तो संभाव्य दायित्व का खुलासा किया जाता है।
usageTranslations.th: หนี้สินที่อาจเกิดขึ้นจะถูกเปิดเผยเมื่อบริษัทเป็นจำเลยในคดีความและผลลัพธ์ยังไม่แน่นอนในวันรายงาน
usageTranslations.id: Liabilitas kontinjensi diungkapkan jika perusahaan menjadi tergugat dan hasilnya belum pasti pada tanggal pelaporan.

terms.definition: A financial metric that measures a company’s ability to service its debt or other fixed obligations, commonly including interest coverage, debt service coverage, and fixed-charge coverage ratios.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: The interest coverage ratio assesses a firm’s ability to meet interest payments from operating earnings.

termTranslations.th: อัตราส่วนความสามารถชำระหนี้

usageTranslations.en: The interest coverage ratio assesses a firm’s ability to meet interest payments from operating earnings.
usageTranslations.tr: Faiz karşılama oranı, şirketin faiz ödemelerini faaliyet kârı ile karşılayabilme kabiliyetini ölçer.
usageTranslations.fr: Le ratio de couverture des intérêts mesure la capacité de l’entreprise à payer ses intérêts avec son résultat opérationnel.
usageTranslations.de: Der Zinsdeckungsgrad misst die Fähigkeit eines Unternehmens, Zinsen aus dem operativen Ergebnis zu bedienen.
usageTranslations.es: El índice de cobertura de intereses mide la capacidad de la empresa para pagar intereses con su beneficio operativo.
usageTranslations.zh: 利息偿付比率衡量企业用经营收益支付利息的能力。
usageTranslations.ar: يقيس معدل تغطية الفوائد قدرة الشركة على سداد الفوائد من أرباح التشغيل.
usageTranslations.pt: O índice de cobertura de juros avalia a capacidade da empresa de pagar juros a partir do lucro operacional.
usageTranslations.ru: Коэффициент покрытия процентов показывает способность компании платить проценты из операционной прибыли.
usageTranslations.ja: インタレストカバレッジレシオは営業利益から利息支払能力を測る指標です。
usageTranslations.it: L’indice di copertura degli interessi valuta la capacità di pagare interessi tramite il risultato operativo.
usageTranslations.vi: Tỷ lệ bảo đảm lãi vay đo khả năng thanh toán lãi từ lợi nhuận hoạt động của doanh nghiệp.
usageTranslations.hi: ब्याज कवरेज अनुपात, संचालन लाभ से ब्याज भुगतान की क्षमता मापता है।
usageTranslations.th: อัตราส่วนความสามารถชำระดอกเบี้ยวัดความสามารถในการจ่ายดอกเบี้ยจากกำไรดำเนินงาน
usageTranslations.id: Rasio penutup bunga menilai kemampuan perusahaan membayar bunga dari laba operasi.

terms.definition: The yield difference between a corporate bond and a government bond of similar maturity and currency, reflecting default risk, liquidity, and other credit risk factors.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: A widening credit spread signals rising perceived default risk in the corporate bond market compared to government securities.

termTranslations.ja: クレジットスプレッド
termTranslations.th: ส่วนต่างเครดิต

usageTranslations.en: A widening credit spread signals rising perceived default risk in the corporate bond market compared to government securities.
usageTranslations.tr: Kredi marjının artması, kurumsal tahvil piyasasında algılanan temerrüt riskinin devlet tahvillerine göre arttığına işaret eder.
usageTranslations.fr: Un écart de crédit croissant indique une augmentation du risque de défaut perçu sur le marché des obligations d’entreprise par rapport aux titres d’État.
usageTranslations.de: Ein steigender Credit Spread signalisiert ein wachsendes Ausfallrisiko im Unternehmensanleihenmarkt im Vergleich zu Staatsanleihen.
usageTranslations.es: Un diferencial de crédito en aumento indica un mayor riesgo de impago percibido en el mercado de bonos corporativos respecto a los gubernamentales.
usageTranslations.zh: 信用利差扩大表明企业债券市场的违约风险相对国债在上升。
usageTranslations.ar: اتساع فارق الائتمان يدل على ارتفاع المخاطر المتصورة في سوق السندات مقابل الأوراق الحكومية.
usageTranslations.pt: O aumento do spread de crédito sinaliza risco crescente de inadimplência no mercado de títulos corporativos em comparação aos títulos do governo.
usageTranslations.ru: Расширение кредитного спрэда говорит о росте риска дефолта на рынке корпоративных облигаций по сравнению с государственными.
usageTranslations.ja: クレジットスプレッドの拡大は社債市場の信用リスクが国債より高まったことを示します。
usageTranslations.it: L’allargamento dello spread creditizio segnala un rischio di default percepito in aumento sulle obbligazioni societarie rispetto ai titoli di Stato.
usageTranslations.vi: Chênh lệch tín dụng nới rộng báo hiệu rủi ro vỡ nợ tăng trên thị trường trái phiếu doanh nghiệp so với trái phiếu chính phủ.
usageTranslations.hi: क्रेडिट स्प्रेड बढ़ना, कॉरपोरेट बॉन्ड बाजार में डिफॉल्ट जोखिम में वृद्धि का संकेत देता है।
usageTranslations.th: ส่วนต่างเครดิตที่กว้างขึ้นแสดงถึงความเสี่ยงผิดนัดชำระที่เพิ่มขึ้นในตลาดตราสารหนี้องค์กรเทียบกับรัฐบาล
usageTranslations.id: Pelebaran credit spread menandakan risiko gagal bayar meningkat di pasar obligasi korporasi dibanding obligasi pemerintah.

terms.definition: A liquidity ratio calculated as current assets divided by current liabilities, indicating a company’s short-term solvency position.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: A current ratio above 1.0 indicates that current assets exceed current liabilities, suggesting sufficient liquidity for short-term obligations.

termTranslations.vi: Hệ Số Thanh Khoản Hiện Hành
termTranslations.th: อัตราส่วนเงินทุนหมุนเวียน

usageTranslations.en: A current ratio above 1.0 indicates that current assets exceed current liabilities, suggesting sufficient liquidity for short-term obligations.
usageTranslations.tr: Cari oran 1’in üzerindeyse, dönen varlıkların kısa vadeli borçları aştığı ve likidite açısından yeterli olduğu anlamına gelir.
usageTranslations.fr: Un ratio de liquidité générale supérieur à 1 signifie que les actifs courants sont supérieurs aux passifs courants, suggérant une liquidité suffisante.
usageTranslations.de: Ein Current Ratio über 1 zeigt, dass das Umlaufvermögen die kurzfristigen Verbindlichkeiten übersteigt und somit ausreichend Liquidität besteht.
usageTranslations.es: Un ratio de liquidez corriente superior a 1 indica que los activos corrientes superan los pasivos corrientes, mostrando liquidez suficiente.
usageTranslations.zh: 流动比率大于1表明流动资产大于流动负债，流动性充足。
usageTranslations.ar: نسبة السيولة الجارية فوق 1 تعني أن الأصول المتداولة تتجاوز الالتزامات المتداولة، مما يشير إلى توفر سيولة كافية.
usageTranslations.pt: Índice de liquidez corrente acima de 1 indica que os ativos circulantes superam os passivos circulantes, sugerindo liquidez suficiente.
usageTranslations.ru: Коэффициент текущей ликвидности выше 1 говорит о превышении оборотных активов над краткосрочными обязательствами, что свидетельствует о достаточной ликвидности.
usageTranslations.ja: 流動比率が1を超えていれば、流動資産が流動負債を上回り、短期債務に対する十分な流動性があると示される。
usageTranslations.it: Un indice di liquidità corrente superiore a 1 indica che le attività correnti superano le passività correnti, suggerendo liquidità sufficiente.
usageTranslations.vi: Hệ số thanh khoản hiện hành trên 1 cho thấy tài sản ngắn hạn lớn hơn nợ ngắn hạn, đảm bảo thanh khoản đủ.
usageTranslations.hi: चालू अनुपात 1 से अधिक होने पर यह दर्शाता है कि चालू संपत्तियां चालू दायित्वों से अधिक हैं, जिससे अल्पकालिक दायित्वों के लिए पर्याप्त तरलता होती है।
usageTranslations.th: อัตราส่วนเงินทุนหมุนเวียนมากกว่า 1 หมายถึงสินทรัพย์หมุนเวียนมากกว่าหนี้สินหมุนเวียน บ่งบอกถึงสภาพคล่องเพียงพอสำหรับภาระผูกพันระยะสั้น
usageTranslations.id: Rasio lancar di atas 1 menunjukkan aset lancar melebihi liabilitas lancar, menandakan likuiditas cukup untuk kewajiban jangka pendek.

terms.definition: A measure of a portfolio’s sensitivity to movements in the overall market, representing systematic risk relative to a chosen benchmark, commonly used in performance attribution and risk management.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: The fund manager reduced beta exposure to limit portfolio losses during periods of elevated market volatility.

termTranslations.ja: ベータ・エクスポージャー
termTranslations.th: การเปิดรับเบต้า

usageTranslations.en: The fund manager reduced beta exposure to limit portfolio losses during periods of elevated market volatility.
usageTranslations.tr: Fon yöneticisi, piyasa oynaklığının arttığı dönemlerde portföy kayıplarını sınırlamak için beta maruziyetini azalttı.
usageTranslations.fr: Le gestionnaire de fonds a réduit l’exposition bêta afin de limiter les pertes du portefeuille pendant les périodes de forte volatilité.
usageTranslations.de: Der Fondsmanager senkte die Beta-Exposure, um Portfolioverluste bei erhöhter Marktschwankung zu begrenzen.
usageTranslations.es: El gestor redujo la exposición beta para limitar las pérdidas de la cartera durante periodos de alta volatilidad.
usageTranslations.zh: 基金经理在市场波动加剧时降低了贝塔敞口，以限制投资组合损失。
usageTranslations.ar: قام مدير الصندوق بتقليل تعرض بيتا للحد من خسائر المحفظة خلال فترات تقلب السوق.
usageTranslations.pt: O gestor reduziu a exposição beta para limitar perdas do portfólio em períodos de alta volatilidade.
usageTranslations.ru: Управляющий снизил бета-экспозицию, чтобы ограничить убытки портфеля в периоды высокой волатильности.
usageTranslations.ja: ファンドマネージャーは、市場の変動性が高まる期間にポートフォリオ損失を抑えるため、ベータ・エクスポージャーを減らした。
usageTranslations.it: Il gestore del fondo ha ridotto l’esposizione beta per limitare le perdite del portafoglio durante periodi di elevata volatilità di mercato.
usageTranslations.vi: Quản lý quỹ giảm phơi nhiễm Beta để hạn chế thua lỗ danh mục khi biến động thị trường tăng cao.
usageTranslations.hi: फंड मैनेजर ने उच्च बाजार अस्थिरता के दौरान पोर्टफोलियो घाटा सीमित करने के लिए बीटा एक्सपोजर कम किया।
usageTranslations.th: ผู้จัดการกองทุนลดการเปิดรับเบต้าเพื่อลดการขาดทุนของพอร์ตในช่วงตลาดผันผวน
usageTranslations.id: Manajer dana mengurangi eksposur beta untuk membatasi kerugian portofolio selama periode volatilitas pasar yang tinggi.

terms.definition: The minimum return required on invested capital, representing the cost of capital multiplied by invested capital, used in performance measurement frameworks such as Economic Value Added (EVA) and regulatory capital models.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Economic profit is calculated after deducting the capital charge from net operating profit after taxes.

termTranslations.th: ค่าธรรมเนียมเงินทุน

usageTranslations.en: Economic profit is calculated after deducting the capital charge from net operating profit after taxes.
usageTranslations.tr: Ekonomik kâr, vergi sonrası net faaliyet kârından sermaye maliyeti yükü çıkarıldıktan sonra hesaplanır.
usageTranslations.fr: Le profit économique est calculé après déduction de la charge de capital du bénéfice d’exploitation net après impôts.
usageTranslations.de: Der wirtschaftliche Gewinn wird berechnet, nachdem die Kapitalbelastung vom Nettobetriebsergebnis nach Steuern abgezogen wurde.
usageTranslations.es: El beneficio económico se calcula después de deducir la carga de capital del beneficio operativo neto tras impuestos.
usageTranslations.zh: 经济利润是在从税后净营业利润中扣除资本费用后计算的。
usageTranslations.ar: يتم حساب الربح الاقتصادي بعد خصم تكلفة رأس المال من صافي الربح التشغيلي بعد الضرائب.
usageTranslations.pt: O lucro econômico é calculado após deduzir o encargo de capital do lucro operacional líquido após impostos.
usageTranslations.ru: Экономическая прибыль рассчитывается после вычета платы за капитал из чистой операционной прибыли после налогов.
usageTranslations.ja: 経済的利益は、税引後営業利益から資本コスト負担を差し引いた後に計算されます。
usageTranslations.it: Il profitto economico si calcola dopo aver dedotto il costo del capitale dall’utile operativo netto dopo le imposte.
usageTranslations.vi: Lợi nhuận kinh tế được tính sau khi trừ chi phí vốn khỏi lợi nhuận hoạt động ròng sau thuế.
usageTranslations.hi: आर्थिक लाभ की गणना, कर के बाद शुद्ध परिचालन लाभ से पूंजी शुल्क घटाने के बाद की जाती है।
usageTranslations.th: กำไรทางเศรษฐกิจคำนวณหลังจากหักค่าธรรมเนียมเงินทุนจากกำไรสุทธิหลังหักภาษีแล้ว
usageTranslations.id: Laba ekonomi dihitung setelah mengurangkan beban modal dari laba operasional bersih setelah pajak.

terms.definition: A process or ratio measuring the efficiency with which a company converts its accounting profits or inventory into actual cash flows, often referenced as the cash conversion cycle in working capital management.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Improving cash conversion is vital for ensuring sufficient liquidity, especially in businesses with long operating cycles.

termTranslations.ja: キャッシュコンバージョン
termTranslations.th: การแปลงเป็นเงินสด

usageTranslations.en: Improving cash conversion is vital for ensuring sufficient liquidity, especially in businesses with long operating cycles.
usageTranslations.tr: Nakit dönüşümünü iyileştirmek, özellikle uzun faaliyet döngüsüne sahip işletmelerde yeterli likiditenin sağlanması için kritik öneme sahiptir.
usageTranslations.fr: Améliorer la conversion de trésorerie est essentiel pour assurer une liquidité suffisante, notamment dans les entreprises à longs cycles d’exploitation.
usageTranslations.de: Die Verbesserung der Bargeldumwandlung ist entscheidend für ausreichende Liquidität, insbesondere bei Unternehmen mit langen Betriebszyklen.
usageTranslations.es: Mejorar la conversión de efectivo es vital para garantizar la liquidez, especialmente en empresas con ciclos operativos largos.
usageTranslations.zh: 提升现金转换对于确保充足的流动性至关重要，尤其是在运营周期较长的企业。
usageTranslations.ar: تحسين تحويل النقدية أمر بالغ الأهمية لضمان السيولة الكافية، خاصة في الشركات ذات الدورات التشغيلية الطويلة.
usageTranslations.pt: Melhorar a conversão de caixa é vital para garantir liquidez suficiente, principalmente em empresas com ciclos operacionais longos.
usageTranslations.ru: Улучшение конвертации в наличность крайне важно для обеспечения ликвидности, особенно в компаниях с длинным операционным циклом.
usageTranslations.ja: キャッシュコンバージョンの改善は、特に運転サイクルが長い企業にとって十分な流動性を確保するために不可欠です。
usageTranslations.it: Migliorare la conversione di cassa è fondamentale per garantire liquidità, specialmente in aziende con lunghi cicli operativi.
usageTranslations.vi: Cải thiện chuyển đổi tiền mặt rất quan trọng để đảm bảo thanh khoản, đặc biệt trong doanh nghiệp có chu kỳ vận hành dài.
usageTranslations.hi: नकद रूपांतरण में सुधार करना, विशेषकर लंबी परिचालन चक्र वाली कंपनियों के लिए, पर्याप्त तरलता सुनिश्चित करने के लिए महत्वपूर्ण है।
usageTranslations.th: การปรับปรุงการแปลงเป็นเงินสดมีความสำคัญต่อสภาพคล่อง โดยเฉพาะในธุรกิจที่มีวงจรดำเนินการยาว
usageTranslations.id: Meningkatkan konversi kas sangat penting untuk menjaga likuiditas, terutama pada bisnis dengan siklus operasi panjang.

terms.definition: The rate at which a company expends its cash reserves, typically expressed as a monthly or quarterly amount, commonly used to assess sustainability of loss-making or high-growth firms.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Startups closely monitor cash burn to estimate how many months of operations remain before requiring additional funding.

termTranslations.th: การเผาผลาญเงินสด

usageTranslations.en: Startups closely monitor cash burn to estimate how many months of operations remain before requiring additional funding.
usageTranslations.tr: Startuplar, ek finansman gereksinimi doğmadan önce kaç ay operasyon yürütebileceklerini tahmin etmek için nakit tüketimini yakından takip eder.
usageTranslations.fr: Les startups surveillent attentivement le brûlage de trésorerie pour estimer le nombre de mois restants avant de devoir lever des fonds supplémentaires.
usageTranslations.de: Start-ups überwachen den Cash Burn genau, um abzuschätzen, wie viele Monate Betrieb vor einer weiteren Finanzierungsrunde verbleiben.
usageTranslations.es: Las startups monitorizan la quema de efectivo para calcular cuántos meses de operaciones quedan antes de necesitar financiación adicional.
usageTranslations.zh: 初创公司密切关注现金消耗，以估算在需要额外融资前还能运营几个月。
usageTranslations.ar: تراقب الشركات الناشئة عن كثب معدل استهلاك النقدية لتقدير عدد الأشهر المتبقية قبل الحاجة إلى تمويل إضافي.
usageTranslations.pt: Startups monitoram de perto o consumo de caixa para estimar quantos meses de operação restam antes de necessitar novo aporte.
usageTranslations.ru: Стартапы внимательно отслеживают сжигание денежных средств, чтобы оценить, на сколько месяцев хватит денег до следующего раунда финансирования.
usageTranslations.ja: スタートアップはキャッシュバーンを注視し、追加資金調達前に残り何カ月運営できるかを推計します。
usageTranslations.it: Le startup monitorano attentamente il consumo di cassa per stimare i mesi di autonomia prima di dover raccogliere nuovi fondi.
usageTranslations.vi: Các startup giám sát chặt chẽ mức đốt tiền mặt để ước tính số tháng hoạt động còn lại trước khi cần gọi vốn bổ sung.
usageTranslations.hi: स्टार्टअप्स नकद जलने की दर को निकटता से मॉनिटर करते हैं ताकि वे अनुमान लगा सकें कि अतिरिक्त फंडिंग की आवश्यकता से पहले कितने महीने का संचालन बचा है।
usageTranslations.th: สตาร์ทอัพติดตามการเผาผลาญเงินสดอย่างใกล้ชิดเพื่อประมาณระยะเวลาที่เหลือก่อนขอทุนเพิ่มเติม
usageTranslations.id: Startup secara ketat memantau pembakaran kas untuk memperkirakan berapa bulan operasi tersisa sebelum butuh pendanaan tambahan.

terms.definition: A balance sheet account arising from temporary differences between the tax base of assets and liabilities and their carrying amounts in financial statements, resulting in deferred tax assets or liabilities as per IAS 12 and ASC 740.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Deferred tax liabilities arise when taxable income is lower in the current period due to timing differences, but will reverse in future periods.

termTranslations.th: ภาษีเงินได้รอตัดบัญชี

usageTranslations.en: Deferred tax liabilities arise when taxable income is lower in the current period due to timing differences, but will reverse in future periods.
usageTranslations.tr: Ertelenmiş vergi yükümlülükleri, cari dönemde geçici farklar nedeniyle vergilendirilebilir gelirin düşük olmasından kaynaklanır ve sonraki dönemlerde tersine döner.
usageTranslations.fr: Les passifs d’impôt différé apparaissent lorsque le revenu imposable est inférieur à cause des différences temporelles, mais se renverseront à l’avenir.
usageTranslations.de: Latente Steuerschulden entstehen, wenn das zu versteuernde Einkommen aufgrund temporärer Unterschiede niedriger ist und sich in späteren Perioden umkehrt.
usageTranslations.es: Los pasivos por impuesto diferido surgen cuando la renta imponible es menor en el periodo actual por diferencias temporales, revirtiéndose en el futuro.
usageTranslations.zh: 递延所得税负债因期间性差异导致本期应纳税所得减少，但未来期间会转回。
usageTranslations.ar: تنشأ التزامات الضريبة المؤجلة عندما يكون الدخل الخاضع للضريبة أقل في الفترة الحالية بسبب الفروقات المؤقتة وسينعكس في الفترات المستقبلية.
usageTranslations.pt: Passivos de imposto diferido surgem quando a renda tributável é menor no período corrente por diferenças temporárias, revertendo-se no futuro.
usageTranslations.ru: Отложенные налоговые обязательства возникают при временных разницах, когда налогооблагаемый доход в текущем периоде ниже, но впоследствии увеличится.
usageTranslations.ja: 繰延税金負債は、一時的差異により当期の課税所得が低い場合に発生し、将来期間で反転します。
usageTranslations.it: Le passività fiscali differite sorgono quando il reddito imponibile è inferiore nel periodo corrente a causa di differenze temporanee, ma si invertiranno nei periodi successivi.
usageTranslations.vi: Thuế hoãn lại phát sinh khi thu nhập chịu thuế thấp hơn do chênh lệch thời gian và sẽ đảo chiều trong tương lai.
usageTranslations.hi: स्थगित कर दायित्व तब उत्पन्न होता है जब अस्थायी अंतर के कारण चालू अवधि में कर योग्य आय कम होती है, लेकिन आगे उलट जाएगी।
usageTranslations.th: ภาษีเงินได้รอตัดบัญชีเกิดขึ้นเมื่อกำไรสุทธิเพื่อเสียภาษีต่ำกว่าในงวดปัจจุบันจากความแตกต่างของเวลา และจะกลับรายการในอนาคต
usageTranslations.id: Kewajiban pajak tangguhan muncul ketika laba kena pajak lebih rendah pada periode berjalan akibat perbedaan waktu, namun akan berbalik di periode mendatang.

terms.definition: The systematic allocation of the cost of a tangible fixed asset over its useful life, in accordance with IAS 16 and ASC 360, recognized as an operating expense.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Depreciation expense is calculated annually for property, plant, and equipment based on the straight-line or other accepted methods.

termTranslations.th: ค่าเสื่อมราคา

usageTranslations.en: Depreciation expense is calculated annually for property, plant, and equipment based on the straight-line or other accepted methods.
usageTranslations.tr: Amortisman gideri, maddi duran varlıklar için doğrusal ya da kabul görmüş diğer yöntemlerle yıllık olarak hesaplanır.
usageTranslations.fr: La dotation aux amortissements est calculée chaque année pour les immobilisations corporelles selon la méthode linéaire ou d’autres méthodes acceptées.
usageTranslations.de: Abschreibungsaufwand wird jährlich für Sachanlagen nach der linearen oder anderen anerkannten Methoden berechnet.
usageTranslations.es: El gasto por depreciación se calcula anualmente para propiedades, planta y equipo, según el método lineal u otros métodos aceptados.
usageTranslations.zh: 折旧费用按年为固定资产采用直线法或其他认可方法计提。
usageTranslations.ar: يتم حساب مصروف الإهلاك سنويًا للأصول الثابتة وفقًا لطريقة القسط الثابت أو الطرق المقبولة الأخرى.
usageTranslations.pt: A despesa de depreciação é calculada anualmente para ativos imobilizados com base no método linear ou outros aceitos.
usageTranslations.ru: Расходы по амортизации ежегодно рассчитываются для основных средств по линейному или другим признанным методам.
usageTranslations.ja: 減価償却費は、建物や設備などに対し、定額法または他の認められた方法で毎年算出されます。
usageTranslations.it: Le spese di ammortamento sono calcolate annualmente per gli immobili, impianti e macchinari, secondo il metodo lineare o altri metodi accettati.
usageTranslations.vi: Chi phí khấu hao được tính hàng năm cho tài sản cố định theo phương pháp đường thẳng hoặc các phương pháp được chấp nhận khác.
usageTranslations.hi: मूल्यह्रास व्यय अचल संपत्ति, संयंत्र और उपकरण के लिए प्रतिवर्ष गणना किया जाता है।
usageTranslations.th: ค่าเสื่อมราคาถูกคำนวณประจำปีสำหรับสินทรัพย์ถาวรตามวิธีเส้นตรงหรือวิธีที่ได้รับการยอมรับอื่นๆ
usageTranslations.id: Beban penyusutan dihitung setiap tahun untuk aset tetap dengan metode garis lurus atau metode lain yang diakui.

terms.definition: The interest rate used to determine the present value of future cash flows in valuation models and accounting measurements, including DCF analysis, impairment testing, and pension obligations.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: The discount rate applied in a discounted cash flow model directly impacts the present value of projected earnings.

termTranslations.th: อัตราส่วนลด

usageTranslations.en: The discount rate applied in a discounted cash flow model directly impacts the present value of projected earnings.
usageTranslations.tr: İskonto oranı, indirgenmiş nakit akımı modelinde gelecekteki kazançların bugünkü değerini doğrudan etkiler.
usageTranslations.fr: Le taux d’actualisation utilisé dans un modèle de flux de trésorerie actualisés influe directement sur la valeur actuelle des revenus prévisionnels.
usageTranslations.de: Der im DCF-Modell verwendete Abzinsungssatz beeinflusst unmittelbar den Barwert der prognostizierten Erträge.
usageTranslations.es: La tasa de descuento aplicada en un modelo de flujos de caja descontados impacta directamente el valor presente de los beneficios proyectados.
usageTranslations.zh: 在贴现现金流模型中使用的贴现率直接影响预计收益的现值。
usageTranslations.ar: يؤثر معدل الخصم المستخدم في نموذج التدفقات النقدية المخصومة مباشرةً على القيمة الحالية للأرباح المتوقعة.
usageTranslations.pt: A taxa de desconto aplicada no modelo de fluxo de caixa descontado impacta diretamente o valor presente dos lucros projetados.
usageTranslations.ru: Дисконтная ставка в DCF-модели напрямую влияет на приведённую стоимость прогнозируемых доходов.
usageTranslations.ja: 割引キャッシュフローモデルで用いる割引率は予想収益の現在価値に直接影響する。
usageTranslations.it: Il tasso di attualizzazione applicato nel modello DCF incide direttamente sul valore attuale dei flussi di cassa previsti.
usageTranslations.vi: Tỷ lệ chiết khấu dùng trong mô hình dòng tiền chiết khấu ảnh hưởng trực tiếp đến giá trị hiện tại của thu nhập dự báo.
usageTranslations.hi: डिस्काउंट दर, डीसीएफ मॉडल में अनुमानित आय की वर्तमान मूल्य को प्रत्यक्ष रूप से प्रभावित करती है।
usageTranslations.th: อัตราส่วนลดที่ใช้ในแบบจำลองกระแสเงินสดลดราคา ส่งผลโดยตรงต่อมูลค่าปัจจุบันของรายได้ที่คาดการณ์ไว้
usageTranslations.id: Tingkat diskonto yang diterapkan dalam model DCF secara langsung mempengaruhi nilai kini pendapatan proyeksi.

terms.definition: Forward-looking statements issued by a company’s management, providing projected earnings, revenues, or other key financial metrics for future periods, as per market practice and regulatory disclosure rules.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: The company raised its earnings guidance for the fiscal year in response to stronger-than-expected quarterly results.

termTranslations.th: แนวทางรายได้

usageTranslations.en: The company raised its earnings guidance for the fiscal year in response to stronger-than-expected quarterly results.
usageTranslations.tr: Şirket, beklenenden güçlü çeyrek sonuçları nedeniyle yıl sonu kâr tahminini yukarı çekti.
usageTranslations.fr: L’entreprise a relevé ses prévisions de résultats annuels suite à des résultats trimestriels supérieurs aux attentes.
usageTranslations.de: Das Unternehmen erhöhte seine Gewinnprognose für das Geschäftsjahr nach besser als erwarteten Quartalsergebnissen.
usageTranslations.es: La compañía elevó su guía de resultados anuales tras unos resultados trimestrales mejores de lo esperado.
usageTranslations.zh: 由于季度业绩超出预期，公司上调了全年盈利指引。
usageTranslations.ar: رفعت الشركة توجيه الأرباح للسنة المالية بعد نتائج ربع سنوية أقوى من المتوقع.
usageTranslations.pt: A empresa elevou a projeção de resultados para o ano após um trimestre acima das expectativas.
usageTranslations.ru: Компания повысила прогноз прибыли на год после квартальных результатов, превысивших ожидания.
usageTranslations.ja: 四半期業績が予想を上回ったため、会社は通年業績見通しを上方修正した。
usageTranslations.it: L’azienda ha aumentato la guidance sugli utili annuali in seguito a risultati trimestrali migliori delle attese.
usageTranslations.vi: Công ty đã nâng dự báo lợi nhuận cho cả năm sau khi kết quả quý tốt hơn kỳ vọng.
usageTranslations.hi: कंपनी ने उम्मीद से बेहतर तिमाही परिणामों के बाद वित्तीय वर्ष के लिए आय मार्गदर्शन बढ़ाया।
usageTranslations.th: บริษัทได้ปรับเพิ่มแนวทางรายได้ประจำปีหลังผลประกอบการไตรมาสออกมาดีกว่าคาด
usageTranslations.id: Perusahaan menaikkan panduan laba tahunannya setelah hasil kuartalan melebihi ekspektasi.

terms.definition: The residual profit after subtracting the cost of capital from net operating profit after taxes (NOPAT); used to measure value creation beyond accounting profit, as in Economic Value Added (EVA) frameworks.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: A positive economic profit indicates the firm generated returns in excess of its cost of capital, creating shareholder value.

termTranslations.th: กำไรทางเศรษฐกิจ

usageTranslations.en: A positive economic profit indicates the firm generated returns in excess of its cost of capital, creating shareholder value.
usageTranslations.tr: Pozitif ekonomik kâr, firmanın sermaye maliyetini aşan getiri sağladığını ve hissedar değeri yarattığını gösterir.
usageTranslations.fr: Un profit économique positif indique que l’entreprise a généré des rendements supérieurs à son coût du capital, créant de la valeur pour les actionnaires.
usageTranslations.de: Ein positiver ökonomischer Gewinn zeigt, dass das Unternehmen eine Rendite über den Kapitalkosten erzielt und damit Aktionärswert schafft.
usageTranslations.es: Un beneficio económico positivo indica que la empresa generó rendimientos superiores a su costo de capital, creando valor para los accionistas.
usageTranslations.zh: 正的经济利润表示公司创造的回报超过资本成本，为股东创造价值。
usageTranslations.ar: يشير الربح الاقتصادي الإيجابي إلى أن الشركة حققت عوائد تفوق تكلفة رأس المال، مما يخلق قيمة للمساهمين.
usageTranslations.pt: Um lucro econômico positivo indica que a empresa gerou retornos superiores ao seu custo de capital, criando valor para os acionistas.
usageTranslations.ru: Положительная экономическая прибыль означает, что компания получила доходность выше стоимости капитала, создав стоимость для акционеров.
usageTranslations.ja: 経済的利益がプラスの場合、企業が資本コストを上回るリターンを創出し、株主価値を生んだことを示します。
usageTranslations.it: Un profitto economico positivo indica che l’azienda ha generato rendimenti superiori al costo del capitale, creando valore per gli azionisti.
usageTranslations.vi: Lợi nhuận kinh tế dương cho thấy doanh nghiệp tạo ra lợi tức vượt chi phí vốn và tăng giá trị cổ đông.
usageTranslations.hi: सकारात्मक आर्थिक लाभ दर्शाता है कि फर्म ने पूंजी लागत से अधिक रिटर्न उत्पन्न किया है, जिससे शेयरधारकों के लिए मूल्य सृजन हुआ है।
usageTranslations.th: กำไรทางเศรษฐกิจที่เป็นบวกหมายถึงบริษัทสร้างผลตอบแทนสูงกว่าต้นทุนเงินทุน สร้างมูลค่าให้ผู้ถือหุ้น
usageTranslations.id: Laba ekonomi positif menunjukkan perusahaan menghasilkan pengembalian melebihi biaya modal dan menciptakan nilai pemegang saham.

terms.definition: The total value of a business calculated as equity market capitalization plus total debt and minority interest minus cash and cash equivalents; used in M&A, valuation, and financial analysis.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Enterprise value provides a comprehensive measure of a company’s total value and is used in acquisition multiples and takeover analysis.

termTranslations.th: มูลค่ากิจการ

usageTranslations.en: Enterprise value provides a comprehensive measure of a company’s total value and is used in acquisition multiples and takeover analysis.
usageTranslations.tr: Firma değeri, bir şirketin toplam değerinin kapsamlı bir ölçüsünü sunar ve satın alma çarpanları ile devralma analizlerinde kullanılır.
usageTranslations.fr: La valeur d’entreprise donne une mesure globale de la valeur totale d’une société et est utilisée dans les multiples de transaction et les analyses d’acquisition.
usageTranslations.de: Der Unternehmenswert bietet eine umfassende Kennzahl für den Gesamtwert eines Unternehmens und wird bei Übernahmen und Bewertungskennzahlen verwendet.
usageTranslations.es: El valor empresarial brinda una medida integral del valor total de una compañía y se utiliza en múltiplos de adquisición y análisis de adquisiciones.
usageTranslations.zh: 企业价值是公司总价值的综合衡量指标，用于并购估值和收购分析。
usageTranslations.ar: توفر قيمة المنشأة مقياسًا شاملاً للقيمة الكلية للشركة وتستخدم في معاملات الاستحواذ والتحليل.
usageTranslations.pt: O valor da empresa fornece uma medida abrangente do valor total da companhia e é utilizado em múltiplos de aquisição e análise de aquisições.
usageTranslations.ru: Стоимость предприятия — это комплексная мера общей стоимости компании, используемая при расчетах мультипликаторов и анализе поглощений.
usageTranslations.ja: 企業価値は企業の総合的な価値を示し、買収マルチプルやTOB分析で利用される。
usageTranslations.it: Il valore d’impresa rappresenta una misura complessiva del valore totale dell’azienda e viene usato nei multipli di acquisizione e nelle analisi di takeover.
usageTranslations.vi: Giá trị doanh nghiệp cung cấp thước đo tổng thể về tổng giá trị công ty và dùng trong phân tích thương vụ mua lại.
usageTranslations.hi: एंटरप्राइज वैल्यू कंपनी के कुल मूल्य का समग्र माप प्रदान करता है और अधिग्रहण मल्टीपल्स व अधिग्रहण विश्लेषण में प्रयुक्त होता है।
usageTranslations.th: มูลค่ากิจการให้การวัดมูลค่ารวมของบริษัทแบบครอบคลุมและใช้ในตัวคูณกิจการและการวิเคราะห์การเข้าซื้อกิจการ
usageTranslations.id: Nilai perusahaan memberikan ukuran komprehensif nilai total dan digunakan dalam analisis pengambilalihan serta kelipatan akuisisi.

terms.definition: The value of a company’s shareholders’ equity, calculated as market capitalization (shares outstanding times share price); used in valuation, reporting, and as a component of enterprise value.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Equity value increases when the company’s share price rises or when new shares are issued at a premium.

termTranslations.vi: Giá Trị Vốn Chủ Sở Hữu
termTranslations.th: มูลค่าหุ้น

usageTranslations.en: Equity value increases when the company’s share price rises or when new shares are issued at a premium.
usageTranslations.tr: Özkaynak değeri, şirketin hisse fiyatı yükseldiğinde veya yeni hisseler primli olarak ihraç edildiğinde artar.
usageTranslations.fr: La valeur des capitaux propres augmente lorsque le cours de l’action monte ou que de nouvelles actions sont émises avec une prime.
usageTranslations.de: Der Eigenkapitalwert steigt, wenn der Aktienkurs des Unternehmens steigt oder neue Aktien mit Aufschlag ausgegeben werden.
usageTranslations.es: El valor patrimonial aumenta cuando sube el precio de la acción o se emiten nuevas acciones con prima.
usageTranslations.zh: 公司股价上涨或以溢价发行新股时，股权价值会增加。
usageTranslations.ar: تزداد قيمة حقوق الملكية عندما يرتفع سعر سهم الشركة أو تصدر أسهم جديدة بعلاوة.
usageTranslations.pt: O valor patrimonial aumenta quando o preço das ações sobe ou quando novas ações são emitidas com ágio.
usageTranslations.ru: Стоимость собственного капитала увеличивается при росте цены акций компании или выпуске новых акций с премией.
usageTranslations.ja: 株価が上昇するか、新株がプレミアムで発行されると株主価値が増加します。
usageTranslations.it: Il valore del capitale proprio aumenta quando il prezzo delle azioni sale o vengono emesse nuove azioni a premio.
usageTranslations.vi: Giá trị vốn chủ sở hữu tăng khi giá cổ phiếu công ty tăng hoặc phát hành cổ phiếu mới với giá cao.
usageTranslations.hi: इक्विटी वैल्यू तब बढ़ती है जब कंपनी के शेयर की कीमत बढ़ती है या नए शेयर प्रीमियम पर जारी किए जाते हैं।
usageTranslations.th: มูลค่าหุ้นเพิ่มขึ้นเมื่อราคาหุ้นบริษัทสูงขึ้นหรือมีการออกหุ้นใหม่ในราคาสูง
usageTranslations.id: Nilai ekuitas meningkat ketika harga saham perusahaan naik atau saat saham baru diterbitkan dengan premi.

terms.definition: A standardized metric expressing the total operating expenses of a fund or investment product as a percentage of its average assets under management, used for comparative performance and fee disclosure.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: The fund’s expense ratio declined year-over-year, improving its competitive position relative to peer mutual funds.

termTranslations.th: อัตราส่วนค่าใช้จ่าย

usageTranslations.en: The fund’s expense ratio declined year-over-year, improving its competitive position relative to peer mutual funds.
usageTranslations.tr: Fonun gider oranı yıldan yıla azaldı ve benzer yatırım fonlarına göre rekabet gücünü artırdı.
usageTranslations.fr: Le ratio de frais du fonds a diminué d’une année sur l’autre, améliorant sa compétitivité par rapport aux fonds similaires.
usageTranslations.de: Die Kostenquote des Fonds ging im Jahresvergleich zurück und verbesserte seine Wettbewerbsposition gegenüber vergleichbaren Fonds.
usageTranslations.es: La ratio de gastos del fondo disminuyó interanualmente, mejorando su competitividad frente a fondos similares.
usageTranslations.zh: 该基金的费用率同比下降，提升了与同类基金的竞争力。
usageTranslations.ar: انخفضت نسبة المصروفات للصندوق سنة بعد أخرى، مما حسّن وضعه التنافسي مقارنةً بالصناديق النظيرة.
usageTranslations.pt: O índice de despesas do fundo caiu ano a ano, melhorando sua posição competitiva em relação aos fundos concorrentes.
usageTranslations.ru: Коэффициент расходов фонда снизился в годовом выражении, повысив его конкурентоспособность среди аналогичных фондов.
usageTranslations.ja: ファンドの経費率は前年比で減少し、同業他社に対する競争力が向上した。
usageTranslations.it: Il rapporto delle spese del fondo è diminuito anno su anno, migliorando la sua posizione rispetto ai fondi concorrenti.
usageTranslations.vi: Tỷ lệ chi phí của quỹ giảm qua từng năm, giúp nâng cao vị thế cạnh tranh so với các quỹ cùng loại.
usageTranslations.hi: फंड का व्यय अनुपात साल-दर-साल घट गया, जिससे इसकी प्रतिस्पर्धात्मक स्थिति बेहतर हुई।
usageTranslations.th: อัตราส่วนค่าใช้จ่ายของกองทุนลดลงเมื่อเทียบปีต่อปี เพิ่มความสามารถในการแข่งขันเมื่อเทียบกับกองทุนรวมคู่แข่ง
usageTranslations.id: Rasio beban dana menurun dari tahun ke tahun, meningkatkan posisi kompetitifnya dibandingkan reksa dana sejenis.

terms.definition: A reserve of highly liquid assets held to meet short-term obligations or cover unexpected cash outflows, as required by regulatory standards such as Basel III LCR and operational risk management frameworks.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Banks are required to maintain a liquidity buffer to ensure they can meet withdrawal demands during periods of market stress as mandated by Basel III.

termTranslations.th: บัฟเฟอร์สภาพคล่อง

usageTranslations.en: Banks are required to maintain a liquidity buffer to ensure they can meet withdrawal demands during periods of market stress as mandated by Basel III.
usageTranslations.tr: Bankalar, Basel III gereği piyasa stresi dönemlerinde çekim taleplerini karşılamak için likidite tamponu bulundurmak zorundadır.
usageTranslations.fr: Les banques doivent détenir un coussin de liquidité pour répondre aux demandes de retrait en période de tension sur les marchés selon Bâle III.
usageTranslations.de: Banken müssen gemäß Basel III einen Liquiditätspuffer halten, um in Stressphasen Auszahlungsanforderungen erfüllen zu können.
usageTranslations.es: Los bancos deben mantener un colchón de liquidez para satisfacer demandas de retiros en períodos de tensión de mercado, según Basilea III.
usageTranslations.zh: 根据巴塞尔协议III，银行必须保有流动性缓冲，以应对市场压力时期的提款需求。
usageTranslations.ar: يجب على البنوك الاحتفاظ بمخزون السيولة لضمان تلبية طلبات السحب في أوقات ضغوط السوق حسب بازل 3.
usageTranslations.pt: Bancos devem manter um colchão de liquidez para atender saques em períodos de estresse de mercado conforme Basel III.
usageTranslations.ru: Банки обязаны поддерживать ликвидный буфер для удовлетворения требований на снятие средств в периоды рыночного стресса по стандарту Базель III.
usageTranslations.ja: バーゼルIIIの規定により、銀行は市場ストレス時の引き出し要求に対応するため流動性バッファーを維持しなければならない。
usageTranslations.it: Le banche sono tenute a mantenere un buffer di liquidità per soddisfare le richieste di prelievo durante le fasi di stress di mercato secondo Basilea III.
usageTranslations.vi: Các ngân hàng phải duy trì vùng đệm thanh khoản để đảm bảo có thể đáp ứng nhu cầu rút tiền trong thời kỳ căng thẳng thị trường theo Basel III.
usageTranslations.hi: बैंकों को Basel III के अनुसार, बाज़ार तनाव के समय निकासी मांग पूरी करने हेतु तरलता बफ़र रखना आवश्यक है।
usageTranslations.th: ธนาคารต้องรักษาบัฟเฟอร์สภาพคล่องเพื่อให้สามารถรองรับการถอนเงินในช่วงวิกฤตตลาดตามข้อกำหนดของ Basel III
usageTranslations.id: Bank diwajibkan menjaga penyangga likuiditas untuk memastikan dapat memenuhi permintaan penarikan saat tekanan pasar sesuai Basel III.

terms.definition: The price that would be received to sell an asset or paid to transfer a liability in an orderly transaction between market participants at the measurement date, as defined by IFRS 13 and US GAAP.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: IFRS 13 requires all assets and liabilities measured at fair value to be disclosed with reference to the relevant input hierarchy.

termTranslations.th: มูลค่ายุติธรรม

usageTranslations.en: IFRS 13 requires all assets and liabilities measured at fair value to be disclosed with reference to the relevant input hierarchy.
usageTranslations.tr: IFRS 13, gerçeğe uygun değerle ölçülen tüm varlık ve yükümlülüklerin ilgili girdi hiyerarşisi ile birlikte açıklanmasını zorunlu kılar.
usageTranslations.fr: La norme IFRS 13 exige que tous les actifs et passifs évalués à la juste valeur soient présentés avec la hiérarchie des données utilisée.
usageTranslations.de: IFRS 13 verlangt, dass alle mit dem Fair Value bewerteten Vermögenswerte und Schulden unter Angabe der Eingabe-Hierarchie offengelegt werden.
usageTranslations.es: La NIIF 13 requiere que todos los activos y pasivos valorados a valor razonable se revelen con la jerarquía de inputs correspondiente.
usageTranslations.zh: IFRS 13要求以公允价值计量的所有资产和负债，需披露相应的输入层级。
usageTranslations.ar: تتطلب المعيار IFRS 13 الإفصاح عن جميع الأصول والالتزامات المقاسة بالقيمة العادلة مع الإشارة إلى تسلسل المدخلات المعني.
usageTranslations.pt: A IFRS 13 exige a divulgação de todos os ativos e passivos mensurados pelo valor justo com referência à hierarquia dos inputs.
usageTranslations.ru: МСФО (IFRS) 13 требует раскрытия всех активов и обязательств, оценённых по справедливой стоимости, с указанием уровня входных данных.
usageTranslations.ja: IFRS第13号は公正価値で評価されたすべての資産と負債について、関連インプット階層の開示を義務付けています。
usageTranslations.it: L’IFRS 13 richiede che tutti gli attivi e passivi valutati al fair value siano riportati indicando la gerarchia degli input utilizzati.
usageTranslations.vi: IFRS 13 yêu cầu tất cả tài sản và nợ phải trả được xác định theo giá trị hợp lý phải công bố kèm phân cấp đầu vào.
usageTranslations.hi: IFRS 13 के अनुसार, सभी संपत्तियों और दायित्वों की न्यायसंगत मूल्य पर माप के साथ संबंधित इनपुट पदानुक्रम का खुलासा करना आवश्यक है।
usageTranslations.th: IFRS 13 กำหนดให้ทรัพย์สินและหนี้สินที่วัดมูลค่ายุติธรรมต้องเปิดเผยพร้อมลำดับขั้นของข้อมูลอินพุตที่เกี่ยวข้อง
usageTranslations.id: IFRS 13 mewajibkan seluruh aset dan liabilitas yang diukur dengan nilai wajar diungkapkan beserta hierarki input terkait.

terms.definition: A measure of the degree to which a company uses borrowed funds to finance its assets, operations, or investments, amplifying potential returns and risks, often expressed as a ratio of debt to equity or assets.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: High financial leverage increases both the potential return and the risk of insolvency if the company cannot meet its debt obligations.

termTranslations.th: เลเวอเรจทางการเงิน

usageTranslations.en: High financial leverage increases both the potential return and the risk of insolvency if the company cannot meet its debt obligations.
usageTranslations.tr: Yüksek finansal kaldıraç, potansiyel getiriyi artırırken, şirketin borç yükümlülüklerini yerine getirememesi halinde iflas riskini de yükseltir.
usageTranslations.fr: Un effet de levier financier élevé accroît à la fois le rendement potentiel et le risque d’insolvabilité si l’entreprise ne peut pas honorer ses dettes.
usageTranslations.de: Hohe finanzielle Hebelwirkung erhöht sowohl die potenzielle Rendite als auch das Insolvenzrisiko, falls das Unternehmen seinen Verpflichtungen nicht nachkommen kann.
usageTranslations.es: Un alto apalancamiento financiero aumenta tanto el potencial de retorno como el riesgo de insolvencia si la empresa no puede cumplir con sus obligaciones.
usageTranslations.zh: 高财务杠杆既提高了潜在收益，也增加了公司无法履行债务时的破产风险。
usageTranslations.ar: الرافعة المالية العالية تزيد من العائد المحتمل ومخاطر الإفلاس إذا لم تتمكن الشركة من الوفاء بالتزاماتها.
usageTranslations.pt: Alta alavancagem financeira aumenta tanto o retorno potencial quanto o risco de insolvência se a empresa não puder honrar suas dívidas.
usageTranslations.ru: Высокий финансовый рычаг увеличивает как потенциальную прибыль, так и риск неплатежеспособности, если компания не может выполнить долговые обязательства.
usageTranslations.ja: 高い財務レバレッジは、潜在的なリターンと債務不履行時の倒産リスクの両方を高めます。
usageTranslations.it: Un’elevata leva finanziaria aumenta sia il rendimento potenziale sia il rischio di insolvenza se l’azienda non può adempiere ai propri obblighi.
usageTranslations.vi: Đòn bẩy tài chính cao làm tăng cả lợi nhuận tiềm năng lẫn rủi ro phá sản nếu doanh nghiệp không trả được nợ.
usageTranslations.hi: उच्च वित्तीय उत्तोलन संभावित रिटर्न को बढ़ाता है, लेकिन यदि कंपनी ऋण नहीं चुका सकती है तो दिवालियापन का जोखिम भी बढ़ जाता है।
usageTranslations.th: เลเวอเรจทางการเงินสูงเพิ่มทั้งผลตอบแทนที่อาจเกิดขึ้นและความเสี่ยงในการล้มละลายหากบริษัทไม่สามารถชำระหนี้ได้
usageTranslations.id: Leverage keuangan yang tinggi meningkatkan potensi pengembalian dan risiko kebangkrutan jika perusahaan tidak dapat memenuhi kewajiban utangnya.

terms.definition: A measure of how closely actual financial or operational results match the corresponding budget, projection, or forecast, commonly assessed using variance analysis in financial planning and performance management.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Management regularly evaluates forecast accuracy by comparing actual performance against budgeted expectations and identifying key variance drivers.

termTranslations.th: ความแม่นยำของการคาดการณ์

usageTranslations.en: Management regularly evaluates forecast accuracy by comparing actual performance against budgeted expectations and identifying key variance drivers.
usageTranslations.tr: Yönetim, fiili performansı bütçelenen beklentilerle karşılaştırarak ve temel sapma nedenlerini belirleyerek tahmin doğruluğunu düzenli olarak değerlendirir.
usageTranslations.fr: La direction évalue régulièrement la précision des prévisions en comparant les performances réelles aux attentes budgétisées et en identifiant les principaux écarts.
usageTranslations.de: Das Management bewertet die Prognosegenauigkeit regelmäßig durch den Vergleich von Ist-Ergebnissen mit den Budgetvorgaben und die Analyse wesentlicher Abweichungen.
usageTranslations.es: La gerencia evalúa periódicamente la precisión de las previsiones comparando el desempeño real con las expectativas presupuestadas y detectando las desviaciones clave.
usageTranslations.zh: 管理层通过将实际业绩与预算预期对比并识别主要差异因素，定期评估预测准确性。
usageTranslations.ar: تقوم الإدارة بتقييم دقة التنبؤ بانتظام من خلال مقارنة الأداء الفعلي بالتوقعات الموازنية وتحديد أسباب الانحرافات الرئيسية.
usageTranslations.pt: A administração avalia regularmente a acurácia das previsões comparando o desempenho real com as expectativas orçamentadas e identificando os principais desvios.
usageTranslations.ru: Руководство регулярно оценивает точность прогноза, сравнивая фактические результаты с бюджетными ожиданиями и выявляя ключевые факторы отклонений.
usageTranslations.ja: 経営陣は実績と予算期待を比較し、主な差異要因を特定することで予測精度を定期的に評価します。
usageTranslations.it: La direzione valuta regolarmente l’accuratezza delle previsioni confrontando i risultati effettivi con quelli previsti e individuando le cause principali degli scostamenti.
usageTranslations.vi: Ban lãnh đạo thường xuyên đánh giá độ chính xác dự báo bằng cách so sánh thực tế với ngân sách và xác định nguyên nhân chênh lệch.
usageTranslations.hi: प्रबंधन नियमित रूप से पूर्वानुमान सटीकता का मूल्यांकन करता है, वास्तविक प्रदर्शन और बजट की तुलना करके प्रमुख विचलन कारणों की पहचान करता है।
usageTranslations.th: ฝ่ายบริหารประเมินความแม่นยำของการคาดการณ์โดยเปรียบเทียบผลลัพธ์จริงกับที่ตั้งงบประมาณและหาสาเหตุของความคลาดเคลื่อน
usageTranslations.id: Manajemen secara rutin mengevaluasi akurasi prakiraan dengan membandingkan kinerja aktual dengan anggaran dan mengidentifikasi penyebab utama varians.

terms.definition: A financial metric measuring an entity’s ability to meet short-term obligations using liquid assets. Common types include current ratio and quick ratio, as disclosed under IFRS and US GAAP.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Liquidity ratios are routinely analyzed by creditors and regulators to assess a company’s ability to cover short-term liabilities with available assets.

termTranslations.th: อัตราส่วนสภาพคล่อง

usageTranslations.en: Liquidity ratios are routinely analyzed by creditors and regulators to assess a company’s ability to cover short-term liabilities with available assets.
usageTranslations.tr: Likidite oranları, şirketin kısa vadeli borçlarını mevcut varlıklarla karşılayabilme kabiliyetini değerlendirmek için alacaklılar ve düzenleyiciler tarafından incelenir.
usageTranslations.fr: Les ratios de liquidité sont analysés par les créanciers et les régulateurs pour évaluer la capacité d’une société à couvrir ses dettes à court terme.
usageTranslations.de: Liquiditätskennzahlen werden von Gläubigern und Aufsichtsbehörden regelmäßig analysiert, um die Fähigkeit zur Deckung kurzfristiger Verbindlichkeiten zu bewerten.
usageTranslations.es: Los índices de liquidez son analizados por acreedores y reguladores para evaluar la capacidad de cubrir pasivos a corto plazo.
usageTranslations.zh: 流动比率被债权人和监管机构常规用于评估公司以现有资产偿还短期负债的能力。
usageTranslations.ar: يحلل الدائنون والمنظمون نسب السيولة بشكل دوري لتقييم قدرة الشركة على الوفاء بالالتزامات قصيرة الأجل.
usageTranslations.pt: Índices de liquidez são analisados por credores e reguladores para avaliar a capacidade de cobrir passivos de curto prazo.
usageTranslations.ru: Коэффициенты ликвидности регулярно анализируются кредиторами и регуляторами для оценки способности компании покрывать краткосрочные обязательства.
usageTranslations.ja: 流動比率は、短期負債を資産で賄う能力を評価するために債権者や規制当局によって分析される。
usageTranslations.it: Gli indici di liquidità sono analizzati da creditori e regolatori per valutare la capacità di coprire passività a breve termine.
usageTranslations.vi: Tỷ số thanh khoản được các chủ nợ và cơ quan quản lý phân tích để đánh giá khả năng thanh toán nợ ngắn hạn.
usageTranslations.hi: तरलता अनुपात का विश्लेषण लेनदारों और नियामकों द्वारा किया जाता है ताकि कंपनी की अल्पकालिक दायित्व चुकाने की क्षमता को आंका जा सके।
usageTranslations.th: อัตราส่วนสภาพคล่องถูกวิเคราะห์โดยเจ้าหนี้และหน่วยงานกำกับเพื่อประเมินความสามารถในการชำระหนี้ระยะสั้น
usageTranslations.id: Rasio likuiditas rutin dianalisis oleh kreditur dan regulator untuk menilai kemampuan perusahaan menutupi kewajiban jangka pendek.

terms.definition: A deficiency or combination of deficiencies in internal control over financial reporting such that there is a reasonable possibility that a material misstatement will not be prevented or detected, as defined by PCAOB and SEC.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: The auditor identified a material weakness in the company’s internal controls that could result in material misstatements of the financial statements.

termTranslations.th: จุดอ่อนที่มีสาระสำคัญ

usageTranslations.en: The auditor identified a material weakness in the company’s internal controls that could result in material misstatements of the financial statements.
usageTranslations.tr: Denetçi, şirketin iç kontrol sisteminde finansal tabloların önemli hatalar içermesine yol açabilecek maddi bir zayıflık tespit etti.
usageTranslations.fr: L’auditeur a identifié une défaillance majeure dans les contrôles internes de la société, susceptible d’entraîner des erreurs importantes dans les états financiers.
usageTranslations.de: Der Abschlussprüfer stellte eine wesentliche Schwäche im internen Kontrollsystem fest, die zu wesentlichen Fehlern in den Abschlüssen führen könnte.
usageTranslations.es: El auditor identificó una debilidad material en los controles internos de la empresa que podría dar lugar a errores materiales en los estados financieros.
usageTranslations.zh: 审计师发现公司内部控制存在重大缺陷，可能导致财务报表出现重大错报。
usageTranslations.ar: حدد المدقق ضعفًا جوهريًا في الرقابة الداخلية للشركة قد يؤدي إلى أخطاء جوهرية في البيانات المالية.
usageTranslations.pt: O auditor identificou uma fraqueza material nos controles internos da empresa que pode resultar em distorções relevantes nas demonstrações financeiras.
usageTranslations.ru: Аудитор выявил существенный недостаток во внутреннем контроле компании, способный привести к существенным искажениям финансовой отчетности.
usageTranslations.ja: 監査人は、財務諸表に重要な虚偽記載をもたらす可能性のある社内統制上の重大な弱点を特定しました。
usageTranslations.it: Il revisore ha identificato una debolezza materiale nei controlli interni della società che potrebbe causare errori rilevanti nei bilanci.
usageTranslations.vi: Kiểm toán viên phát hiện điểm yếu trọng yếu trong kiểm soát nội bộ có thể dẫn đến sai sót trọng yếu trên báo cáo tài chính.
usageTranslations.hi: लेखापरीक्षक ने कंपनी की आंतरिक नियंत्रण में ऐसी भौतिक कमजोरी पहचानी जिससे वित्तीय विवरणों में भौतिक गलतियां हो सकती हैं।
usageTranslations.th: ผู้สอบบัญชีพบจุดอ่อนที่มีสาระสำคัญในระบบควบคุมภายในซึ่งอาจนำไปสู่การแสดงข้อมูลที่ผิดในงบการเงิน
usageTranslations.id: Auditor mengidentifikasi kelemahan material dalam pengendalian internal perusahaan yang dapat menyebabkan kesalahan material dalam laporan keuangan.

terms.definition: A quantitative simulation technique using repeated random sampling to estimate the probability distribution of outcomes in financial modeling, risk analysis, and option pricing.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Monte Carlo simulations are widely used in finance to assess portfolio value-at-risk and to model complex option pricing scenarios.

termTranslations.th: มอนติคาร์โล

usageTranslations.en: Monte Carlo simulations are widely used in finance to assess portfolio value-at-risk and to model complex option pricing scenarios.
usageTranslations.tr: Monte Carlo simülasyonları, finans sektöründe portföy riskinin ve karmaşık opsiyon fiyatlamalarının modellenmesinde yaygın olarak kullanılır.
usageTranslations.fr: Les simulations Monte-Carlo sont largement utilisées en finance pour évaluer la value-at-risk d’un portefeuille et modéliser des scénarios complexes de tarification d’options.
usageTranslations.de: Monte-Carlo-Simulationen werden in der Finanzwirtschaft häufig eingesetzt, um das Value-at-Risk von Portfolios zu bewerten und komplexe Optionspreis-Szenarien zu modellieren.
usageTranslations.es: Las simulaciones de Montecarlo se utilizan ampliamente en finanzas para evaluar el value-at-risk de carteras y modelar escenarios complejos de valoración de opciones.
usageTranslations.zh: 蒙特卡洛模拟广泛应用于金融领域，用于评估投资组合的风险价值和模拟复杂期权定价情景。
usageTranslations.ar: تُستخدم محاكاة مونت كارلو على نطاق واسع في المالية لتقييم قيمة المخاطر النموذجية للمحافظ ونمذجة سيناريوهات تسعير الخيارات المعقدة.
usageTranslations.pt: Simulações de Monte Carlo são amplamente utilizadas em finanças para avaliar o value-at-risk de portfólios e modelar cenários complexos de precificação de opções.
usageTranslations.ru: Симуляции Монте-Карло широко применяются в финансах для оценки Value-at-Risk портфеля и моделирования сложных сценариев ценообразования опционов.
usageTranslations.ja: モンテカルロ法は金融分野でポートフォリオのVaR評価や複雑なオプション価格シナリオのモデリングによく使われる。
usageTranslations.it: Le simulazioni Monte Carlo sono ampiamente usate in finanza per valutare il value-at-risk dei portafogli e modellare scenari complessi di valutazione di opzioni.
usageTranslations.vi: Mô phỏng Monte Carlo được sử dụng rộng rãi trong tài chính để đánh giá VaR danh mục và mô hình hóa kịch bản định giá quyền chọn phức tạp.
usageTranslations.hi: मोंटे कार्लो सिमुलेशन का वित्त में व्यापक उपयोग पोर्टफोलियो VaR और जटिल विकल्प मूल्य निर्धारण मॉडलिंग के लिए होता है।
usageTranslations.th: การจำลองมอนติคาร์โลถูกใช้แพร่หลายในทางการเงินเพื่อประเมิน VaR ของพอร์ตและแบบจำลองราคาทางเลือกที่ซับซ้อน
usageTranslations.id: Simulasi Monte Carlo banyak digunakan di keuangan untuk menilai value-at-risk portofolio dan memodelkan skenario penetapan harga opsi yang kompleks.

terms.definition: A measure of financial leverage calculated as total debt minus cash and cash equivalents, divided by EBITDA or another performance metric; reflects the company’s effective indebtedness after netting liquid assets.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Net leverage is closely monitored by rating agencies and creditors, as it accounts for the impact of available cash on the company’s overall debt profile.

termTranslations.th: อัตราส่วนหนี้สินสุทธิ

usageTranslations.en: Net leverage is closely monitored by rating agencies and creditors, as it accounts for the impact of available cash on the company’s overall debt profile.
usageTranslations.tr: Net kaldıraç, mevcut nakdin toplam borç yapısı üzerindeki etkisini gösterdiğinden, derecelendirme kuruluşları ve alacaklılar tarafından yakından takip edilir.
usageTranslations.fr: L’effet de levier net est surveillé de près par les agences de notation et les créanciers, car il prend en compte l’impact de la trésorerie disponible sur la dette globale.
usageTranslations.de: Der Netto-Verschuldungsgrad wird von Ratingagenturen und Gläubigern genau überwacht, da er den Einfluss verfügbarer liquider Mittel auf die Gesamtverschuldung widerspiegelt.
usageTranslations.es: El apalancamiento neto es seguido de cerca por agencias calificadoras y acreedores, pues incorpora el impacto del efectivo disponible en la deuda total.
usageTranslations.zh: 评级机构和债权人密切关注净杠杆率，因为它反映了可用现金对公司总债务状况的影响。
usageTranslations.ar: تراقب وكالات التصنيف والدائنون الرافعة المالية الصافية عن كثب لأنها تأخذ في الاعتبار أثر السيولة المتاحة على إجمالي الديون.
usageTranslations.pt: A alavancagem líquida é monitorada por agências de rating e credores, pois considera o efeito do caixa disponível sobre o perfil de dívida.
