terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Banks are required to maintain a minimum total capital ratio to ensure they have sufficient capital to cover their risk-weighted assets.

termTranslations.th: อัตราส่วนเงินกองทุนรวม

usageTranslations.en: Banks are required to maintain a minimum total capital ratio to ensure they have sufficient capital to cover their risk-weighted assets.
usageTranslations.tr: Bankaların, risk ağırlıklı varlıklarını karşılayacak yeterli sermayeye sahip olmalarını sağlamak için asgari toplam sermaye yeterliliği oranını korumaları gerekmektedir.
usageTranslations.fr: Les banques doivent maintenir un ratio de capital total minimum pour garantir qu'elles disposent de suffisamment de capital pour couvrir leurs actifs pondérés en fonction des risques.
usageTranslations.de: Banken müssen eine Mindest-Gesamtkapitalquote einhalten, um sicherzustellen, dass sie über genügend Kapital zur Abdeckung ihrer risikogewichteten Aktiva verfügen.
usageTranslations.es: Los bancos deben mantener un coeficiente de capital total mínimo para asegurarse de que tienen suficiente capital para cubrir sus activos ponderados por riesgo.
usageTranslations.zh: 银行需要维持最低的总资本充足率，以确保有足够资本覆盖其风险加权资产。
usageTranslations.ar: يُطلب من البنوك الحفاظ على حد أدنى من نسبة إجمالي رأس المال لضمان امتلاكها رأس مال كافٍ لتغطية أصولها الموزونة حسب المخاطر.
usageTranslations.pt: Os bancos são obrigados a manter um índice de capital total mínimo para garantir que possuem capital suficiente para cobrir seus ativos ponderados pelo risco.
usageTranslations.ru: Банки обязаны поддерживать минимальный общий коэффициент капитала, чтобы обеспечить достаточный капитал для покрытия своих взвешенных по риску активов.
usageTranslations.ja: 銀行はリスク加重資産をカバーするのに十分な資本を確保するために、最低限の総自己資本比率を維持する必要があります。
usageTranslations.it: Le banche sono tenute a mantenere un indice di capitale totale minimo per assicurarsi di avere capitale sufficiente a coprire le attività ponderate per il rischio.
usageTranslations.vi: Các ngân hàng phải duy trì tỷ lệ vốn tổng tối thiểu để đảm bảo có đủ vốn cho tài sản có trọng số rủi ro.
usageTranslations.hi: बैंकों को अपने जोखिम-भारित परिसंपत्तियों को कवर करने के लिए न्यूनतम कुल पूंजी अनुपात बनाए रखना आवश्यक है।
usageTranslations.th: ธนาคารต้องรักษาอัตราส่วนเงินกองทุนรวมขั้นต่ำเพื่อให้มีเงินกองทุนเพียงพอสำหรับรองรับสินทรัพย์ที่มีความเสี่ยง
usageTranslations.id: Bank diwajibkan untuk mempertahankan rasio modal total minimum guna memastikan memiliki modal yang cukup untuk menutupi aset tertimbang menurut risiko.

terms.definition: Assets adjusted by a risk weight factor, as prescribed by Basel regulations, to determine the minimum amount of capital that must be held by banks.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: The calculation of risk weighted assets determines the minimum capital banks must hold against unexpected losses.

termTranslations.fr: Actifs Pondérés en Fonction des Risques
termTranslations.ja: リスクアセット（リスク加重資産）
termTranslations.vi: Tài sản có trọng số rủi ro
termTranslations.th: สินทรัพย์ที่มีน้ำหนักความเสี่ยง

usageTranslations.en: The calculation of risk weighted assets determines the minimum capital banks must hold against unexpected losses.
usageTranslations.tr: Risk ağırlıklı varlıkların hesaplanması, bankaların beklenmedik zararlara karşı tutması gereken asgari sermayeyi belirler.
usageTranslations.fr: Le calcul des actifs pondérés en fonction des risques détermine le capital minimum que les banques doivent détenir contre les pertes imprévues.
usageTranslations.de: Die Berechnung der risikogewichteten Aktiva bestimmt das Mindestkapital, das Banken gegen unerwartete Verluste vorhalten müssen.
usageTranslations.es: El cálculo de los activos ponderados por riesgo determina el capital mínimo que los bancos deben mantener contra pérdidas imprevistas.
usageTranslations.zh: 风险加权资产的计算决定了银行应对意外损失必须持有的最低资本。
usageTranslations.ar: يحدد حساب الأصول المرجحة بالمخاطر الحد الأدنى لرأس المال الذي يجب أن تحتفظ به البنوك ضد الخسائر غير المتوقعة.
usageTranslations.pt: O cálculo dos ativos ponderados pelo risco determina o capital mínimo que os bancos devem manter contra perdas inesperadas.
usageTranslations.ru: Расчет активов, взвешенных по риску, определяет минимальный капитал, который банки должны иметь на случай неожиданных убытков.
usageTranslations.ja: リスク加重資産の計算は、銀行が予期せぬ損失に備えて保有すべき最低資本額を決定します。
usageTranslations.it: Il calcolo delle attività ponderate per il rischio determina il capitale minimo che le banche devono detenere contro le perdite inattese.
usageTranslations.vi: Việc tính toán tài sản có trọng số rủi ro quyết định mức vốn tối thiểu các ngân hàng phải nắm giữ đối với các tổn thất bất ngờ.
usageTranslations.hi: जोखिम भारित परिसंपत्तियों की गणना यह निर्धारित करती है कि बैंकों को अप्रत्याशित नुकसानों के खिलाफ कितना न्यूनतम पूंजी रखना चाहिए।
usageTranslations.th: การคำนวณสินทรัพย์ที่มีน้ำหนักความเสี่ยงจะกำหนดเงินกองทุนขั้นต่ำที่ธนาคารต้องสำรองไว้สำหรับความสูญเสียที่ไม่คาดคิด
usageTranslations.id: Perhitungan aset tertimbang menurut risiko menentukan modal minimum yang harus dimiliki bank terhadap kerugian tak terduga.

terms.definition: A methodology under Basel II/III allowing banks to use their own risk assessment systems to calculate capital requirements for credit risk, subject to supervisory approval.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Banks using the internal ratings based approach must obtain supervisory approval and demonstrate robust credit risk modeling.

termTranslations.fr: Approche Fondée sur les Notations Internes
termTranslations.vi: Phương pháp xếp hạng nội bộ
termTranslations.th: วิธีการให้คะแนนภายใน

usageTranslations.en: Banks using the internal ratings based approach must obtain supervisory approval and demonstrate robust credit risk modeling.
usageTranslations.tr: İçsel derecelendirmeye dayalı yaklaşım kullanan bankalar, denetim otoritesinden onay almalı ve sağlam kredi riski modellemesi göstermelidir.
usageTranslations.fr: Les banques utilisant l’approche fondée sur les notations internes doivent obtenir l’approbation du superviseur et démontrer une modélisation solide du risque de crédit.
usageTranslations.de: Banken, die den Internal Ratings Based Ansatz nutzen, müssen eine aufsichtsrechtliche Genehmigung einholen und eine solide Kreditrisikomodellierung nachweisen.
usageTranslations.es: Los bancos que utilizan el enfoque basado en calificaciones internas deben obtener la aprobación del supervisor y demostrar una modelización robusta del riesgo de crédito.
usageTranslations.zh: 采用内部评级法的银行必须获得监管批准并展示强有力的信用风险建模能力。
usageTranslations.ar: يجب على البنوك التي تستخدم نهج التصنيفات الداخلية الحصول على موافقة الجهة الرقابية وإثبات نمذجة قوية لمخاطر الائتمان.
usageTranslations.pt: Os bancos que utilizam a abordagem baseada em ratings internos devem obter aprovação do órgão regulador e demonstrar modelagem robusta de risco de crédito.
usageTranslations.ru: Банки, использующие подход на основе внутренних рейтингов, должны получить одобрение надзорного органа и продемонстрировать надежное моделирование кредитного риска.
usageTranslations.ja: 内部格付手法を用いる銀行は監督当局の承認を受け、強固な信用リスク・モデリングを示す必要があります。
usageTranslations.it: Le banche che utilizzano il metodo basato su rating interni devono ottenere l'approvazione delle autorità di vigilanza e dimostrare una solida modellizzazione del rischio di credito.
usageTranslations.vi: Các ngân hàng sử dụng phương pháp xếp hạng nội bộ phải được cơ quan quản lý phê duyệt và chứng minh mô hình rủi ro tín dụng vững chắc.
usageTranslations.hi: आंतरिक रेटिंग आधारित दृष्टिकोण अपनाने वाले बैंकों को नियामक की स्वीकृति प्राप्त करनी होती है और मजबूत क्रेडिट जोखिम मॉडलिंग प्रदर्शित करनी होती है।
usageTranslations.th: ธนาคารที่ใช้วิธีการให้คะแนนภายในต้องได้รับการอนุมัติจากผู้กำกับดูแลและแสดงแบบจำลองความเสี่ยงเครดิตที่แข็งแกร่ง
usageTranslations.id: Bank yang menggunakan pendekatan berbasis peringkat internal harus memperoleh persetujuan pengawas dan menunjukkan pemodelan risiko kredit yang kuat.

terms.definition: The likelihood that a borrower will default on its financial obligations within a specified time horizon, used in credit risk modeling under Basel frameworks.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Banks estimate the probability of default for each borrower to assess expected credit losses.

termTranslations.th: ความน่าจะเป็นของการผิดนัดชำระหนี้

usageTranslations.en: Banks estimate the probability of default for each borrower to assess expected credit losses.
usageTranslations.tr: Bankalar, beklenen kredi zararlarını değerlendirmek için her bir borçlu için temerrüt olasılığını tahmin eder.
usageTranslations.fr: Les banques estiment la probabilité de défaut pour chaque emprunteur afin d’évaluer les pertes de crédit attendues.
usageTranslations.de: Banken schätzen die Ausfallwahrscheinlichkeit für jeden Kreditnehmer, um erwartete Kreditverluste zu bewerten.
usageTranslations.es: Los bancos estiman la probabilidad de incumplimiento de cada prestatario para evaluar las pérdidas crediticias esperadas.
usageTranslations.zh: 银行为每一位借款人估算违约概率以评估预期信贷损失。
usageTranslations.ar: تقدر البنوك احتمالية التخلف عن السداد لكل مقترض لتقييم الخسائر الائتمانية المتوقعة.
usageTranslations.pt: Os bancos estimam a probabilidade de incumprimento para cada mutuário para avaliar as perdas de crédito esperadas.
usageTranslations.ru: Банки оценивают вероятность дефолта каждого заемщика для оценки ожидаемых кредитных потерь.
usageTranslations.ja: 銀行は各借り手のデフォルト確率を推定して、予想信用損失を評価します。
usageTranslations.it: Le banche stimano la probabilità di inadempienza per ogni mutuatario per valutare le perdite attese.
usageTranslations.vi: Các ngân hàng ước tính xác suất vỡ nợ cho từng khách hàng vay để đánh giá tổn thất tín dụng dự kiến.
usageTranslations.hi: बैंक प्रत्याशित क्रेडिट हानि का आकलन करने के लिए प्रत्येक उधारकर्ता के लिए डिफ़ॉल्ट की संभावना का अनुमान लगाते हैं।
usageTranslations.th: ธนาคารประเมินความน่าจะเป็นของการผิดนัดชำระหนี้ของแต่ละลูกหนี้เพื่อประเมินการสูญเสียเครดิตที่คาดว่าจะเกิดขึ้น
usageTranslations.id: Bank memperkirakan probabilitas gagal bayar untuk setiap debitur guna menilai kerugian kredit yang diharapkan.

terms.definition: The share of an asset that is lost by a lender when a borrower defaults, expressed as a percentage of exposure at default, used in credit risk calculations.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Loss given default is estimated using historical recovery rates on defaulted loans.

termTranslations.vi: Tỷ lệ Mất mát khi Vỡ nợ
termTranslations.th: อัตราการสูญเสียเมื่อผิดนัดชำระหนี้

usageTranslations.en: Loss given default is estimated using historical recovery rates on defaulted loans.
usageTranslations.tr: Temerrütte kayıp, temerrüde düşen kredilerdeki tarihsel geri kazanım oranları kullanılarak tahmin edilir.
usageTranslations.fr: La perte en cas de défaut est estimée à l’aide des taux de recouvrement historiques sur les prêts en défaut.
usageTranslations.de: Die Verlustquote bei Ausfall wird anhand historischer Rückgewinnungsraten ausgefallener Kredite geschätzt.
usageTranslations.es: La pérdida dada la incumplimiento se estima utilizando tasas históricas de recuperación de préstamos en mora.
usageTranslations.zh: 违约损失率通过对违约贷款的历史回收率进行估算。
usageTranslations.ar: يتم تقدير الخسارة عند التخلف عن السداد باستخدام معدلات الاسترداد التاريخية على القروض المتعثرة.
usageTranslations.pt: A perda dada a inadimplência é estimada usando taxas históricas de recuperação de empréstimos inadimplentes.
usageTranslations.ru: Убыток при дефолте оценивается с использованием исторических коэффициентов возврата по дефолтным кредитам.
usageTranslations.ja: デフォルト損失率は、デフォルトとなったローンの過去の回収率を使用して推定されます。
usageTranslations.it: La perdita in caso di inadempienza viene stimata utilizzando i tassi di recupero storici sui prestiti inadempienti.
usageTranslations.vi: Tỷ lệ mất mát khi vỡ nợ được ước tính dựa trên tỷ lệ thu hồi trong quá khứ của các khoản vay bị vỡ nợ.
usageTranslations.hi: डिफ़ॉल्ट होने पर हानि का अनुमान ऐतिहासिक वसूली दर के आधार पर लगाया जाता है।
usageTranslations.th: อัตราการสูญเสียเมื่อผิดนัดชำระหนี้จะประเมินจากอัตราการกู้คืนในอดีตของสินเชื่อที่ผิดนัด
usageTranslations.id: Kerugian saat gagal bayar diperkirakan menggunakan tingkat pemulihan historis pada pinjaman yang gagal bayar.

terms.definition: The total value a bank is exposed to when a borrower defaults, representing the outstanding amount at the moment of default under regulatory capital calculations.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Exposure at default is a critical measure for calculating regulatory capital and estimating expected credit loss.

termTranslations.es: Exposición en el Momento del Incumplimiento
termTranslations.ja: デフォルト時エクスポージャー
termTranslations.vi: Giá trị Phơi bày khi Vỡ nợ
termTranslations.th: มูลค่าความเสี่ยงเมื่อผิดนัดชำระหนี้

usageTranslations.en: Exposure at default is a critical measure for calculating regulatory capital and estimating expected credit loss.
usageTranslations.tr: Temerrüt anındaki maruziyet, düzenleyici sermaye hesaplamaları ve beklenen kredi zararlarının tahmini için kritik bir ölçüdür.
usageTranslations.fr: L’exposition au moment du défaut est une mesure clé pour le calcul du capital réglementaire et l’évaluation des pertes de crédit attendues.
usageTranslations.de: Die Forderung zum Zeitpunkt des Ausfalls ist eine entscheidende Größe für die Berechnung des regulatorischen Kapitals und die Schätzung erwarteter Kreditverluste.
usageTranslations.es: La exposición en el momento del incumplimiento es una medida fundamental para calcular el capital regulatorio y estimar las pérdidas crediticias esperadas.
usageTranslations.zh: 违约时风险敞口是计算监管资本和预期信贷损失的重要指标。
usageTranslations.ar: يعد التعرض عند التخلف عن السداد مقياسًا حاسمًا لحساب رأس المال التنظيمي وتقدير الخسائر الائتمانية المتوقعة.
usageTranslations.pt: A exposição no momento da inadimplência é uma medida crítica para calcular o capital regulatório e estimar a perda de crédito esperada.
usageTranslations.ru: Экспозиция на момент дефолта является ключевым показателем для расчета регулирующего капитала и оценки ожидаемых кредитных убытков.
usageTranslations.ja: デフォルト時エクスポージャーは、規制上の資本計算や予想信用損失の推定において重要な指標です。
usageTranslations.it: L’esposizione al momento dell’inadempienza è una misura fondamentale per il calcolo del capitale regolamentare e la stima delle perdite attese.
usageTranslations.vi: Giá trị phơi bày khi vỡ nợ là thước đo quan trọng để tính toán vốn điều chỉnh và ước tính tổn thất tín dụng dự kiến.
usageTranslations.hi: डिफ़ॉल्ट के समय जोखिम नियामक पूंजी गणना और प्रत्याशित क्रेडिट हानि के आकलन के लिए महत्वपूर्ण माप है।
usageTranslations.th: มูลค่าความเสี่ยงเมื่อผิดนัดชำระหนี้เป็นตัววัดสำคัญสำหรับการคำนวณเงินกองทุนตามกฎระเบียบและการประเมินการสูญเสียเครดิตที่คาดหวัง
usageTranslations.id: Eksposur saat gagal bayar merupakan ukuran penting untuk menghitung modal regulasi dan memperkirakan kerugian kredit yang diharapkan.

terms.definition: A regulatory standard requiring banks to maintain a minimum ratio of Tier 1 capital to total leverage exposure, irrespective of risk weighting, under Basel III.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: The leverage ratio requirement limits excessive leverage by mandating a minimum capital-to-exposure ratio for all banks.

termTranslations.vi: Yêu cầu về Tỷ lệ Đòn bẩy
termTranslations.th: ข้อกำหนดอัตราส่วนเลเวอเรจ

usageTranslations.en: The leverage ratio requirement limits excessive leverage by mandating a minimum capital-to-exposure ratio for all banks.
usageTranslations.tr: Kaldıraç oranı yükümlülüğü, tüm bankalar için asgari bir sermaye/maruziyet oranı zorunlu kılarak aşırı kaldıraç kullanımını sınırlar.
usageTranslations.fr: L’exigence du ratio de levier limite l’excès d’endettement en imposant un ratio minimum de capital sur exposition à toutes les banques.
usageTranslations.de: Die Leverage Ratio Anforderung begrenzt übermäßigen Leverage, indem sie für alle Banken ein Mindestkapital-zu-Exposure-Verhältnis vorschreibt.
usageTranslations.es: El requisito de ratio de apalancamiento limita el apalancamiento excesivo exigiendo un ratio mínimo de capital sobre exposición para todos los bancos.
usageTranslations.zh: 杠杆率要求通过对所有银行设定最低资本与敞口比率，限制了过度杠杆行为。
usageTranslations.ar: يحد متطلب نسبة الرفع المالي من الرفع المالي المفرط من خلال فرض نسبة رأس مال إلى تعرض دنيا على جميع البنوك.
usageTranslations.pt: O requisito de índice de alavancagem limita o excesso de alavancagem exigindo um índice mínimo de capital para exposição para todos os bancos.
usageTranslations.ru: Требование к коэффициенту левериджа ограничивает чрезмерный леверидж, устанавливая минимальное соотношение капитала к экспозиции для всех банков.
usageTranslations.ja: レバレッジ比率要件は、全ての銀行に対して最低限の資本対エクスポージャー比率を義務付けることで、過度なレバレッジを制限します。
usageTranslations.it: Il requisito di leverage ratio limita l’eccessiva leva finanziaria imponendo a tutte le banche un rapporto minimo tra capitale ed esposizione.
usageTranslations.vi: Yêu cầu về tỷ lệ đòn bẩy giới hạn đòn bẩy quá mức bằng cách áp đặt tỷ lệ vốn tối thiểu trên tổng phơi bày cho tất cả các ngân hàng.
usageTranslations.hi: लीवरेज अनुपात आवश्यकता अत्यधिक लीवरेज को सीमित करती है, सभी बैंकों के लिए न्यूनतम पूंजी-टू-एक्सपोजर अनुपात अनिवार्य करके।
usageTranslations.th: ข้อกำหนดอัตราส่วนเลเวอเรจจำกัดเลเวอเรจที่มากเกินไปโดยการกำหนดอัตราส่วนเงินกองทุนต่อความเสี่ยงขั้นต่ำสำหรับธนาคารทุกแห่ง
usageTranslations.id: Persyaratan rasio leverage membatasi leverage berlebihan dengan mewajibkan rasio modal-minimum terhadap eksposur bagi semua bank.

terms.definition: A regulatory capital component under Basel III, referring to Tier 1 capital instruments that are not Common Equity Tier 1 (CET1) but still qualify to absorb losses while a bank remains a going concern.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Banks must report Additional Tier Capital separately from Common Equity Tier 1 to demonstrate compliance with Basel III requirements.

termTranslations.ar: رأس المال الإضافي من الفئة الأولى
termTranslations.th: เงินกองทุนเพิ่มเติมชั้นที่หนึ่ง

usageTranslations.en: Banks must report Additional Tier Capital separately from Common Equity Tier 1 to demonstrate compliance with Basel III requirements.
usageTranslations.tr: Bankalar, Basel III gerekliliklerine uyumu göstermek için Ek Tier Sermaye’yi Ortak Hisse Senedi Tabanlı Sermaye’den ayrı olarak raporlamalıdır.
usageTranslations.fr: Les banques doivent déclarer les fonds propres supplémentaires de catégorie 1 séparément des fonds propres de base afin de respecter Bâle III.
usageTranslations.de: Banken müssen zusätzliches Kernkapital separat vom harten Kernkapital ausweisen, um die Basel-III-Anforderungen zu erfüllen.
usageTranslations.es: Los bancos deben reportar el capital adicional de nivel 1 por separado del capital ordinario de nivel 1 para cumplir con Basilea III.
usageTranslations.zh: 银行必须将其他一级资本与普通股一级资本分开报告，以符合巴塞尔协议III的要求。
usageTranslations.ar: يجب على البنوك الإبلاغ عن رأس المال الإضافي من الفئة الأولى بشكل منفصل عن رأس مال الأسهم العادية للامتثال لمتطلبات بازل 3.
usageTranslations.pt: Os bancos devem reportar o Capital Adicional de Nível 1 separadamente do Capital Principal de Nível 1 para cumprir Basel III.
usageTranslations.ru: Банки должны отдельно отражать дополнительный капитал первого уровня от основного, чтобы соответствовать требованиям Базеля III.
usageTranslations.ja: 銀行はバーゼルIII要件に従い、追加ティア資本を普通株式Tier1資本とは別に報告する必要があります。
usageTranslations.it: Le banche devono riportare il capitale addizionale di classe 1 separatamente dal capitale primario per conformarsi a Basilea III.
usageTranslations.vi: Các ngân hàng phải báo cáo vốn bổ sung cấp một tách biệt với vốn chủ sở hữu phổ thông cấp một để đáp ứng Basel III.
usageTranslations.hi: बैंकों को एडिशनल टियर कैपिटल को कॉमन इक्विटी टियर 1 से अलग रिपोर्ट करना चाहिए।
usageTranslations.th: ธนาคารต้องรายงานเงินกองทุนเพิ่มเติมชั้นที่หนึ่งแยกจากเงินกองทุนชั้นที่หนึ่งตามข้อกำหนด Basel III
usageTranslations.id: Bank harus melaporkan Modal Tambahan Tingkat Satu secara terpisah dari modal inti utama sesuai persyaratan Basel III.

terms.definition: A regulatory system establishing limits on banks’ exposures to individual counterparties or groups, designed to prevent concentration risk as per Basel and EBA guidelines.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: The large exposures framework sets regulatory limits to mitigate the risk of significant losses from concentrated exposures to a single counterparty.

termTranslations.ja: 大口エクスポージャー枠組み
termTranslations.th: กรอบความเสี่ยงขนาดใหญ่

usageTranslations.en: The large exposures framework sets regulatory limits to mitigate the risk of significant losses from concentrated exposures to a single counterparty.
usageTranslations.tr: Büyük maruziyetler çerçevesi, tek bir karşı tarafa olan yoğunlaşmış maruziyetlerden kaynaklanabilecek önemli kayıpları sınırlamak için düzenleyici sınırlar koyar.
usageTranslations.fr: Le cadre des grandes expositions fixe des limites réglementaires pour atténuer le risque de pertes importantes résultant d'expositions concentrées à un seul contrepartie.
usageTranslations.de: Der Großkreditrahmen legt aufsichtsrechtliche Grenzen fest, um das Risiko erheblicher Verluste durch Konzentration auf einen einzigen Kontrahenten zu mindern.
usageTranslations.es: El marco de grandes exposiciones establece límites regulatorios para mitigar el riesgo de pérdidas significativas debido a exposiciones concentradas a una sola contraparte.
usageTranslations.zh: 大额风险暴露框架设定监管限额，以降低对单一交易对手的集中暴露可能导致的重大损失风险。
usageTranslations.ar: يحدد إطار الانكشافات الكبيرة حدودًا تنظيمية للتقليل من مخاطر الخسائر الكبيرة الناتجة عن التركيز على طرف مقابل واحد.
usageTranslations.pt: A estrutura de grandes exposições estabelece limites regulatórios para mitigar o risco de perdas significativas devido à concentração em um único contraparte.
usageTranslations.ru: Рамки крупных рисков устанавливают регулирующие пределы, чтобы снизить риск значительных убытков из-за концентрации на одном контрагенте.
usageTranslations.ja: 大口エクスポージャー枠組みは、単一カウンターパーティへの集中リスクによる重大な損失のリスクを抑制するために規制上の上限を定めています。
usageTranslations.it: Il quadro delle grandi esposizioni stabilisce limiti normativi per ridurre il rischio di perdite significative da esposizioni concentrate verso un'unica controparte.
usageTranslations.vi: Khung tiếp xúc lớn thiết lập giới hạn quy định để giảm rủi ro tổn thất đáng kể từ việc tập trung vào một đối tác duy nhất.
usageTranslations.hi: बड़ी एक्सपोजर रूपरेखा एक ही पक्षकार के प्रति केंद्रित जोखिमों से होने वाले बड़े नुकसान के जोखिम को सीमित करने के लिए नियामक सीमा निर्धारित करती है।
usageTranslations.th: กรอบความเสี่ยงขนาดใหญ่กำหนดขีดจำกัดตามกฎระเบียบเพื่อบรรเทาความเสี่ยงจากการสูญเสียจำนวนมากที่อาจเกิดจากการกระจุกตัวกับคู่สัญญาเพียงรายเดียว
usageTranslations.id: Kerangka eksposur besar menetapkan batasan regulasi untuk mengurangi risiko kerugian signifikan akibat konsentrasi eksposur pada satu pihak lawan.

terms.definition: A capital buffer above the minimum requirement, mandated by Basel III, to ensure banks can absorb losses during periods of financial and economic stress.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Banks must maintain a capital conservation buffer to protect against losses in times of economic downturn.

termTranslations.fr: Coussin de Conservation des Fonds Propres
termTranslations.th: บัฟเฟอร์รักษาเงินกองทุน

usageTranslations.en: Banks must maintain a capital conservation buffer to protect against losses in times of economic downturn.
usageTranslations.tr: Bankalar ekonomik daralma dönemlerinde kayıplara karşı koruma sağlamak için sermaye koruma tamponu bulundurmak zorundadır.
usageTranslations.fr: Les banques doivent maintenir un coussin de conservation des fonds propres pour se prémunir contre les pertes en période de ralentissement économique.
usageTranslations.de: Banken müssen einen Kapitalerhaltungspuffer vorhalten, um sich in wirtschaftlichen Abschwungphasen vor Verlusten zu schützen.
usageTranslations.es: Los bancos deben mantener un colchón de conservación de capital para protegerse de las pérdidas en tiempos de recesión económica.
usageTranslations.zh: 银行必须维持资本留存缓冲以防止经济下行期间的损失。
usageTranslations.ar: يجب على البنوك الحفاظ على هامش حماية رأس المال للحماية من الخسائر خلال فترات الانكماش الاقتصادي.
usageTranslations.pt: Os bancos devem manter uma reserva de conservação de capital para se proteger contra perdas em períodos de recessão econômica.
usageTranslations.ru: Банки должны поддерживать буфер сохранения капитала для защиты от убытков в периоды экономического спада.
usageTranslations.ja: 銀行は景気後退時の損失に備えて資本保全バッファーを維持しなければならない。
usageTranslations.it: Le banche devono mantenere un buffer di conservazione del capitale per proteggersi dalle perdite in periodi di recessione economica.
usageTranslations.vi: Các ngân hàng phải duy trì bộ đệm duy trì vốn để phòng ngừa thua lỗ khi nền kinh tế suy thoái.
usageTranslations.hi: बैंकों को आर्थिक मंदी के समय हानि से बचने के लिए पूंजी संरक्षण बफर बनाए रखना चाहिए।
usageTranslations.th: ธนาคารต้องมีบัฟเฟอร์รักษาเงินกองทุนเพื่อป้องกันการขาดทุนในช่วงเศรษฐกิจถดถอย
usageTranslations.id: Bank harus menjaga penyangga konservasi modal untuk melindungi dari kerugian saat terjadi perlambatan ekonomi.

terms.definition: A variable capital buffer required by regulators during periods of credit growth to protect the banking sector from system-wide risks, as outlined in Basel III.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Authorities activate the countercyclical buffer when credit expansion poses systemic risks to the financial sector.

termTranslations.ja: カウンターシクリカル・バッファー
termTranslations.th: บัฟเฟอร์สวนทางกับวัฏจักรเศรษฐกิจ

usageTranslations.en: Authorities activate the countercyclical buffer when credit expansion poses systemic risks to the financial sector.
usageTranslations.tr: Kredi büyümesi finansal sektöre sistemik risk oluşturduğunda yetkililer karşıtsal döngüsel tamponu devreye alır.
usageTranslations.fr: Les autorités activent le coussin contracyclique lorsque l’expansion du crédit pose des risques systémiques pour le secteur financier.
usageTranslations.de: Die Behörden aktivieren den antizyklischen Kapitalpuffer, wenn das Kreditwachstum systemische Risiken für den Finanzsektor birgt.
usageTranslations.es: Las autoridades activan el colchón contracíclico cuando la expansión del crédito representa riesgos sistémicos para el sector financiero.
usageTranslations.zh: 当信贷扩张对金融体系带来系统性风险时，监管机构会启动逆周期缓冲。
usageTranslations.ar: تقوم السلطات بتفعيل هامش رأس المال المعاكس للدورة عندما يشكل التوسع في الائتمان مخاطر نظامية على القطاع المالي.
usageTranslations.pt: As autoridades ativam a reserva contracíclica quando a expansão do crédito apresenta riscos sistêmicos para o setor financeiro.
usageTranslations.ru: Власти активируют контрциклический буфер, когда расширение кредитования создает системные риски для финансового сектора.
usageTranslations.ja: 当信用拡大が金融セクターにシステミックリスクをもたらす場合、当局はカウンターシクリカル・バッファーを作動させます。
usageTranslations.it: Le autorità attivano il buffer controciclico quando l’espansione del credito comporta rischi sistemici per il settore finanziario.
usageTranslations.vi: Cơ quan chức năng kích hoạt bộ đệm phản chu kỳ khi sự tăng trưởng tín dụng gây ra rủi ro hệ thống cho lĩnh vực tài chính.
usageTranslations.hi: जब ऋण विस्तार से वित्तीय क्षेत्र में प्रणालीगत जोखिम उत्पन्न होता है तो अधिकारी काउंटरसाइक्लिकल बफर सक्रिय करते हैं।
usageTranslations.th: เมื่อการขยายตัวของสินเชื่อก่อให้เกิดความเสี่ยงเชิงระบบกับภาคการเงิน หน่วยงานกำกับดูแลจะเปิดใช้บัฟเฟอร์สวนทางกับวัฏจักรเศรษฐกิจ
usageTranslations.id: Otoritas mengaktifkan penyangga kontraksiklis ketika ekspansi kredit menimbulkan risiko sistemik bagi sektor keuangan.

terms.definition: A supplementary capital requirement imposed by regulators on institutions or exposures posing systemic risks to the financial system, as defined under CRD IV and Basel III.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Authorities may require a systemic risk buffer for banks that could threaten the stability of the entire financial system.

termTranslations.ja: システミックリスク・バッファー
termTranslations.vi: Bộ đệm Rủi ro Hệ thống
termTranslations.th: บัฟเฟอร์ความเสี่ยงเชิงระบบ

usageTranslations.en: Authorities may require a systemic risk buffer for banks that could threaten the stability of the entire financial system.
usageTranslations.tr: Yetkililer, tüm finansal sistemin istikrarını tehdit edebilecek bankalar için sistemik risk tamponu talep edebilir.
usageTranslations.fr: Les autorités peuvent exiger un coussin de risque systémique pour les banques susceptibles de menacer la stabilité du système financier dans son ensemble.
usageTranslations.de: Die Behörden können für Banken, die die Stabilität des gesamten Finanzsystems gefährden könnten, einen Systemrisikopuffer vorschreiben.
usageTranslations.es: Las autoridades pueden exigir un colchón de riesgo sistémico para los bancos que podrían amenazar la estabilidad de todo el sistema financiero.
usageTranslations.zh: 监管机构可要求对可能威胁整个金融体系稳定的银行设立系统性风险缓冲。
usageTranslations.ar: قد تطلب السلطات هامش مخاطر النظامية للبنوك التي يمكن أن تهدد استقرار النظام المالي بأكمله.
usageTranslations.pt: As autoridades podem exigir uma reserva de risco sistêmico para bancos que possam ameaçar a estabilidade de todo o sistema financeiro.
usageTranslations.ru: Власти могут потребовать буфер системного риска для банков, которые могут угрожать стабильности всей финансовой системы.
usageTranslations.ja: 当局は、金融システム全体の安定を脅かす可能性のある銀行に対し、システミックリスク・バッファーを求める場合がある。
usageTranslations.it: Le autorità possono richiedere un buffer di rischio sistemico per le banche che potrebbero minacciare la stabilità dell’intero sistema finanziario.
usageTranslations.vi: Cơ quan chức năng có thể yêu cầu bộ đệm rủi ro hệ thống đối với các ngân hàng có thể đe dọa sự ổn định của toàn hệ thống tài chính.
usageTranslations.hi: अधिकारियों को पूरे वित्तीय तंत्र की स्थिरता को खतरे में डाल सकने वाले बैंकों के लिए सिस्टेमिक रिस्क बफर आवश्यक हो सकता है।
usageTranslations.th: หน่วยงานกำกับดูแลอาจกำหนดให้ธนาคารที่เสี่ยงต่อเสถียรภาพของระบบการเงินทั้งหมดต้องมีบัฟเฟอร์ความเสี่ยงเชิงระบบ
usageTranslations.id: Otoritas dapat mewajibkan penyangga risiko sistemik untuk bank yang dapat mengancam stabilitas seluruh sistem keuangan.

terms.definition: The lowest amount of capital a bank is required to hold by regulators to cover its risks and protect depositors, as specified by Basel III/IV and national regulations.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: The minimum capital requirement ensures banks can absorb losses and continue operating during periods of financial stress.

termTranslations.th: ข้อกำหนดเงินกองทุนขั้นต่ำ

usageTranslations.en: The minimum capital requirement ensures banks can absorb losses and continue operating during periods of financial stress.
usageTranslations.tr: Asgari sermaye yükümlülüğü, bankaların zararları karşılayabilmesini ve mali stres dönemlerinde faaliyetlerini sürdürebilmesini sağlar.
usageTranslations.fr: L’exigence minimale de fonds propres garantit la capacité des banques à absorber les pertes et à poursuivre leurs activités en période de tension financière.
usageTranslations.de: Die Mindestkapitalanforderung stellt sicher, dass Banken Verluste absorbieren und im Stressfall weiterarbeiten können.
usageTranslations.es: El requisito mínimo de capital asegura que los bancos puedan absorber pérdidas y seguir operando durante periodos de tensión financiera.
usageTranslations.zh: 最低资本要求确保银行能够吸收损失并在金融压力时期继续运营。
usageTranslations.ar: الحد الأدنى لمتطلبات رأس المال يضمن قدرة البنوك على استيعاب الخسائر ومواصلة العمل في أوقات الضغوط المالية.
usageTranslations.pt: O requisito mínimo de capital garante que os bancos possam absorver prejuízos e continuar operando em períodos de estresse financeiro.
usageTranslations.ru: Минимальное требование к капиталу обеспечивает способность банков поглощать убытки и продолжать работу во время финансовых стрессов.
usageTranslations.ja: 最低資本要件は銀行が損失を吸収し、金融ストレス時にも運営を継続できるようにします。
usageTranslations.it: Il requisito patrimoniale minimo assicura che le banche possano assorbire le perdite e continuare l’operatività in periodi di stress finanziario.
usageTranslations.vi: Yêu cầu vốn tối thiểu đảm bảo ngân hàng có thể chịu lỗ và tiếp tục hoạt động trong thời kỳ căng thẳng tài chính.
usageTranslations.hi: न्यूनतम पूंजी आवश्यकता यह सुनिश्चित करती है कि बैंक नुकसान सह सकें और वित्तीय तनाव के दौरान संचालन जारी रख सकें।
usageTranslations.th: ข้อกำหนดเงินกองทุนขั้นต่ำทำให้แน่ใจว่าธนาคารสามารถรับความเสียหายและดำเนินงานต่อไปได้ในช่วงวิกฤตทางการเงิน
usageTranslations.id: Persyaratan modal minimum memastikan bank dapat menyerap kerugian dan terus beroperasi saat tekanan keuangan.

terms.definition: The process by which banks and regulators apply the risk-based capital, liquidity, and leverage standards outlined in the Basel III framework.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Basel III implementation requires banks to upgrade risk models, reporting processes, and capital structures to meet new international standards.

termTranslations.fr: Mise en œuvre de Bâle III
termTranslations.th: การนำ Basel III ไปใช้

usageTranslations.en: Basel III implementation requires banks to upgrade risk models, reporting processes, and capital structures to meet new international standards.
usageTranslations.tr: Basel III uygulaması, bankaların yeni uluslararası standartlara uyum için risk modellerini, raporlama süreçlerini ve sermaye yapılarını güncellemesini gerektirir.
usageTranslations.fr: La mise en œuvre de Bâle III exige la modernisation des modèles de risque, des processus de reporting et des structures de capital des banques.
usageTranslations.de: Die Basel-III-Umsetzung erfordert die Aktualisierung von Risikomodellen, Reporting-Prozessen und Kapitalstrukturen.
usageTranslations.es: La implementación de Basilea III exige a los bancos modernizar modelos de riesgo, procesos de reporte y estructuras de capital.
usageTranslations.zh: 巴塞尔协议III实施要求银行更新风险模型、报告流程和资本结构。
usageTranslations.ar: يتطلب تنفيذ بازل 3 من البنوك تحديث نماذج المخاطر، وعمليات التقارير، وهياكل رأس المال.
usageTranslations.pt: A implementação de Basileia III exige a atualização de modelos de risco, processos de reporte e estruturas de capital.
usageTranslations.ru: Внедрение Базеля III требует обновления моделей рисков, процедур отчетности и структуры капитала.
usageTranslations.ja: バーゼルIII実施は、銀行にリスクモデル、報告プロセス、資本構造の刷新を求めます。
usageTranslations.it: L’implementazione di Basilea III richiede l’aggiornamento di modelli di rischio e strutture di capitale.
usageTranslations.vi: Triển khai Basel III yêu cầu các ngân hàng nâng cấp mô hình rủi ro, quy trình báo cáo và cấu trúc vốn.
usageTranslations.hi: बेसल III कार्यान्वयन के लिए बैंकों को जोखिम मॉडल, रिपोर्टिंग प्रक्रिया और पूंजी संरचना में सुधार करना आवश्यक है।
usageTranslations.th: การนำ Basel III ไปใช้จำเป็นต้องอัปเกรดแบบจำลองความเสี่ยงและโครงสร้างเงินกองทุน
usageTranslations.id: Implementasi Basel III menuntut pembaruan model risiko, proses pelaporan, dan struktur modal bank.

terms.definition: The act of meeting all regulatory requirements set out under Basel IV, covering risk-weighted assets, capital adequacy, and disclosure standards.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Basel IV compliance requires banks to adapt internal systems and policies to new risk sensitivity and capital calculation standards.

termTranslations.th: การปฏิบัติตาม Basel IV

usageTranslations.en: Basel IV compliance requires banks to adapt internal systems and policies to new risk sensitivity and capital calculation standards.
usageTranslations.tr: Basel IV uyumu, bankaların yeni risk duyarlılığı ve sermaye hesaplama standartlarına göre iç sistem ve politikalarını uyarlamasını gerektirir.
usageTranslations.fr: La conformité à Bâle IV nécessite d'adapter les systèmes internes et politiques bancaires aux nouvelles normes de calcul du capital.
usageTranslations.de: Basel-IV-Konformität erfordert die Anpassung interner Systeme und Richtlinien an neue Standards zur Risikosensitivität und Kapitalberechnung.
usageTranslations.es: Cumplir con Basilea IV exige adaptar sistemas internos y políticas a nuevos estándares de riesgo y cálculo de capital.
usageTranslations.zh: 巴塞尔协议IV合规要求银行调整内部系统和政策以适应新的风险敏感度和资本计算标准。
usageTranslations.ar: يتطلب الامتثال لبازل 4 من البنوك تكييف الأنظمة الداخلية والسياسات مع معايير جديدة.
usageTranslations.pt: A conformidade com Basileia IV exige adaptar sistemas internos e políticas a novos padrões de risco e cálculo de capital.
usageTranslations.ru: Соответствие Базелю IV требует адаптации внутренних систем к новым стандартам учета риска и капитала.
usageTranslations.ja: バーゼルIV遵守には、銀行内部のシステムや方針を新しい基準に適応させる必要があります。
usageTranslations.it: La conformità a Basilea IV richiede l’adeguamento dei sistemi interni alle nuove regole di calcolo del capitale.
usageTranslations.vi: Tuân thủ Basel IV đòi hỏi các ngân hàng điều chỉnh hệ thống nội bộ và chính sách theo tiêu chuẩn mới.
usageTranslations.hi: बेसल IV अनुपालन के लिए बैंकों को नई जोखिम संवेदनशीलता और पूंजी गणना मानकों के अनुसार प्रणाली व नीति अपनानी होती है।
usageTranslations.th: การปฏิบัติตาม Basel IV ต้องปรับระบบและนโยบายภายในธนาคารให้ตรงกับมาตรฐานใหม่
usageTranslations.id: Kepatuhan Basel IV menuntut bank menyesuaikan sistem dan kebijakan internal dengan standar baru.

terms.definition: The process by which a bank evaluates the adequacy of its capital relative to its risk profile, business model, and regulatory requirements (ICAAP).
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Internal capital assessment allows banks to identify potential capital shortfalls and align buffers with actual risk exposures.

termTranslations.th: การประเมินเงินกองทุนภายใน

usageTranslations.en: Internal capital assessment allows banks to identify potential capital shortfalls and align buffers with actual risk exposures.
usageTranslations.tr: İç sermaye değerlendirmesi, bankaların potansiyel sermaye açıklarını belirlemesini ve tamponlarını gerçek risk maruziyetiyle uyumlu hale getirmesini sağlar.
usageTranslations.fr: L’évaluation interne des fonds propres permet d’identifier les déficits potentiels de capital et d’ajuster les réserves aux risques réels.
usageTranslations.de: Die interne Kapitalbeurteilung ermöglicht es Banken, potenzielle Kapitallücken zu erkennen und Puffer an Risiken anzupassen.
usageTranslations.es: La evaluación interna de capital permite identificar déficits potenciales y alinear colchones con los riesgos reales.
usageTranslations.zh: 内部资本评估使银行能够识别潜在的资本短缺，并将缓冲与实际风险敞口对齐。
usageTranslations.ar: تسمح تقييمات رأس المال الداخلي للبنوك بتحديد أوجه القصور المحتملة في رأس المال.
usageTranslations.pt: A avaliação interna de capital permite identificar faltas potenciais de capital e ajustar buffers ao risco real.
usageTranslations.ru: Внутренняя оценка капитала позволяет банкам выявлять потенциальные дефициты капитала и корректировать резервы.
usageTranslations.ja: 内部資本評価により、銀行は資本不足の可能性を特定し、バッファを実際のリスクに合わせられます。
usageTranslations.it: La valutazione interna del capitale consente di identificare carenze potenziali e allineare i buffer ai rischi effettivi.
usageTranslations.vi: Đánh giá vốn nội bộ giúp ngân hàng xác định thiếu hụt vốn tiềm tàng và điều chỉnh bộ đệm vốn phù hợp.
usageTranslations.hi: आंतरिक पूंजी आकलन से बैंक संभावित कमी का पता लगा सकते हैं और जोखिम के अनुरूप पूंजी रिजर्व रख सकते हैं।
usageTranslations.th: การประเมินเงินกองทุนภายในช่วยให้ธนาคารระบุข้อบกพร่องและสำรองเงินได้อย่างเหมาะสม
usageTranslations.id: Penilaian modal internal membantu bank mengidentifikasi kekurangan modal dan menyesuaikan buffer sesuai risiko nyata.

terms.definition: A regulatory procedure (Pillar 2 of Basel framework) in which supervisors evaluate a bank’s internal capital adequacy assessment and risk management processes.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: The supervisory review process examines a bank’s ICAAP and ensures capital and risk management meet regulatory expectations.

termTranslations.ja: 監督的レビュー・プロセス
termTranslations.vi: Quy trình giám sát xem xét lại
termTranslations.th: กระบวนการทบทวนโดยผู้กำกับดูแล

usageTranslations.en: The supervisory review process examines a bank’s ICAAP and ensures capital and risk management meet regulatory expectations.
usageTranslations.tr: Denetimsel gözden geçirme süreci, bir bankanın ICAAP'ını inceler ve sermaye ile risk yönetiminin düzenleyici beklentileri karşıladığından emin olur.
usageTranslations.fr: Le processus de révision de surveillance examine l’ICAAP d’une banque et s’assure de la conformité de la gestion des risques.
usageTranslations.de: Der aufsichtsrechtliche Überprüfungsprozess prüft das ICAAP der Bank und stellt die regulatorische Einhaltung sicher.
usageTranslations.es: El proceso de revisión supervisora examina el ICAAP del banco y verifica la gestión del riesgo.
usageTranslations.zh: 监管审查程序审查银行的ICAAP，并确保资本与风险管理符合法规要求。
usageTranslations.ar: تقوم عملية المراجعة الإشرافية بفحص ICAAP للبنك لضمان إدارة رأس المال والمخاطر.
usageTranslations.pt: O processo de revisão supervisória examina o ICAAP do banco e garante a conformidade regulatória.
usageTranslations.ru: Процесс надзорной проверки оценивает ICAAP банка и соответствие управления рисками требованиям.
usageTranslations.ja: 監督的レビュー・プロセスは銀行のICAAPを審査し、規制要件の遵守を確認します。
usageTranslations.it: Il processo di revisione della vigilanza valuta l’ICAAP della banca e la gestione dei rischi.
usageTranslations.vi: Quy trình giám sát xem xét lại đánh giá ICAAP của ngân hàng và đảm bảo quản lý vốn tuân thủ quy định.
usageTranslations.hi: पर्यवेक्षी समीक्षा प्रक्रिया बैंक की ICAAP और जोखिम प्रबंधन का मूल्यांकन करती है।
usageTranslations.th: กระบวนการทบทวนโดยผู้กำกับดูแลจะตรวจสอบ ICAAP ของธนาคาร
usageTranslations.id: Proses tinjauan pengawasan menilai ICAAP bank dan memastikan pengelolaan modal dan risiko memenuhi harapan regulator.

terms.definition: Supervisory recommendations and expectations provided to banks regarding internal risk management and capital assessment under Pillar 2 of the Basel framework.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Pillar Two Guidance helps banks understand supervisory expectations for capital planning and stress testing under the Basel framework.

termTranslations.th: แนวทางเสาหลักที่สอง

usageTranslations.en: Pillar Two Guidance helps banks understand supervisory expectations for capital planning and stress testing under the Basel framework.
usageTranslations.tr: İkinci Sütun Rehberi, bankaların Basel çerçevesinde sermaye planlaması ve stres testi için denetim beklentilerini anlamasına yardımcı olur.
usageTranslations.fr: Les orientations du pilier 2 aident les banques à comprendre les attentes des superviseurs pour la planification du capital.
usageTranslations.de: Der Säule-II-Leitfaden hilft Banken, die aufsichtsrechtlichen Erwartungen an Kapitalplanung zu verstehen.
usageTranslations.es: La guía del pilar dos ayuda a los bancos a comprender las expectativas supervisoras.
usageTranslations.zh: 第二支柱指引帮助银行理解监管对资本规划和压力测试的期望。
usageTranslations.ar: تساعد إرشادات الركيزة الثانية البنوك على فهم توقعات الرقابة للتخطيط الرأسمالي واختبارات الضغط.
usageTranslations.pt: A orientação do Pilar 2 auxilia os bancos na compreensão das expectativas de supervisão.
usageTranslations.ru: Рекомендации по второму столпу помогают банкам понять надзорные ожидания.
usageTranslations.ja: 第2の柱ガイダンスは、銀行が規制の資本計画やストレステスト要件を理解するのに役立ちます。
usageTranslations.it: La Guida al secondo pilastro aiuta le banche a comprendere le aspettative dei supervisori.
usageTranslations.vi: Hướng dẫn trụ cột hai giúp ngân hàng hiểu kỳ vọng của cơ quan giám sát.
usageTranslations.hi: पिलर दो मार्गदर्शन बैंकों को नियामक अपेक्षाएँ समझने में सहायता करता है।
usageTranslations.th: แนวทางเสาหลักที่สองช่วยให้ธนาคารเข้าใจความคาดหวังของหน่วยงานกำกับดูแล
usageTranslations.id: Panduan Pilar Kedua membantu bank memahami ekspektasi pengawas.

terms.definition: A class of regulatory capital, recognized under Basel III and IV, that consists of instruments and reserves other than common equity, including certain subordinated debt and hybrid securities, used to absorb losses and support a bank’s resilience beyond Common Equity Tier 1.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Under Basel III, banks must maintain a minimum amount of Additional Tier Capital to enhance loss-absorbing capacity during periods of stress.

termTranslations.th: เงินกองทุนชั้นเพิ่มเติม

usageTranslations.en: Under Basel III, banks must maintain a minimum amount of Additional Tier Capital to enhance loss-absorbing capacity during periods of stress.
usageTranslations.tr: Basel III kapsamında, bankaların stres dönemlerinde kayıpları karşılayabilme kapasitesini artırmak için asgari düzeyde Ek Sermaye Katmanı bulundurması gerekir.
usageTranslations.fr: En vertu de Bâle III, les banques doivent maintenir un montant minimal de fonds propres de niveau supplémentaire pour renforcer la capacité d’absorption des pertes en période de tension.
usageTranslations.de: Nach Basel III müssen Banken eine Mindestmenge an zusätzlichem Kernkapital halten, um die Verlustabsorptionsfähigkeit in Stressphasen zu erhöhen.
usageTranslations.es: Según Basilea III, los bancos deben mantener una cantidad mínima de capital de nivel adicional para mejorar la capacidad de absorción de pérdidas en periodos de tensión.
usageTranslations.zh: 根据巴塞尔协议Ⅲ，银行必须保持最低附加一级资本，以增强在压力时期的损失吸收能力。
usageTranslations.ar: بموجب بازل 3، يجب على البنوك الاحتفاظ بحد أدنى من رأس المال الإضافي من الشريحة لتعزيز قدرة امتصاص الخسائر أثناء فترات الضغط.
usageTranslations.pt: De acordo com Basileia III, os bancos devem manter uma quantidade mínima de capital de nível adicional para aumentar a capacidade de absorção de perdas em períodos de estresse.
usageTranslations.ru: В соответствии с Базелем III банки должны поддерживать минимальный объём дополнительного базового капитала для повышения способности поглощать убытки в периоды стресса.
usageTranslations.ja: バーゼルIIIの下で、銀行はストレス時の損失吸収能力を高めるために、追加ティア資本の最低額を維持しなければなりません。
usageTranslations.it: Secondo Basilea III, le banche devono mantenere una quantità minima di capitale aggiuntivo di livello per rafforzare la capacità di assorbire perdite nei periodi di stress.
usageTranslations.vi: Theo Basel III, các ngân hàng phải duy trì một lượng vốn cấp bổ sung tối thiểu để tăng khả năng hấp thụ thua lỗ trong các giai đoạn căng thẳng.
usageTranslations.hi: बेसल III के तहत, बैंकों को तनाव की अवधियों के दौरान हानि-अवशोषण क्षमता बढ़ाने के लिए न्यूनतम अतिरिक्त टियर पूंजी बनाए रखनी चाहिए।
usageTranslations.th: ภายใต้บาเซิล III ธนาคารต้องรักษาเงินกองทุนชั้นเพิ่มเติมขั้นต่ำเพื่อเพิ่มขีดความสามารถในการรองรับความสูญเสียในช่วงเวลาที่มีความตึงเครียด
usageTranslations.id: Di bawah Basel III, bank harus mempertahankan jumlah Modal Inti Tambahan minimum untuk meningkatkan kapasitas penyerapan kerugian selama masa stres.

terms.definition: The risk that changes in market interest rates will adversely affect a bank’s earnings or the economic value of its assets and liabilities. It is a core element of bank risk management under Basel and regulatory frameworks.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Banks must regularly assess interest rate risk exposures and report stress-test results to regulators under Basel requirements.

termTranslations.th: ความเสี่ยงอัตราดอกเบี้ย

usageTranslations.en: Banks must regularly assess interest rate risk exposures and report stress-test results to regulators under Basel requirements.
usageTranslations.tr: Bankalar, Basel düzenlemeleri kapsamında faiz oranı riski maruziyetini düzenli olarak değerlendirmeli ve stres testi sonuçlarını düzenleyicilere raporlamalıdır.
usageTranslations.fr: Les banques doivent évaluer régulièrement leur exposition au risque de taux d’intérêt et communiquer les résultats des tests de résistance aux autorités de régulation conformément aux exigences de Bâle.
usageTranslations.de: Banken müssen regelmäßig das Zinsänderungsrisiko bewerten und die Ergebnisse der Stresstests gemäß Basel-Vorgaben an die Aufsichtsbehörden melden.
usageTranslations.es: Los bancos deben evaluar periódicamente la exposición al riesgo de tipo de interés y reportar los resultados de pruebas de estrés a los reguladores según Basilea.
usageTranslations.zh: 根据巴塞尔协议要求，银行必须定期评估利率风险敞口并向监管机构报告压力测试结果。
usageTranslations.ar: يجب على البنوك تقييم مخاطر سعر الفائدة بانتظام وتقديم نتائج اختبارات الضغط للجهات التنظيمية بموجب متطلبات بازل.
usageTranslations.pt: Os bancos devem avaliar regularmente as exposições ao risco de taxa de juros e reportar os resultados de testes de estresse aos reguladores conforme Basileia.
usageTranslations.ru: Банки должны регулярно оценивать процентный риск и отчитываться о результатах стресс-тестирования регуляторам в соответствии с требованиями Базеля.
usageTranslations.ja: 銀行はバーゼル要件に基づき、金利リスクのエクスポージャーを定期的に評価し、ストレステスト結果を規制当局に報告しなければなりません。
usageTranslations.it: Le banche devono valutare regolarmente l’esposizione al rischio di tasso d’interesse e segnalare i risultati degli stress test ai regolatori secondo Basilea.
usageTranslations.vi: Các ngân hàng phải thường xuyên đánh giá rủi ro lãi suất và báo cáo kết quả kiểm tra sức chịu đựng cho cơ quan quản lý theo quy định Basel.
usageTranslations.hi: बैंकों को बेसल आवश्यकताओं के तहत ब्याज दर जोखिम का मूल्यांकन और तनाव परीक्षण के परिणाम नियामकों को नियमित रूप से रिपोर्ट करना चाहिए।
usageTranslations.th: ธนาคารต้องประเมินความเสี่ยงอัตราดอกเบี้ยเป็นประจำและรายงานผลการทดสอบความเครียดให้กับหน่วยงานกำกับดูแลตามข้อกำหนดของบาเซิล
usageTranslations.id: Bank harus secara rutin menilai risiko suku bunga dan melaporkan hasil uji tekanan kepada regulator sesuai ketentuan Basel.

terms.definition: Regulatory disclosure requirements under Pillar 3 of the Basel framework, mandating banks to publish information on their capital structure, risk exposures, and risk assessment processes to promote market discipline.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Pillar Three Disclosure enhances transparency by requiring banks to publicly report capital adequacy, risk profile, and governance practices.

termTranslations.th: การเปิดเผยข้อมูลเสาหลักที่สาม

usageTranslations.en: Pillar Three Disclosure enhances transparency by requiring banks to publicly report capital adequacy, risk profile, and governance practices.
usageTranslations.tr: Üçüncü Sütun Açıklaması, bankaların sermaye yeterliliği, risk profili ve yönetim uygulamalarını kamuya açıklamasını zorunlu kılarak şeffaflığı artırır.
usageTranslations.fr: La publication du pilier 3 renforce la transparence en imposant la publication d'informations sur les fonds propres et les risques.
usageTranslations.de: Die Säule-III-Offenlegung erhöht die Transparenz durch öffentliche Berichte über Kapital und Risiken.
usageTranslations.es: La divulgación del pilar tres mejora la transparencia al exigir informes públicos sobre capital y riesgos.
usageTranslations.zh: 第三支柱信息披露通过要求银行公开资本和风险信息提升透明度。
usageTranslations.ar: الإفصاح عن الركيزة الثالثة يعزز الشفافية من خلال متطلبات الإفصاح العام.
usageTranslations.pt: A divulgação do Pilar 3 aumenta a transparência por meio de relatórios públicos de capital e riscos.
usageTranslations.ru: Раскрытие по третьему столпу повышает прозрачность благодаря публичным отчетам о капитале и рисках.
usageTranslations.ja: 第3の柱の開示は、資本やリスクに関する公開報告により透明性を高めます。
usageTranslations.it: L’informativa del terzo pilastro accresce la trasparenza richiedendo la pubblicazione di dati su capitale e rischi.
usageTranslations.vi: Công bố trụ cột ba tăng tính minh bạch bằng cách yêu cầu ngân hàng công khai vốn và rủi ro.
usageTranslations.hi: पिलर थ्री डिस्क्लोजर सार्वजनिक रिपोर्टिंग से पारदर्शिता बढ़ाता है।
usageTranslations.th: การเปิดเผยข้อมูลเสาหลักที่สามช่วยเพิ่มความโปร่งใสโดยบังคับให้ธนาคารเปิดเผยข้อมูลด้านเงินกองทุนและความเสี่ยง
usageTranslations.id: Pengungkapan Pilar Tiga meningkatkan transparansi dengan mengharuskan bank melaporkan modal dan risiko secara publik.

terms.definition: A hypothetical adverse event or set of conditions used to assess the resilience of a bank’s capital, liquidity, or risk profile under severe but plausible scenarios.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Supervisors require banks to run annual stress testing scenarios to measure their capital adequacy against severe economic downturns.

termTranslations.ja: ストレステストシナリオ
termTranslations.vi: Kịch bản kiểm tra sức chịu đựng
termTranslations.th: สถานการณ์การทดสอบความเครียด

usageTranslations.en: Supervisors require banks to run annual stress testing scenarios to measure their capital adequacy against severe economic downturns.
usageTranslations.tr: Denetçiler, bankalardan sermaye yeterliliklerini şiddetli ekonomik dalgalanmalara karşı ölçmek için yıllık stres testi senaryoları yürütmelerini ister.
usageTranslations.fr: Les superviseurs exigent que les banques effectuent chaque année des scénarios de test de résistance.
usageTranslations.de: Aufseher verlangen von Banken jährliche Stresstest-Szenarien zur Prüfung der Kapitalausstattung.
usageTranslations.es: Los supervisores exigen a los bancos realizar escenarios anuales de prueba de estrés.
usageTranslations.zh: 监管机构要求银行每年进行压力测试情景分析，以衡量资本充足率。
usageTranslations.ar: يطلب المشرفون من البنوك إجراء سيناريوهات اختبار الضغط سنويًا.
usageTranslations.pt: Supervisores exigem que os bancos realizem cenários anuais de teste de estresse.
usageTranslations.ru: Надзорные органы требуют от банков ежегодного проведения стресс-тестов.
usageTranslations.ja: 監督当局は銀行にストレステストシナリオの年次実施を求めます。
usageTranslations.it: I supervisori richiedono alle banche di eseguire scenari di stress test annualmente.
usageTranslations.vi: Các cơ quan giám sát yêu cầu ngân hàng thực hiện kịch bản kiểm tra sức chịu đựng hằng năm.
usageTranslations.hi: नियामक बैंकों से वार्षिक स्ट्रेस टेस्टिंग परिदृश्य लागू करने को कहते हैं।
usageTranslations.th: ผู้กำกับดูแลกำหนดให้ธนาคารต้องจัดทำสถานการณ์การทดสอบความเครียดทุกปี
usageTranslations.id: Otoritas mengharuskan bank melakukan skenario uji tekanan setiap tahun.

terms.definition: A risk management technique where banks identify scenarios that could cause business failure, working backwards to pinpoint vulnerabilities and test resilience.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Reverse stress testing helps banks recognize scenarios that would threaten their viability and develop contingency plans for extreme risks.

termTranslations.ja: リバースストレステスト
termTranslations.vi: Kiểm tra sức chịu đựng ngược
termTranslations.th: การทดสอบความเครียดแบบย้อนกลับ

usageTranslations.en: Reverse stress testing helps banks recognize scenarios that would threaten their viability and develop contingency plans for extreme risks.
usageTranslations.tr: Ters stres testi, bankaların varlığını tehdit edecek senaryoları belirlemesine ve aşırı risklere karşı eylem planları geliştirmesine yardımcı olur.
usageTranslations.fr: Le test de résistance inversé aide les banques à anticiper les scénarios extrêmes menaçant leur survie.
usageTranslations.de: Reverse-Stresstests helfen Banken, existenzbedrohende Szenarien zu erkennen und Notfallpläne zu entwickeln.
usageTranslations.es: La prueba de estrés inversa ayuda a los bancos a identificar escenarios que pondrían en peligro su viabilidad.
usageTranslations.zh: 反向压力测试帮助银行识别威胁生存的极端情景，并制定应对计划。
usageTranslations.ar: يساعد اختبار الضغط العكسي البنوك في تحديد السيناريوهات التي تهدد وجودها.
usageTranslations.pt: O teste de estresse reverso ajuda os bancos a reconhecer riscos extremos.
usageTranslations.ru: Обратное стресс-тестирование помогает выявить сценарии, угрожающие устойчивости банка.
usageTranslations.ja: リバースストレステストは銀行の存続を脅かすシナリオを特定します。
usageTranslations.it: Lo stress test inverso aiuta a individuare scenari che minacciano la solidità della banca.
usageTranslations.vi: Kiểm tra sức chịu đựng ngược giúp ngân hàng nhận diện các kịch bản đe dọa sự tồn tại.
usageTranslations.hi: रिवर्स स्ट्रेस टेस्टिंग बैंकों को अस्तित्व संकट वाले परिदृश्य पहचानने में मदद करता है।
usageTranslations.th: การทดสอบความเครียดแบบย้อนกลับช่วยให้ธนาคารระบุสถานการณ์ที่คุกคามความอยู่รอด
usageTranslations.id: Uji tekanan terbalik membantu bank mengidentifikasi skenario yang membahayakan kelangsungan usaha.

terms.definition: A situation or scenario in which a bank faces significant cash outflows or restricted market funding, testing its ability to meet short-term obligations.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Banks model liquidity risk stress to ensure they hold sufficient high-quality liquid assets to survive unexpected funding pressures.

termTranslations.ja: 流動性リスクストレス
termTranslations.vi: Căng thẳng rủi ro thanh khoản
termTranslations.th: ความเครียดจากความเสี่ยงด้านสภาพคล่อง

usageTranslations.en: Banks model liquidity risk stress to ensure they hold sufficient high-quality liquid assets to survive unexpected funding pressures.
usageTranslations.tr: Bankalar, beklenmedik fonlama baskılarına dayanabilmek için yeterli kaliteli likit varlık bulundurduklarından emin olmak amacıyla likidite riski stresi modellerler.
usageTranslations.fr: Les banques modélisent le stress de risque de liquidité pour garantir des réserves suffisantes d’actifs liquides.
usageTranslations.de: Banken modellieren Liquiditätsrisikostress, um ausreichend hochwertige liquide Mittel vorzuhalten.
usageTranslations.es: Los bancos modelan el estrés de riesgo de liquidez para asegurar activos líquidos suficientes.
usageTranslations.zh: 银行通过模拟流动性风险压力来确保持有足够的高质量流动性资产。
usageTranslations.ar: تقوم البنوك بنمذجة ضغوط مخاطر السيولة لضمان توافر الأصول السائلة الكافية.
usageTranslations.pt: Os bancos modelam o estresse de risco de liquidez para garantir ativos líquidos suficientes.
usageTranslations.ru: Банки моделируют стресс ликвидного риска для обеспечения достаточного объема ликвидных активов.
usageTranslations.ja: 銀行は流動性リスクストレスをモデル化して高品質の流動資産を確保します。
usageTranslations.it: Le banche modellano lo stress di rischio di liquidità per garantire riserve sufficienti.
usageTranslations.vi: Ngân hàng mô phỏng căng thẳng rủi ro thanh khoản để đảm bảo có đủ tài sản thanh khoản chất lượng.
usageTranslations.hi: बैंक लिक्विडिटी रिस्क स्ट्रेस को मॉडल करते हैं ताकि अपरिहार्य दबाव में पर्याप्त उच्च गुणवत्ता वाले तरल संपत्ति रहे।
usageTranslations.th: ธนาคารจำลองความเครียดจากความเสี่ยงด้านสภาพคล่องเพื่อให้มั่นใจว่ามีสินทรัพย์สภาพคล่องคุณภาพสูงเพียงพอ
usageTranslations.id: Bank memodelkan stres risiko likuiditas untuk memastikan aset likuid berkualitas cukup tersedia.

terms.definition: A financial institution or corporate entity that is registered and authorized to send and receive financial messages over the SWIFT network, in accordance with SWIFT’s standards and regulations.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: A SWIFT network participant must adhere to strict operational and compliance protocols when sending cross-border payment messages.

termTranslations.th: ผู้เข้าร่วมเครือข่าย SWIFT

usageTranslations.en: A SWIFT network participant must adhere to strict operational and compliance protocols when sending cross-border payment messages.
usageTranslations.tr: SWIFT ağ katılımcısı, sınır ötesi ödeme mesajları gönderirken sıkı operasyonel ve uyum protokollerine uymalıdır.
usageTranslations.fr: Un participant au réseau SWIFT doit respecter des protocoles stricts pour les paiements transfrontaliers.
usageTranslations.de: Ein SWIFT-Netzwerkteilnehmer muss strikte Betriebs- und Compliance-Protokolle einhalten.
usageTranslations.es: Un participante de la red SWIFT debe cumplir estrictos protocolos operativos y de cumplimiento.
usageTranslations.zh: SWIFT网络参与方在发送跨境支付消息时须遵守严格的操作和合规协议。
usageTranslations.ar: يجب على مشارك شبكة سويفت الالتزام ببروتوكولات تشغيلية وتنظيمية صارمة.
usageTranslations.pt: Um participante da rede SWIFT deve seguir rigorosos protocolos operacionais e de conformidade.
usageTranslations.ru: Участник сети SWIFT должен соблюдать строгие операционные и комплаенс-протоколы.
usageTranslations.ja: SWIFTネットワーク参加者は厳格な運用・コンプライアンス手順を遵守しなければなりません。
usageTranslations.it: Un partecipante alla rete SWIFT deve rispettare rigidi protocolli operativi e di conformità.
usageTranslations.vi: Thành viên mạng SWIFT phải tuân thủ quy trình vận hành và tuân thủ nghiêm ngặt.
usageTranslations.hi: स्विफ्ट नेटवर्क सहभागी को कड़े परिचालन और अनुपालन प्रोटोकॉल का पालन करना चाहिए।
usageTranslations.th: ผู้เข้าร่วมเครือข่าย SWIFT ต้องปฏิบัติตามระเบียบการปฏิบัติงานและข้อกำหนดที่เข้มงวด
usageTranslations.id: Peserta jaringan SWIFT harus mematuhi protokol operasional dan kepatuhan yang ketat.

terms.definition: A regulatory adjustment to the fair value of derivative instruments to account for counterparty credit risk, as mandated by Basel III. CVA reflects the market value of counterparty default risk on over-the-counter derivatives.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Banks are required to calculate credit valuation adjustment charges for derivative portfolios to reflect counterparty risk as per Basel III.

termTranslations.vi: Điều chỉnh định giá tín dụng
termTranslations.th: การปรับมูลค่าสินเชื่อ

usageTranslations.en: Banks are required to calculate credit valuation adjustment charges for derivative portfolios to reflect counterparty risk as per Basel III.
usageTranslations.tr: Bankalar, Basel III kapsamında türev portföyleri için karşı taraf riski yansıtacak şekilde kredi değerleme düzeltmesi hesaplamak zorundadır.
usageTranslations.fr: Les banques doivent calculer les ajustements de valorisation du crédit pour les portefeuilles de dérivés conformément à Bâle III afin de refléter le risque de contrepartie.
usageTranslations.de: Banken sind verpflichtet, für Derivateportfolios Kreditbewertungsanpassungen gemäß Basel III zu berechnen, um das Kontrahentenrisiko widerzuspiegeln.
usageTranslations.es: Los bancos deben calcular ajustes de valoración de crédito para carteras de derivados según Basilea III para reflejar el riesgo de contraparte.
usageTranslations.zh: 根据巴塞尔协议III，银行需为衍生品组合计算信用估值调整费用，以反映对手方风险。
usageTranslations.ar: يتعين على البنوك حساب تسوية تقييم الائتمان لمحافظ المشتقات لتعكس مخاطر الطرف المقابل وفقًا لبازل 3.
usageTranslations.pt: Os bancos devem calcular ajustes de avaliação de crédito para carteiras de derivativos conforme Basileia III para refletir o risco de contraparte.
usageTranslations.ru: Банки обязаны рассчитывать корректировку оценки кредитного риска для портфелей деривативов в соответствии с Базелем III.
usageTranslations.ja: 銀行はバーゼルIIIに従い、デリバティブ・ポートフォリオのカウンターパーティリスクを反映するため、クレジット評価調整を計算する必要があります。
usageTranslations.it: Le banche devono calcolare gli adeguamenti di valutazione del credito per i portafogli di derivati secondo Basilea III per riflettere il rischio di controparte.
usageTranslations.vi: Ngân hàng phải tính phí điều chỉnh định giá tín dụng cho danh mục phái sinh để phản ánh rủi ro đối tác theo Basel III.
usageTranslations.hi: बैंकों को बेसल III के अनुसार डेरिवेटिव पोर्टफोलियो के लिए क्रेडिट मूल्य समायोजन शुल्क की गणना करनी होती है ताकि प्रतिपक्ष जोखिम को दर्शाया जा सके।
usageTranslations.th: ธนาคารต้องคำนวณค่าปรับมูลค่าสินเชื่อสำหรับพอร์ตอนุพันธ์เพื่อสะท้อนความเสี่ยงของคู่สัญญาตาม Basel III
usageTranslations.id: Bank diwajibkan menghitung biaya penyesuaian nilai kredit untuk portofolio derivatif sesuai Basel III untuk mencerminkan risiko pihak lawan.

terms.definition: A mechanism whereby a central counterparty (CCP) interposes itself between trading parties in derivatives and securities markets, guaranteeing the terms of a trade and reducing counterparty risk.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Central counterparty clearing reduces systemic risk by ensuring trades are honored even if one party defaults.

termTranslations.ja: 中央カウンターパーティ清算
termTranslations.vi: Bù trừ đối tác trung tâm
termTranslations.th: การชำระบัญชีคู่สัญญากลาง

usageTranslations.en: Central counterparty clearing reduces systemic risk by ensuring trades are honored even if one party defaults.
usageTranslations.tr: Merkezi karşı taraf takası, bir taraf temerrüde düşse dahi işlemlerin yerine getirilmesini sağlayarak sistemik riski azaltır.
usageTranslations.fr: La compensation par contrepartie centrale réduit le risque systémique en garantissant le règlement des transactions même en cas de défaut d'une partie.
usageTranslations.de: Zentraler Kontrahentenausgleich verringert das systemische Risiko, indem er sicherstellt, dass Geschäfte auch bei Ausfall einer Partei erfüllt werden.
usageTranslations.es: La compensación de contraparte central reduce el riesgo sistémico al garantizar el cumplimiento de las operaciones incluso si una parte incumple.
usageTranslations.zh: 中央对手方清算通过确保即使一方违约交易仍可履行，从而降低系统性风险。
usageTranslations.ar: تقلل المقاصة بواسطة الطرف المقابل المركزي من المخاطر النظامية من خلال ضمان تنفيذ الصفقات حتى في حالة تخلف أحد الأطراف.
usageTranslations.pt: A compensação de contraparte central reduz o risco sistêmico garantindo que as negociações sejam honradas mesmo se uma das partes entrar em default.
usageTranslations.ru: Центральный клиринговый контрагент снижает системный риск, гарантируя исполнение сделок даже при дефолте одной из сторон.
usageTranslations.ja: 中央カウンターパーティ清算は、いずれかの当事者がデフォルトしても取引が履行されることを保証することで、システミックリスクを低減します。
usageTranslations.it: La compensazione per controparte centrale riduce il rischio sistemico assicurando che le operazioni siano onorate anche in caso di default di una parte.
usageTranslations.vi: Bù trừ đối tác trung tâm giảm rủi ro hệ thống bằng cách đảm bảo các giao dịch được thực hiện ngay cả khi một bên vỡ nợ.
usageTranslations.hi: केंद्रीय प्रतिपक्ष निपटान प्रणाली, एक पक्ष के डिफॉल्ट की स्थिति में भी लेनदेन को सुनिश्चित कर प्रणालीगत जोखिम को कम करती है।
usageTranslations.th: การชำระบัญชีคู่สัญญากลางช่วยลดความเสี่ยงเชิงระบบโดยรับประกันว่าธุรกรรมจะได้รับการปฏิบัติตามแม้ว่าฝ่ายใดฝ่ายหนึ่งจะผิดนัดชำระหนี้
usageTranslations.id: Kliring kontraposan pusat mengurangi risiko sistemik dengan memastikan transaksi tetap dipenuhi meskipun satu pihak wanprestasi.

terms.definition: The minimum amount of collateral required to open a position in a derivatives contract, set by clearinghouses or regulators to cover potential future exposures from market movements.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Clearinghouses calculate initial margin requirements to ensure adequate collateral is posted before derivatives trades are executed.

termTranslations.vi: Yêu cầu ký quỹ ban đầu
termTranslations.th: ข้อกำหนดมาร์จิ้นเริ่มต้น

usageTranslations.en: Clearinghouses calculate initial margin requirements to ensure adequate collateral is posted before derivatives trades are executed.
usageTranslations.tr: Takas kurumları, türev işlemler gerçekleşmeden önce yeterli teminat yatırıldığından emin olmak için başlangıç teminat yükümlülüklerini hesaplar.
usageTranslations.fr: Les chambres de compensation calculent les exigences de marge initiale pour garantir que des garanties suffisantes sont déposées avant l’exécution des opérations sur dérivés.
usageTranslations.de: Clearinghäuser berechnen die initiale Marginanforderung, um sicherzustellen, dass vor Ausführung von Derivatgeschäften ausreichende Sicherheiten hinterlegt werden.
usageTranslations.es: Las cámaras de compensación calculan los requisitos de margen inicial para garantizar que se aporte suficiente garantía antes de ejecutar operaciones de derivados.
usageTranslations.zh: 清算所计算初始保证金要求，以确保在执行衍生品交易前已提交足够的抵押品。
usageTranslations.ar: تحسب غرف المقاصة متطلبات الهامش الأولي لضمان إيداع الضمانات الكافية قبل تنفيذ صفقات المشتقات.
usageTranslations.pt: As câmaras de compensação calculam os requisitos de margem inicial para garantir que haja garantia suficiente antes da execução de operações de derivativos.
usageTranslations.ru: Клиринговые организации рассчитывают требования к начальной марже, чтобы обеспечить размещение достаточного обеспечения до совершения сделок с деривативами.
usageTranslations.ja: クリアリングハウスは、デリバティブ取引が実行される前に十分な担保が差し入れられていることを保証するため、初期証拠金要件を計算します。
usageTranslations.it: Le controparti centrali calcolano il requisito di margine iniziale per garantire che venga depositata sufficiente garanzia prima dell'esecuzione delle operazioni su derivati.
usageTranslations.vi: Các tổ chức thanh toán bù trừ tính toán yêu cầu ký quỹ ban đầu để đảm bảo tài sản thế chấp đầy đủ được gửi trước khi giao dịch phái sinh được thực hiện.
usageTranslations.hi: क्लियरिंगहाउस प्रारंभिक मार्जिन आवश्यकताओं की गणना करते हैं ताकि डेरिवेटिव लेनदेन से पहले पर्याप्त जमानत राशि जमा हो जाए।
usageTranslations.th: สำนักหักบัญชีคำนวณข้อกำหนดมาร์จิ้นเริ่มต้นเพื่อให้แน่ใจว่ามีการวางหลักประกันเพียงพอก่อนการดำเนินธุรกรรมอนุพันธ์
usageTranslations.id: Lembaga kliring menghitung persyaratan margin awal untuk memastikan agunan yang memadai telah ditempatkan sebelum transaksi derivatif dilakukan.

terms.definition: A demand by a clearinghouse or counterparty for additional collateral to cover current exposures resulting from changes in the market value of derivatives positions. Required under regulatory margining rules to mitigate credit risk.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: A sharp drop in asset prices triggered a variation margin call requiring market participants to post additional collateral.

termTranslations.vi: Yêu cầu ký quỹ biến động
termTranslations.th: การเรียกหลักประกันเพิ่มเติม

usageTranslations.en: A sharp drop in asset prices triggered a variation margin call requiring market participants to post additional collateral.
usageTranslations.tr: Varlık fiyatlarındaki ani düşüş, piyasa katılımcılarının ek teminat yatırmasını gerektiren bir değişim teminat çağrısını tetikledi.
usageTranslations.fr: Une forte baisse des prix des actifs a déclenché un appel de marge de variation exigeant des participants au marché de déposer des garanties supplémentaires.
usageTranslations.de: Ein starker Rückgang der Vermögenspreise löste einen Variation Margin Call aus, der von Marktteilnehmern zusätzliche Sicherheiten verlangte.
usageTranslations.es: Una fuerte caída en los precios de los activos provocó una llamada de margen de variación que requería a los participantes del mercado aportar garantías adicionales.
usageTranslations.zh: 资产价格大幅下跌引发了变动保证金追加通知，要求市场参与者补交追加担保。
usageTranslations.ar: انخفاض حاد في أسعار الأصول أدى إلى نداء هامش التغيير الذي يتطلب من المشاركين في السوق تقديم ضمانات إضافية.
usageTranslations.pt: Uma forte queda nos preços dos ativos desencadeou uma chamada de margem de variação exigindo que os participantes do mercado depositassem garantias adicionais.
usageTranslations.ru: Резкое падение стоимости активов вызвало вызов по вариационной марже, требуя от участников рынка внесения дополнительного обеспечения.
usageTranslations.ja: 資産価格の急落が変動マージンコールを引き起こし、市場参加者に追加担保の差し入れを求めた。
usageTranslations.it: Un forte calo dei prezzi degli asset ha attivato una chiamata di margine di variazione, richiedendo ai partecipanti al mercato di versare ulteriori garanzie.
usageTranslations.vi: Sự giảm mạnh giá tài sản đã kích hoạt yêu cầu ký quỹ biến động buộc các thành viên thị trường phải nộp thêm tài sản thế chấp.
usageTranslations.hi: परिसंपत्ति मूल्यों में तेज गिरावट ने वैरिएशन मार्जिन कॉल को ट्रिगर किया, जिससे बाजार प्रतिभागियों को अतिरिक्त जमानत राशि जमा करनी पड़ी।
usageTranslations.th: การลดลงอย่างมากของราคาสินทรัพย์ได้กระตุ้นการเรียกหลักประกันเพิ่มเติมโดยผู้เข้าร่วมตลาดต้องวางหลักประกันเพิ่มเติม
usageTranslations.id: Penurunan tajam harga aset memicu panggilan margin variasi yang mengharuskan peserta pasar menyerahkan agunan tambahan.

terms.definition: A trading platform regulated under Dodd-Frank and CFTC rules where multiple participants can execute and trade swaps in a transparent and standardized manner.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: All standardized swaps must be traded on a swap execution facility to enhance transparency and market integrity.

termTranslations.vi: Nền tảng giao dịch hoán đổi
termTranslations.th: แพลตฟอร์มการดำเนินการสว็อป

usageTranslations.en: All standardized swaps must be traded on a swap execution facility to enhance transparency and market integrity.
usageTranslations.tr: Tüm standart swap işlemleri, şeffaflığı ve piyasa bütünlüğünü artırmak için swap işlem platformunda gerçekleştirilmelidir.
usageTranslations.fr: Tous les swaps standardisés doivent être négociés sur une plateforme d’exécution de swaps afin d’améliorer la transparence et l’intégrité du marché.
usageTranslations.de: Alle standardisierten Swaps müssen zur Erhöhung von Transparenz und Marktintegrität auf einer Swap-Ausführungsplattform gehandelt werden.
usageTranslations.es: Todos los swaps estandarizados deben negociarse en una plataforma de ejecución de swaps para mejorar la transparencia y la integridad del mercado.
usageTranslations.zh: 所有标准化掉期交易必须在掉期执行平台进行，以提升透明度和市场完整性。
usageTranslations.ar: يجب تداول جميع المبادلات الموحدة على مرفق تنفيذ المبادلات لتعزيز الشفافية ونزاهة السوق.
usageTranslations.pt: Todos os swaps padronizados devem ser negociados em uma plataforma de execução de swap para aumentar a transparência e a integridade do mercado.
usageTranslations.ru: Все стандартизированные свопы должны торговаться на платформе исполнения свопов для повышения прозрачности и целостности рынка.
usageTranslations.ja: すべての標準化スワップは、透明性と市場の完全性を高めるためにスワップ執行施設で取引されなければなりません。
usageTranslations.it: Tutti gli swap standardizzati devono essere negoziati su una piattaforma di esecuzione swap per migliorare la trasparenza e l’integrità del mercato.
usageTranslations.vi: Tất cả các hợp đồng hoán đổi tiêu chuẩn phải được giao dịch trên nền tảng giao dịch hoán đổi để tăng tính minh bạch và liêm chính thị trường.
usageTranslations.hi: सभी मानकीकृत स्वैप को पारदर्शिता और बाजार अखंडता बढ़ाने के लिए स्वैप निष्पादन सुविधा पर ट्रेड किया जाना चाहिए।
usageTranslations.th: ธุรกรรมสว็อปมาตรฐานทั้งหมดต้องดำเนินการบนแพลตฟอร์มการดำเนินการสว็อปเพื่อเสริมสร้างความโปร่งใสและความสมบูรณ์ของตลาด
usageTranslations.id: Semua swap terstandarisasi harus diperdagangkan di fasilitas eksekusi swap untuk meningkatkan transparansi dan integritas pasar.

terms.definition: A legally recognized financial agreement, such as a derivatives, repo, or securities lending contract, that is granted special protections under insolvency and resolution regimes (e.g., Dodd-Frank, ISDA protocols).
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Qualified financial contracts benefit from close-out netting provisions, reducing systemic risk during counterparty default.

termTranslations.vi: Hợp đồng tài chính đủ điều kiện
termTranslations.th: สัญญาทางการเงินที่ผ่านเกณฑ์

usageTranslations.en: Qualified financial contracts benefit from close-out netting provisions, reducing systemic risk during counterparty default.
usageTranslations.tr: Nitelikli finansal sözleşmeler, netleştirme hükümlerinden yararlanarak karşı taraf temerrüdünde sistemik riski azaltır.
usageTranslations.fr: Les contrats financiers qualifiés bénéficient de dispositions de compensation nette, réduisant le risque systémique en cas de défaut de contrepartie.
usageTranslations.de: Qualifizierte Finanzverträge profitieren von Netting-Regelungen und verringern das systemische Risiko bei Ausfall des Kontrahenten.
usageTranslations.es: Los contratos financieros calificados se benefician de las disposiciones de liquidación neta, reduciendo el riesgo sistémico durante el incumplimiento de contraparte.
usageTranslations.zh: 合格金融合约受益于终止净额结算条款，在对手方违约时降低系统性风险。
usageTranslations.ar: تستفيد العقود المالية المؤهلة من أحكام صافي الإغلاق، مما يقلل من المخاطر النظامية أثناء تخلف الطرف المقابل.
usageTranslations.pt: Contratos financeiros qualificados beneficiam-se de provisões de compensação de encerramento, reduzindo o risco sistêmico em caso de inadimplência da contraparte.
usageTranslations.ru: Квалифицированные финансовые контракты используют положения о неттинге при закрытии, снижая системный риск при дефолте контрагента.
usageTranslations.ja: 適格金融契約はクローズアウト・ネッティング規定の恩恵を受け、カウンターパーティのデフォルト時のシステミックリスクを低減します。
usageTranslations.it: I contratti finanziari qualificati beneficiano di clausole di netting, riducendo il rischio sistemico in caso di default della controparte.
usageTranslations.vi: Hợp đồng tài chính đủ điều kiện được hưởng lợi từ các điều khoản bù trừ kết thúc, giảm rủi ro hệ thống khi đối tác vỡ nợ.
usageTranslations.hi: योग्य वित्तीय अनुबंध क्लोज-आउट नेटिंग प्रावधानों से लाभान्वित होते हैं, जिससे प्रतिपक्ष डिफ़ॉल्ट के दौरान प्रणालीगत जोखिम कम होता है।
usageTranslations.th: สัญญาทางการเงินที่ผ่านเกณฑ์ได้รับประโยชน์จากข้อกำหนดการหักกลบลบหนี้ ลดความเสี่ยงเชิงระบบในกรณีที่คู่สัญญาผิดนัด
usageTranslations.id: Kontrak keuangan berkualifikasi diuntungkan oleh ketentuan netting, sehingga mengurangi risiko sistemik saat wanprestasi pihak lawan.

terms.definition: A standardized structure for financial messages exchanged over the SWIFT network, defined by SWIFT and used for global payments, securities, and trade finance transactions.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Banks must ensure all cross-border payment instructions conform to the correct SWIFT message format (e.g., MT103, MT202).

termTranslations.ja: SWIFTメッセージフォーマット
termTranslations.th: รูปแบบข้อความ SWIFT

usageTranslations.en: Banks must ensure all cross-border payment instructions conform to the correct SWIFT message format (e.g., MT103, MT202).
usageTranslations.tr: Bankalar, tüm sınır ötesi ödeme talimatlarının doğru SWIFT mesaj formatına (ör. MT103, MT202) uygun olduğundan emin olmalıdır.
usageTranslations.fr: Les banques doivent garantir que toutes les instructions de paiement sont au format SWIFT approprié.
usageTranslations.de: Banken müssen sicherstellen, dass alle Zahlungsanweisungen dem SWIFT-Nachrichtenformat entsprechen.
usageTranslations.es: Los bancos deben asegurarse de que las instrucciones de pago usen el formato SWIFT correcto.
usageTranslations.zh: 银行需确保所有跨境支付指令符合SWIFT报文格式（如MT103、MT202）。
usageTranslations.ar: يجب على البنوك التأكد من أن جميع تعليمات الدفع تتبع تنسيق رسالة سويفت الصحيح.
usageTranslations.pt: Os bancos devem garantir que todas as instruções de pagamento estejam no formato SWIFT correto.
usageTranslations.ru: Банки должны обеспечить соответствие всех платежных инструкций формату сообщений SWIFT.
usageTranslations.ja: 銀行は全ての国際送金指示が正しいSWIFTメッセージフォーマット（例：MT103, MT202）であることを確認しなければならない。
usageTranslations.it: Le banche devono garantire che tutte le istruzioni di pagamento utilizzino il corretto formato SWIFT.
usageTranslations.vi: Ngân hàng phải đảm bảo mọi lệnh chuyển tiền đều tuân thủ định dạng tin nhắn SWIFT chuẩn.
usageTranslations.hi: बैंकों को सभी भुगतान निर्देशों को उचित SWIFT संदेश प्रारूप में सुनिश्चित करना चाहिए।
