usageTranslations.th: ธนาคารต้องแน่ใจว่าคำสั่งชำระเงินทั้งหมดอยู่ในรูปแบบข้อความ SWIFT ที่ถูกต้อง
usageTranslations.id: Bank harus memastikan semua instruksi pembayaran menggunakan format pesan SWIFT yang benar.

terms.definition: The global transition of payment, securities, and trade messages from legacy SWIFT formats (MT) to ISO 20022 XML-based messaging, aiming to improve interoperability and data richness.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: ISO 20022 migration will harmonize payment messaging globally and is mandatory for cross-border payments by 2025.

termTranslations.th: การเปลี่ยนไปใช้ ISO 20022

usageTranslations.en: ISO 20022 migration will harmonize payment messaging globally and is mandatory for cross-border payments by 2025.
usageTranslations.tr: ISO 20022 geçişi, küresel ödeme mesajlaşmasını uyumlu hale getirecek ve 2025 itibarıyla sınır ötesi ödemeler için zorunlu olacak.
usageTranslations.fr: La migration ISO 20022 harmonisera les messages de paiement à l’échelle mondiale.
usageTranslations.de: Die ISO-20022-Migration vereinheitlicht weltweite Zahlungsnachrichten und wird verpflichtend.
usageTranslations.es: La migración a ISO 20022 armonizará los mensajes de pago a nivel mundial.
usageTranslations.zh: ISO 20022迁移将统一全球支付报文，2025年前跨境支付强制实施。
usageTranslations.ar: الانتقال إلى ISO 20022 سيوحد رسائل الدفع عالميًا وسيكون إلزاميًا.
usageTranslations.pt: A migração ISO 20022 padronizará a mensagem de pagamentos globalmente.
usageTranslations.ru: Переход на ISO 20022 унифицирует платежные сообщения по всему миру.
usageTranslations.ja: ISO 20022移行は世界の決済メッセージを標準化します。
usageTranslations.it: La migrazione ISO 20022 armonizzerà la messaggistica dei pagamenti a livello globale.
usageTranslations.vi: Chuyển đổi ISO 20022 sẽ chuẩn hóa thông điệp thanh toán toàn cầu.
usageTranslations.hi: आईएसओ 20022 माइग्रेशन वैश्विक भुगतान संदेशों को मानकीकृत करेगा।
usageTranslations.th: การเปลี่ยนไปใช้ ISO 20022 จะทำให้การส่งข้อความชำระเงินเป็นมาตรฐานเดียวทั่วโลก
usageTranslations.id: Migrasi ISO 20022 akan menyatukan pesan pembayaran global.

terms.definition: A standardized electronic message format for financial transaction card originated messages, used primarily in card payment systems and ATMs globally.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: All ATM and card payment messages must comply with the ISO 8583 messaging standard for interoperability between banks.

termTranslations.th: การส่งข้อความ ISO 8583

usageTranslations.en: All ATM and card payment messages must comply with the ISO 8583 messaging standard for interoperability between banks.
usageTranslations.tr: Tüm ATM ve kart ödeme mesajları, bankalar arası uyumluluk için ISO 8583 mesajlaşma standardına uymalıdır.
usageTranslations.fr: Tous les messages de paiement doivent respecter la norme ISO 8583.
usageTranslations.de: Alle Zahlungsanweisungen müssen dem ISO-8583-Standard entsprechen.
usageTranslations.es: Todos los mensajes de pago de cajeros automáticos deben cumplir con ISO 8583.
usageTranslations.zh: 所有ATM和卡支付报文都必须符合ISO 8583报文标准。
usageTranslations.ar: يجب أن تلتزم جميع رسائل المدفوعات المرسلة عبر أجهزة الصراف الآلي بمعيار ISO 8583.
usageTranslations.pt: Todas as mensagens de pagamentos via cartão devem atender ao padrão ISO 8583.
usageTranslations.ru: Все сообщения по картам должны соответствовать стандарту ISO 8583.
usageTranslations.ja: すべてのATM・カード決済メッセージはISO 8583に準拠しなければならない。
usageTranslations.it: Tutti i messaggi di pagamento devono rispettare ISO 8583.
usageTranslations.vi: Tất cả tin nhắn giao dịch thẻ phải tuân thủ chuẩn ISO 8583.
usageTranslations.hi: सभी एटीएम व कार्ड भुगतान संदेशों को ISO 8583 मानक का पालन करना चाहिए।
usageTranslations.th: ข้อความชำระเงินบัตรและ ATM ทั้งหมดต้องเป็นไปตามมาตรฐาน ISO 8583
usageTranslations.id: Semua pesan pembayaran ATM dan kartu harus sesuai standar ISO 8583.

terms.definition: The supervisory function by which central banks and regulators monitor, assess, and enforce safety, efficiency, and reliability in payment systems as per global regulatory standards.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Central banks conduct payment system oversight to mitigate systemic risk and ensure compliance with international standards such as CPMI-IOSCO.

termTranslations.vi: Giám sát hệ thống thanh toán
termTranslations.th: การกำกับดูแลระบบการชำระเงิน

usageTranslations.en: Central banks conduct payment system oversight to mitigate systemic risk and ensure compliance with international standards such as CPMI-IOSCO.
usageTranslations.tr: Merkez bankaları, sistemik riski azaltmak ve CPMI-IOSCO gibi uluslararası standartlara uyumu sağlamak için ödeme sistemi gözetimi yapar.
usageTranslations.fr: Les banques centrales assurent la surveillance des systèmes de paiement pour limiter les risques systémiques.
usageTranslations.de: Zentralbanken führen Zahlungssystemaufsicht zur Risikominderung durch.
usageTranslations.es: Los bancos centrales supervisan los sistemas de pagos para reducir el riesgo sistémico.
usageTranslations.zh: 央行实施支付系统监管，以减轻系统性风险，确保符合CPMI-IOSCO等国际标准。
usageTranslations.ar: تقوم البنوك المركزية برقابة نظام الدفع للحد من المخاطر النظامية.
usageTranslations.pt: Bancos centrais realizam supervisão para mitigar risco sistêmico.
usageTranslations.ru: Центральные банки осуществляют надзор за платежными системами для снижения системного риска.
usageTranslations.ja: 中央銀行は決済システム監督でシステミックリスクを抑制する。
usageTranslations.it: Le banche centrali effettuano la supervisione dei sistemi di pagamento per ridurre il rischio sistemico.
usageTranslations.vi: Ngân hàng trung ương giám sát hệ thống thanh toán để giảm rủi ro hệ thống.
usageTranslations.hi: केंद्रीय बैंक सिस्टमिक जोखिम कम करने के लिए पेमेंट सिस्टम ओवरसाइट करते हैं।
usageTranslations.th: ธนาคารกลางดำเนินการกำกับดูแลระบบการชำระเงินเพื่อลดความเสี่ยงเชิงระบบ
usageTranslations.id: Bank sentral melakukan pengawasan sistem pembayaran untuk memitigasi risiko sistemik.

terms.definition: A set of laws, regulations, and procedures designed to prevent criminals from disguising illegally obtained funds as legitimate income, as defined by FATF and national authorities.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Banks must implement robust anti money laundering controls in line with FATF recommendations and local laws.

termTranslations.ja: マネーロンダリング対策
termTranslations.th: การป้องกันการฟอกเงิน

usageTranslations.en: Banks must implement robust anti money laundering controls in line with FATF recommendations and local laws.
usageTranslations.tr: Bankalar, FATF tavsiyeleri ve yerel mevzuata uygun olarak güçlü kara para aklamayı önleme kontrolleri uygulamalıdır.
usageTranslations.fr: Les banques doivent appliquer des contrôles solides de lutte contre le blanchiment.
usageTranslations.de: Banken müssen wirksame Geldwäschebekämpfungskontrollen umsetzen.
usageTranslations.es: Los bancos deben implementar controles sólidos de prevención del lavado de dinero.
usageTranslations.zh: 银行必须依据FATF建议和本地法规实施反洗钱控制措施。
usageTranslations.ar: يجب على البنوك تنفيذ ضوابط قوية لمكافحة غسل الأموال.
usageTranslations.pt: Os bancos devem adotar controles de prevenção à lavagem de dinheiro.
usageTranslations.ru: Банки обязаны внедрять надежные меры по ПОД/ФТ.
usageTranslations.ja: 銀行はFATF勧告と国内法に沿ったマネロン対策を実施しなければならない。
usageTranslations.it: Le banche devono implementare controlli antiriciclaggio solidi.
usageTranslations.vi: Ngân hàng phải thực hiện kiểm soát chống rửa tiền chặt chẽ.
usageTranslations.hi: बैंकों को एंटी मनी लॉन्ड्रिंग के लिए सख्त नियंत्रण लागू करने चाहिए।
usageTranslations.th: ธนาคารต้องมีการควบคุมการป้องกันการฟอกเงินที่เข้มงวด
usageTranslations.id: Bank wajib menerapkan kontrol anti pencucian uang sesuai rekomendasi FATF.

terms.definition: A regulatory requirement obligating banks and financial institutions to verify the identity and assess the risk of customers as part of AML/CFT controls.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Customer due diligence is mandatory before opening an account and during the entire business relationship as per FATF guidelines.

termTranslations.fr: Vigilance à l’égard de la clientèle
termTranslations.ja: 顧客デューデリジェンス
termTranslations.th: การตรวจสอบข้อมูลลูกค้า

usageTranslations.en: Customer due diligence is mandatory before opening an account and during the entire business relationship as per FATF guidelines.
usageTranslations.tr: FATF rehberine göre müşteri durum tespiti, hesap açmadan önce ve tüm iş ilişkisi boyunca zorunludur.
usageTranslations.fr: La vigilance à l’égard de la clientèle est obligatoire avant toute ouverture de compte.
usageTranslations.de: Kunden-Sorgfaltspflicht ist vor Kontoeröffnung und während der gesamten Geschäftsbeziehung verpflichtend.
usageTranslations.es: La debida diligencia del cliente es obligatoria antes de abrir una cuenta.
usageTranslations.zh: 根据FATF指南，客户尽职调查在开户和业务关系全程均为强制性。
usageTranslations.ar: العناية الواجبة بالعملاء إلزامية قبل فتح الحساب وطوال العلاقة.
usageTranslations.pt: A diligência devida do cliente é obrigatória antes da abertura de conta.
usageTranslations.ru: Должная проверка клиента обязательна до открытия счета и в течение всей деловой связи.
usageTranslations.ja: 顧客デューデリジェンスは口座開設前と取引期間中必須です。
usageTranslations.it: La due diligence sul cliente è obbligatoria prima dell’apertura del conto.
usageTranslations.vi: Thẩm định khách hàng là bắt buộc trước khi mở tài khoản.
usageTranslations.hi: खाता खोलने से पहले ग्राहक ड्यू डिलिजेंस अनिवार्य है।
usageTranslations.th: ต้องตรวจสอบข้อมูลลูกค้าก่อนเปิดบัญชีและตลอดความสัมพันธ์ทางธุรกิจ
usageTranslations.id: Uji tuntas nasabah wajib dilakukan sebelum pembukaan rekening.

terms.definition: The process of verifying the identity of clients and assessing their suitability, risks, and background to comply with anti-money laundering and counter-terrorism financing regulations.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Financial institutions are legally required to implement robust know your customer processes to prevent money laundering and fraud.

termTranslations.th: รู้จักลูกค้าของคุณ

usageTranslations.en: Financial institutions are legally required to implement robust know your customer processes to prevent money laundering and fraud.
usageTranslations.tr: Finansal kuruluşlar, kara para aklama ve dolandırıcılığı önlemek için güçlü müşterini tanı süreçleri uygulamak zorundadır.
usageTranslations.fr: Les institutions financières doivent appliquer des procédures de connaissance du client.
usageTranslations.de: Finanzinstitute müssen robuste KYC-Prozesse umsetzen.
usageTranslations.es: Las instituciones financieras deben implementar procedimientos de conozca a su cliente.
usageTranslations.zh: 金融机构必须实施强有力的了解你的客户程序，以防止洗钱和欺诈。
usageTranslations.ar: يتعين على المؤسسات المالية تنفيذ عمليات اعرف عميلك.
usageTranslations.pt: Instituições financeiras devem implementar processos robustos de KYC.
usageTranslations.ru: Финансовые организации обязаны внедрять строгие процедуры KYC.
usageTranslations.ja: 金融機関は強固な顧客確認プロセスを導入しなければならない。
usageTranslations.it: Le istituzioni finanziarie devono implementare processi KYC solidi.
usageTranslations.vi: Các tổ chức tài chính phải thực hiện quy trình KYC nghiêm ngặt.
usageTranslations.hi: वित्तीय संस्थाओं को मजबूत KYC प्रक्रियाएँ लागू करनी होती हैं।
usageTranslations.th: สถาบันการเงินต้องดำเนินกระบวนการรู้จักลูกค้าของคุณที่เข้มงวด
usageTranslations.id: Lembaga keuangan harus menerapkan proses KYC yang kuat.

terms.definition: An individual entrusted with prominent public functions, whose position exposes them to a higher risk of involvement in bribery or corruption, as defined in FATF and Wolfsberg guidance.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Enhanced due diligence is required for accounts held by a politically exposed person due to higher money laundering risks.

termTranslations.vi: Người có ảnh hưởng chính trị
termTranslations.th: บุคคลที่มีความเสี่ยงทางการเมือง

usageTranslations.en: Enhanced due diligence is required for accounts held by a politically exposed person due to higher money laundering risks.
usageTranslations.tr: Daha yüksek kara para aklama riski nedeniyle siyasi nüfuz sahibi kişiler için artırılmış durum tespiti gereklidir.
usageTranslations.fr: Une vigilance accrue est requise pour les comptes de personnes politiquement exposées.
usageTranslations.de: Für politisch exponierte Personen ist eine verstärkte Sorgfaltspflicht vorgeschrieben.
usageTranslations.es: Se requiere una debida diligencia reforzada para cuentas de personas políticamente expuestas.
usageTranslations.zh: 对政治公众人物账户需进行加强尽职调查。
usageTranslations.ar: تتطلب الحسابات الخاصة بأشخاص ذوي مناصب سياسية بارزة عناية فائقة.
usageTranslations.pt: É necessário realizar due diligence aprimorada para PEPs.
usageTranslations.ru: Для ПДЛ требуется усиленная проверка из-за повышенного риска отмывания денег.
usageTranslations.ja: 政治的に影響力のある人物の口座は強化されたデューデリジェンスが必要です。
usageTranslations.it: Per i PEP occorre una due diligence rafforzata.
usageTranslations.vi: Cần thẩm định nâng cao đối với tài khoản của người có ảnh hưởng chính trị.
usageTranslations.hi: राजनीतिक रूप से प्रमुख व्यक्ति के खातों के लिए विशेष जांच आवश्यक है।
usageTranslations.th: ต้องมีการตรวจสอบข้อมูลลูกค้าอย่างเข้มงวดสำหรับบุคคลที่มีความเสี่ยงทางการเมือง
usageTranslations.id: Uji tuntas ekstra diperlukan untuk PEP karena risiko pencucian uang lebih tinggi.

terms.definition: A list of individuals, entities, or countries subject to financial and economic sanctions, used by financial institutions to screen transactions for compliance with international and domestic regulations.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Banks are required to match all customer transactions against the sanctions screening list to prevent dealings with sanctioned parties.

termTranslations.ja: 制裁スクリーニングリスト
termTranslations.vi: Danh sách kiểm tra lệnh trừng phạt
termTranslations.th: รายชื่อคัดกรองการคว่ำบาตร

usageTranslations.en: Banks are required to match all customer transactions against the sanctions screening list to prevent dealings with sanctioned parties.
usageTranslations.tr: Bankalar, yaptırım uygulanan taraflarla işlem yapılmasını önlemek için tüm müşteri işlemlerini yaptırım tarama listesiyle eşleştirmek zorundadır.
usageTranslations.fr: Les banques doivent comparer toutes les transactions avec la liste de filtrage des sanctions.
usageTranslations.de: Banken müssen alle Transaktionen gegen die Sanktionsprüfliste abgleichen.
usageTranslations.es: Los bancos deben cotejar todas las transacciones con la lista de control de sanciones.
usageTranslations.zh: 银行必须将所有客户交易与制裁筛查名单核对，以防与受制裁方进行交易。
usageTranslations.ar: يجب على البنوك مطابقة جميع المعاملات مع قائمة فحص العقوبات.
usageTranslations.pt: Os bancos devem conferir todas as transações com a lista de triagem de sanções.
usageTranslations.ru: Банки обязаны проверять все транзакции клиентов по списку санкционного скрининга.
usageTranslations.ja: 銀行はすべての取引を制裁スクリーニングリストと照合しなければならない。
usageTranslations.it: Le banche devono confrontare tutte le transazioni con l'elenco di screening delle sanzioni.
usageTranslations.vi: Ngân hàng phải so khớp tất cả giao dịch với danh sách kiểm tra lệnh trừng phạt.
usageTranslations.hi: बैंकों को सभी लेन-देन को प्रतिबंध स्क्रीनिंग सूची से मिलाना अनिवार्य है।
usageTranslations.th: ธนาคารต้องเปรียบเทียบธุรกรรมทั้งหมดกับรายชื่อคัดกรองการคว่ำบาตร
usageTranslations.id: Bank harus mencocokkan semua transaksi dengan daftar pemeriksaan sanksi.

terms.definition: A bank or investment account held by two or more individuals with equal rights to deposit, withdraw, and manage funds. Each holder is jointly liable for account activities and obligations as per banking regulation and contract.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: A joint account allows both spouses to access and manage funds, and both are legally responsible for the account’s liabilities and transactions.

termTranslations.th: บัญชีร่วม

usageTranslations.en: A joint account allows both spouses to access and manage funds, and both are legally responsible for the account’s liabilities and transactions.
usageTranslations.tr: Ortak hesap, her iki eşin de fonlara erişmesine ve yönetmesine olanak tanır ve her ikisi de hesabın yükümlülüklerinden ve işlemlerinden yasal olarak sorumludur.
usageTranslations.fr: Un compte joint permet aux deux conjoints d'accéder aux fonds et de les gérer, tous deux étant légalement responsables des obligations et transactions du compte.
usageTranslations.de: Ein Gemeinschaftskonto ermöglicht beiden Ehepartnern den Zugriff und die Verwaltung der Gelder, wobei beide für die Verbindlichkeiten und Transaktionen des Kontos rechtlich verantwortlich sind.
usageTranslations.es: Una cuenta conjunta permite que ambos cónyuges accedan y gestionen los fondos, siendo ambos legalmente responsables de las obligaciones y transacciones de la cuenta.
usageTranslations.zh: 联名账户允许双方共同管理资金，双方对账户的责任和交易都承担法律责任。
usageTranslations.ar: يسمح الحساب المشترك لكلا الزوجين بإدارة الأموال، وكلاهما مسؤول قانونيًا عن التزامات ومعاملات الحساب.
usageTranslations.pt: Uma conta conjunta permite que ambos os cônjuges acessem e gerenciem fundos, sendo ambos legalmente responsáveis pelas obrigações e transações da conta.
usageTranslations.ru: Совместный счет позволяет обоим супругам управлять средствами, и оба несут юридическую ответственность за обязательства и операции по счету.
usageTranslations.ja: 共同口座は両方の配偶者が資金にアクセスし管理でき、両者が口座の債務と取引に法的責任を負います。
usageTranslations.it: Un conto cointestato consente a entrambi i coniugi di accedere e gestire i fondi, ed entrambi sono legalmente responsabili delle obbligazioni e transazioni del conto.
usageTranslations.vi: Tài khoản chung cho phép cả hai vợ chồng truy cập và quản lý tiền, và cả hai đều chịu trách nhiệm pháp lý đối với các nghĩa vụ và giao dịch của tài khoản.
usageTranslations.hi: संयुक्त खाता दोनों पति-पत्नी को धन प्रबंधन की अनुमति देता है और दोनों खाता दायित्वों और लेनदेन के लिए कानूनी रूप से उत्तरदायी होते हैं।
usageTranslations.th: บัญชีร่วมเปิดโอกาสให้ทั้งสองคู่สมรสเข้าถึงและจัดการเงินทุน และทั้งสองฝ่ายมีหน้าที่รับผิดชอบตามกฎหมายต่อหนี้สินและธุรกรรมของบัญชี
usageTranslations.id: Rekening bersama memungkinkan kedua pasangan mengakses dan mengelola dana, dan keduanya bertanggung jawab secara hukum atas kewajiban dan transaksi rekening.

terms.definition: A bank account from which funds may be withdrawn at any time without notice, typically used for day-to-day liquidity management and accessible via checks, debit, or electronic transfer.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Corporates maintain demand deposit accounts for operational liquidity, enabling same-day settlement of payments and cash management activities.

termTranslations.th: เงินฝากกระแสรายวัน

usageTranslations.en: Corporates maintain demand deposit accounts for operational liquidity, enabling same-day settlement of payments and cash management activities.
usageTranslations.tr: Şirketler, operasyonel likidite için vadesiz mevduat hesapları tutar ve aynı gün ödeme ve nakit yönetimi sağlar.
usageTranslations.fr: Les entreprises détiennent des dépôts à vue pour la liquidité opérationnelle, permettant le règlement le jour même et la gestion de trésorerie.
usageTranslations.de: Unternehmen führen Sichteinlagenkonten zur betrieblichen Liquidität und ermöglichen taggleiche Abwicklung und Cash Management.
usageTranslations.es: Las empresas mantienen depósitos a la vista para liquidez operativa, permitiendo liquidaciones y gestión de efectivo el mismo día.
usageTranslations.zh: 企业为运营流动性保有活期存款账户，实现当日支付和现金管理。
usageTranslations.ar: تحتفظ الشركات بحسابات ودائع تحت الطلب للسيولة التشغيلية، ما يسمح بالتسوية وإدارة النقد في نفس اليوم.
usageTranslations.pt: Empresas mantêm depósitos à ordem para liquidez operacional, permitindo liquidação e gestão de caixa no mesmo dia.
usageTranslations.ru: Компании поддерживают счета до востребования для оперативной ликвидности, обеспечивая расчет и управление наличностью в тот же день.
usageTranslations.ja: 企業は運転資金のために当座預金を保有し、即日決済やキャッシュマネジメントを可能にします。
usageTranslations.it: Le imprese detengono depositi a vista per la liquidità operativa, consentendo la regolazione e gestione della cassa in giornata.
usageTranslations.vi: Doanh nghiệp duy trì tiền gửi thanh toán cho thanh khoản, cho phép thanh toán và quản lý tiền trong ngày.
usageTranslations.hi: कॉरपोरेट्स परिचालन तरलता के लिए डिमांड डिपॉज़िट खाते रखते हैं, जिससे उसी दिन भुगतान और नकदी प्रबंधन संभव होता है।
usageTranslations.th: องค์กรมีเงินฝากกระแสรายวันเพื่อสภาพคล่อง ให้ชำระและบริหารเงินสดในวันเดียวกัน
usageTranslations.id: Perusahaan memelihara giro untuk likuiditas operasional, memungkinkan penyelesaian dan manajemen kas di hari yang sama.

terms.definition: A time deposit issued by a bank with a fixed maturity date and specified interest rate; early withdrawal typically incurs a penalty. Used for capital preservation and interest income.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Investors purchase certificates of deposit for fixed-term interest earnings, but early withdrawal may trigger a penalty as per banking regulations.

termTranslations.th: ใบรับฝากเงินประจำ

usageTranslations.en: Investors purchase certificates of deposit for fixed-term interest earnings, but early withdrawal may trigger a penalty as per banking regulations.
usageTranslations.tr: Yatırımcılar, sabit vadeli faiz geliri için vadeli mevduat sertifikası alır ancak erken çekim durumunda cezai yaptırım uygulanabilir.
usageTranslations.fr: Les investisseurs achètent des certificats de dépôt pour un rendement fixe, mais un retrait anticipé peut entraîner une pénalité réglementaire.
usageTranslations.de: Anleger erwerben Termineinlagezertifikate für feste Zinserträge, aber vorzeitige Abhebung kann eine Strafe nach sich ziehen.
usageTranslations.es: Los inversores adquieren certificados de depósito por intereses fijos; un retiro anticipado puede acarrear penalizaciones.
usageTranslations.zh: 投资者购买定期存款单以获得固定收益，提前支取可能面临罚款。
usageTranslations.ar: يشترى المستثمرون شهادات إيداع لأرباح محددة الأجل، وقد يؤدي السحب المبكر إلى غرامة حسب اللوائح.
usageTranslations.pt: Investidores adquirem certificados de depósito para rendimento fixo, mas o resgate antecipado pode acarretar penalidade.
usageTranslations.ru: Инвесторы покупают депозитные сертификаты для фиксированного дохода, досрочное снятие может повлечь штраф.
usageTranslations.ja: 投資家は定期収益を得るため譲渡性預金証書を購入し、早期解約には罰則が科されることがある。
usageTranslations.it: Gli investitori acquistano certificati di deposito per un rendimento fisso; il ritiro anticipato può comportare una penale.
usageTranslations.vi: Nhà đầu tư mua chứng chỉ tiền gửi nhận lãi suất cố định, rút trước hạn có thể bị phạt.
usageTranslations.hi: निवेशक निश्चित ब्याज आय के लिए सर्टिफिकेट ऑफ डिपॉज़िट खरीदते हैं, जल्दी निकालने पर जुर्माना लग सकता है।
usageTranslations.th: นักลงทุนซื้อใบรับฝากเงินเพื่อดอกเบี้ยประจำ ถอนก่อนกำหนดอาจถูกปรับ
usageTranslations.id: Investor membeli sertifikat deposito untuk bunga tetap, penarikan awal dapat dikenai denda.

terms.definition: A long-term loan secured by real estate property, repaid in installments, and subject to specific interest rates and collateral requirements as defined in banking regulations.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: The bank approves a mortgage loan after appraising the property's value and reviewing the borrower's credit profile in line with national lending regulations.

termTranslations.th: สินเชื่อจำนอง

usageTranslations.en: The bank approves a mortgage loan after appraising the property's value and reviewing the borrower's credit profile in line with national lending regulations.
usageTranslations.tr: Banka, taşınmaz değerini ve müşterinin kredi profilini ulusal mevzuata uygun şekilde değerlendirerek konut kredisi onaylar.
usageTranslations.fr: La banque accorde un prêt hypothécaire après évaluation du bien et du profil de crédit, selon la réglementation.
usageTranslations.de: Die Bank genehmigt ein Hypothekendarlehen nach Bewertung der Immobilie und Bonitätsprüfung gemäß den nationalen Vorschriften.
usageTranslations.es: El banco aprueba un préstamo hipotecario tras tasar el inmueble y evaluar el perfil crediticio según la regulación.
usageTranslations.zh: 银行在评估房产价值和借款人信用状况后，根据法规批准抵押贷款。
usageTranslations.ar: يوافق البنك على قرض عقاري بعد تقييم العقار والتحقق من السجل الائتماني، حسب اللوائح.
usageTranslations.pt: O banco aprova o empréstimo hipotecário após avaliação do imóvel e análise de crédito conforme as normas.
usageTranslations.ru: Банк одобряет ипотечный кредит после оценки недвижимости и анализа кредитной истории в соответствии с нормативами.
usageTranslations.ja: 銀行は不動産評価と信用審査後、住宅ローンを規制に従い承認します。
usageTranslations.it: La banca approva il mutuo dopo valutazione dell’immobile e del profilo di credito, come da regolamento.
usageTranslations.vi: Ngân hàng phê duyệt khoản vay thế chấp sau khi thẩm định tài sản và hồ sơ tín dụng theo quy định.
usageTranslations.hi: बैंक संपत्ति का मूल्यांकन व क्रेडिट प्रोफ़ाइल जाँचने के बाद गृह ऋण स्वीकृत करता है।
usageTranslations.th: ธนาคารอนุมัติสินเชื่อจำนองหลังประเมินราคาและตรวจสอบเครดิตลูกหนี้ตามข้อบังคับ
usageTranslations.id: Bank menyetujui kredit hipotek setelah menilai properti dan profil kredit sesuai regulasi.

terms.definition: A credit facility that allows a bank account holder to withdraw more money than the current account balance, creating a temporary negative balance within pre-approved limits.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: The bank offers an overdraft facility allowing account holders to temporarily access additional funds beyond their current balance, subject to interest and fees.

termTranslations.th: วงเงินเบิกเกินบัญชี

usageTranslations.en: The bank offers an overdraft facility allowing account holders to temporarily access additional funds beyond their current balance, subject to interest and fees.
usageTranslations.tr: Banka, hesap sahiplerine mevcut bakiyelerinin üzerinde geçici ek limit imkânı sunar; faiz ve ücret uygulanır.
usageTranslations.fr: La banque propose un découvert permettant de dépasser temporairement le solde, avec intérêts et frais.
usageTranslations.de: Die Bank bietet einen Überziehungskredit an, der vorübergehend zusätzliche Mittel über das Guthaben hinaus ermöglicht, mit Zinsen und Gebühren.
usageTranslations.es: El banco ofrece descubierto bancario para disponer de fondos adicionales con intereses y comisiones.
usageTranslations.zh: 银行为客户提供透支服务，允许超出账户余额临时支取，需支付利息和手续费。
usageTranslations.ar: يتيح البنك خدمة السحب على المكشوف للوصول المؤقت إلى أموال إضافية مقابل فوائد ورسوم.
usageTranslations.pt: O banco oferece cheque especial permitindo saque acima do saldo, com juros e tarifas.
usageTranslations.ru: Банк предоставляет овердрафт для временного доступа к дополнительным средствам, взимая проценты и комиссии.
usageTranslations.ja: 銀行は当座貸越を提供し、口座残高を超えて一時的な資金利用が可能、金利・手数料が発生します。
usageTranslations.it: La banca offre uno scoperto di conto consentendo l’accesso temporaneo a fondi extra, con interessi e spese.
usageTranslations.vi: Ngân hàng cung cấp hạn mức thấu chi cho phép rút tiền vượt số dư, có phí và lãi.
usageTranslations.hi: बैंक ओवरड्राफ्ट सुविधा देता है जिससे खाता धारक ब्याज व शुल्क सहित अतिरिक्त धन निकाल सकते हैं।
usageTranslations.th: ธนาคารให้บริการเบิกเกินบัญชี สามารถใช้เงินเกินยอดได้โดยมีดอกเบี้ยและค่าธรรมเนียม
usageTranslations.id: Bank menawarkan fasilitas cerukan agar nasabah dapat mengakses dana tambahan sementara dengan bunga dan biaya.

terms.definition: A mutual fund that invests in short-term, high-liquidity, low-risk money market instruments such as Treasury bills, commercial paper, and certificates of deposit. Used for cash management by institutions and individuals.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Institutional investors use money market funds to manage short-term cash needs and maintain liquidity with minimal risk exposure, as funds invest in government and high-grade commercial paper.

termTranslations.ja: マネーマーケットファンド
termTranslations.th: กองทุนตลาดเงิน

usageTranslations.en: Institutional investors use money market funds to manage short-term cash needs and maintain liquidity with minimal risk exposure, as funds invest in government and high-grade commercial paper.
usageTranslations.tr: Kurumsal yatırımcılar, kısa vadeli nakit ihtiyaçları ve düşük riskle likidite sağlamak için likidite fonu kullanır; fonlar kamu ve özel sektör menkul kıymetlerine yatırım yapar.
usageTranslations.fr: Les investisseurs institutionnels utilisent les fonds monétaires pour la gestion de trésorerie à court terme et la liquidité avec un risque minimal.
usageTranslations.de: Institutionelle Anleger nutzen Geldmarktfonds für kurzfristige Liquidität bei minimalem Risiko, da die Fonds in Staatsanleihen und hochwertige Commercial Paper investieren.
usageTranslations.es: Los inversores institucionales usan fondos del mercado monetario para necesidades de efectivo a corto plazo con mínimo riesgo.
usageTranslations.zh: 机构投资者使用货币市场基金来管理短期现金和保持流动性，风险极低。
usageTranslations.ar: يستخدم المستثمرون المؤسسون صناديق سوق المال لتلبية احتياجات السيولة قصيرة الأجل بمخاطر منخفضة.
usageTranslations.pt: Investidores institucionais usam fundos do mercado monetário para necessidades de caixa de curto prazo e liquidez.
usageTranslations.ru: Институциональные инвесторы используют фонды денежного рынка для краткосрочной ликвидности с минимальными рисками.
usageTranslations.ja: 機関投資家は短期資金と流動性維持のためマネーマーケットファンドを利用します。
usageTranslations.it: Gli investitori istituzionali usano i fondi monetari per esigenze di cassa a breve termine e liquidità.
usageTranslations.vi: Nhà đầu tư tổ chức dùng quỹ thị trường tiền tệ cho nhu cầu tiền ngắn hạn và thanh khoản.
usageTranslations.hi: संस्थागत निवेशक मनी मार्केट फंड का उपयोग अल्पकालिक नकदी जरूरतों के लिए करते हैं।
usageTranslations.th: นักลงทุนสถาบันใช้กองทุนตลาดเงินเพื่อสภาพคล่องระยะสั้น
usageTranslations.id: Investor institusional menggunakan reksa dana pasar uang untuk likuiditas jangka pendek.

terms.definition: The minimum amount of money required to be maintained in a bank account to avoid fees or maintain account privileges, as specified in the account terms.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Banks require customers to maintain a minimum balance to avoid monthly service charges or to qualify for certain account features.

termTranslations.th: ยอดเงินขั้นต่ำ

usageTranslations.en: Banks require customers to maintain a minimum balance to avoid monthly service charges or to qualify for certain account features.
usageTranslations.tr: Bankalar, aylık ücretlerden muafiyet veya ek hizmetler için asgari bakiye tutulmasını ister.
usageTranslations.fr: Les banques exigent un solde minimum pour éviter les frais mensuels ou bénéficier d'avantages.
usageTranslations.de: Banken verlangen ein Mindestguthaben, um monatliche Gebühren zu vermeiden oder Zusatzleistungen zu erhalten.
usageTranslations.es: Los bancos exigen un saldo mínimo para evitar cargos mensuales o acceder a beneficios.
usageTranslations.zh: 银行要求客户维持最低余额以免除月费或享受额外服务。
usageTranslations.ar: تشترط البنوك وجود حد أدنى للرصيد لتجنب الرسوم الشهرية أو الحصول على ميزات.
usageTranslations.pt: Bancos exigem saldo mínimo para evitar taxas mensais ou acessar recursos.
usageTranslations.ru: Банки требуют поддерживать минимальный остаток для избежания ежемесячных комиссий или получения привилегий.
usageTranslations.ja: 銀行は月額手数料回避や特典のため最低残高を求める。
usageTranslations.it: Le banche richiedono un saldo minimo per evitare spese mensili o accedere a vantaggi.
usageTranslations.vi: Ngân hàng yêu cầu số dư tối thiểu để tránh phí dịch vụ hàng tháng.
usageTranslations.hi: बैंक ग्राहकों से मासिक शुल्क बचने या विशेष सुविधाओं के लिए न्यूनतम शेष राशि रखते हैं।
usageTranslations.th: ธนาคารกำหนดยอดเงินขั้นต่ำเพื่อหลีกเลี่ยงค่าบริการหรือรับสิทธิ์
usageTranslations.id: Bank mensyaratkan saldo minimum untuk menghindari biaya bulanan atau fitur akun.

terms.definition: A legal arrangement where a third party holds assets, funds, or documents on behalf of transacting parties until all contractual conditions are fulfilled.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Funds are held in escrow until both the buyer and seller meet all obligations under the purchase agreement, ensuring transaction security.

termTranslations.th: บัญชีเอสโครว์

usageTranslations.en: Funds are held in escrow until both the buyer and seller meet all obligations under the purchase agreement, ensuring transaction security.
usageTranslations.tr: Satıcı ve alıcı, sözleşme şartlarını tamamlayana kadar fonlar emanet hesapta tutulur; işlem güvenliği sağlanır.
usageTranslations.fr: Les fonds sont détenus sur un compte séquestre jusqu'à la réalisation des conditions par les deux parties.
usageTranslations.de: Mittel werden auf einem Treuhandkonto gehalten, bis Käufer und Verkäufer ihre Pflichten erfüllen.
usageTranslations.es: Los fondos se mantienen en una cuenta de garantía hasta que ambas partes cumplan sus obligaciones.
usageTranslations.zh: 在买卖双方完成所有协议条款前，资金存于托管账户，确保交易安全。
usageTranslations.ar: يحتفظ بالأموال في حساب ضمان حتى يفي البائع والمشتري بجميع الشروط.
usageTranslations.pt: Os fundos ficam em conta escrow até que ambas as partes cumpram as obrigações.
usageTranslations.ru: Средства хранятся на эскроу-счете до выполнения всех условий обеих сторон.
usageTranslations.ja: 売買両者が契約義務を果たすまで資金はエスクロー口座に保持される。
usageTranslations.it: I fondi restano su conto escrow finché entrambe le parti soddisfano gli obblighi.
usageTranslations.vi: Tiền giữ trong tài khoản ký quỹ cho đến khi các bên hoàn thành nghĩa vụ.
usageTranslations.hi: संपूर्ण अनुबंध शर्तें पूरी होने तक धनराशि एस्क्रो में रहती है।
usageTranslations.th: เงินจะถูกพักไว้ในบัญชีเอสโครว์จนกว่าคู่สัญญาจะปฏิบัติตามข้อตกลง
usageTranslations.id: Dana disimpan di rekening escrow sampai kewajiban terpenuhi.

terms.definition: A short-term, high-interest unsecured loan designed to cover the borrower's expenses until the next payday; subject to specific regulatory controls due to consumer risk.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Payday loans provide immediate cash but often carry high fees and interest rates, making them a regulated product in many countries to protect consumers.

termTranslations.th: เงินกู้วันเงินเดือนออก

usageTranslations.en: Payday loans provide immediate cash but often carry high fees and interest rates, making them a regulated product in many countries to protect consumers.
usageTranslations.tr: Maaş avansı kredisi hızlı nakit sağlar ancak yüksek faiz ve masraflar nedeniyle birçok ülkede sıkı düzenlemeye tabidir.
usageTranslations.fr: Les prêts sur salaire offrent des liquidités immédiates, mais sont fortement réglementés à cause des frais élevés.
usageTranslations.de: Kurzfristige Zahltagskredite bieten schnelle Liquidität, sind aber wegen hoher Kosten streng reguliert.
usageTranslations.es: Los préstamos de día de pago ofrecen efectivo inmediato, pero suelen tener altos intereses y son regulados.
usageTranslations.zh: 发薪日贷款能迅速提供现金，但高利率使其受严格监管。
usageTranslations.ar: تقدم قروض يوم الدفع سيولة فورية لكنها خاضعة لرقابة بسبب الرسوم المرتفعة.
usageTranslations.pt: Empréstimos consignados de salário oferecem dinheiro imediato, mas são altamente regulados.
usageTranslations.ru: Займы до зарплаты предоставляют быстрые средства, но строго регулируются из-за высоких процентов.
usageTranslations.ja: 給料日前ローンは即時現金を提供するが高金利のため厳しく規制される。
usageTranslations.it: I prestiti anticipo stipendio danno liquidità immediata ma sono fortemente regolamentati.
usageTranslations.vi: Khoản vay ngày lĩnh lương cung cấp tiền mặt ngay nhưng bị quản lý do lãi suất cao.
usageTranslations.hi: पेडे लोन त्वरित नकद देते हैं पर उच्च ब्याज के कारण कड़ी निगरानी में हैं।
usageTranslations.th: เงินกู้วันเงินเดือนออกให้เงินสดทันทีแต่มีดอกเบี้ยสูงจึงถูกควบคุม
usageTranslations.id: Pinjaman hari gajian memberikan dana cepat, tapi diatur ketat karena bunga tinggi.

terms.definition: A payment card issued by a financial institution that enables the holder to borrow funds within a credit limit to make purchases or withdraw cash, subject to repayment with interest as per contractual terms.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Banks set individual credit limits on each credit card account based on creditworthiness and regulatory guidelines, and all outstanding balances must be repaid monthly or incur interest.

termTranslations.th: บัตรเครดิต

usageTranslations.en: Banks set individual credit limits on each credit card account based on creditworthiness and regulatory guidelines, and all outstanding balances must be repaid monthly or incur interest.
usageTranslations.tr: Bankalar, kredi kartı hesaplarına, kredi değerliliği ve düzenlemelere göre limit belirler; borçlar aylık ödenmezse faiz işler.
usageTranslations.fr: Les banques fixent des plafonds sur chaque carte de crédit selon la solvabilité et la réglementation; les soldes doivent être remboursés mensuellement.
usageTranslations.de: Banken legen für jede Kreditkarte je nach Bonität und Vorgaben ein Limit fest; offene Beträge müssen monatlich beglichen werden.
usageTranslations.es: Los bancos establecen límites en cada tarjeta de crédito según solvencia y normas; los saldos deben pagarse mensualmente.
usageTranslations.zh: 银行根据信用等级和监管规定为每张信用卡设定额度，未还清余额需按月支付利息。
usageTranslations.ar: تحدد البنوك حدودًا فردية لكل بطاقة ائتمان وفق الجدارة الائتمانية والتعليمات التنظيمية؛ يجب سداد الرصيد شهريًا.
usageTranslations.pt: Bancos definem limites de crédito individuais com base na análise de crédito e regulamentação; os saldos devem ser pagos mensalmente.
usageTranslations.ru: Банки устанавливают лимиты по кредитным картам на основании платежеспособности и требований; задолженность подлежит ежемесячной оплате.
usageTranslations.ja: 銀行は信用力と規制に基づきクレジットカードごとに限度額を設定、未払い残高には月々利息が発生します。
usageTranslations.it: Le banche fissano limiti individuali sulle carte di credito in base all’affidabilità e alle regole; i saldi devono essere rimborsati mensilmente.
usageTranslations.vi: Ngân hàng đặt hạn mức tín dụng từng thẻ dựa trên điểm tín dụng; dư nợ phải trả hàng tháng hoặc chịu lãi.
usageTranslations.hi: बैंक क्रेडिट कार्ड की सीमा ग्राहक की योग्यता के अनुसार तय करते हैं; शेष राशि मासिक या ब्याज सहित चुकानी होती है।
usageTranslations.th: ธนาคารกำหนดวงเงินบัตรเครดิตแต่ละใบตามเครดิตและข้อบังคับ ยอดค้างต้องชำระทุกเดือน
usageTranslations.id: Bank menetapkan limit kredit tiap kartu kredit sesuai analisa kredit; saldo harus dibayar bulanan.

terms.definition: A numerical rating derived from a borrower’s credit history, used by lenders to assess creditworthiness and risk in granting loans or credit products.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Financial institutions rely on credit scores to evaluate loan applications and set interest rates, with higher scores indicating lower perceived risk.

termTranslations.th: คะแนนเครดิต

usageTranslations.en: Financial institutions rely on credit scores to evaluate loan applications and set interest rates, with higher scores indicating lower perceived risk.
usageTranslations.tr: Finans kuruluşları, kredi başvurularını ve faiz oranlarını değerlendirmek için kredi notuna güvenir; yüksek not düşük risk anlamına gelir.
usageTranslations.fr: Les établissements financiers utilisent le score de crédit pour évaluer les demandes de prêt; un score élevé signale un risque réduit.
usageTranslations.de: Kreditinstitute nutzen den Kreditwürdigkeitsscore zur Prüfung von Kreditanträgen; höhere Scores bedeuten geringeres Risiko.
usageTranslations.es: Las instituciones financieras usan el puntaje de crédito para evaluar préstamos; puntajes altos indican menor riesgo.
usageTranslations.zh: 金融机构依赖信用评分评估贷款申请，高分代表低风险。
usageTranslations.ar: تعتمد المؤسسات المالية على درجة الائتمان لتقييم طلبات القروض؛ الدرجة الأعلى تعني مخاطرة أقل.
usageTranslations.pt: Instituições financeiras usam o score de crédito para avaliar empréstimos; pontuação alta indica menor risco.
usageTranslations.ru: Финансовые организации используют кредитный рейтинг для оценки заявок; высокий рейтинг — низкий риск.
usageTranslations.ja: 金融機関は信用スコアを参考に融資や金利を決定し、高スコアは低リスクを示します。
usageTranslations.it: Le istituzioni finanziarie si affidano al punteggio di credito per valutare i prestiti; un punteggio alto indica minore rischio.
usageTranslations.vi: Các tổ chức tài chính dựa vào điểm tín dụng để xét duyệt và định lãi suất; điểm cao là ít rủi ro.
usageTranslations.hi: वित्तीय संस्थाएँ ऋण के लिए क्रेडिट स्कोर देखती हैं; ऊँचा स्कोर कम जोखिम दर्शाता है।
usageTranslations.th: สถาบันการเงินใช้คะแนนเครดิตประเมินสินเชื่อ คะแนนสูงคือความเสี่ยงต่ำ
usageTranslations.id: Lembaga keuangan menggunakan skor kredit untuk mengevaluasi pinjaman; skor tinggi berarti risiko rendah.

terms.definition: A legal right or claim by a creditor over an asset of a debtor as collateral to secure a debt or obligation, enforceable until the obligation is satisfied.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: A bank may place a lien on property or assets until a secured loan is repaid in full, ensuring legal claim in case of default.

termTranslations.th: สิทธิ์ยึดหน่วง

usageTranslations.en: A bank may place a lien on property or assets until a secured loan is repaid in full, ensuring legal claim in case of default.
usageTranslations.tr: Banka, teminatlı kredi tamamen ödenene kadar taşınmaz veya varlık üzerinde rehin hakkı tesis edebilir.
usageTranslations.fr: La banque peut placer une sûreté réelle sur un bien jusqu'au remboursement intégral du prêt garanti.
usageTranslations.de: Eine Bank kann ein Pfandrecht auf Vermögen bis zur Rückzahlung des Darlehens halten.
usageTranslations.es: El banco puede imponer un gravamen hasta el pago total del préstamo garantizado.
usageTranslations.zh: 银行可对财产设立留置权，直到担保贷款偿还完毕。
usageTranslations.ar: قد يفرض البنك حق حجز على الأصول حتى سداد القرض بالكامل.
usageTranslations.pt: O banco pode aplicar penhor até a quitação do empréstimo garantido.
usageTranslations.ru: Банк может наложить залоговое право на имущество до погашения кредита.
usageTranslations.ja: 銀行は担保付きローンが完済されるまで担保権を行使することがある。
usageTranslations.it: La banca può esercitare il diritto di pegno fino al rimborso del prestito garantito.
usageTranslations.vi: Ngân hàng có thể áp đặt quyền giữ tài sản cho tới khi khoản vay được trả hết.
usageTranslations.hi: बैंक सुरक्षित ऋण चुकाने तक संपत्ति पर लीएन अधिकार रख सकता है।
usageTranslations.th: ธนาคารมีสิทธิ์ยึดหน่วงสินทรัพย์จนกว่าจะชำระหนี้ครบ
usageTranslations.id: Bank dapat menempatkan hak tanggungan sampai pinjaman lunas.

terms.definition: A revolving credit facility offered by a financial institution that allows a borrower to draw funds up to a specified limit at any time, repaying and reborrowing as needed.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Businesses often use a line of credit to finance working capital needs, accessing funds when required and only paying interest on amounts drawn.

termTranslations.th: วงเงินสินเชื่อ

usageTranslations.en: Businesses often use a line of credit to finance working capital needs, accessing funds when required and only paying interest on amounts drawn.
usageTranslations.tr: İşletmeler, işletme sermayesini finanse etmek için kredi limiti kullanır; yalnızca kullanılan tutar üzerinden faiz öder.
usageTranslations.fr: Les entreprises utilisent une ligne de crédit pour financer le fonds de roulement; seuls les montants utilisés sont facturés en intérêts.
usageTranslations.de: Unternehmen nutzen Kreditlinien zur Finanzierung des Betriebskapitals; Zinsen fallen nur für abgerufene Beträge an.
usageTranslations.es: Las empresas usan líneas de crédito para financiar capital de trabajo y solo pagan intereses por los montos utilizados.
usageTranslations.zh: 企业常用信用额度支持营运资金，仅对已用部分支付利息。
usageTranslations.ar: تستخدم الشركات خط ائتمان لتمويل رأس المال التشغيلي وتدفع فوائد فقط على المبالغ المسحوبة.
usageTranslations.pt: Empresas usam linhas de crédito para capital de giro, pagando juros apenas sobre valores utilizados.
usageTranslations.ru: Компании используют кредитную линию для оборотного капитала, платя проценты только за использованные суммы.
usageTranslations.ja: 企業は運転資金のため信用枠を使い、引出分のみ利息を支払う。
usageTranslations.it: Le aziende usano una linea di credito per finanziare il capitale circolante e pagano interessi solo sulle somme prelevate.
usageTranslations.vi: Doanh nghiệp dùng hạn mức tín dụng cho vốn lưu động, chỉ trả lãi phần đã dùng.
usageTranslations.hi: व्यवसाय कार्यशील पूंजी के लिए लाइन ऑफ क्रेडिट का उपयोग करते हैं, केवल निकासी राशि पर ब्याज देते हैं।
usageTranslations.th: ธุรกิจใช้วงเงินสินเชื่อเพื่อเงินทุนหมุนเวียนและจ่ายดอกเบี้ยเฉพาะส่วนที่ใช้
usageTranslations.id: Perusahaan memakai fasilitas kredit untuk modal kerja dan hanya membayar bunga atas dana yang dipakai.

terms.definition: A check guaranteed by the issuing bank, which verifies that sufficient funds exist and sets aside the amount for payment, ensuring payment to the recipient.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: A certified check ensures payment as the bank verifies availability of funds and reserves the check amount until it is cashed or deposited.

termTranslations.th: เช็คเงินสดที่ธนาคารรับรอง

usageTranslations.en: A certified check ensures payment as the bank verifies availability of funds and reserves the check amount until it is cashed or deposited.
usageTranslations.tr: Banka teminatlı çek, karşılığın banka tarafından ayrılması ve onaylanmasıyla ödemeyi garanti eder.
usageTranslations.fr: Le chèque certifié garantit le paiement, la banque réservant le montant.
usageTranslations.de: Ein bestätigter Scheck garantiert die Zahlung, da die Bank die Summe reserviert.
usageTranslations.es: El cheque certificado garantiza el pago ya que el banco reserva el importe.
usageTranslations.zh: 保付支票由银行确认资金充足并预留，确保付款。
usageTranslations.ar: يضمن الشيك المصدق الدفع حيث تؤكد البنك توافر الرصيد وتحجز المبلغ.
usageTranslations.pt: Cheque administrativo garante o pagamento pois o banco reserva o valor.
usageTranslations.ru: Сертифицированный чек гарантирует платеж; банк резервирует сумму.
usageTranslations.ja: 認証小切手は銀行が資金確保し支払いを保証する。
usageTranslations.it: L'assegno circolare garantisce il pagamento poiché la banca riserva la somma.
usageTranslations.vi: Séc xác nhận đảm bảo thanh toán do ngân hàng xác nhận và giữ tiền.
usageTranslations.hi: प्रमाणित चेक में बैंक धनराशि आरक्षित कर भुगतान की गारंटी देता है।
usageTranslations.th: เช็คที่ธนาคารรับรองรับประกันการจ่ายเงินเพราะธนาคารสำรองยอดไว้
usageTranslations.id: Cek bersertifikat menjamin pembayaran karena bank telah memverifikasi dan menahan dana.

terms.definition: A status indicating a credit or loan account has exceeded its approved credit limit, potentially incurring fees and regulatory action according to card or credit agreements.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: An overlimit fee may be charged when a cardholder's spending exceeds the preset credit limit, as specified in the card agreement.

termTranslations.th: เกินวงเงิน

usageTranslations.en: An overlimit fee may be charged when a cardholder's spending exceeds the preset credit limit, as specified in the card agreement.
usageTranslations.tr: Kart sahibinin harcaması belirlenen kredi limitini aştığında limit aşım ücreti alınabilir.
usageTranslations.fr: Des frais de dépassement peuvent être facturés si le titulaire dépasse le plafond de crédit.
usageTranslations.de: Bei Überschreitung des Kreditlimits kann eine Überlimit-Gebühr anfallen.
usageTranslations.es: Se puede cobrar una comisión por exceso si el gasto supera el límite.
usageTranslations.zh: 当消费超出信用额度时，可能会收取超限费。
usageTranslations.ar: قد يتم فرض رسوم تجاوز الحد إذا تجاوزت النفقات الحد الائتماني.
usageTranslations.pt: Pode ser cobrada taxa por exceder o limite pré-estabelecido.
usageTranslations.ru: За превышение лимита может взиматься комиссия согласно договору.
usageTranslations.ja: 利用限度額を超えると手数料が課されることがある。
usageTranslations.it: Una commissione può essere addebitata se si supera il limite di credito.
usageTranslations.vi: Phí vượt hạn mức sẽ bị thu nếu tiêu vượt quá hạn mức tín dụng.
usageTranslations.hi: ओवरलिमिट शुल्क तब लिया जा सकता है जब खर्च सीमा पार कर जाए।
usageTranslations.th: หากใช้จ่ายเกินวงเงิน อาจถูกเรียกเก็บค่าธรรมเนียมเกินวงเงิน
usageTranslations.id: Biaya overlimit dikenakan jika pengeluaran melebihi batas kredit.

terms.definition: A numeric or alphanumeric code used to authenticate the holder of a payment card, ATM card, or secure banking access, mandated by EMV and PCI DSS standards.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: A cardholder must enter their PIN at an ATM or point-of-sale terminal to authorize cash withdrawals or transactions.

termTranslations.th: รหัส PIN

usageTranslations.en: A cardholder must enter their PIN at an ATM or point-of-sale terminal to authorize cash withdrawals or transactions.
usageTranslations.tr: Kart sahibi, ATM veya POS cihazında işlemi onaylamak için PIN girmelidir.
usageTranslations.fr: Le titulaire doit saisir son code PIN pour valider un retrait ou un paiement.
usageTranslations.de: Der Karteninhaber muss die PIN am Automaten eingeben, um Transaktionen zu bestätigen.
usageTranslations.es: El titular debe ingresar su PIN para autorizar operaciones.
usageTranslations.zh: 持卡人在ATM或终端输入密码以完成交易。
usageTranslations.ar: يجب إدخال رمز PIN للموافقة على السحب أو العملية.
usageTranslations.pt: O titular deve digitar o PIN para aprovar a transação.
usageTranslations.ru: Владелец должен ввести ПИН для подтверждения операций.
usageTranslations.ja: カード保有者はATMやPOSで暗証番号を入力する必要がある。
usageTranslations.it: Il titolare deve inserire il PIN per autorizzare le operazioni.
usageTranslations.vi: Chủ thẻ phải nhập mã PIN để xác nhận giao dịch.
usageTranslations.hi: कार्डधारक को ट्रांजैक्शन के लिए पिन डालना होता है।
usageTranslations.th: ผู้ถือบัตรต้องใส่รหัส PIN ที่ ATM หรือ POS เพื่ออนุมัติธุรกรรม
usageTranslations.id: Pemegang kartu harus memasukkan PIN di ATM atau POS untuk transaksi.

terms.definition: An item, such as a loan payment or bill, that has not been paid by its due date and is classified as overdue per banking regulations and credit reporting standards.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: A past due item on a loan account may trigger penalty interest and negative credit reporting, depending on the length of delinquency.

termTranslations.th: รายการค้างชำระ

usageTranslations.en: A past due item on a loan account may trigger penalty interest and negative credit reporting, depending on the length of delinquency.
usageTranslations.tr: Bir kredide vadesi geçmiş kalem, gecikme faizi ve olumsuz kredi raporlamasına yol açabilir.
usageTranslations.fr: Une échéance impayée peut entraîner des pénalités et une déclaration défavorable.
usageTranslations.de: Überfällige Positionen können zu Strafzinsen und negativer Bonität führen.
usageTranslations.es: Un partida vencida puede generar intereses de demora y reporte negativo.
usageTranslations.zh: 贷款中的逾期项目可能导致罚息和负面征信记录。
usageTranslations.ar: العناصر المتأخرة قد تؤدي إلى فوائد جزائية وتقرير ائتماني سلبي.
usageTranslations.pt: Item vencido pode gerar multa e registro negativo.
usageTranslations.ru: Просроченный платёж может привести к штрафам и плохой кредитной истории.
usageTranslations.ja: 延滞項目は遅延利息や信用情報に悪影響を与える場合がある。
usageTranslations.it: Un elemento scaduto può causare interessi di mora e segnalazione negativa.
usageTranslations.vi: Khoản quá hạn có thể bị phạt lãi và ghi nhận tín dụng xấu.
usageTranslations.hi: बकाया मद पर जुर्माना और नकारात्मक क्रेडिट रिपोर्ट आ सकती है।
usageTranslations.th: รายการค้างชำระอาจโดนปรับและถูกรายงานเครดิตลบ
usageTranslations.id: Item jatuh tempo dapat memicu bunga denda dan catatan kredit buruk.

terms.definition: The complete repayment of an outstanding loan balance, including principal, interest, and any accrued charges, thereby closing the loan obligation as per contract.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: The borrower requested a payoff statement to close the mortgage loan and transfer the property title.

termTranslations.th: ชำระหนี้ทั้งหมด

usageTranslations.en: The borrower requested a payoff statement to close the mortgage loan and transfer the property title.
usageTranslations.tr: Borçlu, konut kredisini kapatıp tapu devri için kapanış bakiyesi talep etti.
usageTranslations.fr: L'emprunteur a demandé un relevé de règlement intégral pour solder son prêt et transférer le titre.
usageTranslations.de: Der Kreditnehmer forderte eine Gesamttilgungsabrechnung zur Ablösung des Hypothekendarlehens.
usageTranslations.es: El prestatario solicitó una liquidación para cancelar la hipoteca y transferir el título.
usageTranslations.zh: 借款人要求结清证明以注销抵押贷款并过户产权。
usageTranslations.ar: طلب المقترض كشف التسوية لإغلاق الرهن ونقل الملكية.
usageTranslations.pt: O mutuário solicitou quitação para encerrar o financiamento imobiliário e transferir o imóvel.
usageTranslations.ru: Заёмщик запросил справку о полном погашении для закрытия ипотеки и переоформления титула.
usageTranslations.ja: 借り手は住宅ローン完済証明書を請求し名義変更した。
usageTranslations.it: Il debitore ha richiesto il conteggio per estinguere il mutuo e trasferire il titolo.
usageTranslations.vi: Bên vay yêu cầu bảng thanh toán hết khoản vay và chuyển quyền sở hữu.
usageTranslations.hi: ऋणकर्ता ने ऋण बंद करने और संपत्ति स्थानांतरण के लिए भुगतान पत्र मांगा।
usageTranslations.th: ลูกค้าขอใบชำระหนี้ทั้งหมดเพื่อนำไปโอนกรรมสิทธิ์
usageTranslations.id: Peminjam meminta surat pelunasan untuk menutup KPR dan mengalihkan sertifikat.

terms.definition: An instruction by an account holder to a bank to refuse payment on a specific check or transaction before it has been processed, subject to banking terms and fees.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: A stop payment request must be submitted to the bank before the check clears, and fees may apply under account terms.

termTranslations.th: ระงับการจ่ายเงิน

usageTranslations.en: A stop payment request must be submitted to the bank before the check clears, and fees may apply under account terms.
usageTranslations.tr: Çek işleme alınmadan önce ödeme durdurma talebi bankaya iletilmelidir ve ücret uygulanabilir.
usageTranslations.fr: Une opposition doit être faite avant l'encaissement du chèque et peut entraîner des frais.
usageTranslations.de: Eine Zahlungssperre muss vor Einlösung des Schecks beantragt werden, Gebühren möglich.
usageTranslations.es: La orden de no pago debe solicitarse antes de que se cobre el cheque y puede tener comisiones.
usageTranslations.zh: 止付申请须在支票兑现前提交，可能收取手续费。
usageTranslations.ar: يجب تقديم طلب إيقاف الدفع قبل صرف الشيك وقد يتم فرض رسوم.
usageTranslations.pt: O pedido de sustação deve ser feito antes da compensação do cheque, sujeito a taxas.
usageTranslations.ru: Запрос на отзыв платежа подаётся до проведения чека, возможны комиссии.
usageTranslations.ja: 支払停止依頼は小切手決済前に行う必要があり手数料が発生する場合がある。
usageTranslations.it: La richiesta di blocco deve essere fatta prima dell’incasso, con possibili commissioni.
usageTranslations.vi: Yêu cầu chặn thanh toán phải gửi trước khi séc được thanh toán, có thể bị tính phí.
usageTranslations.hi: भुगतान रोकने का अनुरोध चेक क्लियर होने से पहले देना होता है, और शुल्क लग सकता है।
usageTranslations.th: ต้องแจ้งระงับก่อนเช็คผ่าน อาจมีค่าธรรมเนียม
usageTranslations.id: Permintaan penghentian pembayaran harus dilakukan sebelum cek dicairkan dan mungkin ada biaya.

terms.definition: A payment card linked directly to a checking or savings account, enabling electronic access to funds for purchases or cash withdrawals, governed by network and regulatory standards.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: A debit card enables customers to make purchases or withdraw cash with immediate deduction from their bank account.

termTranslations.th: บัตรเดบิต

usageTranslations.en: A debit card enables customers to make purchases or withdraw cash with immediate deduction from their bank account.
usageTranslations.tr: Banka kartı, hesaptan anında para çekilerek alışveriş veya nakit çekim yapılmasını sağlar.
usageTranslations.fr: La carte de débit permet d’acheter ou retirer de l’argent en débitant immédiatement le compte.
usageTranslations.de: Mit der Debitkarte werden Einkäufe oder Barabhebungen direkt vom Konto abgebucht.
usageTranslations.es: La tarjeta de débito permite compras y retiros con cargo inmediato a la cuenta.
usageTranslations.zh: 借记卡使用户可以即时从账户扣款购物或取现。
usageTranslations.ar: بطاقة الخصم تتيح المشتريات أو السحب الفوري من الحساب البنكي.
usageTranslations.pt: O cartão de débito permite compras ou saques com débito imediato na conta.
usageTranslations.ru: Дебетовая карта позволяет оплачивать покупки и снимать наличные с немедленным списанием.
usageTranslations.ja: デビットカードは即座に口座から引き落とされる。
usageTranslations.it: La carta di debito consente acquisti o prelievi con addebito immediato.
usageTranslations.vi: Thẻ ghi nợ cho phép mua sắm hoặc rút tiền với trừ tiền ngay lập tức.
usageTranslations.hi: डेबिट कार्ड से खाते से तुरंत पैसे कटकर खरीदारी या निकासी होती है।
usageTranslations.th: บัตรเดบิตสามารถซื้อสินค้าหรือถอนเงินทันทีจากบัญชี
usageTranslations.id: Kartu debit memungkinkan pembelian atau penarikan tunai dengan pemotongan langsung.

terms.definition: A bank deposit account that is repayable on demand without advance notice, typically used for liquidity management in corporate or interbank operations, and earns interest at a variable rate.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Corporates use call deposit accounts for daily liquidity needs, allowing them to withdraw funds at any time without penalty and earn interest until withdrawn.

termTranslations.th: เงินฝากถอนตามคำขอ

usageTranslations.en: Corporates use call deposit accounts for daily liquidity needs, allowing them to withdraw funds at any time without penalty and earn interest until withdrawn.
usageTranslations.tr: Şirketler, günlük likidite ihtiyacı için vadesiz mevduat kullanır; istedikleri an ceza olmaksızın para çekebilir ve faiz elde ederler.
usageTranslations.fr: Les entreprises utilisent des dépôts à vue pour la liquidité quotidienne, retirant des fonds à tout moment sans pénalité et percevant des intérêts.
usageTranslations.de: Unternehmen nutzen Tagesgeldkonten für tägliche Liquidität; Gelder können jederzeit ohne Strafe abgehoben werden.
usageTranslations.es: Las empresas usan depósitos a la vista para liquidez diaria, pudiendo retirar fondos en cualquier momento y recibir intereses.
usageTranslations.zh: 企业为日常流动性使用活期存款，可随时取款且享受利息。
usageTranslations.ar: تستخدم الشركات ودائع تحت الطلب للسيولة اليومية؛ يمكنها السحب بأي وقت دون غرامة وتحصل على فائدة.
usageTranslations.pt: Empresas utilizam depósitos à ordem para liquidez diária, podendo sacar a qualquer momento e receber juros.
usageTranslations.ru: Компании используют счета до востребования для ежедневной ликвидности, снимая средства в любое время и получая проценты.
usageTranslations.ja: 企業は日常流動性のためコール預金を活用し、いつでも無手数料で引き出し利息を得られる。
usageTranslations.it: Le imprese usano depositi a chiamata per la liquidità quotidiana, potendo prelevare fondi in qualsiasi momento.
usageTranslations.vi: Doanh nghiệp dùng tiền gửi không kỳ hạn cho nhu cầu thanh khoản, có thể rút bất kỳ lúc nào và nhận lãi.
usageTranslations.hi: कंपनियाँ दैनिक नकदी की जरूरत के लिए कॉल डिपॉजिट खातों का उपयोग करती हैं, बिना दंड के कभी भी धन निकाल सकती हैं।
usageTranslations.th: องค์กรใช้เงินฝากถอนตามคำขอเพื่อสภาพคล่องรายวัน ถอนเมื่อไรก็ได้และได้รับดอกเบี้ย
usageTranslations.id: Perusahaan memakai giro untuk kebutuhan likuiditas harian; dana dapat diambil kapan saja tanpa penalti.

terms.definition: The benchmark interest rate that commercial banks charge their most creditworthy corporate customers, influencing rates for loans, mortgages, and other financial products as set by central bank policy or major banks.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: A bank’s variable loan rates are typically tied to changes in the prime lending rate, which reflects central bank monetary policy.

termTranslations.th: อัตราดอกเบี้ยชั้นดี

usageTranslations.en: A bank’s variable loan rates are typically tied to changes in the prime lending rate, which reflects central bank monetary policy.
usageTranslations.tr: Bankaların değişken faizli kredi oranları genellikle referans faiz oranındaki değişikliklere bağlıdır.
usageTranslations.fr: Les taux des prêts variables sont souvent indexés sur le taux préférentiel, reflet de la politique monétaire.
usageTranslations.de: Variable Kreditzinsen orientieren sich meist am Leitzins, der die Notenbankpolitik widerspiegelt.
usageTranslations.es: Las tasas variables suelen estar ligadas a la tasa preferencial, reflejando la política monetaria.
usageTranslations.zh: 银行的浮动贷款利率通常与最优惠贷款利率变化相关，反映货币政策。
usageTranslations.ar: عادة ما ترتبط أسعار الفائدة المتغيرة بالقروض بسعر الإقراض الأساسي.
usageTranslations.pt: Taxas de empréstimos variáveis costumam seguir a taxa preferencial definida pelo banco central.
usageTranslations.ru: Переменные ставки по кредитам обычно привязаны к основной ставке кредитования.
usageTranslations.ja: 銀行の変動金利ローンは通常、プライムレートの変動に連動します。
usageTranslations.it: I tassi variabili sui prestiti sono legati al tasso primario, riflettendo la politica monetaria.
usageTranslations.vi: Lãi suất vay thả nổi thường gắn liền với lãi suất ưu đãi do ngân hàng trung ương điều chỉnh.
usageTranslations.hi: बैंक के परिवर्तनीय ऋण दरें प्राइम लेंडिंग रेट के अनुसार बदलती हैं।
usageTranslations.th: อัตราดอกเบี้ยเงินกู้แบบลอยตัวผูกกับอัตราดอกเบี้ยชั้นดีซึ่งสะท้อนนโยบายการเงินของธนาคารกลาง
usageTranslations.id: Suku bunga kredit variabel biasanya mengikuti suku bunga utama yang ditetapkan bank sentral.

terms.definition: A bank account that automatically transfers (sweeps) amounts above or below a certain threshold into a higher interest-bearing investment or to cover shortfalls, optimizing liquidity and returns for account holders.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Corporations use sweep accounts to maximize daily interest by automatically transferring surplus cash into money market funds each night.

termTranslations.th: บัญชีสวีป

usageTranslations.en: Corporations use sweep accounts to maximize daily interest by automatically transferring surplus cash into money market funds each night.
usageTranslations.tr: Şirketler, her gece fazla nakdi otomatik olarak likidite fonuna aktaran süpürme hesabı ile günlük faiz getirilerini maksimize eder.
usageTranslations.fr: Les entreprises utilisent des comptes de virement automatique pour maximiser les intérêts quotidiens en transférant automatiquement les excédents de trésorerie.
usageTranslations.de: Unternehmen nutzen Sweep-Konten zur automatischen Übertragung überschüssiger Liquidität in Geldmarktfonds.
usageTranslations.es: Las empresas usan cuentas sweep para maximizar intereses diarios transfiriendo el excedente a fondos del mercado monetario.
usageTranslations.zh: 企业通过自动归集账户将多余现金转入货币市场基金，最大化日利息。
usageTranslations.ar: تستخدم الشركات حساب التحويل التلقائي لتعظيم الفائدة اليومية بتحويل الفائض تلقائياً إلى صناديق سوق المال.
usageTranslations.pt: Empresas usam contas sweep para maximizar juros diários transferindo automaticamente o excedente para fundos de mercado monetário.
usageTranslations.ru: Компании используют счета со свип-операциями для автоматического перевода излишков на денежный рынок.
usageTranslations.ja: 企業はスイープ口座で余剰資金を毎晩自動的にマネーマーケットファンドに振替えて日々の利息を最大化する。
usageTranslations.it: Le aziende usano conti sweep per massimizzare l’interesse trasferendo automaticamente l’eccesso di liquidità.
usageTranslations.vi: Doanh nghiệp dùng tài khoản sweep chuyển tiền dư tự động để tối ưu hóa lãi suất hằng ngày.
usageTranslations.hi: कंपनियाँ स्वचालित स्वीप खातों से अधिशेष धनराशि को प्रतिदिन उच्च ब्याज खाते में भेजती हैं।
usageTranslations.th: องค์กรใช้บัญชีสวีปโอนเงินส่วนเกินไปยังกองทุนตลาดเงินโดยอัตโนมัติ
usageTranslations.id: Perusahaan menggunakan rekening sweep untuk memaksimalkan bunga harian dengan transfer otomatis ke reksa dana pasar uang.

terms.definition: An electronic banking instruction set by the account holder to move funds automatically between accounts on predetermined dates or recurring intervals, commonly used for payments and savings.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Many individuals set up scheduled transfers to pay recurring bills or move money to savings accounts on a monthly basis.

termTranslations.th: โอนเงินตามกำหนด

usageTranslations.en: Many individuals set up scheduled transfers to pay recurring bills or move money to savings accounts on a monthly basis.
usageTranslations.tr: Birçok kişi, faturalarını ödemek veya birikim hesabına aylık para aktarmak için planlı havale talimatı oluşturur.
usageTranslations.fr: Beaucoup programment des virements pour régler des factures récurrentes ou alimenter un compte d’épargne chaque mois.
usageTranslations.de: Viele richten geplante Überträge ein, um wiederkehrende Rechnungen zu bezahlen oder zu sparen.
usageTranslations.es: Muchas personas configuran transferencias programadas para pagar facturas o ahorrar cada mes.
usageTranslations.zh: 许多人设置定期转账以按月支付账单或存钱。
usageTranslations.ar: يقوم الكثيرون بإعداد تحويلات مجدولة لدفع الفواتير أو التوفير.
usageTranslations.pt: Muitos configuram transferências programadas para pagar contas recorrentes ou poupar mensalmente.
usageTranslations.ru: Многие устанавливают запланированные переводы для оплаты счетов или накоплений.
usageTranslations.ja: 多くの人が定期振込を設定し、毎月請求書や貯蓄口座に資金を送る。
usageTranslations.it: Molti impostano trasferimenti programmati per pagare bollette o risparmiare ogni mese.
usageTranslations.vi: Nhiều người đặt lệnh chuyển khoản định kỳ để thanh toán hóa đơn hàng tháng.
usageTranslations.hi: कई लोग मासिक बिल या बचत के लिए निर्धारित ट्रांसफर सेट करते हैं।
usageTranslations.th: หลายคนตั้งค่าโอนเงินตามกำหนดเพื่อชำระบิลหรือออมเงิน
usageTranslations.id: Banyak orang mengatur transfer terjadwal untuk membayar tagihan bulanan atau menabung.

terms.definition: A dematerialized account used to hold securities such as shares and bonds in electronic format, enabling seamless trading and settlement, primarily in regulated markets.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Investors must open a demat account with a depository participant to electronically hold and transfer shares on regulated exchanges.

termTranslations.th: บัญชีหลักทรัพย์อิเล็กทรอนิกส์

usageTranslations.en: Investors must open a demat account with a depository participant to electronically hold and transfer shares on regulated exchanges.
usageTranslations.tr: Yatırımcılar, borsada menkul kıymet alım-satımı için aracı kurumda menkul kıymet hesabı açmalıdır.
usageTranslations.fr: Les investisseurs doivent ouvrir un compte dématérialisé pour détenir et transférer des titres électroniquement.
usageTranslations.de: Anleger müssen für Wertpapierhandel ein Wertpapierdepot bei einer Depotbank eröffnen.
usageTranslations.es: Los inversores abren una cuenta dematerializada para custodiar y transferir valores.
usageTranslations.zh: 投资者须开立证券账户以电子化持有和转让股票。
usageTranslations.ar: يجب على المستثمرين فتح حساب ديمات للاحتفاظ ونقل الأوراق المالية إلكترونياً.
usageTranslations.pt: Investidores abrem conta demat para manter e transferir títulos eletronicamente.
usageTranslations.ru: Инвесторы открывают депозитарный счёт для хранения и перевода ценных бумаг.
usageTranslations.ja: 投資家はデマット口座を開設して証券を電子的に保有・移転する。
usageTranslations.it: Gli investitori aprono un conto dematerializzato per la gestione elettronica dei titoli.
usageTranslations.vi: Nhà đầu tư mở tài khoản chứng khoán để lưu ký cổ phiếu điện tử.
usageTranslations.hi: निवेशकों को शेयरों की इलेक्ट्रॉनिक होल्डिंग के लिए डीमैट खाता खोलना होता है।
usageTranslations.th: นักลงทุนต้องเปิดบัญชีหลักทรัพย์อิเล็กทรอนิกส์สำหรับถือหุ้น
usageTranslations.id: Investor membuka akun demat untuk menyimpan dan mentransfer saham secara elektronik.

terms.definition: Negative data on a borrower's credit report such as late payments, defaults, or bankruptcies, which adversely affect credit assessment and lending decisions.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Lenders review derogatory information in credit reports such as loan defaults and overdue accounts before approving new credit facilities.

termTranslations.th: ข้อมูลเครดิตเสีย

usageTranslations.en: Lenders review derogatory information in credit reports such as loan defaults and overdue accounts before approving new credit facilities.
usageTranslations.tr: Kredi kuruluşları, yeni kredi vermeden önce müşteri raporlarındaki olumsuz kayıtları (temerrüt, gecikmiş borç) inceler.
usageTranslations.fr: Les prêteurs examinent les informations négatives du rapport de crédit avant d'approuver un prêt.
usageTranslations.de: Kreditgeber prüfen negative Einträge in der Schufa vor Kreditvergabe.
usageTranslations.es: Las entidades revisan información negativa antes de conceder crédito.
usageTranslations.zh: 放贷机构在批准新贷款前会审核不良信用信息。
usageTranslations.ar: يقوم المقرضون بمراجعة المعلومات السلبية قبل الموافقة على ائتمان جديد.
usageTranslations.pt: Credores analisam informações negativas antes de aprovar crédito.
usageTranslations.ru: Кредиторы проверяют негативную информацию в отчёте перед одобрением кредита.
usageTranslations.ja: 貸し手は新規融資前にネガティブ情報を確認する。
usageTranslations.it: I creditori esaminano le informazioni negative prima di concedere nuovo credito.
usageTranslations.vi: Ngân hàng xem xét thông tin xấu trước khi phê duyệt khoản vay.
usageTranslations.hi: ऋणदाता, नए ऋण की मंज़ूरी से पहले रिपोर्ट में नकारात्मक जानकारी देखते हैं।
usageTranslations.th: ผู้ให้กู้ตรวจสอบข้อมูลเครดิตเสียก่อนอนุมัติสินเชื่อใหม่
usageTranslations.id: Pemberi pinjaman meninjau informasi negatif sebelum menyetujui kredit baru.

terms.definition: A personal finance measure that compares an individual's total monthly debt payments to their gross monthly income, used by lenders to assess repayment capacity and credit risk.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Mortgage lenders evaluate the debt-to-income ratio to determine if an applicant can afford additional loan obligations without excessive financial stress.

termTranslations.vi: Tỷ lệ nợ trên thu nhập
termTranslations.th: อัตราส่วนหนี้สินต่อรายได้

usageTranslations.en: Mortgage lenders evaluate the debt-to-income ratio to determine if an applicant can afford additional loan obligations without excessive financial stress.
usageTranslations.tr: Konut kredisi verenler, başvuranın yeni borcu kaldırıp kaldıramayacağını görmek için borç-gelir oranını değerlendirir.
usageTranslations.fr: Les prêteurs hypothécaires évaluent le ratio dette/revenu pour vérifier la capacité de remboursement.
usageTranslations.de: Hypothekenbanken bewerten die Schulden-Einkommens-Quote vor Kreditvergabe.
usageTranslations.es: Las entidades de hipotecas evalúan la relación deuda-ingreso para medir la capacidad de pago.
usageTranslations.zh: 房贷机构评估债务收入比以判断还款能力。
usageTranslations.ar: يقيّم المقرضون نسبة الدين إلى الدخل لتحديد قدرة السداد.
usageTranslations.pt: Credores hipotecários analisam o índice de endividamento para avaliar a capacidade de pagamento.
usageTranslations.ru: Ипотечные кредиторы оценивают соотношение долга к доходу для определения платёжеспособности.
usageTranslations.ja: 住宅ローン会社は債務返済比率を評価して返済能力を判断する。
usageTranslations.it: I finanziatori valutano il rapporto debito/reddito per stabilire la capacità di rimborso.
usageTranslations.vi: Ngân hàng xem xét tỷ lệ nợ trên thu nhập để xác định khả năng trả nợ.
usageTranslations.hi: गृह ऋणदाता ऋण-आय अनुपात से भुगतान क्षमता आंकते हैं।
usageTranslations.th: ผู้ให้กู้ประเมินอัตราส่วนหนี้สินต่อรายได้เพื่อวิเคราะห์ความสามารถชำระหนี้
usageTranslations.id: Pemberi kredit hipotek menilai rasio utang terhadap pendapatan untuk menilai kemampuan membayar.

terms.definition: A unique, permanent, alphanumeric identifier issued by the national tax authority to individuals or entities for tax reporting and regulatory compliance, especially in India (PAN).
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: The Permanent Account Number must be quoted for all high-value financial transactions and tax filings in India.

termTranslations.th: หมายเลขบัญถาวร

usageTranslations.en: The Permanent Account Number must be quoted for all high-value financial transactions and tax filings in India.
usageTranslations.tr: Hindistan’da tüm yüksek tutarlı finansal işlemler ve vergi beyannamelerinde Kalıcı Hesap Numarası belirtilmelidir.
usageTranslations.fr: Le numéro de compte permanent doit être indiqué dans toutes les transactions importantes et les déclarations fiscales en Inde.
usageTranslations.de: Die permanente Kontonummer ist bei allen wichtigen Transaktionen und Steuererklärungen in Indien erforderlich.
usageTranslations.es: El número de cuenta permanente debe indicarse en todas las transacciones y declaraciones fiscales importantes en la India.
usageTranslations.zh: 在印度，所有大额交易和报税都必须注明永久账户号码。
usageTranslations.ar: يجب ذكر رقم الحساب الدائم في جميع المعاملات المالية الكبيرة والإقرارات الضريبية في الهند.
usageTranslations.pt: O número de conta permanente deve ser informado em todas as transações financeiras de alto valor e declarações fiscais na Índia.
usageTranslations.ru: Постоянный номер счета обязателен для всех крупных операций и налоговой отчётности в Индии.
usageTranslations.ja: インドでは全ての高額取引と税申告に恒久口座番号が必要です。
usageTranslations.it: In India, il numero di conto permanente va indicato in tutte le transazioni e dichiarazioni fiscali rilevanti.
usageTranslations.vi: Tại Ấn Độ, số tài khoản vĩnh viễn phải khai báo trong mọi giao dịch lớn và khai thuế.
usageTranslations.hi: भारत में सभी उच्च-मूल्य लेन-देन और कर दाखिलियों में स्थायी खाता संख्या देना अनिवार्य है।
usageTranslations.th: ในอินเดีย ต้องระบุหมายเลขบัญชีถาวรสำหรับธุรกรรมการเงินและยื่นภาษีทั้งหมด
usageTranslations.id: Nomor akun permanen harus dicantumkan untuk semua transaksi besar dan pelaporan pajak di India.

terms.definition: A deposit account from which funds may be withdrawn at any time without advance notice, primarily used for checking accounts under banking regulations.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Funds in a demand deposit account are available for withdrawal on demand, and are used to settle checks and electronic payments.

termTranslations.es: Cuenta de depósito a la vista
termTranslations.vi: Tài khoản tiền gửi không kỳ hạn
termTranslations.th: บัญชีเงินฝากเผื่อเรียก

usageTranslations.en: Funds in a demand deposit account are available for withdrawal on demand, and are used to settle checks and electronic payments.
usageTranslations.tr: Vadesiz mevduat hesabındaki fonlar istenildiği zaman çekilebilir ve çek ile EFT ödemelerinde kullanılır.
usageTranslations.fr: Les fonds d’un compte à vue sont retirables à tout moment et servent à régler chèques et virements.
usageTranslations.de: Gelder auf Sichteinlagen können jederzeit abgehoben und für Zahlungen genutzt werden.
usageTranslations.es: Los fondos en cuentas de depósito a la vista se pueden retirar en cualquier momento y usar para pagos.
usageTranslations.zh: 活期存款可随时提取，用于支票及电子支付。
usageTranslations.ar: الأموال في حساب الودائع تحت الطلب متاحة للسحب الفوري وتستخدم في تسوية الشيكات والمدفوعات الإلكترونية.
usageTranslations.pt: Recursos em conta de depósito à ordem podem ser sacados a qualquer momento e usados para pagamentos.
usageTranslations.ru: Средства на счёте до востребования доступны для снятия и расчетов по чекам и переводам.
usageTranslations.ja: 当座預金は即時引き出し可能で、支払や送金に利用される。
usageTranslations.it: I fondi nel conto a vista sono prelevabili subito e servono a regolare pagamenti.
usageTranslations.vi: Tiền trong tài khoản tiền gửi không kỳ hạn có thể rút bất cứ lúc nào và dùng để thanh toán.
usageTranslations.hi: डिमांड डिपॉजिट खाते से धन तुरंत निकाला जा सकता है और भुगतान के लिए उपयोग होता है।
usageTranslations.th: บัญชีเงินฝากเผื่อเรียกถอนเงินได้ตลอดเวลา ใช้จ่ายเช็คและโอนเงิน
usageTranslations.id: Dana di rekening giro dapat ditarik kapan saja dan untuk pembayaran.

terms.definition: A type of deposit account that typically pays higher interest and offers limited check-writing privileges, subject to regulatory transaction limits and money market fund investment rules.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: A money market account offers higher interest than a regular savings account, but limits the number of monthly transactions as per Regulation D.

termTranslations.ja: マネーマーケット口座
termTranslations.vi: Tài khoản thị trường tiền tệ
termTranslations.th: บัญชีตลาดเงิน

usageTranslations.en: A money market account offers higher interest than a regular savings account, but limits the number of monthly transactions as per Regulation D.
usageTranslations.tr: Para piyasası hesabı, normal bir tasarruf hesabından daha yüksek faiz sunar ancak aylık işlem sayısını sınırlar.
usageTranslations.fr: Le compte sur livret offre un taux supérieur mais limite le nombre de retraits mensuels.
usageTranslations.de: Das Tagesgeldkonto bietet höhere Zinsen, begrenzt aber die Zahl der monatlichen Transaktionen.
usageTranslations.es: La cuenta del mercado monetario ofrece más interés pero limita las operaciones mensuales.
usageTranslations.zh: 货币市场账户利率更高，但每月交易次数有限制。
usageTranslations.ar: حساب سوق المال يمنح فائدة أعلى لكن يحدد عدد المعاملات الشهرية.
usageTranslations.pt: Conta do mercado monetário rende mais, mas limita transações mensais.
usageTranslations.ru: Счет денежного рынка приносит больший доход, но ограничивает операции.
usageTranslations.ja: マネーマーケット口座は高金利だが月間取引数制限あり。
usageTranslations.it: Il conto del mercato monetario offre più interessi ma limita le operazioni mensili.
usageTranslations.vi: Tài khoản thị trường tiền tệ lãi cao hơn nhưng giới hạn giao dịch hàng tháng.
usageTranslations.hi: मनी मार्केट खाता ज्यादा ब्याज देता है लेकिन मासिक लेनदेन सीमित करता है।
usageTranslations.th: บัญชีตลาดเงินให้ดอกเบี้ยสูงกว่าแต่จำกัดธุรกรรมรายเดือน
usageTranslations.id: Rekening pasar uang menawarkan bunga lebih tinggi, tapi transaksi bulanan terbatas.

terms.definition: The person or entity to whom a payment, such as a check, transfer, or remittance, is made or owed according to the instructions of a financial instrument or contract.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: The payee must endorse the back of the check before depositing it into their account.
