termTranslations.th: ผู้รับเงิน

usageTranslations.en: The payee must endorse the back of the check before depositing it into their account.
usageTranslations.tr: Lehdar, çeki hesabına yatırmadan önce arka yüzünü imzalamalıdır.
usageTranslations.fr: Le bénéficiaire doit endosser le chèque avant de le déposer.
usageTranslations.de: Der Zahlungsempfänger muss den Scheck vor der Einreichung indossieren.
usageTranslations.es: El beneficiario debe endosar el cheque antes de ingresarlo.
usageTranslations.zh: 收款人存入支票前须背书。
usageTranslations.ar: يجب أن يؤيد المستفيد الشيك قبل إيداعه في الحساب.
usageTranslations.pt: O beneficiário deve endossar o cheque antes de depositá-lo.
usageTranslations.ru: Получатель должен индоссировать чек перед зачислением на счет.
usageTranslations.ja: 受取人は口座入金前に小切手裏面に署名が必要です。
usageTranslations.it: Il beneficiario deve girare l’assegno prima di versarlo.
usageTranslations.vi: Người nhận phải ký hậu chi phiếu trước khi gửi vào tài khoản.
usageTranslations.hi: प्राप्तकर्ता को चेक जमा करने से पहले उसका समर्थन करना चाहिए।
usageTranslations.th: ผู้รับเงินต้องเซ็นหลังเช็คก่อนนำเข้าบัญชี
usageTranslations.id: Penerima harus menandatangani cek sebelum menyetorkannya.

terms.definition: The person or entity that issues or makes a payment, typically by check, transfer, or direct debit, according to contractual or banking instructions.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: The payor must ensure sufficient funds are available in the account before initiating payment to the payee.

termTranslations.th: ผู้จ่ายเงิน

usageTranslations.en: The payor must ensure sufficient funds are available in the account before initiating payment to the payee.
usageTranslations.tr: Ödeyen, lehdara ödeme yapmadan önce hesabında yeterli bakiye olduğundan emin olmalıdır.
usageTranslations.fr: Le payeur doit vérifier que son compte est suffisamment approvisionné avant d’effectuer le paiement.
usageTranslations.de: Der Zahler muss für ausreichende Deckung vor der Zahlung sorgen.
usageTranslations.es: El pagador debe garantizar fondos suficientes antes de pagar.
usageTranslations.zh: 付款人付款前应保证账户余额充足。
usageTranslations.ar: يجب على الدافع التأكد من وجود رصيد كاف بالحساب قبل الدفع.
usageTranslations.pt: O pagador deve garantir saldo suficiente antes do pagamento.
usageTranslations.ru: Плательщик должен обеспечить наличие средств перед оплатой.
usageTranslations.ja: 支払人は支払い前に口座残高を確認する必要がある。
usageTranslations.it: Il pagatore deve assicurarsi di avere fondi sufficienti prima di pagare.
usageTranslations.vi: Người trả tiền phải đảm bảo có đủ tiền trước khi chuyển khoản.
usageTranslations.hi: प्रदाता को भुगतान से पहले खाते में पर्याप्त धनराशि सुनिश्चित करनी चाहिए।
usageTranslations.th: ผู้จ่ายเงินต้องแน่ใจว่ามีเงินเพียงพอในบัญชี
usageTranslations.id: Pembayar harus memastikan dana cukup sebelum pembayaran.

terms.definition: The person or entity that writes and signs a check or bill of exchange, instructing the drawee to pay a specified sum to the payee.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: The drawer must sign the check and have sufficient funds for the drawee bank to honor the payment.

termTranslations.th: ผู้สั่งจ่าย

usageTranslations.en: The drawer must sign the check and have sufficient funds for the drawee bank to honor the payment.
usageTranslations.tr: Keşideci çeki imzalamalı ve bankada ödeme için yeterli bakiyesi olmalıdır.
usageTranslations.fr: Le tireur doit signer le chèque et disposer des fonds nécessaires.
usageTranslations.de: Der Aussteller muss den Scheck unterschreiben und Deckung bieten.
usageTranslations.es: El librador debe firmar el cheque y tener fondos suficientes.
usageTranslations.zh: 出票人须签署支票并保证有足够资金。
usageTranslations.ar: يجب على الساحب توقيع الشيك وتوفير رصيد كافٍ.
usageTranslations.pt: O sacador deve assinar o cheque e garantir saldo suficiente.
usageTranslations.ru: Трассант подписывает чек и обеспечивает наличие средств.
usageTranslations.ja: 振出人は小切手に署名し、口座に残高を確保すべきです。
usageTranslations.it: Il traente deve firmare l’assegno e garantire la copertura.
usageTranslations.vi: Người ký phát phải ký và đảm bảo đủ tiền trong tài khoản.
usageTranslations.hi: निर्गमक को चेक पर हस्ताक्षर कर खाते में पर्याप्त राशि रखनी होती है।
usageTranslations.th: ผู้สั่งจ่ายต้องเซ็นเช็คและมีเงินเพียงพอในบัญชี
usageTranslations.id: Penarik harus menandatangani cek dan memastikan saldo cukup.

terms.definition: The financial institution or party upon whom a check, draft, or bill of exchange is drawn and which is ordered to pay the specified sum to the payee.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: The drawee, usually a bank, verifies funds and processes payment on behalf of the drawer to the payee.

termTranslations.th: ผู้ถูกสั่งจ่าย

usageTranslations.en: The drawee, usually a bank, verifies funds and processes payment on behalf of the drawer to the payee.
usageTranslations.tr: Muhatap (genellikle banka), keşideci adına lehdara ödeme yapmadan önce bakiyeyi kontrol eder.
usageTranslations.fr: Le tiré, généralement une banque, vérifie les fonds avant paiement.
usageTranslations.de: Der Bezogene, meist eine Bank, prüft das Guthaben und zahlt an den Empfänger.
usageTranslations.es: El librado, normalmente un banco, verifica fondos y paga al beneficiario.
usageTranslations.zh: 付款人（通常为银行）核查资金并支付给收款人。
usageTranslations.ar: المسحوب عليه (عادة بنك) يتحقق من الرصيد ويدفع للمستفيد.
usageTranslations.pt: O sacado (normalmente um banco) verifica o saldo e paga ao beneficiário.
usageTranslations.ru: Трассат, обычно банк, проверяет средства и совершает платёж получателю.
usageTranslations.ja: 支払人（通常銀行）は残高確認後、支払いを実行します。
usageTranslations.it: Il trattario, di solito una banca, verifica i fondi e paga al beneficiario.
usageTranslations.vi: Người bị ký phát (thường là ngân hàng) xác minh và chi trả cho người nhận.
usageTranslations.hi: द्रावी (अमूमन बैंक) राशि सत्यापित कर भुगतान करता है।
usageTranslations.th: ผู้ถูกสั่งจ่าย (ส่วนใหญ่คือธนาคาร) ตรวจสอบเงินและจ่ายให้ผู้รับเงิน
usageTranslations.id: Tertarik (biasanya bank) memeriksa dana dan membayar penerima.

terms.definition: A formal, legal instruction from an account holder to their financial institution to halt payment on a specific check or transaction before it is processed.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: A stop payment order must be received by the bank before the item clears and is subject to fees under the account agreement.

termTranslations.th: คำสั่งระงับการจ่ายเงิน

usageTranslations.en: A stop payment order must be received by the bank before the item clears and is subject to fees under the account agreement.
usageTranslations.tr: Ödeme durdurma talimatı, işlem gerçekleşmeden önce bankaya iletilmeli ve sözleşmeye göre ücretlendirilebilir.
usageTranslations.fr: L’ordre d’opposition doit être reçu avant l’encaissement et peut entraîner des frais.
usageTranslations.de: Der Zahlungssperrauftrag muss vor Einlösung eingehen und kann gebührenpflichtig sein.
usageTranslations.es: La orden debe recibirse antes de que se cobre el cheque y puede conllevar comisiones.
usageTranslations.zh: 止付指令须在票据兑付前收到，可能需支付手续费。
usageTranslations.ar: يجب استلام أمر الإيقاف قبل صرف الشيك وقد يستلزم رسومًا.
usageTranslations.pt: A ordem deve chegar ao banco antes da compensação e pode ter taxas.
usageTranslations.ru: Поручение на отзыв должно поступить до расчёта, возможно взимание комиссии.
usageTranslations.ja: 支払停止命令は決済前に銀行に届く必要があり、手数料が発生する場合がある。
usageTranslations.it: L’ordine deve arrivare prima del pagamento, con eventuali costi.
usageTranslations.vi: Lệnh chặn thanh toán phải được gửi trước khi chi trả, có thể mất phí.
usageTranslations.hi: भुगतान रोकने का आदेश चेक क्लियर होने से पहले बैंक को मिलना चाहिए, और शुल्क लग सकता है।
usageTranslations.th: ต้องแจ้งธนาคารก่อนเช็คผ่านและอาจมีค่าธรรมเนียม
usageTranslations.id: Perintah penghentian harus diterima sebelum cek dicairkan dan mungkin dikenakan biaya.

terms.definition: Funds held in cash or low-yield accounts that are not actively invested or used for operational purposes, resulting in opportunity cost and reduced returns for individuals or institutions.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Financial managers seek to minimize idle money by reallocating excess cash into short-term investment vehicles to enhance returns.

termTranslations.th: เงินนิ่ง

usageTranslations.en: Financial managers seek to minimize idle money by reallocating excess cash into short-term investment vehicles to enhance returns.
usageTranslations.tr: Finans yöneticileri, getiri artırmak için fazla nakdi kısa vadeli yatırımlara yönlendirerek atıl parayı minimize etmeye çalışır.
usageTranslations.fr: Les gestionnaires financiers minimisent les fonds inactifs en investissant les excédents à court terme.
usageTranslations.de: Finanzmanager minimieren unproduktives Geld durch Umschichtung in kurzfristige Anlagen.
usageTranslations.es: Los gestores financieros minimizan el dinero ocioso invirtiendo excedentes a corto plazo.
usageTranslations.zh: 财务经理通过将多余现金投向短期投资来减少闲置资金。
usageTranslations.ar: يسعى المديرون الماليون لتقليل الأموال الخاملة عبر استثمار الفوائض.
usageTranslations.pt: Gestores financeiros minimizam dinheiro ocioso aplicando excedentes em investimentos de curto prazo.
usageTranslations.ru: Финансовые менеджеры минимизируют неиспользованные средства, инвестируя излишки в краткосрочные инструменты.
usageTranslations.ja: 財務担当者は遊休資金を短期投資に振り向けて最小化を図る。
usageTranslations.it: I manager finanziari riducono il denaro inattivo investendo l'eccesso a breve termine.
usageTranslations.vi: Quản lý tài chính giảm tiền nhàn rỗi bằng cách đầu tư vào sản phẩm ngắn hạn.
usageTranslations.hi: वित्त प्रबंधक निष्क्रिय धन को अल्पकालिक निवेश में लगाकर घटाते हैं।
usageTranslations.th: ผู้จัดการการเงินลดเงินนิ่งด้วยการลงทุนระยะสั้น
usageTranslations.id: Manajer keuangan meminimalkan dana menganggur dengan investasi jangka pendek.

terms.definition: A loan or advance for which the principal or interest payment has remained overdue for a specified period (typically 90 days), classified under regulatory norms as impaired or at risk of default.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Banks must report non-performing assets in regulatory filings and make provisions as required by prudential banking standards.

termTranslations.th: สินทรัพย์ด้อยคุณภาพ

usageTranslations.en: Banks must report non-performing assets in regulatory filings and make provisions as required by prudential banking standards.
usageTranslations.tr: Bankalar, takipteki alacakları yasal raporlara dahil edip karşılık ayırmak zorundadır.
usageTranslations.fr: Les banques déclarent les actifs non-performants et provisionnent selon les normes prudentielles.
usageTranslations.de: Banken müssen notleidende Vermögenswerte melden und Rückstellungen bilden.
usageTranslations.es: Los bancos reportan activos no rentables y constituyen provisiones conforme a normas prudenciales.
usageTranslations.zh: 银行须在监管报表中申报不良资产并计提拨备。
usageTranslations.ar: يجب على البنوك الإفصاح عن الأصول غير المنتجة وتكوين مخصصات.
usageTranslations.pt: Bancos devem reportar ativos não-produtivos e constituir provisões.
usageTranslations.ru: Банки обязаны отражать проблемные активы в отчетности и создавать резервы.
usageTranslations.ja: 銀行は不良債権を報告し、基準に従い引当金を計上する。
usageTranslations.it: Le banche devono segnalare le attività deteriorate e accantonare riserve.
usageTranslations.vi: Ngân hàng phải báo cáo tài sản không sinh lợi và trích lập dự phòng.
usageTranslations.hi: बैंक गैर-निष्पादित संपत्ति की रिपोर्ट और प्रावधान करते हैं।
usageTranslations.th: ธนาคารต้องรายงานสินทรัพย์ด้อยคุณภาพและตั้งสำรอง
usageTranslations.id: Bank wajib melaporkan aset non-produktif dan membuat provisi.

terms.definition: Highly liquid financial assets that are not cash but can be easily converted to cash within a short period, such as treasury bills, certificates of deposit, or money market instruments.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Economists include near money in broader monetary aggregates since these assets can be quickly liquidated for payments or investments.

termTranslations.th: สินทรัพย์ใกล้เงินสด

usageTranslations.en: Economists include near money in broader monetary aggregates since these assets can be quickly liquidated for payments or investments.
usageTranslations.tr: Ekonomistler, hızla nakde çevrilebildiği için nakit benzeri varlıkları para arzı tanımına dahil eder.
usageTranslations.fr: Les économistes incluent la quasi-monnaie dans les agrégats monétaires car ces actifs sont rapidement liquidables.
usageTranslations.de: Nahezu Geld wird in Geldmengenstatistiken erfasst, da es rasch liquidiert werden kann.
usageTranslations.es: La quasi dinero se incluye en los agregados monetarios por su alta liquidez.
usageTranslations.zh: 经济学家将准货币计入广义货币供给，因其可迅速变现。
usageTranslations.ar: يعتبر الاقتصاديون شبه النقد ضمن العرض النقدي الموسع لسهولة تسييله.
usageTranslations.pt: Economistas incluem quase dinheiro nos agregados monetários devido à facilidade de conversão.
usageTranslations.ru: Экономисты включают квази-деньги в денежную массу из-за быстрой ликвидности.
usageTranslations.ja: エコノミストは準通貨を広義の通貨供給に含める。
usageTranslations.it: Gli economisti includono la quasi moneta negli aggregati monetari per la rapidità di conversione.
usageTranslations.vi: Kinh tế học xếp tiền gần như tiền mặt vào tổng cung tiền do dễ chuyển đổi.
usageTranslations.hi: आर्थिक विशेषज्ञ नियर मनी को मुद्रा आपूर्ति में गिनते हैं।
usageTranslations.th: นักเศรษฐศาสตร์จัดสินทรัพย์ใกล้เงินสดไว้ในตัวชี้วัดปริมาณเงิน
usageTranslations.id: Ekonom menambahkan aset likuid ke dalam agregat moneter karena mudah dicairkan.

terms.definition: A formal document issued by a bank guaranteeing payment to a beneficiary on behalf of the applicant, provided that specific terms and conditions are met, widely used in international trade.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Exporters require a letter of credit to mitigate payment risk in international transactions, ensuring payment from the buyer’s bank upon shipment compliance.

termTranslations.th: หนังสือเครดิต

usageTranslations.en: Exporters require a letter of credit to mitigate payment risk in international transactions, ensuring payment from the buyer’s bank upon shipment compliance.
usageTranslations.tr: İhracatçılar, uluslararası ödemelerde alıcı bankasından ödeme garantisi sağlamak için akreditif ister.
usageTranslations.fr: Les exportateurs demandent un crédit documentaire pour garantir le paiement dans les transactions internationales.
usageTranslations.de: Exporteure verlangen zur Absicherung ein Akkreditiv für internationale Geschäfte.
usageTranslations.es: Los exportadores solicitan carta de crédito para garantizar el pago en transacciones internacionales.
usageTranslations.zh: 出口商要求信用证以降低国际交易付款风险。
usageTranslations.ar: يشترط المصدرون الاعتماد المستندي لضمان السداد في التجارة الدولية.
usageTranslations.pt: Exportadores requerem carta de crédito para mitigar risco de pagamento internacional.
usageTranslations.ru: Экспортёры требуют аккредитив для гарантии оплаты в международных сделках.
usageTranslations.ja: 輸出業者は国際取引で信用状を必要とし、確実な支払いを得る。
usageTranslations.it: Gli esportatori richiedono lettera di credito per garantire il pagamento all'estero.
usageTranslations.vi: Nhà xuất khẩu cần thư tín dụng để đảm bảo thanh toán quốc tế.
usageTranslations.hi: निर्यातक अंतर्राष्ट्रीय भुगतान के लिए एल.सी. मांगते हैं जिससे बैंक से भुगतान की गारंटी मिलती है।
usageTranslations.th: ผู้ส่งออกต้องการหนังสือเครดิตเพื่อประกันการชำระเงินในต่างประเทศ
usageTranslations.id: Eksportir membutuhkan letter of credit untuk menjamin pembayaran ekspor.

terms.definition: The process of distributing specific quantities or percentages of digital tokens across a cryptocurrency portfolio, strategy, or fund, based on predefined investment, risk, or compliance objectives. Token allocation is fundamental for portfolio construction, risk management, and regulatory reporting within digital asset management.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Token allocation defines the percentage of portfolio capital assigned to each cryptocurrency or digital asset in accordance with the fund’s mandate and risk framework.

termTranslations.th: การจัดสรรโทเค็น

usageTranslations.en: Token allocation defines the percentage of portfolio capital assigned to each cryptocurrency or digital asset in accordance with the fund’s mandate and risk framework.
usageTranslations.tr: Token dağılımı, fonun yetkisi ve risk çerçevesine uygun olarak her bir kripto para veya dijital varlığa ayrılan portföy sermayesinin yüzdesini tanımlar.
usageTranslations.fr: La répartition des tokens détermine le pourcentage du capital du portefeuille attribué à chaque crypto-actif selon le mandat du fonds et le cadre de risque.
usageTranslations.de: Die Token-Allokation definiert den Prozentsatz des Portfoliokapitals, der jedem Krypto-Asset gemäß dem Mandat und Risikorahmen des Fonds zugewiesen wird.
usageTranslations.es: La asignación de tokens define el porcentaje del capital del portafolio asignado a cada activo digital de acuerdo con el mandato y el marco de riesgo del fondo.
usageTranslations.zh: 代币配置根据基金的投资授权和风险框架，定义了分配给每种数字资产的投资组合资金比例。
usageTranslations.ar: تحدد توزيع الرموز النسبة المئوية لرأس مال المحفظة المخصص لكل أصل رقمي وفقًا لتفويض الصندوق وإطار المخاطر.
usageTranslations.pt: A alocação de tokens define o percentual do capital do portfólio atribuído a cada ativo digital conforme o mandato e estrutura de risco do fundo.
usageTranslations.ru: Распределение токенов определяет процент капитала портфеля, выделяемого на каждый цифровой актив согласно мандату и риск-политике фонда.
usageTranslations.ja: トークン配分は、ファンドの投資方針およびリスク枠組みに基づき、各暗号資産に割り当てられるポートフォリオ資本の割合を定義します。
usageTranslations.it: L’allocazione dei token definisce la percentuale di capitale di portafoglio assegnata a ciascun asset digitale in linea con il mandato e il quadro di rischio del fondo.
usageTranslations.vi: Phân bổ token xác định tỷ lệ phần trăm vốn danh mục đầu tư được phân bổ cho từng tài sản kỹ thuật số theo ủy quyền và khuôn khổ rủi ro của quỹ.
usageTranslations.hi: टोकन आवंटन फंड के अधिदेश और जोखिम रूपरेखा के अनुसार प्रत्येक डिजिटल संपत्ति के लिए पोर्टफोलियो पूंजी का प्रतिशत निर्दिष्ट करता है।
usageTranslations.th: การจัดสรรโทเค็นกำหนดเปอร์เซ็นต์ของเงินลงทุนในแต่ละสินทรัพย์ดิจิทัลตามข้อบังคับและกรอบความเสี่ยงของกองทุน
usageTranslations.id: Alokasi token menentukan persentase modal portofolio yang dialokasikan ke setiap aset digital sesuai mandat dan kerangka risiko dana.

terms.definition: Operational methods or automated protocols implemented by crypto asset managers and trading systems to minimize adverse price movement (slippage) between order submission and execution, especially for large or illiquid trades on exchanges or DeFi protocols. Involves setting slippage tolerance, using limit orders, or deploying algorithmic execution to protect portfolio returns.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Institutional crypto portfolio managers rely on slippage control tools to ensure that large order executions do not erode portfolio performance due to excessive price impact.

termTranslations.th: การควบคุม Slippage

usageTranslations.en: Institutional crypto portfolio managers rely on slippage control tools to ensure that large order executions do not erode portfolio performance due to excessive price impact.
usageTranslations.tr: Kurumsal kripto portföy yöneticileri, büyük emirlerin aşırı fiyat etkisi nedeniyle portföy performansını düşürmemesi için slippage kontrol araçlarına güvenir.
usageTranslations.fr: Les gestionnaires institutionnels de portefeuilles crypto utilisent des outils de contrôle du slippage pour éviter que l'exécution d'ordres importants ne dégrade la performance du portefeuille.
usageTranslations.de: Institutionelle Krypto-Portfoliomanager setzen auf Slippage-Kontrollwerkzeuge, um zu verhindern, dass große Orders die Portfolioperformance durch zu starken Preiseinfluss beeinträchtigen.
usageTranslations.es: Los gestores institucionales de carteras cripto utilizan herramientas de control de slippage para evitar que la ejecución de grandes órdenes erosione el rendimiento de la cartera.
usageTranslations.zh: 机构级加密资产管理者依靠滑点控制工具，以确保大额订单执行不会因过度价格冲击而侵蚀投资组合业绩。
usageTranslations.ar: يعتمد مديرو محافظ العملات المشفرة المؤسسية على أدوات التحكم في الانزلاق السعري لضمان أن تنفيذ الأوامر الكبيرة لا يضر بأداء المحفظة.
usageTranslations.pt: Gestores institucionais de portfólios cripto dependem de ferramentas de controle de slippage para garantir que a execução de grandes ordens não prejudique o desempenho do portfólio.
usageTranslations.ru: Институциональные управляющие крипто-портфелями используют инструменты контроля проскальзывания, чтобы крупные сделки не ухудшали доходность портфеля из-за ценового воздействия.
usageTranslations.ja: 機関投資家の暗号資産ポートフォリオマネージャーは、大口注文の執行による過度な価格インパクトでパフォーマンスが損なわれないよう、スリッページ管理ツールを利用する。
usageTranslations.it: I gestori istituzionali di portafogli crypto si affidano a strumenti di controllo dello slippage per evitare che l'esecuzione di grandi ordini comprometta la performance del portafoglio.
usageTranslations.vi: Nhà quản lý danh mục tiền mã hóa tổ chức dựa vào công cụ kiểm soát slippage để đảm bảo lệnh lớn không làm giảm hiệu suất danh mục do tác động giá quá mức.
usageTranslations.hi: संस्थागत क्रिप्टो पोर्टफोलियो प्रबंधक यह सुनिश्चित करने के लिए स्लिपेज नियंत्रण उपकरणों पर निर्भर करते हैं कि बड़े ऑर्डर निष्पादन के कारण पोर्टफोलियो प्रदर्शन प्रभावित न हो।
usageTranslations.th: ผู้จัดการพอร์ตคริปโตระดับสถาบันพึ่งพาเครื่องมือควบคุม Slippage เพื่อให้แน่ใจว่าการส่งคำสั่งขนาดใหญ่จะไม่กระทบต่อผลตอบแทนของพอร์ตอย่างรุนแรง
usageTranslations.id: Manajer portofolio kripto institusional mengandalkan alat kontrol slippage untuk memastikan eksekusi order besar tidak merusak kinerja portofolio akibat dampak harga berlebihan.

terms.definition: A self-executing, code-based contract deployed on a blockchain that automatically enforces and executes agreed rules and transactions when predetermined conditions are met. Used in DeFi, custody, settlement, and asset management for trustless automation and compliance.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Crypto portfolio custodians use smart contracts to automate settlement, staking, and asset transfers without manual intervention or counterparty risk.

termTranslations.ja: スマートコントラクト
termTranslations.th: สมาร์ทคอนแทรกต์

usageTranslations.en: Crypto portfolio custodians use smart contracts to automate settlement, staking, and asset transfers without manual intervention or counterparty risk.
usageTranslations.tr: Kripto portföy saklayıcıları, mutabakat, staking ve varlık transferlerini manuel müdahale veya karşı taraf riski olmadan otomatikleştirmek için akıllı kontratlar kullanır.
usageTranslations.fr: Les dépositaires de portefeuilles crypto utilisent des contrats intelligents pour automatiser le règlement, le staking et les transferts d'actifs sans intervention manuelle ni risque de contrepartie.
usageTranslations.de: Krypto-Portfoliotreuhänder nutzen Smart Contracts, um Abwicklung, Staking und Vermögensübertragungen ohne manuelles Eingreifen oder Kontrahentenrisiko zu automatisieren.
usageTranslations.es: Los custodios de carteras cripto utilizan contratos inteligentes para automatizar liquidaciones, staking y transferencias de activos sin intervención manual ni riesgo de contraparte.
usageTranslations.zh: 加密资产托管人利用智能合约自动完成结算、质押及资产转移，无需人工干预或对手方风险。
usageTranslations.ar: يستخدم أمناء محافظ العملات الرقمية العقود الذكية لأتمتة التسوية والتخزين ونقل الأصول دون تدخل يدوي أو مخاطر الطرف المقابل.
usageTranslations.pt: Custodiantes de portfólios cripto usam contratos inteligentes para automatizar liquidação, staking e transferências de ativos sem intervenção manual ou risco de contraparte.
usageTranslations.ru: Кастодианы крипто-портфелей используют смарт-контракты для автоматизации расчетов, стейкинга и перевода активов без ручного вмешательства или риска контрагента.
usageTranslations.ja: 暗号資産カストディアンは、手動操作やカウンターパーティリスクなしで決済・ステーキング・資産移転を自動化するためにスマートコントラクトを利用する。
usageTranslations.it: I custodi di portafogli crypto usano smart contract per automatizzare il regolamento, lo staking e i trasferimenti di asset senza intervento manuale o rischio di controparte.
usageTranslations.vi: Đơn vị lưu ký danh mục tiền mã hóa sử dụng hợp đồng thông minh để tự động hóa thanh toán, staking và chuyển giao tài sản mà không cần can thiệp thủ công hoặc rủi ro đối tác.
usageTranslations.hi: क्रिप्टो पोर्टफोलियो कस्टोडियन स्मार्ट कॉन्ट्रैक्ट का उपयोग सेटलमेंट, स्टेकिंग और एसेट ट्रांसफर को मैन्युअल हस्तक्षेप या काउंटरपार्टी जोखिम के बिना स्वचालित करने के लिए करते हैं।
usageTranslations.th: ผู้ดูแลสินทรัพย์คริปโตใช้สมาร์ทคอนแทรกต์เพื่ออัตโนมัติการชำระบัญชี การสเตก และการโอนสินทรัพย์โดยไม่ต้องมีการแทรกแซงหรือความเสี่ยงคู่สัญญา
usageTranslations.id: Kustodian portofolio kripto menggunakan kontrak pintar untuk mengotomasi penyelesaian, staking, dan transfer aset tanpa intervensi manual atau risiko pihak lawan.

terms.definition: Analytical methods and data tools that leverage public blockchain transaction data to monitor, measure, and manage crypto asset flows, wallet behavior, risk, and compliance in portfolio management.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Onchain analytics platforms enable portfolio managers to track token movements, wallet clusters, and compliance signals across multiple blockchains in real time.

termTranslations.th: การวิเคราะห์ออนเชน

usageTranslations.en: Onchain analytics platforms enable portfolio managers to track token movements, wallet clusters, and compliance signals across multiple blockchains in real time.
usageTranslations.tr: Onchain analitik platformları, portföy yöneticilerinin birden fazla blokzincirde token hareketlerini, cüzdan kümelerini ve uyum sinyallerini gerçek zamanlı izlemelerini sağlar.
usageTranslations.fr: Les plateformes d’analyse onchain permettent aux gestionnaires de suivre les mouvements de tokens et les signaux de conformité sur plusieurs blockchains en temps réel.
usageTranslations.de: Onchain-Analyseplattformen ermöglichen es Portfoliomanagern, Token-Bewegungen und Compliance-Signale über mehrere Blockchains hinweg in Echtzeit zu verfolgen.
usageTranslations.es: Las plataformas de análisis onchain permiten a los gestores de carteras rastrear movimientos de tokens y señales de cumplimiento en varias blockchains en tiempo real.
usageTranslations.zh: 链上分析平台使投资组合经理能够实时跟踪多个区块链上的代币流动和合规信号。
usageTranslations.ar: تمكّن منصات التحليلات على السلسلة مديري المحافظ من تتبع حركة الرموز والإشارات التنظيمية عبر سلاسل كتل متعددة في الوقت الفعلي.
usageTranslations.pt: Plataformas de análise onchain permitem aos gestores de portfólio monitorar movimentações de tokens e sinais de compliance em múltiplas blockchains em tempo real.
usageTranslations.ru: Ончейн-аналитика позволяет управляющим портфелями отслеживать движения токенов и сигналы комплаенса на разных блокчейнах в реальном времени.
usageTranslations.ja: オンチェーン分析プラットフォームは、ポートフォリオマネージャーが複数のブロックチェーンにわたりトークンの動きやコンプライアンスシグナルをリアルタイムで追跡することを可能にします。
usageTranslations.it: Le piattaforme di analisi onchain consentono ai gestori di monitorare i movimenti dei token e i segnali di conformità su più blockchain in tempo reale.
usageTranslations.vi: Nền tảng phân tích onchain cho phép nhà quản lý danh mục theo dõi luồng token và tín hiệu tuân thủ trên nhiều blockchain theo thời gian thực.
usageTranslations.hi: ऑनचेन एनालिटिक्स प्लेटफ़ॉर्म पोर्टफोलियो प्रबंधकों को रीयल-टाइम में कई ब्लॉकचेन पर टोकन मूवमेंट और अनुपालन संकेतों को ट्रैक करने में सक्षम बनाते हैं।
usageTranslations.th: แพลตฟอร์มวิเคราะห์ออนเชนช่วยให้ผู้จัดการพอร์ตติดตามการเคลื่อนไหวของโทเค็นและสัญญาณการปฏิบัติตามข้อกำหนดในหลายบล็อกเชนแบบเรียลไทม์
usageTranslations.id: Platform analitik onchain memungkinkan manajer portofolio melacak pergerakan token dan sinyal kepatuhan di banyak blockchain secara real-time.

terms.definition: A cryptographic key that provides control over digital assets held in a blockchain wallet; essential for transaction authorization, custody, and security in crypto portfolio management.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Loss or compromise of a private key leads to irreversible loss of control over the associated crypto assets, making secure custody solutions mandatory.

termTranslations.th: กุญแจส่วนตัว

usageTranslations.en: Loss or compromise of a private key leads to irreversible loss of control over the associated crypto assets, making secure custody solutions mandatory.
usageTranslations.tr: Özel anahtarın kaybolması veya ele geçirilmesi, ilgili kripto varlıklar üzerinde geri döndürülemez kontrol kaybına yol açar ve güvenli saklama çözümlerini zorunlu kılar.
usageTranslations.fr: La perte ou la compromission d'une clé privée entraîne une perte irréversible du contrôle des actifs associés, rendant indispensables des solutions de conservation sécurisée.
usageTranslations.de: Der Verlust oder die Kompromittierung eines privaten Schlüssels führt zum unwiderruflichen Verlust der Kontrolle über die zugehörigen Krypto-Assets, weshalb sichere Verwahrungslösungen unerlässlich sind.
usageTranslations.es: La pérdida o compromiso de una clave privada implica una pérdida irreversible del control sobre los criptoactivos asociados, por lo que las soluciones de custodia segura son obligatorias.
usageTranslations.zh: 私钥的丢失或泄露将导致无法恢复对相关加密资产的控制，因此安全托管解决方案至关重要。
usageTranslations.ar: فقدان أو اختراق المفتاح الخاص يؤدي إلى فقدان لا رجعة فيه للسيطرة على الأصول الرقمية المرتبطة، مما يجعل حلول الحفظ الآمن إلزامية.
usageTranslations.pt: A perda ou comprometimento da chave privada leva à perda irreversível do controle dos ativos, tornando obrigatórias soluções seguras de custódia.
usageTranslations.ru: Утрата или компрометация приватного ключа приводит к безвозвратной потере контроля над связанными криптоактивами, что делает безопасное хранение обязательным.
usageTranslations.ja: 秘密鍵の紛失や漏洩は、関連する暗号資産の制御を不可逆的に失うことになり、安全なカストディ・ソリューションが必須となる。
usageTranslations.it: La perdita o la compromissione della chiave privata comporta una perdita irreversibile del controllo sugli asset associati, rendendo obbligatorie soluzioni di custodia sicura.
usageTranslations.vi: Việc mất hoặc bị lộ khóa riêng dẫn đến mất kiểm soát không thể đảo ngược đối với tài sản kỹ thuật số liên quan, yêu cầu giải pháp lưu trữ an toàn.
usageTranslations.hi: प्राइवेट की का नुकसान या समझौता संबंधित क्रिप्टो संपत्तियों पर अपरिवर्तनीय नियंत्रण हानि का कारण बनता है, जिससे सुरक्षित कस्टडी समाधान अनिवार्य हो जाते हैं।
usageTranslations.th: การสูญหายหรือรั่วไหลของกุญแจส่วนตัวนำไปสู่การสูญเสียการควบคุมสินทรัพย์ดิจิทัลอย่างถาวรและต้องมีโซลูชันการเก็บรักษาที่ปลอดภัย
usageTranslations.id: Kehilangan atau kompromi kunci privat menyebabkan hilangnya kendali atas aset kripto terkait secara permanen, sehingga solusi penyimpanan yang aman menjadi wajib.

terms.definition: A custody method for securing private keys and crypto assets in an offline environment, inaccessible from the internet, to mitigate cyber, hacking, and operational risks in portfolio management.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Institutional-grade cold storage is mandatory for large crypto portfolios to comply with security, insurance, and regulatory requirements.

termTranslations.th: การจัดเก็บแบบเย็น

usageTranslations.en: Institutional-grade cold storage is mandatory for large crypto portfolios to comply with security, insurance, and regulatory requirements.
usageTranslations.tr: Kurumsal düzeyde soğuk depolama, güvenlik, sigorta ve yasal gerekliliklere uymak için büyük kripto portföylerinde zorunludur.
usageTranslations.fr: Le stockage à froid de niveau institutionnel est obligatoire pour les grands portefeuilles crypto afin de répondre aux exigences de sécurité et de conformité.
usageTranslations.de: Institutionelles Cold Storage ist für große Krypto-Portfolios aufgrund von Sicherheits- und regulatorischen Anforderungen verpflichtend.
usageTranslations.es: El almacenamiento en frío de grado institucional es obligatorio para grandes portafolios de criptomonedas para cumplir con los requisitos de seguridad y regulación.
usageTranslations.zh: 机构级冷存储是大型加密投资组合满足安全、保险及监管要求的强制措施。
usageTranslations.ar: التخزين البارد على مستوى المؤسسات إلزامي للمحافظ الكبيرة لتلبية متطلبات الأمان والتأمين والتنظيم.
usageTranslations.pt: Armazenamento a frio institucional é obrigatório para grandes portfólios de criptoativos para cumprir requisitos de segurança e regulação.
usageTranslations.ru: Холодное хранение институционального уровня обязательно для крупных криптопортфелей для соблюдения требований безопасности, страхования и регулирования.
usageTranslations.ja: 大規模な暗号資産ポートフォリオでは、機関投資家向けコールドストレージがセキュリティや規制要件を満たすために必須となります。
usageTranslations.it: Il cold storage di livello istituzionale è obbligatorio per i grandi portafogli crypto per rispettare requisiti di sicurezza e regolamentazione.
usageTranslations.vi: Lưu trữ lạnh cấp tổ chức là bắt buộc đối với danh mục lớn để đáp ứng các yêu cầu về bảo mật và quy định.
usageTranslations.hi: बड़े क्रिप्टो पोर्टफोलियो के लिए संस्थागत स्तर का कोल्ड स्टोरेज सुरक्षा और विनियामक आवश्यकताओं के लिए अनिवार्य है।
usageTranslations.th: การจัดเก็บแบบเย็นในระดับสถาบันเป็นสิ่งจำเป็นสำหรับพอร์ตโฟลิโอขนาดใหญ่เพื่อตอบสนองข้อกำหนดด้านความปลอดภัยและกฎระเบียบ
usageTranslations.id: Cold storage tingkat institusional wajib untuk portofolio kripto besar agar memenuhi persyaratan keamanan dan regulasi.

terms.definition: The risk of loss, theft, or misappropriation of crypto assets held by a custodian or self-custody provider, including operational, cyber, and legal exposures unique to digital asset management.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Portfolio disclosure must address custody risk, including protocols for third-party, multi-signature, and cold storage solutions.

termTranslations.th: ความเสี่ยงในการรับฝากทรัพย์สิน

usageTranslations.en: Portfolio disclosure must address custody risk, including protocols for third-party, multi-signature, and cold storage solutions.
usageTranslations.tr: Portföy açıklamaları, üçüncü taraf, çoklu imza ve soğuk depolama çözümleri dâhil olmak üzere saklama riskini ele almalıdır.
usageTranslations.fr: Les informations sur le portefeuille doivent aborder le risque de conservation, y compris les protocoles tiers, multisignatures et de stockage à froid.
usageTranslations.de: Portfolioberichte müssen Verwahrrisiken abdecken, einschließlich Drittanbieter-, Multisignatur- und Cold-Storage-Lösungen.
usageTranslations.es: La divulgación de la cartera debe abordar el riesgo de custodia, incluidos los protocolos de terceros, multifirma y almacenamiento en frío.
usageTranslations.zh: 投资组合披露必须涵盖托管风险，包括第三方、多重签名和冷存储方案。
usageTranslations.ar: يجب أن تتناول إفصاحات المحفظة مخاطر الحفظ، بما في ذلك بروتوكولات الطرف الثالث والتوقيعات المتعددة وحلول التخزين البارد.
usageTranslations.pt: A divulgação do portfólio deve abordar o risco de custódia, incluindo protocolos de terceiros, multisig e cold storage.
usageTranslations.ru: Раскрытие информации о портфеле должно учитывать риски хранения, включая сторонние, мультиподписные и холодные решения.
usageTranslations.ja: ポートフォリオ開示は、第三者、マルチシグネチャ、コールドストレージを含むカストディリスクに対応しなければなりません。
usageTranslations.it: La disclosure di portafoglio deve affrontare il rischio di custodia, incluse le soluzioni di terze parti, multisignature e cold storage.
usageTranslations.vi: Công bố danh mục phải giải quyết rủi ro lưu ký, bao gồm giao thức bên thứ ba, đa chữ ký và lưu trữ lạnh.
usageTranslations.hi: पोर्टफोलियो प्रकटीकरण में कस्टडी जोखिम को शामिल करना चाहिए, जिसमें थर्ड-पार्टी, मल्टी-सिग्नेचर और कोल्ड स्टोरेज समाधान भी शामिल हैं।
usageTranslations.th: การเปิดเผยข้อมูลพอร์ตต้องกล่าวถึงความเสี่ยงในการรับฝากทรัพย์สิน รวมถึงโซลูชันของบุคคลที่สาม มัลติซิก และการจัดเก็บแบบเย็น
usageTranslations.id: Pengungkapan portofolio harus membahas risiko kustodian, termasuk protokol pihak ketiga, multisignature, dan cold storage.

terms.definition: The operational practice of maintaining client assets in separate wallets or address clusters, ensuring clear ownership, risk segregation, and regulatory compliance in crypto asset management.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Institutional custodians implement wallet segregation to prevent commingling of client assets and satisfy audit and regulatory requirements.

termTranslations.th: การแยกกระเป๋าสตางค์

usageTranslations.en: Institutional custodians implement wallet segregation to prevent commingling of client assets and satisfy audit and regulatory requirements.
usageTranslations.tr: Kurumsal saklayıcılar, müşteri varlıklarının karışmasını önlemek ve denetim ile yasal gereklilikleri karşılamak için cüzdan ayrıştırması uygular.
usageTranslations.fr: Les dépositaires institutionnels pratiquent la segmentation des portefeuilles pour éviter le mélange des actifs clients et répondre aux exigences réglementaires.
usageTranslations.de: Institutionelle Verwahrer setzen Wallet-Segregation ein, um die Vermischung von Kundengeldern zu verhindern und regulatorische Anforderungen zu erfüllen.
usageTranslations.es: Los custodios institucionales implementan la segregación de carteras para evitar la mezcla de activos de clientes y cumplir con los requisitos regulatorios.
usageTranslations.zh: 机构托管人实施钱包隔离，以防止客户资产混合并满足审计和监管要求。
usageTranslations.ar: تطبق أمناء الحفظ المؤسسيون فصل المحافظ لمنع اختلاط أصول العملاء وتلبية متطلبات التدقيق والتنظيم.
usageTranslations.pt: Custodiantes institucionais implementam segregação de carteiras para evitar mistura de ativos de clientes e cumprir requisitos regulatórios.
usageTranslations.ru: Институциональные кастодианы применяют сегрегацию кошельков для предотвращения смешивания клиентских активов и соблюдения требований аудита и регулирования.
usageTranslations.ja: 機関保管業者は、顧客資産の混合を防ぎ、監査および規制要件を満たすためにウォレット分離を実施します。
usageTranslations.it: I custodi istituzionali applicano la segregazione dei wallet per evitare la commistione degli asset dei clienti e rispettare i requisiti di audit e regolamentazione.
usageTranslations.vi: Các tổ chức lưu ký triển khai phân tách ví để ngăn chặn việc trộn lẫn tài sản khách hàng và đáp ứng yêu cầu kiểm toán, quy định.
usageTranslations.hi: संस्थागत कस्टोडियन क्लाइंट संपत्तियों के मिश्रण को रोकने और ऑडिट व नियामक आवश्यकताओं को पूरा करने के लिए वॉलेट पृथक्करण लागू करते हैं।
usageTranslations.th: ผู้ดูแลสถาบันใช้การแยกกระเป๋าสตางค์เพื่อป้องกันการรวมทรัพย์สินลูกค้าและเป็นไปตามข้อกำหนดการตรวจสอบ
usageTranslations.id: Kustodian institusional menerapkan segregasi dompet untuk mencegah pencampuran aset klien dan memenuhi persyaratan audit serta regulasi.

terms.definition: A protocol change or technical update to a blockchain network that can affect asset interoperability, portfolio operations, and compliance; often includes hard or soft forks and impacts portfolio risk.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Portfolio managers must evaluate the operational and custodial impact of upcoming network upgrades on their crypto asset holdings.

termTranslations.ja: ネットワークアップグレード
termTranslations.th: อัปเกรดเครือข่าย

usageTranslations.en: Portfolio managers must evaluate the operational and custodial impact of upcoming network upgrades on their crypto asset holdings.
usageTranslations.tr: Portföy yöneticileri, yaklaşan ağ güncellemelerinin kripto varlıkları üzerindeki operasyonel ve saklama etkisini değerlendirmelidir.
usageTranslations.fr: Les gestionnaires doivent évaluer l’impact opérationnel et de conservation des prochaines mises à niveau du réseau sur leurs avoirs crypto.
usageTranslations.de: Portfoliomanager müssen die operationellen und verwahrungstechnischen Auswirkungen anstehender Netzwerk-Upgrades auf ihre Krypto-Bestände bewerten.
usageTranslations.es: Los gestores de cartera deben evaluar el impacto operativo y de custodia de las próximas actualizaciones de red sobre sus activos criptográficos.
usageTranslations.zh: 投资组合经理必须评估即将到来的网络升级对其加密资产持有的运营和托管影响。
usageTranslations.ar: يجب على مديري المحافظ تقييم الأثر التشغيلي والحفظي لترقيات الشبكة القادمة على أصولهم الرقمية.
usageTranslations.pt: Gestores de portfólio devem avaliar o impacto operacional e de custódia das próximas atualizações de rede em seus ativos cripto.
usageTranslations.ru: Управляющие портфелями должны оценить операционные и кастодиальные последствия предстоящих обновлений сети для своих криптоактивов.
usageTranslations.ja: ポートフォリオマネージャーは、今後のネットワークアップグレードが暗号資産保有に与える運用・カストディ影響を評価する必要があります。
usageTranslations.it: I gestori devono valutare l’impatto operativo e di custodia dei prossimi aggiornamenti di rete sulle loro posizioni in crypto asset.
usageTranslations.vi: Nhà quản lý danh mục phải đánh giá tác động vận hành và lưu ký của việc nâng cấp mạng sắp tới đối với tài sản kỹ thuật số.
usageTranslations.hi: पोर्टफोलियो प्रबंधकों को आगामी नेटवर्क अपग्रेड के अपने क्रिप्टो संपत्तियों पर परिचालन और कस्टडी प्रभाव का मूल्यांकन करना चाहिए।
usageTranslations.th: ผู้จัดการพอร์ตต้องประเมินผลกระทบด้านปฏิบัติการและการดูแลทรัพย์สินของการอัปเกรดเครือข่ายที่กำลังจะมาถึงต่อคริปโตในครอบครอง
usageTranslations.id: Manajer portofolio harus mengevaluasi dampak operasional dan kustodian dari pembaruan jaringan mendatang terhadap kepemilikan aset kripto mereka.

terms.definition: The risk of loss or disruption due to vulnerabilities, governance failures, or technical flaws in the codebase or consensus mechanisms of a blockchain protocol held in a portfolio.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Protocol risk assessment is critical when allocating assets to new DeFi projects or blockchain upgrades within institutional portfolios.

termTranslations.th: ความเสี่ยงของโปรโตคอล

usageTranslations.en: Protocol risk assessment is critical when allocating assets to new DeFi projects or blockchain upgrades within institutional portfolios.
usageTranslations.tr: Protokol riskinin değerlendirilmesi, kurumsal portföylerde yeni DeFi projelerine veya blokzincir güncellemelerine varlık tahsisinde kritiktir.
usageTranslations.fr: L’évaluation du risque de protocole est cruciale lors de l’allocation d’actifs à de nouveaux projets DeFi ou à des mises à niveau de blockchain.
usageTranslations.de: Die Bewertung des Protokollrisikos ist entscheidend, wenn Assets neuen DeFi-Projekten oder Blockchain-Upgrades in institutionellen Portfolios zugewiesen werden.
usageTranslations.es: La evaluación del riesgo de protocolo es fundamental al asignar activos a nuevos proyectos DeFi o actualizaciones de blockchain en carteras institucionales.
usageTranslations.zh: 在为机构投资组合分配资产到新DeFi项目或区块链升级时，协议风险评估至关重要。
usageTranslations.ar: تقييم مخاطر البروتوكول أمر بالغ الأهمية عند تخصيص الأصول لمشاريع DeFi الجديدة أو ترقيات البلوكشين في المحافظ المؤسسية.
usageTranslations.pt: A avaliação do risco de protocolo é fundamental ao alocar ativos para novos projetos DeFi ou upgrades de blockchain em portfólios institucionais.
usageTranslations.ru: Оценка риска протокола критична при распределении активов между новыми DeFi-проектами или обновлениями блокчейна в институциональных портфелях.
usageTranslations.ja: プロトコルリスクの評価は、機関投資家のポートフォリオ内で新しいDeFiプロジェクトやブロックチェーンアップグレードに資産を割り当てる際に極めて重要です。
usageTranslations.it: La valutazione del rischio di protocollo è fondamentale nell’allocazione di asset verso nuovi progetti DeFi o aggiornamenti blockchain nei portafogli istituzionali.
usageTranslations.vi: Đánh giá rủi ro giao thức rất quan trọng khi phân bổ tài sản vào các dự án DeFi mới hoặc nâng cấp blockchain trong danh mục tổ chức.
usageTranslations.hi: संस्थानिक पोर्टफोलियो में नए DeFi प्रोजेक्ट या ब्लॉकचेन अपग्रेड के लिए परिसंपत्ति आवंटन के समय प्रोटोकॉल जोखिम आकलन अत्यंत महत्वपूर्ण है।
usageTranslations.th: การประเมินความเสี่ยงของโปรโตคอลเป็นสิ่งสำคัญเมื่อต้องจัดสรรสินทรัพย์ให้กับโปรเจ็กต์ DeFi ใหม่หรือการอัปเกรดบล็อกเชนในพอร์ตสถาบัน
usageTranslations.id: Penilaian risiko protokol sangat penting saat mengalokasikan aset ke proyek DeFi baru atau pembaruan blockchain di portofolio institusional.

terms.definition: A DeFi investment strategy in which users allocate crypto assets to liquidity pools or lending protocols to earn variable returns, typically in the form of additional tokens or protocol incentives.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Yield farming allows portfolio managers to optimize returns by allocating assets to high-yield DeFi protocols, but exposes them to protocol, liquidity, and smart contract risks.

termTranslations.ja: イールドファーミング
termTranslations.th: Yield Farming

usageTranslations.en: Yield farming allows portfolio managers to optimize returns by allocating assets to high-yield DeFi protocols, but exposes them to protocol, liquidity, and smart contract risks.
usageTranslations.tr: Yield farming, portföy yöneticilerinin varlıkları yüksek getirili DeFi protokollerine tahsis ederek getirilerini optimize etmelerini sağlar ancak protokol, likidite ve akıllı kontrat risklerine maruz bırakır.
usageTranslations.fr: Le yield farming permet aux gestionnaires d’optimiser les rendements en allouant des actifs à des protocoles DeFi à haut rendement, mais les expose à des risques de protocole, de liquidité et de smart contract.
usageTranslations.de: Yield Farming ermöglicht es Portfoliomanagern, Renditen zu optimieren, indem sie Vermögenswerte in ertragsstarke DeFi-Protokolle allokieren, setzt sie jedoch Protokoll-, Liquiditäts- und Smart-Contract-Risiken aus.
usageTranslations.es: El yield farming permite a los gestores de cartera optimizar los rendimientos asignando activos a protocolos DeFi de alto rendimiento, pero los expone a riesgos de protocolo, liquidez y contratos inteligentes.
usageTranslations.zh: 收益农场使投资组合经理通过将资产分配到高收益DeFi协议来优化回报，但也暴露于协议、流动性和智能合约风险。
usageTranslations.ar: يتيح فارمنج العوائد لمديري المحافظ تحسين العوائد من خلال تخصيص الأصول لبروتوكولات DeFi ذات العوائد المرتفعة، لكنه يعرضهم لمخاطر البروتوكول والسيولة والعقود الذكية.
usageTranslations.pt: Yield farming permite que gestores otimizem retornos alocando ativos em protocolos DeFi de alto rendimento, mas os expõe a riscos de protocolo, liquidez e smart contract.
usageTranslations.ru: Yield Farming позволяет портфельным менеджерам оптимизировать доходность путем размещения активов в высокодоходных DeFi-протоколах, но подвергает их протокольным, ликвидным и смарт-контрактным рискам.
usageTranslations.ja: イールドファーミングは、ポートフォリオマネージャーが資産を高利回りのDeFiプロトコルに割り当ててリターンを最適化できる一方で、プロトコル、流動性、スマートコントラクトのリスクにもさらされます。
usageTranslations.it: Il yield farming consente ai gestori di ottimizzare i rendimenti allocando asset in protocolli DeFi ad alto rendimento, ma li espone a rischi di protocollo, liquidità e smart contract.
usageTranslations.vi: Yield farming cho phép nhà quản lý danh mục tối ưu hóa lợi nhuận bằng cách phân bổ tài sản vào các giao thức DeFi lãi suất cao, nhưng cũng đối mặt với các rủi ro về giao thức, thanh khoản và hợp đồng thông minh.
usageTranslations.hi: यील्ड फार्मिंग पोर्टफोलियो मैनेजरों को उच्च-रिटर्न वाले DeFi प्रोटोकॉल में संपत्तियों का आवंटन कर रिटर्न अनुकूलित करने में सक्षम बनाता है, लेकिन यह प्रोटोकॉल, लिक्विडिटी और स्मार्ट कॉन्ट्रैक्ट जोखिम भी लाता है।
usageTranslations.th: Yield Farming ช่วยให้ผู้จัดการพอร์ตปรับผลตอบแทนโดยการจัดสรรสินทรัพย์ไปยังโปรโตคอล DeFi ที่ให้ผลตอบแทนสูง แต่เสี่ยงต่อโปรโตคอล สภาพคล่อง และสัญญาอัจฉริยะ
usageTranslations.id: Yield farming memungkinkan manajer portofolio mengoptimalkan hasil dengan mengalokasikan aset ke protokol DeFi hasil tinggi, namun juga terekspos risiko protokol, likuiditas, dan smart contract.

terms.definition: Earnings paid to participants who lock or delegate their tokens in a proof-of-stake blockchain to support network operations, commonly used as an income stream in crypto portfolios.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Staking rewards provide portfolio managers with passive income opportunities but are subject to protocol, slashing, and regulatory risks.

termTranslations.th: รางวัลสเตกกิ้ง

usageTranslations.en: Staking rewards provide portfolio managers with passive income opportunities but are subject to protocol, slashing, and regulatory risks.
usageTranslations.tr: Staking ödülleri, portföy yöneticilerine pasif gelir imkânı sunar, ancak protokol, slashing ve düzenleyici risklere tabidir.
usageTranslations.fr: Les récompenses de staking offrent des revenus passifs mais comportent des risques de protocole, de slashing et de réglementation.
usageTranslations.de: Staking-Belohnungen bieten passive Einkommensmöglichkeiten, unterliegen jedoch Protokoll-, Slashing- und regulatorischen Risiken.
usageTranslations.es: Las recompensas de staking ofrecen ingresos pasivos pero están sujetas a riesgos de protocolo, slashing y regulatorios.
usageTranslations.zh: 质押奖励为投资组合经理提供被动收入机会，但也面临协议、惩罚和监管风险。
usageTranslations.ar: تمنح مكافآت الستيكينغ مديري المحافظ فرص دخل سلبي لكنها تخضع لمخاطر البروتوكول والاقتطاع والتنظيم.
usageTranslations.pt: As recompensas de staking oferecem renda passiva, mas estão sujeitas a riscos de protocolo, slashing e regulação.
usageTranslations.ru: Награды за стейкинг предоставляют возможность пассивного дохода, но связаны с протокольными, слашинг и регуляторными рисками.
usageTranslations.ja: ステーキング報酬はポートフォリオマネージャーにパッシブ収入の機会を提供しますが、プロトコル、スラッシング、および規制リスクの影響を受けます。
usageTranslations.it: Le ricompense di staking offrono entrate passive, ma sono soggette a rischi di protocollo, slashing e regolamentazione.
usageTranslations.vi: Phần thưởng staking cung cấp thu nhập thụ động nhưng chịu rủi ro về giao thức, slashing và quy định.
usageTranslations.hi: स्टेकिंग रिवॉर्ड्स पोर्टफोलियो प्रबंधकों को पैसिव इनकम के अवसर देते हैं, लेकिन ये प्रोटोकॉल, स्लैशिंग और नियामक जोखिमों के अधीन होते हैं।
usageTranslations.th: รางวัลสเตกกิ้งสร้างรายได้แบบพาสซีฟแต่มีความเสี่ยงด้านโปรโตคอล การถูกตัดสิทธิ์ และข้อบังคับ
usageTranslations.id: Hadiah staking memberikan peluang pendapatan pasif, tetapi tunduk pada risiko protokol, slashing, dan regulasi.

terms.definition: A DeFi incentive program in which users provide assets to decentralized liquidity pools and earn token rewards, commonly used to boost liquidity for trading and lending platforms.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Liquidity mining initiatives incentivize users to contribute assets, increasing the depth and stability of DeFi trading pools.

termTranslations.th: Liquidity Mining

usageTranslations.en: Liquidity mining initiatives incentivize users to contribute assets, increasing the depth and stability of DeFi trading pools.
usageTranslations.tr: Likidite madenciliği girişimleri, kullanıcıları varlık eklemeye teşvik ederek DeFi ticaret havuzlarının derinliğini ve istikrarını artırır.
usageTranslations.fr: Le mining de liquidité incite les utilisateurs à fournir des actifs, renforçant la profondeur et la stabilité des pools DeFi.
usageTranslations.de: Liquiditäts-Mining-Initiativen motivieren Nutzer zur Bereitstellung von Assets und erhöhen so die Tiefe und Stabilität der DeFi-Handelspools.
usageTranslations.es: La minería de liquidez incentiva a los usuarios a aportar activos, aumentando la profundidad y la estabilidad de los pools de DeFi.
usageTranslations.zh: 流动性挖矿激励用户提供资产，增强DeFi交易池的深度和稳定性。
usageTranslations.ar: تشجع مبادرات تعدين السيولة المستخدمين على تقديم الأصول، مما يزيد من عمق واستقرار مجمعات التداول DeFi.
usageTranslations.pt: A mineração de liquidez incentiva os usuários a aportar ativos, aumentando a profundidade e estabilidade dos pools DeFi.
usageTranslations.ru: Ликвидити-майнинг стимулирует пользователей вносить активы, увеличивая глубину и устойчивость DeFi-пулов.
usageTranslations.ja: 流動性マイニングの取り組みは、ユーザーに資産の提供を促し、DeFiプールの深さと安定性を高めます。
usageTranslations.it: Il mining di liquidità incentiva gli utenti a fornire asset, aumentando la profondità e la stabilità dei pool DeFi.
usageTranslations.vi: Khai thác thanh khoản khuyến khích người dùng đóng góp tài sản, tăng chiều sâu và sự ổn định của pool DeFi.
usageTranslations.hi: लिक्विडिटी माइनिंग पहलों से उपयोगकर्ता संपत्तियां योगदान देने के लिए प्रेरित होते हैं, जिससे DeFi ट्रेडिंग पूल की गहराई और स्थिरता बढ़ती है।
usageTranslations.th: Liquidity Mining กระตุ้นให้ผู้ใช้ฝากสินทรัพย์ เพิ่มความลึกและเสถียรภาพของพูล DeFi
usageTranslations.id: Inisiatif penambangan likuiditas mendorong pengguna untuk memberikan aset, meningkatkan kedalaman dan stabilitas pool DeFi.

terms.definition: The transaction cost required to process operations or execute smart contracts on a blockchain network, typically denominated in the native token (e.g., ETH for Ethereum). Gas fees compensate validators/miners and directly impact portfolio transaction costs, execution timing, and DeFi strategy performance.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Crypto portfolio managers must monitor gas fees when executing large DeFi trades to optimize transaction costs and prevent slippage.

termTranslations.th: ค่าธรรมเนียม Gas

usageTranslations.en: Crypto portfolio managers must monitor gas fees when executing large DeFi trades to optimize transaction costs and prevent slippage.
usageTranslations.tr: Kripto portföy yöneticileri, büyük DeFi işlemleri gerçekleştirirken işlem maliyetlerini optimize etmek ve slippage’i önlemek için gas ücretlerini izlemelidir.
usageTranslations.fr: Les gestionnaires de portefeuilles crypto doivent surveiller les frais de gas lors de l'exécution de grandes transactions DeFi afin d'optimiser les coûts et d'éviter le slippage.
usageTranslations.de: Krypto-Portfoliomanager müssen Gasgebühren beim Ausführen großer DeFi-Trades überwachen, um Transaktionskosten zu optimieren und Slippage zu vermeiden.
usageTranslations.es: Los gestores de carteras cripto deben monitorear las tarifas de gas al ejecutar grandes operaciones DeFi para optimizar los costos y prevenir el slippage.
usageTranslations.zh: 加密资产组合经理在执行大额DeFi交易时必须监控燃料费，以优化交易成本并防止滑点。
usageTranslations.ar: يجب على مديري محافظ العملات الرقمية مراقبة رسوم الغاز عند تنفيذ صفقات DeFi الكبيرة لتحسين تكاليف المعاملات ومنع الانزلاق.
usageTranslations.pt: Gestores de portfólios cripto devem monitorar as taxas de gas ao executar grandes operações DeFi para otimizar custos e evitar slippage.
usageTranslations.ru: Управляющие криптопортфелями должны контролировать комиссии за газ при совершении крупных DeFi-сделок для оптимизации издержек и предотвращения проскальзывания.
usageTranslations.ja: 暗号資産ポートフォリオマネージャーは、大規模なDeFi取引を行う際、トランザクションコストの最適化とスリッページ防止のためガス代を監視する必要がある。
usageTranslations.it: I gestori di portafogli crypto devono monitorare le commissioni gas durante grandi operazioni DeFi per ottimizzare i costi e prevenire lo slippage.
usageTranslations.vi: Quản lý danh mục tiền mã hóa cần theo dõi phí gas khi thực hiện giao dịch DeFi lớn để tối ưu chi phí và ngăn slippage.
usageTranslations.hi: क्रिप्टो पोर्टफोलियो मैनेजर को बड़े DeFi ट्रेड निष्पादन करते समय ट्रांजैक्शन लागत को अनुकूलित करने और स्लिपेज रोकने के लिए गैस शुल्क पर निगरानी रखनी चाहिए।
usageTranslations.th: ผู้จัดการพอร์ตคริปโตต้องติดตามค่าธรรมเนียม Gas เมื่อดำเนินการเทรด DeFi ขนาดใหญ่เพื่อเพิ่มประสิทธิภาพต้นทุนและป้องกัน Slippage
usageTranslations.id: Manajer portofolio kripto harus memantau biaya gas saat mengeksekusi perdagangan DeFi besar untuk mengoptimalkan biaya transaksi dan mencegah slippage.

terms.definition: The process by which blockchain networks or staking protocols determine which validator nodes are eligible to participate in block production or transaction validation. This selection affects staking rewards, portfolio risk, and compliance for institutional digital-asset managers.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Portfolio managers assess validator selection criteria on staking networks to optimize yield and minimize exposure to slashing or network downtime.

termTranslations.th: การเลือก Validator

usageTranslations.en: Portfolio managers assess validator selection criteria on staking networks to optimize yield and minimize exposure to slashing or network downtime.
usageTranslations.tr: Portföy yöneticileri, getiriyi optimize etmek ve slashing veya ağ kesintisine maruziyeti azaltmak için staking ağlarında doğrulayıcı seçimi kriterlerini değerlendirir.
usageTranslations.fr: Les gestionnaires de portefeuille évaluent les critères de sélection des validateurs sur les réseaux de staking pour optimiser le rendement et réduire l'exposition aux sanctions ou aux pannes réseau.
usageTranslations.de: Portfoliomanager bewerten Validatorenauswahlkriterien in Staking-Netzwerken, um Renditen zu optimieren und das Risiko von Slashing oder Ausfallzeiten zu minimieren.
usageTranslations.es: Los gestores de carteras evalúan los criterios de selección de validadores en redes de staking para optimizar el rendimiento y minimizar el riesgo de slashing o caídas de la red.
usageTranslations.zh: 投资组合经理在质押网络上评估验证者选择标准，以优化收益并降低因惩罚或网络中断而暴露的风险。
usageTranslations.ar: يقيم مديرو المحافظ معايير اختيار المدققين في شبكات الستيكينغ لتحسين العائد وتقليل التعرض لعقوبات أو تعطل الشبكة.
usageTranslations.pt: Gestores de portfólios avaliam critérios de seleção de validadores em redes de staking para otimizar o rendimento e minimizar riscos de penalização ou indisponibilidade da rede.
usageTranslations.ru: Управляющие портфелями оценивают критерии выбора валидаторов в стейкинговых сетях для оптимизации доходности и минимизации рисков штрафов или простоев сети.
usageTranslations.ja: ポートフォリオマネージャーは、利回りを最適化しスラッシングやネットワーク停止リスクを最小化するため、ステーキングネットワークでのバリデータ選定基準を評価する。
usageTranslations.it: I gestori di portafogli valutano i criteri di selezione dei validatori sulle reti di staking per ottimizzare i rendimenti e ridurre l'esposizione a slashing o interruzioni di rete.
usageTranslations.vi: Nhà quản lý danh mục đánh giá tiêu chí chọn trình xác thực trên các mạng staking để tối ưu lợi nhuận và giảm rủi ro bị phạt hoặc gián đoạn mạng.
usageTranslations.hi: पोर्टफोलियो प्रबंधक उपज को अनुकूलित करने और स्लैशिंग या नेटवर्क डाउनटाइम के जोखिम को कम करने के लिए स्टेकिंग नेटवर्क पर वैलिडेटर चयन मानदंडों का मूल्यांकन करते हैं।
usageTranslations.th: ผู้จัดการพอร์ตโฟลิโอประเมินเกณฑ์การเลือก Validator ในเครือข่าย staking เพื่อเพิ่มผลตอบแทนและลดความเสี่ยงต่อการถูกลงโทษหรือระบบล่ม
usageTranslations.id: Manajer portofolio menilai kriteria seleksi validator di jaringan staking untuk mengoptimalkan hasil dan meminimalkan paparan risiko slashing atau downtime jaringan.

terms.definition: The process of connecting or embedding decentralized finance (DeFi) protocols and smart contracts into portfolio management workflows, asset allocation, or custody solutions for enhanced yield, liquidity, or automation.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: DeFi integration enables portfolio managers to deploy capital directly into decentralized protocols for liquidity provision and automated yield strategies.

termTranslations.th: การบูรณาการ DeFi

usageTranslations.en: DeFi integration enables portfolio managers to deploy capital directly into decentralized protocols for liquidity provision and automated yield strategies.
usageTranslations.tr: DeFi entegrasyonu, portföy yöneticilerinin likidite sağlama ve otomatik getiri stratejileri için sermayeyi doğrudan merkeziyetsiz protokollere aktarmasına olanak tanır.
usageTranslations.fr: L’intégration DeFi permet aux gestionnaires de portefeuille de déployer du capital directement dans des protocoles décentralisés pour la liquidité et les stratégies de rendement automatisées.
usageTranslations.de: Die DeFi-Integration ermöglicht es Portfoliomanagern, Kapital direkt in dezentrale Protokolle für Liquiditätsbereitstellung und automatisierte Renditestrategien einzusetzen.
usageTranslations.es: La integración DeFi permite a los gestores de carteras desplegar capital directamente en protocolos descentralizados para provisión de liquidez y estrategias automatizadas de rendimiento.
usageTranslations.zh: DeFi集成使投资组合经理能够直接将资本部署到去中心化协议中，用于流动性提供和自动化收益策略。
usageTranslations.ar: يتيح تكامل DeFi لمديري المحافظ نشر رأس المال مباشرة في البروتوكولات اللامركزية لتوفير السيولة واستراتيجيات العائد الآلي.
usageTranslations.pt: A integração DeFi permite aos gestores de portfólio alocar capital diretamente em protocolos descentralizados para liquidez e estratégias automatizadas de rendimento.
usageTranslations.ru: Интеграция DeFi позволяет управляющим портфелями направлять капитал напрямую в децентрализованные протоколы для предоставления ликвидности и автоматизированных доходных стратегий.
usageTranslations.ja: DeFi統合により、ポートフォリオマネージャーは資本を分散型プロトコルに直接展開して流動性供給や自動化された利回り戦略を実行できる。
usageTranslations.it: L’integrazione DeFi consente ai gestori di portafoglio di allocare capitale direttamente in protocolli decentralizzati per liquidità e strategie di rendimento automatiche.
usageTranslations.vi: Tích hợp DeFi cho phép nhà quản lý danh mục đầu tư phân bổ vốn trực tiếp vào các giao thức phi tập trung cho cung cấp thanh khoản và chiến lược lợi nhuận tự động.
usageTranslations.hi: DeFi एकीकरण पोर्टफोलियो प्रबंधकों को सीधे विकेन्द्रीकृत प्रोटोकॉल में पूंजी लगाने और स्वचालित यील्ड रणनीतियाँ अपनाने की सुविधा देता है।
usageTranslations.th: การบูรณาการ DeFi ช่วยให้ผู้จัดการพอร์ตลงทุนเงินทุนในโปรโตคอลแบบกระจายศูนย์เพื่อเพิ่มสภาพคล่องและผลตอบแทนอัตโนมัติ
usageTranslations.id: Integrasi DeFi memungkinkan manajer portofolio menempatkan modal langsung ke protokol terdesentralisasi untuk penyediaan likuiditas dan strategi hasil otomatis.

terms.definition: Measures and protocols implemented to protect cross-chain token bridges from exploits, theft, and operational failures in the transfer of digital assets between blockchains.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Portfolio disclosures must address bridge security when transferring assets between blockchains to ensure protection against cross-chain exploits and counterparty risk.

termTranslations.ja: ブリッジセキュリティ
termTranslations.th: ความปลอดภัยของบริดจ์

usageTranslations.en: Portfolio disclosures must address bridge security when transferring assets between blockchains to ensure protection against cross-chain exploits and counterparty risk.
usageTranslations.tr: Portföy açıklamalarında, blokzincirler arası varlık transferlerinde köprü güvenliğine değinilerek zincirler arası açıklar ve karşı taraf riski önlenmelidir.
usageTranslations.fr: Les informations sur le portefeuille doivent aborder la sécurité des bridges lors des transferts entre blockchains pour se prémunir contre les exploits inter-chaînes et le risque de contrepartie.
usageTranslations.de: Portfolioberichte müssen die Bridge-Sicherheit bei Blockchain-Transfers ansprechen, um Schutz vor Cross-Chain-Exploits und Kontrahentenrisiken zu gewährleisten.
usageTranslations.es: Las declaraciones de cartera deben abordar la seguridad de los puentes al transferir activos entre blockchains para proteger contra exploits cross-chain y riesgo de contraparte.
usageTranslations.zh: 在跨区块链转移资产时，投资组合披露必须涵盖跨链桥安全，以防止跨链攻击和对手方风险。
usageTranslations.ar: يجب أن تتناول إفصاحات المحفظة أمان الجسر عند نقل الأصول بين البلوكشينات لضمان الحماية من الثغرات والمخاطر عبر الشبكات.
usageTranslations.pt: A divulgação do portfólio deve abordar a segurança das pontes ao transferir ativos entre blockchains para proteger contra exploits e riscos de contraparte.
usageTranslations.ru: В раскрытиях информации о портфеле должна быть отражена безопасность мостов при трансфере активов между блокчейнами для защиты от эксплойтов и контрагентских рисков.
usageTranslations.ja: ブロックチェーン間で資産を移動する際には、クロスチェーン攻撃とカウンターパーティリスクを防ぐためにブリッジセキュリティへの対応が必要です。
usageTranslations.it: Le disclosure di portafoglio devono trattare la sicurezza dei bridge nei trasferimenti tra blockchain per prevenire exploit e rischi di controparte.
usageTranslations.vi: Báo cáo danh mục đầu tư phải đề cập đến bảo mật cầu nối khi chuyển tài sản giữa các blockchain để ngăn chặn rủi ro khai thác và đối tác.
usageTranslations.hi: पोर्टफोलियो खुलासों में ब्लॉकचेन के बीच संपत्ति ट्रांसफर करते समय ब्रिज सुरक्षा का उल्लेख आवश्यक है ताकि एक्सप्लॉइट और काउंटरपार्टी रिस्क से बचा जा सके।
usageTranslations.th: การเปิดเผยข้อมูลพอร์ตต้องกล่าวถึงความปลอดภัยของบริดจ์ในการโอนสินทรัพย์ข้ามบล็อกเชนเพื่อป้องกันการโจมตีและความเสี่ยงของคู่สัญญา
usageTranslations.id: Pengungkapan portofolio harus membahas keamanan bridge saat mentransfer aset antar blockchain untuk melindungi dari eksploitasi dan risiko counterparty.

terms.definition: A trading strategy that seeks to profit from price discrepancies for the same digital asset on different cryptocurrency exchanges, often requiring rapid execution and multi-exchange account management.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Exchange arbitrage requires automated execution and account balances across multiple trading venues to capture price spreads before they close.

termTranslations.ja: 取引所アービトラージ
termTranslations.th: อาร์บิทราจระหว่างตลาดแลกเปลี่ยน

usageTranslations.en: Exchange arbitrage requires automated execution and account balances across multiple trading venues to capture price spreads before they close.
usageTranslations.tr: Borsa arbitrajı, fiyat farkları kapanmadan önce birden fazla borsada otomatik emir ve bakiye gerektirir.
usageTranslations.fr: L’arbitrage d’échange nécessite une exécution automatisée et des soldes sur plusieurs plateformes pour profiter des écarts de prix.
usageTranslations.de: Börsenarbitrage erfordert automatisierte Ausführung und Guthaben auf mehreren Handelsplätzen, um Preisdifferenzen zu nutzen, bevor sie sich schließen.
usageTranslations.es: El arbitraje de intercambio requiere ejecución automatizada y saldos en varias plataformas para capturar los diferenciales de precio antes de que se cierren.
usageTranslations.zh: 交易所套利需要在多个交易平台自动执行和保持账户余额，以在价差消失前获利。
usageTranslations.ar: تتطلب المراجحة بين البورصات تنفيذًا آليًا وأرصدة في حسابات عبر منصات متعددة للاستفادة من فروقات الأسعار قبل إغلاقها.
usageTranslations.pt: A arbitragem de exchanges exige execução automatizada e saldos em várias plataformas para aproveitar os spreads de preços antes que desapareçam.
usageTranslations.ru: Биржевой арбитраж требует автоматизированного исполнения и балансов на нескольких площадках для фиксации спреда до его закрытия.
usageTranslations.ja: 取引所アービトラージには、価格差が解消される前に複数の取引所での自動執行と残高管理が必要です。
usageTranslations.it: L’arbitraggio tra exchange richiede esecuzione automatica e saldi su più piattaforme per cogliere le differenze di prezzo prima che si annullino.
usageTranslations.vi: Arbitrage sàn giao dịch đòi hỏi thực hiện tự động và số dư tài khoản trên nhiều sàn để khai thác chênh lệch giá trước khi biến mất.
usageTranslations.hi: एक्सचेंज आर्बिट्राज में कई ट्रेडिंग वेन्यू पर स्वचालित निष्पादन और बैलेंस की आवश्यकता होती है ताकि प्राइस स्प्रेड बंद होने से पहले लाभ उठाया जा सके।
usageTranslations.th: อาร์บิทราจระหว่างตลาดแลกเปลี่ยนต้องการการดำเนินการอัตโนมัติและยอดคงเหลือในหลายตลาดเพื่อเก็บกำไรจากส่วนต่างราคาก่อนจะปิดตัว
usageTranslations.id: Arbitras bursa memerlukan eksekusi otomatis dan saldo di beberapa bursa untuk menangkap selisih harga sebelum hilang.

terms.definition: An entity or node responsible for creating and validating new blocks in a blockchain network, also referred to as a validator or miner, depending on the consensus protocol.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Block producers maintain blockchain integrity by validating transactions and are compensated through block rewards or transaction fees.

termTranslations.ja: ブロックプロデューサー
termTranslations.th: ผู้ผลิตบล็อก

usageTranslations.en: Block producers maintain blockchain integrity by validating transactions and are compensated through block rewards or transaction fees.
usageTranslations.tr: Blok üreticileri, işlemleri doğrulayarak blokzincirin bütünlüğünü korur ve blok ödülleri veya işlem ücretleriyle teşvik edilir.
usageTranslations.fr: Les producteurs de blocs maintiennent l’intégrité de la blockchain en validant les transactions et sont rémunérés par des récompenses ou des frais de transaction.
usageTranslations.de: Block-Produzenten gewährleisten die Integrität der Blockchain durch Validierung von Transaktionen und werden durch Blockbelohnungen oder Transaktionsgebühren entschädigt.
usageTranslations.es: Los productores de bloques mantienen la integridad de la blockchain validando transacciones y reciben recompensas o comisiones.
usageTranslations.zh: 区块生产者通过验证交易维护区块链的完整性，并通过区块奖励或交易手续费获得报酬。
usageTranslations.ar: يحافظ منتجو الكتل على سلامة البلوكشين من خلال التحقق من المعاملات ويُعوضون بمكافآت الكتل أو رسوم المعاملات.
usageTranslations.pt: Os produtores de bloco mantêm a integridade da blockchain validando transações e são recompensados com blocos ou taxas.
usageTranslations.ru: Производители блоков поддерживают целостность блокчейна, подтверждая транзакции, и получают вознаграждение блоками или комиссиями.
usageTranslations.ja: ブロックプロデューサーはトランザクションの検証でブロックチェーンの整合性を維持し、報酬や手数料を得る。
usageTranslations.it: I produttori di blocchi mantengono l’integrità della blockchain validando le transazioni e sono ricompensati tramite ricompense di blocco o commissioni.
usageTranslations.vi: Nhà sản xuất khối duy trì tính toàn vẹn của blockchain bằng cách xác thực giao dịch và được thưởng bằng phí giao dịch hoặc phần thưởng khối.
usageTranslations.hi: ब्लॉक उत्पादक लेनदेन को मान्य करके ब्लॉकचेन की अखंडता बनाए रखते हैं और ब्लॉक इनाम या शुल्क के माध्यम से मुआवजा पाते हैं।
usageTranslations.th: ผู้ผลิตบล็อกช่วยรักษาความสมบูรณ์ของบล็อกเชนด้วยการตรวจสอบธุรกรรมและได้รับค่าตอบแทนเป็นรางวัลหรือค่าธรรมเนียมธุรกรรม
usageTranslations.id: Produsen blok menjaga integritas blockchain dengan memvalidasi transaksi dan mendapatkan kompensasi dari hadiah blok atau biaya transaksi.

terms.definition: A node that participates in block validation and consensus by verifying transactions, creating new blocks, and securing the blockchain, especially in proof-of-stake networks.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Validator nodes are critical for the security and operation of proof-of-stake blockchains and may earn staking rewards for their services.

termTranslations.th: โหนดตัวตรวจสอบ

usageTranslations.en: Validator nodes are critical for the security and operation of proof-of-stake blockchains and may earn staking rewards for their services.
usageTranslations.tr: Doğrulayıcı node’lar, proof-of-stake blokzincirlerinin güvenliği ve işleyişi için kritik önemdedir ve sundukları hizmetler karşılığında staking ödülleri kazanabilirler.
usageTranslations.fr: Les nœuds valideurs sont essentiels à la sécurité et au fonctionnement des blockchains proof-of-stake et peuvent gagner des récompenses de staking.
usageTranslations.de: Validator Nodes sind für die Sicherheit und den Betrieb von Proof-of-Stake-Blockchains entscheidend und können Staking-Belohnungen verdienen.
usageTranslations.es: Los nodos validadores son fundamentales para la seguridad y el funcionamiento de las blockchains proof-of-stake y pueden recibir recompensas de staking.
usageTranslations.zh: 验证节点对权益证明区块链的安全和运作至关重要，并可因其服务获得质押奖励。
usageTranslations.ar: عقد التحقق ضرورية لأمان وعمل بلوكشينات إثبات الحصة وقد تكسب مكافآت الستيكينغ مقابل خدماتها.
usageTranslations.pt: Nós validadores são essenciais para a segurança e operação das blockchains proof-of-stake e podem ganhar recompensas de staking.
usageTranslations.ru: Валидаторы критичны для безопасности и функционирования PoS-блокчейнов и могут получать вознаграждение за стейкинг.
usageTranslations.ja: バリデータノードはPoSブロックチェーンのセキュリティと運用に不可欠で、サービスに応じて報酬を得られる。
usageTranslations.it: I nodi validatori sono fondamentali per la sicurezza e il funzionamento delle blockchain proof-of-stake e possono ricevere ricompense di staking.
usageTranslations.vi: Nút xác thực rất quan trọng với bảo mật và vận hành blockchain proof-of-stake và có thể nhận thưởng staking.
usageTranslations.hi: वैलिडेटर नोड्स प्रूफ-ऑफ-स्टेक ब्लॉकचेन की सुरक्षा और संचालन के लिए महत्वपूर्ण हैं और वे अपनी सेवाओं के लिए स्टेकिंग रिवॉर्ड्स कमा सकते हैं।
usageTranslations.th: โหนดตัวตรวจสอบสำคัญต่อความปลอดภัยและการทำงานของบล็อกเชน proof-of-stake และได้รับรางวัล staking
usageTranslations.id: Node validator sangat penting untuk keamanan dan operasi blockchain proof-of-stake dan dapat memperoleh hadiah staking.

terms.definition: A blockchain-native token that confers voting rights and participation privileges in the protocol’s decision-making, allowing holders to influence upgrades, parameter changes, and treasury allocations in decentralized crypto projects.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Crypto portfolio managers may hold governance tokens to participate in DeFi protocol votes on upgrades, fee structures, or risk parameters.

termTranslations.th: โทเคนการกำกับดูแล

usageTranslations.en: Crypto portfolio managers may hold governance tokens to participate in DeFi protocol votes on upgrades, fee structures, or risk parameters.
usageTranslations.tr: Kripto portföy yöneticileri, DeFi protokollerindeki yükseltmeler, ücret yapıları veya risk parametreleriyle ilgili oylamalara katılmak için yönetim token’ı bulundurabilir.
usageTranslations.fr: Les gestionnaires de portefeuilles crypto peuvent détenir des jetons de gouvernance pour participer aux votes des protocoles DeFi sur les mises à jour, les frais ou les paramètres de risque.
usageTranslations.de: Krypto-Portfoliomanager halten möglicherweise Governance-Token, um an Abstimmungen zu Upgrades, Gebühren oder Risiko-Parametern von DeFi-Protokollen teilzunehmen.
usageTranslations.es: Los gestores de carteras cripto pueden mantener tokens de gobernanza para participar en las votaciones de protocolos DeFi sobre actualizaciones, tarifas o parámetros de riesgo.
usageTranslations.zh: 加密资产组合经理可持有治理代币，参与DeFi协议的升级、费用或风险参数投票。
usageTranslations.ar: قد يحتفظ مديرو المحافظ بالرموز الخاصة بالحوكمة للمشاركة في تصويت بروتوكولات DeFi بشأن الترقيات أو هياكل الرسوم أو معايير المخاطر.
usageTranslations.pt: Gestores de portfólios cripto podem deter tokens de governança para votar em atualizações, taxas ou parâmetros de risco em protocolos DeFi.
usageTranslations.ru: Управляющие криптопортфелями могут держать токены управления для участия в голосованиях по апгрейдам, комиссиям или рискам DeFi-протоколов.
usageTranslations.ja: 暗号資産ポートフォリオマネージャーは、DeFiプロトコルのアップグレードやリスクパラメータ投票のためにガバナンストークンを保有することがある。
usageTranslations.it: I gestori di portafogli crypto possono detenere token di governance per partecipare alle votazioni su aggiornamenti, tariffe o parametri di rischio dei protocolli DeFi.
usageTranslations.vi: Nhà quản lý danh mục tiền mã hóa có thể giữ token quản trị để tham gia bỏ phiếu về nâng cấp, phí hoặc tham số rủi ro trong các giao thức DeFi.
usageTranslations.hi: क्रिप्टो पोर्टफोलियो मैनेजर DeFi प्रोटोकॉल में उन्नयन, शुल्क संरचना या जोखिम मापदंडों पर मतदान में भाग लेने के लिए गवर्नेंस टोकन रख सकते हैं।
usageTranslations.th: ผู้จัดการพอร์ตคริปโตอาจถือโทเคนการกำกับดูแลเพื่อเข้าร่วมโหวตอัปเกรด, ค่าธรรมเนียม หรือพารามิเตอร์ความเสี่ยงใน DeFi
usageTranslations.id: Manajer portofolio kripto dapat memegang token tata kelola untuk berpartisipasi dalam pemungutan suara protokol DeFi terkait upgrade, biaya, atau parameter risiko.

terms.definition: A blockchain-based derivative instrument designed to replicate the price behavior of a real-world or digital asset, using smart contracts and collateralization, enabling exposure without direct ownership of the underlying.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Crypto funds use synthetic assets for diversified exposure to commodities or equities without holding the actual underlying assets.

termTranslations.th: สินทรัพย์สังเคราะห์

usageTranslations.en: Crypto funds use synthetic assets for diversified exposure to commodities or equities without holding the actual underlying assets.
usageTranslations.tr: Kripto fonlar, gerçek dayanak varlığı tutmadan emtia veya hisse senetlerine çeşitlendirilmiş maruziyet sağlamak için sentetik varlıkları kullanır.
usageTranslations.fr: Les fonds crypto utilisent des actifs synthétiques pour s’exposer de façon diversifiée à des matières premières ou actions sans détenir l’actif sous-jacent.
usageTranslations.de: Kryptofonds nutzen synthetische Vermögenswerte, um diversifiziertes Engagement in Rohstoffen oder Aktien zu ermöglichen, ohne das zugrunde liegende Asset zu halten.
usageTranslations.es: Los fondos cripto utilizan activos sintéticos para obtener exposición diversificada a commodities o acciones sin poseer el activo subyacente real.
usageTranslations.zh: 加密基金利用合成资产，实现无需持有真实标的资产的多样化敞口。
usageTranslations.ar: تستخدم الصناديق المشفرة الأصول الاصطناعية للحصول على تعرض متنوع للسلع أو الأسهم دون حيازة الأصل الأساسي الفعلي.
usageTranslations.pt: Fundos cripto usam ativos sintéticos para exposição diversificada a commodities ou ações sem deter o ativo subjacente real.
usageTranslations.ru: Криптофонды используют синтетические активы для диверсифицированного доступа к товарам или акциям без владения базовым активом.
usageTranslations.ja: 暗号資産ファンドは、実際の原資産を保有せずにコモディティや株式への分散エクスポージャーのためにシンセティック資産を使用する。
usageTranslations.it: I fondi crypto usano asset sintetici per esposizione diversificata a materie prime o azioni senza detenere l’asset sottostante.
usageTranslations.vi: Quỹ tiền mã hóa sử dụng tài sản tổng hợp để tiếp cận đa dạng với hàng hóa hoặc cổ phiếu mà không cần nắm giữ tài sản cơ sở thực tế.
usageTranslations.hi: क्रिप्टो फंड विविधीकरण के लिए सिंथेटिक संपत्ति का उपयोग करते हैं, जिससे असली संपत्ति रखे बिना एक्सपोजर मिलता है।
usageTranslations.th: กองทุนคริปโตใช้สินทรัพย์สังเคราะห์เพื่อกระจายความเสี่ยงในสินค้าโภคภัณฑ์หรือหุ้นโดยไม่ต้องถือครองสินทรัพย์จริง
usageTranslations.id: Dana kripto menggunakan aset sintetis untuk memperoleh eksposur terdiversifikasi ke komoditas atau saham tanpa memiliki aset dasarnya.

terms.definition: Techniques or protocols that increase blockchain transaction throughput and efficiency by building secondary layers (Layer 2) on top of main networks, enabling faster, cheaper, and more scalable portfolio management operations.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Layer scaling solutions allow institutional crypto managers to execute high-volume transactions without congesting the main chain or incurring excessive gas fees.

termTranslations.ja: レイヤースケーリング
termTranslations.th: การขยายขนาดเลเยอร์

usageTranslations.en: Layer scaling solutions allow institutional crypto managers to execute high-volume transactions without congesting the main chain or incurring excessive gas fees.
usageTranslations.tr: Katman ölçekleme çözümleri, kurumsal kripto yöneticilerinin ana zinciri tıkamadan veya yüksek gas ücretlerine maruz kalmadan yüksek hacimli işlemler gerçekleştirmesine olanak tanır.
