usageTranslations.pt: Gestores de portfólios analisam a profundidade e liquidez do livro de ordens para minimizar impacto de preço e slippage ao executar grandes operações cripto.
usageTranslations.ru: Управляющие портфелями анализируют глубину книги заявок и ликвидность, чтобы минимизировать влияние на цену и проскальзывание при совершении крупных криптосделок.
usageTranslations.ja: ポートフォリオマネージャーは、大口暗号資産取引を執行する際、価格インパクトやスリッページを最小化するためにオーダーブックの深さと流動性を分析する。
usageTranslations.it: I gestori di portafogli analizzano la profondità e la liquidità del libro degli ordini per minimizzare l’impatto sui prezzi e lo slippage nell’esecuzione di grandi ordini crypto.
usageTranslations.vi: Nhà quản lý danh mục phân tích độ sâu và thanh khoản sổ lệnh để giảm thiểu tác động giá và trượt giá khi thực hiện lệnh lớn.
usageTranslations.hi: पोर्टफोलियो प्रबंधक बड़े क्रिप्टो ट्रेड्स के लिए ऑर्डर बुक गहराई व लिक्विडिटी का विश्लेषण करते हैं ताकि प्राइस इम्पैक्ट और स्लिपेज कम हो।
usageTranslations.th: ผู้จัดการพอร์ตวิเคราะห์ความลึกของสมุดคำสั่งซื้อขายและสภาพคล่องเพื่อให้การซื้อขายคริปโตขนาดใหญ่มีผลต่อราคาน้อยที่สุด
usageTranslations.id: Manajer portofolio menganalisis kedalaman buku pesanan dan likuiditas untuk meminimalkan dampak harga dan slippage saat melakukan perdagangan kripto besar.

terms.definition: A tokenized representation of a digital asset from another blockchain, enabling cross-chain compatibility, DeFi participation, and portfolio diversification while requiring robust custody, audit, and redemption protocols.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Portfolio managers use wrapped tokens to access DeFi opportunities on Ethereum with BTC exposure, while monitoring custody and redemption risks.

termTranslations.th: โทเคนห่อหุ้ม

usageTranslations.en: Portfolio managers use wrapped tokens to access DeFi opportunities on Ethereum with BTC exposure, while monitoring custody and redemption risks.
usageTranslations.tr: Portföy yöneticileri, BTC maruziyetiyle Ethereum’daki DeFi fırsatlarına erişmek için sarmalanmış token kullanır ve saklama ile itfa risklerini izler.
usageTranslations.fr: Les gestionnaires de portefeuille utilisent des tokens enveloppés pour accéder aux opportunités DeFi sur Ethereum tout en surveillant les risques de garde et de rachat.
usageTranslations.de: Portfoliomanager nutzen Wrapped Tokens, um DeFi-Chancen auf Ethereum mit BTC-Exposure wahrzunehmen und Verwahr- sowie Rücknahmerisiken zu beobachten.
usageTranslations.es: Los gestores de carteras usan tokens envueltos para acceder a oportunidades DeFi en Ethereum con exposición a BTC, monitorizando riesgos de custodia y redención.
usageTranslations.zh: 投资组合经理使用包装代币在以太坊上获取BTC敞口的DeFi机会，并监控托管与赎回风险。
usageTranslations.ar: يستخدم مديرو المحافظ الرموز المغلفة للوصول إلى فرص DeFi على Ethereum مع التعرض لعملة BTC مع مراقبة مخاطر الحفظ والاسترداد.
usageTranslations.pt: Gestores de portfólios usam tokens envelopados para acessar oportunidades DeFi no Ethereum com exposição a BTC, monitorando riscos de custódia e resgate.
usageTranslations.ru: Управляющие портфелями используют обёрнутые токены для доступа к DeFi на Ethereum при BTC-экспозиции, отслеживая риски хранения и погашения.
usageTranslations.ja: ポートフォリオマネージャーは、BTCエクスポージャーを持ちながらEthereum上のDeFiにアクセスするためにラップドトークンを利用し、カストディや償還リスクを監視している。
usageTranslations.it: I gestori di portafogli usano token wrapped per accedere alle opportunità DeFi su Ethereum con esposizione BTC, monitorando rischi di custodia e rimborso.
usageTranslations.vi: Nhà quản lý danh mục sử dụng token bao bọc để tiếp cận DeFi trên Ethereum với tiếp xúc BTC, đồng thời giám sát rủi ro lưu ký và quy đổi.
usageTranslations.hi: पोर्टफोलियो प्रबंधक BTC एक्सपोजर के साथ Ethereum पर DeFi अवसर पाने के लिए रैप्ड टोकन का उपयोग करते हैं और कस्टडी व रिडेम्पशन जोखिम की निगरानी करते हैं।
usageTranslations.th: ผู้จัดการพอร์ตใช้โทเคนห่อหุ้มเพื่อเข้าถึงโอกาส DeFi บน Ethereum ด้วยการเปิดรับ BTC พร้อมกับติดตามความเสี่ยง
usageTranslations.id: Manajer portofolio menggunakan token wrapped untuk mengakses peluang DeFi di Ethereum dengan eksposur BTC, sambil memantau risiko kustodian dan penebusan.

terms.definition: An offline digital asset storage solution, typically hardware devices or paper wallets, used to secure crypto holdings against cyberattacks, hacking, and unauthorized online access in institutional portfolio custody and treasury operations.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Institutional funds use cold wallets for long-term storage of digital assets, minimizing cyber risk and meeting strict custody regulations.

termTranslations.th: วอลเล็ตเย็น

usageTranslations.en: Institutional funds use cold wallets for long-term storage of digital assets, minimizing cyber risk and meeting strict custody regulations.
usageTranslations.tr: Kurumsal fonlar, dijital varlıkların uzun vadeli saklanması için soğuk cüzdan kullanarak siber riski azaltır ve sıkı saklama yönetmeliklerine uyar.
usageTranslations.fr: Les fonds institutionnels utilisent des wallets froids pour le stockage à long terme des actifs numériques, minimisant le risque cyber et respectant les réglementations de garde strictes.
usageTranslations.de: Institutionelle Fonds verwenden Cold Wallets zur langfristigen Speicherung digitaler Assets, um Cyberrisiken zu minimieren und strengen Verwahrvorschriften zu entsprechen.
usageTranslations.es: Los fondos institucionales utilizan wallets frías para el almacenamiento a largo plazo de activos digitales, minimizando el riesgo cibernético y cumpliendo con regulaciones estrictas de custodia.
usageTranslations.zh: 机构基金使用冷钱包长期存储数字资产，降低网络风险并满足严格的托管规定。
usageTranslations.ar: تستخدم الصناديق المؤسسية المحافظ الباردة لتخزين الأصول الرقمية على المدى الطويل، مما يقلل من مخاطر الإنترنت ويلبي اللوائح الصارمة للحفظ.
usageTranslations.pt: Fundos institucionais usam carteiras frias para armazenar ativos digitais a longo prazo, minimizando riscos cibernéticos e cumprindo normas rígidas de custódia.
usageTranslations.ru: Институциональные фонды используют холодные кошельки для долгосрочного хранения цифровых активов, минимизируя киберриски и соответствуя строгим требованиям кастодиального хранения.
usageTranslations.ja: 機関投資家のファンドはデジタル資産の長期保管にコールドウォレットを利用し、サイバーリスクを最小限に抑え厳格なカストディ規制に対応している。
usageTranslations.it: I fondi istituzionali usano cold wallet per la custodia a lungo termine degli asset digitali, minimizzando i rischi informatici e rispettando la regolamentazione.
usageTranslations.vi: Quỹ tổ chức sử dụng ví lạnh để lưu trữ tài sản kỹ thuật số dài hạn, giảm rủi ro mạng và tuân thủ quy định lưu ký.
usageTranslations.hi: संस्थागत फंड डिजिटल संपत्ति के दीर्घकालिक भंडारण के लिए कोल्ड वॉलेट का उपयोग करते हैं, साइबर जोखिम कम करते हैं और सख्त कस्टडी नियमों का पालन करते हैं।
usageTranslations.th: กองทุนสถาบันใช้วอลเล็ตเย็นสำหรับเก็บสินทรัพย์ดิจิทัลระยะยาว เพื่อลดความเสี่ยงทางไซเบอร์และตรงตามข้อกำหนดการดูแลสินทรัพย์
usageTranslations.id: Dana institusional menggunakan dompet dingin untuk menyimpan aset digital jangka panjang, mengurangi risiko siber dan memenuhi regulasi kustodian yang ketat.

terms.definition: A standardized set of protocols, legal guidelines, and technical tools enabling the issuance, management, and compliance of digital tokens representing assets or rights on blockchain networks.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: A robust tokenization framework is critical for institutional asset managers to issue, track, and service tokenized securities in compliance with regulatory requirements.

termTranslations.ja: トークナイゼーションフレームワーク
termTranslations.th: เฟรมเวิร์กโทเคไนซ์

usageTranslations.en: A robust tokenization framework is critical for institutional asset managers to issue, track, and service tokenized securities in compliance with regulatory requirements.
usageTranslations.tr: Kurumsal varlık yöneticilerinin düzenleyici gereksinimlere uygun şekilde tokenleştirilmiş menkul kıymetleri ihraç etmesi, izlemesi ve yönetmesi için sağlam bir tokenizasyon çerçevesi kritiktir.
usageTranslations.fr: Un cadre de tokenisation solide est essentiel pour que les gestionnaires institutionnels émettent, suivent et gèrent des titres tokenisés dans le respect de la réglementation.
usageTranslations.de: Ein robustes Tokenisierungs-Framework ist entscheidend, damit institutionelle Vermögensverwalter tokenisierte Wertpapiere im Einklang mit regulatorischen Anforderungen herausgeben, nachverfolgen und bedienen können.
usageTranslations.es: Un marco de tokenización sólido es esencial para que los gestores institucionales emitan, rastreen y gestionen valores tokenizados cumpliendo la normativa.
usageTranslations.zh: 强大的代币化框架对于机构资产管理人在符合法规要求的情况下发行、跟踪和服务代币化证券至关重要。
usageTranslations.ar: إطار التوكننة القوي أمر حاسم لمديري الأصول المؤسسيين لإصدار وتتبع وخدمة الأوراق المالية المرمّزة وفقًا للمتطلبات التنظيمية.
usageTranslations.pt: Um framework robusto de tokenização é fundamental para gestores institucionais emitirem, rastrearem e administrarem títulos tokenizados conforme exigências regulatórias.
usageTranslations.ru: Надежный фреймворк токенизации необходим институциональным управляющим для выпуска, отслеживания и обслуживания токенизированных ценных бумаг в соответствии с требованиями регулирования.
usageTranslations.ja: 堅牢なトークナイゼーションフレームワークは、規制要件を満たしてトークン化証券の発行・追跡・管理を行うために機関投資家に不可欠です。
usageTranslations.it: Un framework di tokenizzazione robusto è fondamentale affinché i gestori istituzionali possano emettere, tracciare e gestire titoli tokenizzati in conformità con la normativa.
usageTranslations.vi: Khung token hóa vững chắc rất quan trọng để quản lý tài sản tổ chức phát hành, theo dõi và phục vụ chứng khoán đã token hóa tuân thủ quy định.
usageTranslations.hi: एक मजबूत टोकनाइज़ेशन ढांचा संस्थागत परिसंपत्ति प्रबंधकों के लिए टोकनयुक्त प्रतिभूतियों को जारी, ट्रैक और प्रबंधित करने हेतु आवश्यक है।
usageTranslations.th: เฟรมเวิร์กโทเคไนซ์ที่แข็งแกร่งสำคัญสำหรับผู้จัดการสินทรัพย์สถาบันในการออก ติดตาม และบริหารหลักทรัพย์โทเคไนซ์ให้ถูกต้องตามกฎ
usageTranslations.id: Kerangka tokenisasi yang kokoh sangat penting bagi manajer aset institusional untuk menerbitkan, melacak, dan melayani sekuritas tokenisasi sesuai persyaratan regulasi.

terms.definition: The process of connecting portfolio management systems or platforms with decentralized exchanges (DEXs) to enable direct access to on-chain liquidity, trading, and asset allocation.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: DEX integration allows portfolio managers to execute trades on decentralized exchanges, improving liquidity access and minimizing custody and counterparty risk.

termTranslations.th: การบูรณาการ DEX

usageTranslations.en: DEX integration allows portfolio managers to execute trades on decentralized exchanges, improving liquidity access and minimizing custody and counterparty risk.
usageTranslations.tr: DEX entegrasyonu, portföy yöneticilerinin merkeziyetsiz borsalarda işlem yapmasına olanak tanır; likiditeye erişimi artırır ve saklama ile karşı taraf riskini azaltır.
usageTranslations.fr: L’intégration DEX permet aux gestionnaires d’exécuter des transactions sur des exchanges décentralisés, améliorant l’accès à la liquidité et réduisant les risques de garde et de contrepartie.
usageTranslations.de: Die DEX-Integration ermöglicht es Portfoliomanagern, Trades auf dezentralen Börsen auszuführen, verbessert die Liquiditätszugang und minimiert Verwahrungs- und Kontrahentenrisiken.
usageTranslations.es: La integración DEX permite a los gestores operar en exchanges descentralizados, mejorando la liquidez y minimizando riesgos de custodia y contraparte.
usageTranslations.zh: DEX集成让投资组合经理可在去中心化交易所直接交易，提高流动性并降低托管及对手方风险。
usageTranslations.ar: يسمح تكامل DEX لمديري المحافظ بتنفيذ الصفقات في البورصات اللامركزية، مما يعزز السيولة ويقلل من مخاطر الحفظ والطرف المقابل.
usageTranslations.pt: A integração DEX permite que gestores executem operações em exchanges descentralizadas, melhorando a liquidez e minimizando riscos de custódia e contraparte.
usageTranslations.ru: Интеграция DEX позволяет портфельным управляющим совершать сделки на децентрализованных биржах, улучшая доступ к ликвидности и минимизируя риски хранения и контрагента.
usageTranslations.ja: DEX統合により、ポートフォリオマネージャーは分散型取引所で取引でき、流動性アクセスを高め、カストディおよびカウンターパーティリスクを最小化できます。
usageTranslations.it: L’integrazione DEX consente ai gestori di portafoglio di operare direttamente su exchange decentralizzati, migliorando la liquidità e riducendo i rischi di custodia e controparte.
usageTranslations.vi: Tích hợp DEX giúp quản lý danh mục giao dịch trên sàn phi tập trung, tăng khả năng tiếp cận thanh khoản, giảm rủi ro lưu ký và đối tác.
usageTranslations.hi: DEX एकीकरण पोर्टफोलियो प्रबंधकों को विकेन्द्रीकृत एक्सचेंजों पर ट्रेडिंग सक्षम करता है, जिससे तरलता में सुधार और कस्टडी व काउंटरपार्टी जोखिम कम होता है।
usageTranslations.th: การบูรณาการ DEX ช่วยให้ผู้จัดการพอร์ตสามารถซื้อขายในตลาดกระจายศูนย์ เพิ่มสภาพคล่องและลดความเสี่ยงด้านการเก็บสินทรัพย์และคู่สัญญา
usageTranslations.id: Integrasi DEX memungkinkan manajer portofolio melakukan perdagangan di bursa terdesentralisasi, meningkatkan akses likuiditas dan meminimalkan risiko kustodian dan counterparty.

terms.definition: A smart contract vulnerability where a contract can be called repeatedly before its first invocation is complete, often exploited for unauthorized withdrawals in DeFi protocols.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Portfolio managers must assess DeFi contracts for reentrancy risk to prevent exploit-based asset loss, as highlighted in major protocol attacks.

termTranslations.ja: リエントランシーリスク
termTranslations.th: ความเสี่ยงรีเอนแทรนซี

usageTranslations.en: Portfolio managers must assess DeFi contracts for reentrancy risk to prevent exploit-based asset loss, as highlighted in major protocol attacks.
usageTranslations.tr: Portföy yöneticileri, büyük protokol saldırılarında görüldüğü gibi varlık kaybını önlemek için DeFi kontratlarında yeniden giriş riskini değerlendirmelidir.
usageTranslations.fr: Les gestionnaires de portefeuille doivent évaluer le risque de réentrance dans les contrats DeFi pour éviter des pertes d’actifs liées à des exploits, comme l’ont montré plusieurs attaques majeures.
usageTranslations.de: Portfoliomanager müssen DeFi-Verträge auf Reentrancy-Risiko prüfen, um ausnutzungsbedingte Verluste zu vermeiden, wie große Protokollangriffe zeigen.
usageTranslations.es: Los gestores de carteras deben evaluar el riesgo de reentrada en contratos DeFi para evitar pérdidas por exploits, como en ataques a grandes protocolos.
usageTranslations.zh: 投资组合经理必须评估DeFi合约的重入风险，以防范因漏洞被利用造成的资产损失，正如多起重大协议攻击所示。
usageTranslations.ar: يجب على مديري المحافظ تقييم عقود DeFi لمخاطر إعادة الدخول لمنع خسائر الأصول الناتجة عن الاستغلال، كما أبرزته الهجمات البروتوكولية الكبرى.
usageTranslations.pt: Gestores de portfólio devem avaliar contratos DeFi para risco de reentrância e evitar perdas por exploração, como visto em ataques a grandes protocolos.
usageTranslations.ru: Портфельным управляющим следует оценивать контракты DeFi на риск реентерабельности, чтобы предотвратить потери из-за эксплойтов, как показали крупные атаки.
usageTranslations.ja: ポートフォリオマネージャーは大規模プロトコル攻撃で問題となったリエントランシーリスクをDeFiコントラクトで評価すべきです。
usageTranslations.it: I gestori devono valutare i contratti DeFi per rischio di reentrancy e prevenire perdite da exploit, come dimostrato da vari attacchi ai protocolli.
usageTranslations.vi: Nhà quản lý danh mục cần đánh giá rủi ro reentrancy ở hợp đồng DeFi để ngăn thất thoát tài sản do khai thác lỗ hổng như các vụ tấn công lớn.
usageTranslations.hi: पोर्टफोलियो प्रबंधकों को DeFi अनुबंधों में रीएंट्रेंसी जोखिम का आकलन करना चाहिए ताकि एक्सप्लॉइट आधारित नुकसान से बचा जा सके, जैसा कि बड़े प्रोटोकॉल हमलों में देखा गया।
usageTranslations.th: ผู้จัดการพอร์ตต้องประเมินความเสี่ยงรีเอนแทรนซีของสัญญา DeFi เพื่อป้องกันการสูญเสียจากการถูกโจมตี เช่นในกรณีโปรโตคอลใหญ่ๆ
usageTranslations.id: Manajer portofolio harus menilai kontrak DeFi untuk risiko reentrancy agar mencegah kerugian aset akibat eksploitasi, seperti yang terjadi pada serangan protokol besar.

terms.definition: A web-based or on-chain tool that enables users and portfolio managers to view, search, and verify blockchain transactions, addresses, token holdings, and contract events in real time.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Portfolio audits require verification of all transactions and token holdings using a block explorer to ensure accurate and transparent reporting.

termTranslations.ja: ブロックエクスプローラー
termTranslations.th: Block Explorer

usageTranslations.en: Portfolio audits require verification of all transactions and token holdings using a block explorer to ensure accurate and transparent reporting.
usageTranslations.tr: Portföy denetimleri, tüm işlemlerin ve token varlıklarının doğrulanması için block explorer kullanımı gerektirir; böylece raporlama doğru ve şeffaf olur.
usageTranslations.fr: Les audits de portefeuille nécessitent la vérification de toutes les transactions et des avoirs via un explorateur de blocs afin d’assurer des rapports exacts et transparents.
usageTranslations.de: Portfolio-Audits erfordern die Überprüfung aller Transaktionen und Token-Bestände mit einem Block Explorer, um eine genaue und transparente Berichterstattung sicherzustellen.
usageTranslations.es: Las auditorías de portafolios requieren verificar todas las transacciones y tenencias con un explorador de bloques para garantizar informes precisos y transparentes.
usageTranslations.zh: 投资组合审计需通过区块浏览器验证所有交易和代币持有，以确保报告准确透明。
usageTranslations.ar: تتطلب عمليات تدقيق المحافظ التحقق من جميع المعاملات والأرصدة باستخدام مستكشف الكتل لضمان تقارير دقيقة وشفافة.
usageTranslations.pt: Auditorias de portfólio exigem verificação de todas as transações e ativos via block explorer para garantir relatórios precisos e transparentes.
usageTranslations.ru: Для аудита портфеля требуется верификация всех транзакций и токенов с помощью блок-эксплорера для обеспечения точной и прозрачной отчетности.
usageTranslations.ja: ポートフォリオ監査では、ブロックエクスプローラーを使って全ての取引とトークン保有を検証し、正確かつ透明な報告を確保する必要がある。
usageTranslations.it: Le verifiche di portafoglio richiedono la validazione di tutte le transazioni e delle posizioni token tramite un block explorer per garantire report accurati e trasparenti.
usageTranslations.vi: Kiểm toán danh mục cần xác minh mọi giao dịch và token bằng trình khám phá khối để đảm bảo báo cáo minh bạch và chính xác.
usageTranslations.hi: पोर्टफोलियो ऑडिट में सभी ट्रांजैक्शन और टोकन होल्डिंग की पुष्टि के लिए ब्लॉक एक्सप्लोरर का उपयोग आवश्यक है ताकि रिपोर्टिंग सटीक और पारदर्शी हो।
usageTranslations.th: การตรวจสอบพอร์ตต้องยืนยันธุรกรรมและโทเค็นทุกอย่างด้วย Block Explorer เพื่อความถูกต้องโปร่งใส
usageTranslations.id: Audit portofolio memerlukan verifikasi semua transaksi dan aset menggunakan Block Explorer untuk memastikan pelaporan akurat dan transparan.

terms.definition: The protocol and process by which a blockchain network achieves agreement on the validity of transactions and the addition of new blocks, such as Proof of Work or Proof of Stake.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: The choice of consensus mechanism affects portfolio asset security, staking yield, transaction speed, and network risk profile.

termTranslations.ja: コンセンサスメカニズム
termTranslations.th: กลไกฉันทามติ

usageTranslations.en: The choice of consensus mechanism affects portfolio asset security, staking yield, transaction speed, and network risk profile.
usageTranslations.tr: Konsensüs mekanizması seçimi, portföy varlık güvenliği, staking getirisi, işlem hızı ve ağ risk profilini etkiler.
usageTranslations.fr: Le choix du mécanisme de consensus influence la sécurité des actifs, le rendement du staking, la vitesse des transactions et le profil de risque réseau.
usageTranslations.de: Die Wahl des Konsensmechanismus beeinflusst die Sicherheit der Portfoliowerte, Staking-Renditen, Transaktionsgeschwindigkeit und das Netzwerkrisiko.
usageTranslations.es: La elección del mecanismo de consenso afecta la seguridad de activos, la rentabilidad del staking, la velocidad y el riesgo de la red.
usageTranslations.zh: 共识机制的选择会影响资产安全性、质押收益、交易速度和网络风险。
usageTranslations.ar: اختيار آلية الإجماع يؤثر على أمان الأصول والعائد من الستيكينغ وسرعة المعاملات والمخاطر.
usageTranslations.pt: A escolha do mecanismo de consenso afeta a segurança, o rendimento do staking, a velocidade das transações e o risco da rede.
usageTranslations.ru: Выбор механизма консенсуса влияет на безопасность активов, доходность стейкинга, скорость транзакций и риски сети.
usageTranslations.ja: コンセンサスメカニズムの選択は資産の安全性、ステーキング報酬、トランザクション速度、ネットワークリスクに影響します。
usageTranslations.it: La scelta del meccanismo di consenso incide sulla sicurezza degli asset, il rendimento dello staking, la velocità e il rischio della rete.
usageTranslations.vi: Việc chọn cơ chế đồng thuận ảnh hưởng đến bảo mật tài sản, lợi suất staking, tốc độ giao dịch và rủi ro mạng lưới.
usageTranslations.hi: कंसेंसस मैकेनिज्म का चयन पोर्टफोलियो सुरक्षा, स्टेकिंग यील्ड, ट्रांजैक्शन स्पीड और नेटवर्क रिस्क प्रोफाइल को प्रभावित करता है।
usageTranslations.th: การเลือกกลไกฉันทามติส่งผลต่อความปลอดภัยของสินทรัพย์ ผลตอบแทนการสเตกกิ้ง ความเร็ว และความเสี่ยงของเครือข่าย
usageTranslations.id: Pilihan mekanisme konsensus memengaruhi keamanan aset, hasil staking, kecepatan transaksi, dan profil risiko jaringan.

terms.definition: The process and protocols for regaining access to a digital wallet after key loss, device failure, or compromise, including seed phrase restoration, social recovery, or multi-signature mechanisms.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Portfolio custodians must have robust wallet recovery procedures to mitigate operational risk and prevent permanent loss of digital assets.

termTranslations.th: การกู้คืนวอลเล็ต

usageTranslations.en: Portfolio custodians must have robust wallet recovery procedures to mitigate operational risk and prevent permanent loss of digital assets.
usageTranslations.tr: Portföy saklayıcılarının operasyonel riski azaltmak ve dijital varlıkların kalıcı kaybını önlemek için sağlam cüzdan kurtarma prosedürlerine sahip olması gerekir.
usageTranslations.fr: Les dépositaires doivent disposer de procédures de récupération de portefeuille pour limiter les risques et éviter la perte définitive d’actifs numériques.
usageTranslations.de: Portfolio-Verwahrer müssen robuste Wallet-Wiederherstellungsprozesse haben, um operationelle Risiken zu mindern und dauerhaften Verlust digitaler Assets zu verhindern.
usageTranslations.es: Los custodios deben tener procedimientos sólidos de recuperación de wallet para mitigar riesgos operativos y evitar la pérdida permanente de activos.
usageTranslations.zh: 投资组合托管人必须拥有强大的钱包恢复流程，以降低操作风险并防止数字资产永久丢失。
usageTranslations.ar: يجب أن يكون لدى أمناء المحافظ إجراءات قوية لاستعادة المحفظة لتقليل المخاطر التشغيلية ومنع فقدان الأصول الرقمية بشكل دائم.
usageTranslations.pt: Os custodians devem ter procedimentos robustos de recuperação de wallet para mitigar riscos operacionais e evitar perdas definitivas.
usageTranslations.ru: Кастодианы портфелей должны иметь надежные процедуры восстановления кошельков для снижения операционных рисков и предотвращения безвозвратной потери цифровых активов.
usageTranslations.ja: カストディアンはオペレーショナルリスクを軽減しデジタル資産の恒久的な損失を防ぐため堅牢なウォレット復旧手順を用意すべきです。
usageTranslations.it: I custodi di portafoglio devono disporre di robuste procedure di recupero wallet per mitigare i rischi operativi e prevenire la perdita definitiva di asset digitali.
usageTranslations.vi: Nhà lưu ký cần quy trình khôi phục ví chắc chắn để giảm rủi ro vận hành và tránh mất mát tài sản số vĩnh viễn.
usageTranslations.hi: पोर्टफोलियो कस्टोडियन को संचालन जोखिम कम करने और डिजिटल संपत्तियों की स्थायी हानि रोकने के लिए मजबूत वॉलेट रिकवरी प्रक्रियाएं अपनानी चाहिए।
usageTranslations.th: ผู้ดูแลสินทรัพย์ต้องมีขั้นตอนการกู้คืนวอลเล็ตที่มั่นคงเพื่อลดความเสี่ยงและป้องกันการสูญเสียสินทรัพย์ถาวร
usageTranslations.id: Kustodian portofolio harus memiliki prosedur pemulihan wallet yang andal untuk mengurangi risiko operasional dan mencegah kehilangan aset digital secara permanen.

terms.definition: The fee paid to validators or miners for processing and recording a transaction on a blockchain, impacting portfolio transaction costs and execution timing.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Portfolio managers must optimize transaction fees to minimize costs and avoid delayed or failed transactions, especially during network congestion.

termTranslations.ja: トランザクション手数料
termTranslations.th: ค่าธรรมเนียมธุรกรรม

usageTranslations.en: Portfolio managers must optimize transaction fees to minimize costs and avoid delayed or failed transactions, especially during network congestion.
usageTranslations.tr: Portföy yöneticileri, özellikle ağ yoğunluğunda, maliyetleri azaltmak ve gecikmiş veya başarısız işlemlerden kaçınmak için işlem ücretlerini optimize etmelidir.
usageTranslations.fr: Les gestionnaires doivent optimiser les frais de transaction pour minimiser les coûts et éviter les transactions retardées ou échouées, surtout lors de congestions.
usageTranslations.de: Portfoliomanager müssen Transaktionsgebühren optimieren, um Kosten zu senken und verzögerte oder gescheiterte Transaktionen zu vermeiden, insbesondere bei Netzwerkauslastung.
usageTranslations.es: Los gestores deben optimizar las comisiones para minimizar costes y evitar operaciones fallidas o retrasadas, especialmente en congestión de red.
usageTranslations.zh: 投资组合经理必须优化交易手续费，以降低成本并避免在网络拥堵时发生延迟或失败的交易。
usageTranslations.ar: يجب على مديري المحافظ تحسين رسوم المعاملات لتقليل التكاليف وتجنب التأخير أو فشل المعاملات خاصة عند ازدحام الشبكة.
usageTranslations.pt: Gestores devem otimizar taxas de transação para minimizar custos e evitar atrasos ou falhas, especialmente em congestionamento.
usageTranslations.ru: Портфельные управляющие должны оптимизировать комиссии за транзакции, чтобы снизить затраты и избежать задержек или неудачных транзакций, особенно при перегрузке сети.
usageTranslations.ja: ポートフォリオマネージャーはコストを抑え、混雑時の遅延や失敗を回避するため手数料を最適化すべきです。
usageTranslations.it: I gestori devono ottimizzare le commissioni per minimizzare i costi ed evitare ritardi o errori, soprattutto in caso di congestione.
usageTranslations.vi: Quản lý danh mục cần tối ưu phí giao dịch để giảm chi phí và tránh thất bại hoặc chậm trễ khi mạng lưới tắc nghẽn.
usageTranslations.hi: पोर्टफोलियो प्रबंधकों को लागत कम करने और नेटवर्क जाम में ट्रांजैक्शन फेल/डिले से बचने के लिए फीस को अनुकूलित करना चाहिए।
usageTranslations.th: ผู้จัดการพอร์ตควรปรับค่าธรรมเนียมธุรกรรมเพื่อประหยัดค่าใช้จ่ายและเลี่ยงธุรกรรมล่าช้าหรือผิดพลาดโดยเฉพาะเมื่อเครือข่ายแออัด
usageTranslations.id: Manajer portofolio harus mengoptimalkan biaya transaksi untuk meminimalkan biaya dan menghindari transaksi gagal/terlambat terutama saat jaringan padat.

terms.definition: Strategies and tools to reduce blockchain transaction costs (gas) by scheduling, batching, or coding transactions efficiently to improve portfolio performance and lower operational expenses.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Gas optimization is vital for portfolio managers to maximize yield and reduce transaction overhead, particularly during volatile or congested network periods.

termTranslations.th: การเพิ่มประสิทธิภาพแก๊ส

usageTranslations.en: Gas optimization is vital for portfolio managers to maximize yield and reduce transaction overhead, particularly during volatile or congested network periods.
usageTranslations.tr: Gas optimizasyonu, özellikle volatil veya yoğun ağ dönemlerinde, portföy yöneticilerinin getiriyi en üst düzeye çıkarması ve işlem yükünü azaltması için hayati önemdedir.
usageTranslations.fr: L’optimisation du gas est cruciale pour maximiser le rendement et réduire les frais, surtout lors de pics de volatilité ou de congestion du réseau.
usageTranslations.de: Gas-Optimierung ist entscheidend für Portfoliomanager, um den Ertrag zu maximieren und Transaktionsaufwand besonders bei Volatilität oder Netzwerkauslastung zu senken.
usageTranslations.es: La optimización de gas es clave para maximizar el rendimiento y reducir costes de transacción, especialmente con volatilidad o congestión.
usageTranslations.zh: Gas优化对投资组合经理至关重要，可最大化收益并减少交易成本，尤其在波动或拥堵期间。
usageTranslations.ar: تحسين الغاز ضروري لمديري المحافظ لتعظيم العائد وتقليل أعباء المعاملات، خاصة أثناء فترات التقلب أو ازدحام الشبكة.
usageTranslations.pt: A otimização de gas é vital para maximizar o rendimento e reduzir custos, especialmente em períodos de volatilidade ou congestionamento.
usageTranslations.ru: Оптимизация газа крайне важна для максимизации доходности портфеля и снижения накладных расходов на транзакции, особенно при высокой волатильности или перегрузке сети.
usageTranslations.ja: ガス最適化はポートフォリオマネージャーがリターンを最大化し取引コストを抑えるために重要で、特に混雑や変動の時期に不可欠です。
usageTranslations.it: L’ottimizzazione del gas è fondamentale per massimizzare i rendimenti e ridurre i costi di transazione, soprattutto in periodi di volatilità o congestione.
usageTranslations.vi: Tối ưu hóa gas rất quan trọng giúp quản lý danh mục tối đa hóa lợi suất và giảm phí khi mạng lưới biến động hoặc tắc nghẽn.
usageTranslations.hi: गैस ऑप्टिमाइज़ेशन पोर्टफोलियो प्रबंधकों के लिए रिटर्न अधिकतम और ट्रांजैक्शन लागत कम करने हेतु अनिवार्य है, खासकर अस्थिर या जाम नेटवर्क में।
usageTranslations.th: การเพิ่มประสิทธิภาพแก๊สสำคัญต่อผู้จัดการพอร์ตในการเพิ่มผลตอบแทนและลดต้นทุนธุรกรรมโดยเฉพาะช่วงเครือข่ายผันผวนหรือแออัด
usageTranslations.id: Optimasi gas penting bagi manajer portofolio untuk memaksimalkan hasil dan mengurangi biaya transaksi, terutama saat jaringan volatil atau padat.

terms.definition: The point at which a block or transaction is considered irreversible and permanently confirmed on a blockchain, essential for portfolio NAV calculation and risk management.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Portfolio managers rely on chain finality to ensure that asset transfers are fully settled before reporting holdings.

termTranslations.ja: チェーンファイナリティ
termTranslations.th: ความสิ้นสุดของเชน

usageTranslations.en: Portfolio managers rely on chain finality to ensure that asset transfers are fully settled before reporting holdings.
usageTranslations.tr: Portföy yöneticileri, varlık transferlerinin tamamen sonuçlandığından emin olmak için zincir kesinliğine güvenir.
usageTranslations.fr: Les gestionnaires de portefeuille s’appuient sur la finalité de la chaîne pour garantir le règlement complet des transferts d’actifs avant le reporting.
usageTranslations.de: Portfoliomanager verlassen sich auf die Kettenfinalität, um sicherzustellen, dass Übertragungen vor der Berichterstattung endgültig sind.
usageTranslations.es: Los gestores de cartera dependen de la finalidad de cadena para asegurar que las transferencias estén completamente asentadas antes de informar.
usageTranslations.zh: 投资组合经理依赖链终结性，以确保资产转移在报告前已完全结算。
usageTranslations.ar: يعتمد مديرو المحافظ على نهائية السلسلة لضمان تسوية التحويلات قبل التقارير.
usageTranslations.pt: Gerentes de portfólio dependem da finalidade da cadeia para garantir liquidação antes do relatório.
usageTranslations.ru: Управляющие портфелем полагаются на финальность цепочки для подтверждения переводов до отчетности.
usageTranslations.ja: ポートフォリオマネージャーはチェーンファイナリティにより資産移転の完了を確認する。
usageTranslations.it: I gestori di portafoglio si affidano alla finalità della catena per assicurare il regolamento.
usageTranslations.vi: Nhà quản lý danh mục dựa vào tính cuối cùng của chuỗi để đảm bảo chuyển khoản hoàn tất.
usageTranslations.hi: पोर्टफोलियो प्रबंधक, होल्डिंग रिपोर्ट से पहले लेन-देन की पुष्टि के लिए चेन फाइनलिटी पर निर्भर करते हैं।
usageTranslations.th: ผู้จัดการพอร์ตใช้ความสิ้นสุดของเชนเพื่อยืนยันการโอนสินทรัพย์เสร็จสมบูรณ์ก่อนรายงาน
usageTranslations.id: Manajer portofolio mengandalkan finalitas rantai untuk memastikan transfer aset telah final.

terms.definition: A situation where a pegged crypto asset (e.g., stablecoin) loses its intended value parity, impacting portfolio valuation and risk.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: A peg failure in a stablecoin can trigger large portfolio drawdowns and immediate risk controls.

termTranslations.th: การล้มเหลวของการตรึงค่า

usageTranslations.en: A peg failure in a stablecoin can trigger large portfolio drawdowns and immediate risk controls.
usageTranslations.tr: Bir stablecoin'deki çapa bozulması portföyde ciddi değer kaybı ve risk kontrollerini tetikleyebilir.
usageTranslations.fr: Une défaillance de l’ancrage sur un stablecoin peut entraîner d’importantes pertes de portefeuille et des contrôles immédiats.
usageTranslations.de: Ein Peginstabilität bei einem Stablecoin kann erhebliche Verluste und sofortige Risikokontrollen auslösen.
usageTranslations.es: Un fallo de paridad en una stablecoin puede provocar grandes pérdidas y controles inmediatos.
usageTranslations.zh: 稳定币锚定失效可能导致组合大幅回撤与风控措施启动。
usageTranslations.ar: فشل الربط في عملة مستقرة قد يؤدي إلى خسائر كبيرة وإجراءات فورية.
usageTranslations.pt: Falha de lastro em stablecoin pode gerar grandes perdas e controles rápidos.
usageTranslations.ru: Сбой привязки стейблкоина вызывает убытки и срочные меры риска.
usageTranslations.ja: ステーブルコインのペッグ崩壊は大幅な損失と即時のリスク管理を引き起こす可能性がある。
usageTranslations.it: Il fallimento dell’ancoraggio di una stablecoin può causare perdite e misure di rischio immediate.
usageTranslations.vi: Sự cố neo giá ở stablecoin có thể gây ra lỗ lớn và kiểm soát rủi ro ngay lập tức.
usageTranslations.hi: स्टेबलकॉइन में पेग विफलता से भारी घाटा और त्वरित रिस्क कंट्रोल हो सकते हैं।
usageTranslations.th: การล้มเหลวของการตรึงค่าของ stablecoin อาจทำให้ขาดทุนหนักและต้องควบคุมความเสี่ยงทันที
usageTranslations.id: Kegagalan peg pada stablecoin dapat menyebabkan kerugian besar dan kontrol risiko langsung.

terms.definition: A punitive action on staking protocols where validator misbehavior results in partial loss of staked assets, directly affecting portfolio NAV.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: A slashing event reduced the fund’s staked asset value, requiring immediate compliance reporting to clients.

termTranslations.ja: スラッシングイベント
termTranslations.th: เหตุการณ์ Slashing

usageTranslations.en: A slashing event reduced the fund’s staked asset value, requiring immediate compliance reporting to clients.
usageTranslations.tr: Bir cezalandırma olayı, fonun stake edilen varlık değerini azalttı ve derhal rapor gerektirdi.
usageTranslations.fr: Un événement de slashing a réduit la valeur des actifs stakés du fonds, nécessitant un rapport immédiat.
usageTranslations.de: Ein Slashing-Ereignis verringerte den Wert der gestakten Vermögenswerte und erforderte sofortige Berichterstattung.
usageTranslations.es: Un evento de slashing redujo el valor apostado y requirió informes inmediatos.
usageTranslations.zh: 削减事件导致基金质押资产价值下降，需立刻报告。
usageTranslations.ar: حدث القصاص خفض قيمة الأصول المرهونة ويتطلب تقارير فورية.
usageTranslations.pt: Evento de slashing reduziu o valor dos ativos e exigiu relatório imediato.
usageTranslations.ru: Событие слэшинга снизило стоимость активов фонда и потребовало немедленного отчета.
usageTranslations.ja: スラッシングイベントでファンドのステーク資産が減少し、即時報告が必要になった。
usageTranslations.it: Un evento di slashing ha ridotto il valore degli asset vincolati e richiesto una segnalazione immediata.
usageTranslations.vi: Sự kiện cắt giảm làm giảm giá trị tài sản stake và phải báo cáo ngay.
usageTranslations.hi: स्लैशिंग घटना से फंड के स्टेक्ड एसेट्स घट गए और तुरंत रिपोर्टिंग जरूरी हो गई।
usageTranslations.th: เหตุการณ์ Slashing ทำให้มูลค่าทรัพย์สินที่ stake ลดลง ต้องรายงานทันที
usageTranslations.id: Peristiwa slashing mengurangi nilai aset stake dana, memerlukan pelaporan langsung.

terms.definition: Temporary loss in value experienced by liquidity providers due to price divergence between deposited and held assets in AMM protocols.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Impermanent loss calculations are mandatory in performance reports for portfolios engaged in AMM-based liquidity provision.

termTranslations.ja: インパーマネントロス
termTranslations.th: การขาดทุนชั่วคราว

usageTranslations.en: Impermanent loss calculations are mandatory in performance reports for portfolios engaged in AMM-based liquidity provision.
usageTranslations.tr: AMM tabanlı likidite sağlayan portföyler için geçici kayıp hesaplaması performans raporlarında zorunludur.
usageTranslations.fr: Le calcul de la perte impermanente est obligatoire dans les rapports de performance des portefeuilles investis en AMM.
usageTranslations.de: Impermanente Verluste müssen in den Performance-Berichten von AMM-Liquiditätsportfolios berechnet werden.
usageTranslations.es: El cálculo de la pérdida impermanente es obligatorio en informes de portafolios AMM.
usageTranslations.zh: 无常损失的计算是AMM组合业绩报告中的强制要求。
usageTranslations.ar: حساب الخسارة المؤقتة إلزامي بتقارير أداء المحافظ التي تقدم السيولة في AMM.
usageTranslations.pt: Cálculo de perda impermanente é obrigatório nos relatórios de portfólio com liquidez AMM.
usageTranslations.ru: Расчет непостоянной потери обязателен в отчетах портфелей, работающих с AMM.
usageTranslations.ja: AMM型流動性運用ポートフォリオのレポートではインパーマネントロスの計算が必須。
usageTranslations.it: Il calcolo della perdita impermanente è obbligatorio nei report di portafoglio AMM.
usageTranslations.vi: Báo cáo hiệu suất danh mục AMM phải có tính toán tổn thất tạm thời.
usageTranslations.hi: AMM आधारित पोर्टफोलियो के लिए अस्थायी घाटे की गणना अनिवार्य है।
usageTranslations.th: ต้องคำนวณการขาดทุนชั่วคราวในรายงานพอร์ตโฟลิโอที่ทำ AMM
usageTranslations.id: Perhitungan kerugian impermanen wajib pada laporan performa portofolio AMM.

terms.definition: A type of crypto exit scam where project insiders withdraw liquidity or abandon a project, causing total value collapse and investor loss.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Portfolio controls must blacklist protocols with a history or risk of rug pulls to protect investor assets.

termTranslations.th: Rug Pull (ฉ้อโกง)

usageTranslations.en: Portfolio controls must blacklist protocols with a history or risk of rug pulls to protect investor assets.
usageTranslations.tr: Portföy kontrolleri, rug pull riski olan protokolleri kara listeye almalıdır.
usageTranslations.fr: Les contrôles de portefeuille doivent exclure les protocoles présentant un risque d’arnaque rug pull.
usageTranslations.de: Portfoliokontrollen müssen Protokolle mit Rug-Pull-Risiko auf die Blacklist setzen.
usageTranslations.es: Los controles de cartera deben excluir protocolos con historial o riesgo de rug pull.
usageTranslations.zh: 投资组合控制需拉黑有Rug Pull风险的协议以保护资产。
usageTranslations.ar: يجب حظر البروتوكولات ذات مخاطر Rug Pull في المحافظ.
usageTranslations.pt: Controles de portfólio devem banir protocolos com risco de rug pull.
usageTranslations.ru: В портфеле необходимо блокировать протоколы с риском rug pull.
usageTranslations.ja: ポートフォリオ管理はラグプルリスクのあるプロトコルを除外すべき。
usageTranslations.it: I controlli di portafoglio devono escludere i protocolli a rischio rug pull.
usageTranslations.vi: Danh mục cần chặn các giao thức có nguy cơ rug pull để bảo vệ tài sản.
usageTranslations.hi: पोर्टफोलियो को ऐसे प्रोटोकॉल को ब्लैकलिस्ट करना चाहिए जिनमें रग पुल का जोखिम हो।
usageTranslations.th: พอร์ตต้องระวังและตัดโปรโตคอลที่เสี่ยง rug pull
usageTranslations.id: Kontrol portofolio harus mem-blacklist protokol dengan risiko rug pull.

terms.definition: The specific block height or timestamp at which portfolio holdings or user balances are recorded for distributions, airdrops, or NAV calculation.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: The airdrop allocation was based on the portfolio’s balances at the official snapshot date.

termTranslations.th: วันที่ Snapshot

usageTranslations.en: The airdrop allocation was based on the portfolio’s balances at the official snapshot date.
usageTranslations.tr: Airdrop dağıtımı portföyün anlık kayıt tarihindeki bakiyesine göre yapıldı.
usageTranslations.fr: L’allocation d’airdrop a été basée sur le solde au snapshot officiel.
usageTranslations.de: Die Airdrop-Zuteilung basierte auf den Portfoliobeständen zum Snapshot-Datum.
usageTranslations.es: La asignación del airdrop se basó en los saldos en la fecha de snapshot.
usageTranslations.zh: 空投分配以快照日期的组合余额为准。
usageTranslations.ar: تم توزيع الإيردروب بناءً على الرصيد في تاريخ اللقطة.
usageTranslations.pt: A alocação do airdrop foi baseada no saldo do portfólio na data do snapshot.
usageTranslations.ru: Распределение airdrop происходило на основе балансов на дату снимка.
usageTranslations.ja: エアドロップは公式スナップショット日時点の残高に基づいて配布。
usageTranslations.it: La distribuzione dell’airdrop si basava sui saldi al momento del snapshot.
usageTranslations.vi: Việc phân bổ airdrop dựa trên số dư danh mục vào ngày snapshot.
usageTranslations.hi: एयरड्रॉप आवंटन स्नैपशॉट तिथि के पोर्टफोलियो बैलेंस पर आधारित था।
usageTranslations.th: การแจก airdrop อิงยอดพอร์ต ณ วันที่ snapshot อย่างเป็นทางการ
usageTranslations.id: Alokasi airdrop berdasarkan saldo portofolio pada tanggal snapshot.

terms.definition: A significant occurrence that materially impacts the availability or withdrawal of assets, such as a major unlock, vesting, or liquidity injection/removal.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Liquidity events must be pre-disclosed to portfolio investors as they can significantly affect trading volumes and asset pricing.

termTranslations.th: เหตุการณ์สภาพคล่อง

usageTranslations.en: Liquidity events must be pre-disclosed to portfolio investors as they can significantly affect trading volumes and asset pricing.
usageTranslations.tr: Likidite olayları, işlem hacmini ve fiyatlamayı etkileyebileceğinden yatırımcılara önceden bildirilmelidir.
usageTranslations.fr: Les événements de liquidité doivent être communiqués à l’avance aux investisseurs.
usageTranslations.de: Liquiditätsereignisse müssen Anlegern vorab gemeldet werden, da sie Handelsvolumen und Preise beeinflussen.
usageTranslations.es: Los eventos de liquidez deben notificarse previamente a los inversores.
usageTranslations.zh: 流动性事件应提前披露给投资者，以防交易和定价大变动。
usageTranslations.ar: يجب الإفصاح مسبقًا عن أحداث السيولة للمستثمرين لأنها تؤثر على حجم التداول والتسعير.
usageTranslations.pt: Eventos de liquidez devem ser divulgados previamente aos investidores.
usageTranslations.ru: О ликвидных событиях необходимо уведомлять инвесторов заранее.
usageTranslations.ja: 流動性イベントは事前に投資家へ通知する必要がある。
usageTranslations.it: Gli eventi di liquidità devono essere comunicati preventivamente agli investitori.
usageTranslations.vi: Sự kiện thanh khoản cần thông báo trước cho nhà đầu tư.
usageTranslations.hi: तरलता घटनाओं की पूर्व सूचना निवेशकों को देना अनिवार्य है।
usageTranslations.th: ต้องแจ้งเหตุการณ์สภาพคล่องล่วงหน้าให้ผู้ลงทุน
usageTranslations.id: Peristiwa likuiditas harus diberitahu sebelumnya kepada investor.

terms.definition: A regulated service or infrastructure that enables conversion between fiat currency and crypto assets, crucial for fund inflows, outflows, and compliance.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Institutional crypto funds require robust fiat gateway access for large-scale subscriptions and redemptions.

termTranslations.ja: フィアットゲートウェイ
termTranslations.th: ช่องทาง Fiat

usageTranslations.en: Institutional crypto funds require robust fiat gateway access for large-scale subscriptions and redemptions.
usageTranslations.tr: Kurumsal fonlar büyük giriş-çıkışlar için güçlü fiat geçidine ihtiyaç duyar.
usageTranslations.fr: Les fonds crypto institutionnels exigent une passerelle fiat robuste pour les souscriptions massives.
usageTranslations.de: Institutionelle Kryptofonds benötigen robuste Fiat-Gateways für große Ein- und Auszahlungen.
usageTranslations.es: Los fondos institucionales requieren pasarelas fiat sólidas para suscripciones y reembolsos.
usageTranslations.zh: 机构加密基金需稳健的法币通道以便大规模申购与赎回。
usageTranslations.ar: تتطلب الصناديق المؤسسية بوابات قوية للفيت للاكتتابات والسحوبات الكبيرة.
usageTranslations.pt: Fundos institucionais de cripto precisam de gateway fiat robusto para subscrições e resgates.
usageTranslations.ru: Институциональные фонды требуют надёжных фиатных шлюзов для крупных операций.
usageTranslations.ja: 機関投資家向け暗号ファンドは大規模入出金に堅牢なフィアットゲートウェイが必要。
usageTranslations.it: I fondi crypto istituzionali necessitano di gateway fiat affidabili per grandi operazioni.
usageTranslations.vi: Quỹ crypto tổ chức cần cổng fiat mạnh mẽ cho giao dịch quy mô lớn.
usageTranslations.hi: संस्थागत फंड्स को बड़े सब्सक्रिप्शन-रिडेम्पशन के लिए मजबूत फिएट गेटवे चाहिए।
usageTranslations.th: กองทุนคริปโตสถาบันต้องมีช่องทาง Fiat ที่มั่นคงสำหรับธุรกรรมขนาดใหญ่
usageTranslations.id: Dana kripto institusional memerlukan akses gateway fiat untuk transaksi besar.

terms.definition: A blockchain fork resulting in two separate chains, each with distinct asset records, affecting portfolio asset tracking and reconciliation.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Chain splits require portfolio managers to track asset entitlements and reconcile balances on both resulting chains.

termTranslations.th: การแตกสายเชน

usageTranslations.en: Chain splits require portfolio managers to track asset entitlements and reconcile balances on both resulting chains.
usageTranslations.tr: Zincir ayrılması durumunda yöneticiler her iki zincirdeki hakları ve bakiyeleri izlemelidir.
usageTranslations.fr: Une scission de chaîne oblige les gestionnaires à suivre les droits et soldes sur les deux chaînes.
usageTranslations.de: Bei einem Kettensplit müssen Manager Ansprüche und Guthaben auf beiden Ketten nachverfolgen.
usageTranslations.es: Las divisiones de cadena requieren que los gestores rastreen derechos y saldos en ambas cadenas.
usageTranslations.zh: 链分叉时需同时追踪两条链上的资产和余额。
usageTranslations.ar: تتطلب انقسامات السلسلة تتبع الأرصدة والحقوق على السلسلتين.
usageTranslations.pt: Divisão de cadeia exige rastrear ativos e saldos em ambas as cadeias.
usageTranslations.ru: При разделении цепи менеджер отслеживает права и балансы на обеих цепях.
usageTranslations.ja: チェーンスプリットでは両チェーンで権利と残高管理が必要。
usageTranslations.it: Una divisione di catena richiede il tracciamento degli asset su entrambe le catene.
usageTranslations.vi: Phân tách chuỗi cần quản lý quyền và số dư trên cả hai chuỗi.
usageTranslations.hi: चेन विभाजन के बाद दोनों चेन पर अधिकार व बैलेंस ट्रैक करना होता है।
usageTranslations.th: ต้องติดตามสิทธิและยอดคงเหลือในทั้งสองเชนหลังการแตกสาย
usageTranslations.id: Pemisahan rantai memerlukan pelacakan aset dan saldo di kedua rantai.

terms.definition: The value ratio between collateral provided and debt issued in DeFi lending or synthetic asset protocols, affecting liquidation risk and portfolio leverage.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Portfolio leverage risk is continuously monitored by tracking the collateralization ratio in DeFi positions.

termTranslations.th: อัตราส่วนหลักประกัน

usageTranslations.en: Portfolio leverage risk is continuously monitored by tracking the collateralization ratio in DeFi positions.
usageTranslations.tr: DeFi pozisyonlarında teminatlandırma oranı izlenerek kaldıraç riski takip edilir.
usageTranslations.fr: Le ratio de collateralisation est surveillé pour gérer le risque d’effet de levier.
usageTranslations.de: Die Besicherungsquote wird überwacht, um das Hebelrisiko zu steuern.
usageTranslations.es: El riesgo de apalancamiento se gestiona mediante el seguimiento del ratio de colateralización.
usageTranslations.zh: 通过监控抵押率来持续监控投资组合杠杆风险。
usageTranslations.ar: يتم تتبع نسبة الضمان باستمرار لرصد مخاطر الرافعة.
usageTranslations.pt: O risco de alavancagem é monitorado pelo índice de colateralização.
usageTranslations.ru: Риск плеча отслеживается через коэффициент обеспечения.
usageTranslations.ja: DeFiポジションの担保率を追跡しレバレッジリスクを管理する。
usageTranslations.it: Il rischio di leva viene monitorato tramite il rapporto di collateralizzazione.
usageTranslations.vi: Rủi ro đòn bẩy danh mục được theo dõi bằng tỷ lệ thế chấp.
usageTranslations.hi: DeFi में संपार्श्विक अनुपात से पोर्टफोलियो का जोखिम ट्रैक होता है।
usageTranslations.th: ติดตามอัตราส่วนหลักประกันเพื่อตรวจสอบความเสี่ยงเลเวอเรจ
usageTranslations.id: Risiko leverage dipantau melalui rasio kolateralisasi di posisi DeFi.

terms.definition: The mandatory fee paid to validators or miners for processing and confirming transactions on a blockchain network, directly impacting portfolio execution cost and settlement speed.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Portfolio managers must monitor and optimize network fees to reduce costs and avoid execution delays during periods of high blockchain congestion.

termTranslations.th: ค่าธรรมเนียมเครือข่าย

usageTranslations.en: Portfolio managers must monitor and optimize network fees to reduce costs and avoid execution delays during periods of high blockchain congestion.
usageTranslations.tr: Portföy yöneticileri, maliyetleri azaltmak ve ağ yoğunluğunda gecikmeleri önlemek için ağ ücretlerini izlemeli ve optimize etmelidir.
usageTranslations.fr: Les gestionnaires doivent surveiller et optimiser les frais de réseau pour réduire les coûts et éviter les retards d’exécution en période de congestion.
usageTranslations.de: Portfoliomanager müssen Netzwerkgebühren überwachen und optimieren, um Kosten zu senken und Verzögerungen bei starker Netzwerkauslastung zu vermeiden.
usageTranslations.es: Los gestores deben vigilar y optimizar las comisiones de red para reducir costes y evitar retrasos durante la congestión de la blockchain.
usageTranslations.zh: 投资组合经理需监控并优化网络手续费，以降低成本并在区块链拥堵时避免执行延迟。
usageTranslations.ar: يجب على مديري المحافظ مراقبة وتحسين رسوم الشبكة لتقليل التكاليف وتجنب التأخيرات في أوقات ازدحام البلوكشين.
usageTranslations.pt: Gestores de portfólio devem monitorar e otimizar as taxas de rede para reduzir custos e evitar atrasos em períodos de congestionamento.
usageTranslations.ru: Портфельные управляющие должны следить за сетевыми комиссиями и оптимизировать их, чтобы снизить расходы и избежать задержек при перегрузке сети.
usageTranslations.ja: ポートフォリオマネージャーはネットワーク手数料を監視・最適化し、混雑時のコスト増や遅延を防ぐべきです。
usageTranslations.it: I gestori devono monitorare e ottimizzare le commissioni di rete per ridurre i costi ed evitare ritardi di esecuzione in caso di congestione.
usageTranslations.vi: Quản lý danh mục cần theo dõi và tối ưu phí mạng để giảm chi phí và tránh trì hoãn khi mạng lưới tắc nghẽn.
usageTranslations.hi: पोर्टफोलियो प्रबंधकों को लागत कम करने और उच्च नेटवर्क भीड़ के समय में विलंब से बचने हेतु नेटवर्क शुल्क मॉनिटर व ऑप्टिमाइज़ करना चाहिए।
usageTranslations.th: ผู้จัดการพอร์ตควรติดตามและปรับค่าธรรมเนียมเครือข่ายเพื่อประหยัดค่าใช้จ่ายและเลี่ยงความล่าช้าเมื่อเครือข่ายแออัด
usageTranslations.id: Manajer portofolio harus memantau dan mengoptimalkan biaya jaringan untuk menurunkan biaya dan menghindari keterlambatan saat jaringan padat.

terms.definition: The process by which validators or miners maximize profits by reordering, including, or censoring transactions in a block to capture additional value beyond standard block rewards or fees.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: MEV extraction can introduce front-running and sandwich attacks, which portfolio managers must monitor as part of blockchain execution risk management.

termTranslations.th: การสกัด MEV

usageTranslations.en: MEV extraction can introduce front-running and sandwich attacks, which portfolio managers must monitor as part of blockchain execution risk management.
usageTranslations.tr: MEV çıkarımı, önden koşma ve sandwich saldırılarını tetikleyebilir; portföy yöneticileri, zincir üstü işlem risk yönetimi kapsamında bunları izlemelidir.
usageTranslations.fr: L’extraction MEV peut générer des attaques de front-running et sandwich que les gestionnaires doivent surveiller dans la gestion des risques d’exécution blockchain.
usageTranslations.de: MEV-Extraktion kann Front-Running- und Sandwich-Angriffe verursachen; Portfoliomanager müssen dies im Rahmen des Ausführungsrisikomanagements überwachen.
usageTranslations.es: La extracción de MEV puede dar lugar a ataques front-running y sandwich que los gestores deben monitorear como riesgo de ejecución en blockchain.
usageTranslations.zh: MEV提取可能引发抢跑和三明治攻击，投资组合经理必须将其纳入区块链执行风险管理监控。
usageTranslations.ar: يمكن أن تؤدي استخلاص MEV إلى هجمات فرونت رننج وساندويتش ويجب على مديري المحافظ مراقبتها كجزء من إدارة مخاطر التنفيذ.
usageTranslations.pt: A extração MEV pode causar ataques front-running e sandwich, que gestores devem monitorar como parte do gerenciamento de risco de execução.
usageTranslations.ru: Извлечение MEV может привести к атакам фронт-раннинга и сэндвич-атакам; управляющие должны отслеживать их в рамках управления рисками исполнения.
usageTranslations.ja: MEV抽出はフロントランニングやサンドイッチ攻撃を招くことがあり、ポートフォリオマネージャーは実行リスク管理の一環で監視が必要です。
usageTranslations.it: L’estrazione MEV può generare attacchi front-running e sandwich che i gestori devono monitorare nella gestione del rischio esecutivo su blockchain.
usageTranslations.vi: Khai thác MEV có thể gây ra các cuộc tấn công front-running và sandwich mà quản lý danh mục cần kiểm soát trong quản trị rủi ro thực thi blockchain.
usageTranslations.hi: MEV निष्कर्षण से फ्रंट-रनिंग और सैंडविच अटैक उत्पन्न हो सकते हैं, जिन्हें पोर्टफोलियो प्रबंधकों को ब्लॉकचेन एक्जीक्यूशन रिस्क प्रबंधन में मॉनिटर करना चाहिए।
usageTranslations.th: การสกัด MEV อาจก่อให้เกิดการโจมตี front-running และ sandwich ที่ผู้จัดการพอร์ตต้องติดตามเป็นส่วนหนึ่งของการจัดการความเสี่ยงธุรกรรมบล็อกเชน
usageTranslations.id: Ekstraksi MEV dapat menimbulkan serangan front-running dan sandwich yang harus dipantau oleh manajer portofolio sebagai bagian dari manajemen risiko eksekusi blockchain.

terms.definition: A decentralized liquidity pool that holds synthetic assets, enabling exposure to underlying assets via derivatives without owning them directly.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Portfolio allocation to synthetic pools requires monitoring of underlying asset collateral and protocol risk.

termTranslations.ja: シンセティックプール
termTranslations.th: พูลสังเคราะห์

usageTranslations.en: Portfolio allocation to synthetic pools requires monitoring of underlying asset collateral and protocol risk.
usageTranslations.tr: Sentetik havuzlara yapılan portföy tahsisi, teminat ve protokol riskinin izlenmesini gerektirir.
usageTranslations.fr: L’allocation aux pools synthétiques nécessite une surveillance du collatéral sous-jacent et des risques du protocole.
usageTranslations.de: Die Allokation in synthetische Pools erfordert Überwachung von Sicherheiten und Protokollrisiken.
usageTranslations.es: La asignación a pools sintéticos requiere monitoreo del colateral subyacente y riesgo de protocolo.
usageTranslations.zh: 投资合成资产池需监控基础资产抵押和协议风险。
usageTranslations.ar: تتطلب تخصيص المحفظة للمجمعات الاصطناعية مراقبة الضمانات ومخاطر البروتوكول.
usageTranslations.pt: Alocação a pools sintéticos exige monitoramento de garantias e riscos do protocolo.
usageTranslations.ru: Распределение по синтетическим пулам требует контроля залогов и рисков протокола.
usageTranslations.ja: ポートフォリオのシンセティックプール配分は担保とリスク管理が必要。
usageTranslations.it: L’allocazione a pool sintetici richiede monitoraggio di garanzie e rischi di protocollo.
usageTranslations.vi: Phân bổ vào bể tổng hợp cần theo dõi tài sản thế chấp và rủi ro giao thức.
usageTranslations.hi: सिंथेटिक पूल में निवेश के लिए संपार्श्विक और जोखिम की निगरानी आवश्यक है।
usageTranslations.th: การจัดสรรพอร์ตให้พูลสังเคราะห์ต้องติดตามสินทรัพย์และความเสี่ยง
usageTranslations.id: Alokasi portofolio ke kolam sintetis memerlukan pemantauan agunan dan risiko protokol.

terms.definition: A third-party service holding crypto assets temporarily to ensure conditional transaction completion, reducing counterparty risk in portfolio operations.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Escrow services are integrated into portfolio custody solutions to mitigate settlement and counterparty risks.

termTranslations.th: บริการเอสโครว์

usageTranslations.en: Escrow services are integrated into portfolio custody solutions to mitigate settlement and counterparty risks.
usageTranslations.tr: Emanet hizmetleri, portföy saklama çözümlerine entegrasyonla risk azaltır.
usageTranslations.fr: Les services d’entiercement sont intégrés pour réduire les risques de règlement et contrepartie.
usageTranslations.de: Treuhanddienste werden in Verwahrungslösungen zur Risikominderung integriert.
usageTranslations.es: Los servicios de depósito en garantía se integran para mitigar riesgos.
usageTranslations.zh: 托管服务集成于组合托管以降低结算及对手风险。
usageTranslations.ar: يتم دمج خدمات الضمان لتقليل مخاطر التسوية والطرف المقابل.
usageTranslations.pt: Serviços de escrow são integrados para mitigar riscos.
usageTranslations.ru: Эскроу-сервисы интегрируются для снижения рисков расчетов и контрагентов.
usageTranslations.ja: エスクローサービスは決済リスク軽減のために統合される。
usageTranslations.it: I servizi escrow sono integrati per mitigare i rischi di regolamento.
usageTranslations.vi: Dịch vụ ký quỹ tích hợp để giảm rủi ro thanh toán và đối tác.
usageTranslations.hi: एस्क्रो सेवाएँ सेटलमेंट और काउंटरपार्टी जोखिम कम करती हैं।
usageTranslations.th: บริการเอสโครว์ช่วยลดความเสี่ยงการชำระเงินและคู่สัญญา
usageTranslations.id: Layanan escrow diintegrasikan untuk mengurangi risiko penyelesaian.

terms.definition: A sudden, deep, and short-lived drop in crypto asset prices often caused by automated trading, impacting portfolio valuations and triggering risk controls.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Portfolio risk systems automatically halt trading during flash crashes to prevent cascading losses.

termTranslations.ja: フラッシュクラッシュ
termTranslations.th: การล่มสลายแบบฉับพลัน

usageTranslations.en: Portfolio risk systems automatically halt trading during flash crashes to prevent cascading losses.
usageTranslations.tr: Portföy risk sistemleri ani çöküşlerde otomatik işlem durdurur.
usageTranslations.fr: Les systèmes de risque arrêtent automatiquement les transactions lors de krachs éclair.
usageTranslations.de: Risikomanagement stoppt bei Flash Crashes automatisch den Handel.
usageTranslations.es: Los sistemas detienen automáticamente el trading durante caídas flash.
usageTranslations.zh: 闪电崩盘时，风险系统自动暂停交易以防连锁损失。
usageTranslations.ar: توقف أنظمة المخاطر التداول تلقائيًا خلال الانهيارات السريعة.
usageTranslations.pt: Sistemas de risco interrompem negociação durante flash crashes.
usageTranslations.ru: Системы риска останавливают торги при флэш-крэшах.
usageTranslations.ja: フラッシュクラッシュ時にリスク管理システムが自動的に取引停止。
usageTranslations.it: I sistemi di rischio interrompono il trading durante flash crash.
usageTranslations.vi: Hệ thống rủi ro tự động dừng giao dịch khi sụp đổ chớp nhoáng.
usageTranslations.hi: पोर्टफोलियो जोखिम सिस्टम फ्लैश क्रैश में ट्रेडिंग रोकते हैं।
usageTranslations.th: ระบบความเสี่ยงพอร์ตหยุดเทรดอัตโนมัติเมื่อเกิด flash crash
usageTranslations.id: Sistem risiko portofolio otomatis menghentikan trading saat flash crash.

terms.definition: A measure of the market's ability to sustain large orders without significant price changes, crucial for portfolio trade execution planning.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Trade execution algorithms analyze market depth to minimize slippage and optimize order fills.

termTranslations.th: ความลึกของตลาด

usageTranslations.en: Trade execution algorithms analyze market depth to minimize slippage and optimize order fills.
usageTranslations.tr: İşlem algoritmaları piyasa derinliğini analiz ederek fiyat kaymasını azaltır.
usageTranslations.fr: Les algorithmes d’exécution analysent la profondeur de marché pour minimiser le slippage.
usageTranslations.de: Handelsalgorithmen analysieren die Markttiefe zur Minimierung von Slippage.
usageTranslations.es: Los algoritmos analizan la profundidad para minimizar slippage en órdenes.
usageTranslations.zh: 交易执行算法分析市场深度以减少滑点。
usageTranslations.ar: تحلل خوارزميات التنفيذ عمق السوق لتقليل الانزلاق.
usageTranslations.pt: Algoritmos de execução analisam profundidade para minimizar slippage.
usageTranslations.ru: Алгоритмы учитывают глубину рынка для минимизации проскальзывания.
usageTranslations.ja: 取引アルゴリズムは市場深度を分析しスリッページを最小化。
usageTranslations.it: Gli algoritmi di trading analizzano la profondità di mercato per ridurre lo slippage.
usageTranslations.vi: Thuật toán giao dịch phân tích độ sâu thị trường để giảm trượt giá.
usageTranslations.hi: ट्रेड एल्गोरिदम बाजार गहराई का विश्लेषण कर स्लिपेज कम करते हैं।
usageTranslations.th: อัลกอริทึมการเทรดวิเคราะห์ความลึกของตลาดเพื่อลด slippage
usageTranslations.id: Algoritme eksekusi analisis kedalaman pasar untuk minimalisir slippage.

terms.definition: A formal security and compliance review of a blockchain protocol’s codebase and operational controls, essential for portfolio risk assessment.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Portfolio managers rely on third-party protocol audits to evaluate security risks before allocation.

termTranslations.th: การตรวจสอบโปรโตคอล

usageTranslations.en: Portfolio managers rely on third-party protocol audits to evaluate security risks before allocation.
usageTranslations.tr: Portföy yöneticileri, tahsis öncesi güvenlik risklerini üçüncü taraf denetimlerle değerlendirir.
usageTranslations.fr: Les gestionnaires de portefeuille s’appuient sur des audits externes pour évaluer les risques.
usageTranslations.de: Portfoliomanager nutzen Drittanbieter-Audits zur Risikoanalyse vor Investitionen.
usageTranslations.es: Los gestores confían en auditorías externas para evaluar riesgos antes de invertir.
usageTranslations.zh: 投资组合经理依赖第三方审计评估安全风险。
usageTranslations.ar: يعتمد مديرو المحافظ على تدقيق البروتوكول من طرف ثالث لتقييم المخاطر.
usageTranslations.pt: Gerentes de portfólio usam auditorias de protocolo para avaliar riscos.
usageTranslations.ru: Менеджеры полагаются на сторонние аудиты протоколов для оценки рисков.
usageTranslations.ja: ポートフォリオマネージャーは第三者監査を重視する。
usageTranslations.it: I gestori si affidano ad audit terzi per valutare i rischi di sicurezza.
usageTranslations.vi: Quản lý danh mục dựa vào kiểm toán bên thứ ba để đánh giá rủi ro.
usageTranslations.hi: पोर्टफोलियो प्रबंधक सुरक्षा जोखिम आकलन के लिए थर्ड-पार्टी ऑडिट पर निर्भर करते हैं।
usageTranslations.th: ผู้จัดการพอร์ตใช้การตรวจสอบโปรโตคอลจากบุคคลที่สามในการประเมินความเสี่ยง
usageTranslations.id: Manajer portofolio mengandalkan audit protokol pihak ketiga untuk evaluasi risiko.

terms.definition: A predefined timeframe during which selected investors or addresses are allowed privileged access to token sales, staking programs, or other protocol features before general public availability.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: During the whitelist period, portfolio managers secure early access to discounted tokens, enhancing potential returns in compliance with regulatory limits.

termTranslations.th: ระยะเวลารายชื่อขาว

usageTranslations.en: During the whitelist period, portfolio managers secure early access to discounted tokens, enhancing potential returns in compliance with regulatory limits.
usageTranslations.tr: Beyaz liste döneminde, portföy yöneticileri indirimli tokenlere erken erişim sağlayarak potansiyel getirilerini düzenleyici sınırlamalara uygun şekilde artırır.
usageTranslations.fr: Pendant la période de liste blanche, les gestionnaires de portefeuille accèdent en avance à des tokens à prix réduit, augmentant les rendements potentiels tout en respectant la réglementation.
usageTranslations.de: Während des Whitelist-Zeitraums erhalten Portfoliomanager frühen Zugang zu rabattierten Token, was die potenziellen Renditen im Einklang mit regulatorischen Vorgaben steigert.
usageTranslations.es: Durante el período de whitelist, los gestores obtienen acceso anticipado a tokens con descuento, mejorando rendimientos potenciales conforme a regulaciones.
usageTranslations.zh: 在白名单期间，投资组合经理可提前获得折扣代币，提升潜在回报，同时符合监管要求。
usageTranslations.ar: خلال فترة القائمة البيضاء، يحصل مدراء المحافظ على وصول مبكر إلى الرموز المخفضة، مما يعزز العوائد المحتملة وفقًا للقيود التنظيمية.
usageTranslations.pt: Durante o período de whitelist, gestores garantem acesso antecipado a tokens com desconto, aumentando retornos potenciais conforme regulamentação.
usageTranslations.ru: В период белого списка портфельные менеджеры получают ранний доступ к токенам со скидкой, повышая потенциальную доходность в соответствии с регуляторными ограничениями.
usageTranslations.ja: ホワイトリスト期間中、ポートフォリオマネージャーは割引トークンに早期アクセスし、規制制限に準拠しながら潜在的なリターンを高めます。
usageTranslations.it: Durante il periodo di whitelist, i gestori ottengono accesso anticipato a token scontati, aumentando i potenziali rendimenti nel rispetto dei limiti normativi.
usageTranslations.vi: Trong thời gian whitelist, quản lý danh mục có quyền truy cập sớm vào token giảm giá, tăng lợi nhuận tiềm năng theo quy định.
usageTranslations.hi: व्हाइटलिस्ट अवधि के दौरान पोर्टफोलियो प्रबंधक डिस्काउंटेड टोकन तक जल्दी पहुंच पाते हैं, नियामक सीमाओं के साथ संभावित रिटर्न बढ़ाते हैं।
usageTranslations.th: ในช่วงระยะเวลารายชื่อขาว ผู้จัดการพอร์ตจะได้รับสิทธิ์เข้าถึงโทเค็นราคาพิเศษล่วงหน้า เพิ่มโอกาสผลตอบแทนตามข้อกำหนด
usageTranslations.id: Selama periode whitelist, manajer portofolio memperoleh akses awal ke token diskon, meningkatkan potensi hasil sesuai batas regulasi.

terms.definition: A specified duration after token issuance or investment during which holders are restricted from transferring or selling tokens, ensuring market stability and compliance with investment agreements.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: During the lockup period, portfolio managers must ensure tokens are not traded to maintain compliance with contractual and regulatory obligations.

termTranslations.th: ระยะเวลาล็อกอัพ

usageTranslations.en: During the lockup period, portfolio managers must ensure tokens are not traded to maintain compliance with contractual and regulatory obligations.
usageTranslations.tr: Kilitlenme süresince, portföy yöneticileri sözleşme ve düzenleyici yükümlülüklere uygunluk için tokenlerin işlem görmemesini sağlamalıdır.
usageTranslations.fr: Pendant la période de blocage, les gestionnaires doivent s’assurer que les tokens ne sont pas négociés afin de respecter les obligations contractuelles et réglementaires.
usageTranslations.de: Während der Sperrfrist müssen Portfoliomanager sicherstellen, dass Tokens nicht gehandelt werden, um vertragliche und regulatorische Vorgaben einzuhalten.
usageTranslations.es: Durante el período de bloqueo, los gestores deben asegurar que los tokens no se negocien para cumplir con obligaciones contractuales y regulatorias.
usageTranslations.zh: 锁定期内，投资组合经理必须确保代币不被交易，以遵守合同和监管义务。
usageTranslations.ar: خلال فترة الحجز، يجب على مديري المحافظ ضمان عدم تداول الرموز للامتثال للالتزامات التعاقدية والتنظيمية.
usageTranslations.pt: Durante o período de lockup, gestores devem garantir que tokens não sejam negociados para manter conformidade contratual e regulatória.
usageTranslations.ru: В период блокировки портфельные менеджеры должны обеспечить отсутствие торговли токенами для соблюдения контрактных и регуляторных требований.
usageTranslations.ja: ロックアップ期間中、ポートフォリオマネージャーは契約および規制義務を遵守するためトークンの取引禁止を確実にすべきです。
usageTranslations.it: Durante il periodo di lockup, i gestori devono assicurare che i token non vengano negoziati per rispettare obblighi contrattuali e normativi.
usageTranslations.vi: Trong thời gian khóa, quản lý danh mục phải đảm bảo token không được giao dịch để tuân thủ hợp đồng và quy định.
usageTranslations.hi: लॉकअप अवधि के दौरान, पोर्टफोलियो प्रबंधकों को टोकन ट्रेडिंग न होने देना चाहिए ताकि अनुबंधीय और नियामक बाध्यताओं का पालन हो।
usageTranslations.th: ในช่วงระยะเวลาล็อกอัพ ผู้จัดการพอร์ตต้องมั่นใจว่าโทเค็นไม่ได้ถูกซื้อขายเพื่อให้เป็นไปตามสัญญาและกฎระเบียบ
usageTranslations.id: Selama periode lockup, manajer portofolio harus memastikan token tidak diperdagangkan agar mematuhi kewajiban kontraktual dan regulasi.

terms.definition: A contractual schedule outlining when and how token holders receive their allocated tokens over time, aligning incentives and preventing immediate sell-offs after issuance.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Token vesting schedules are critical in portfolio management to ensure alignment of stakeholder incentives and mitigate dumping risks.

termTranslations.ja: トークンベスティング
termTranslations.th: การเวสต์โทเค็น

usageTranslations.en: Token vesting schedules are critical in portfolio management to ensure alignment of stakeholder incentives and mitigate dumping risks.
usageTranslations.tr: Token vestedirme takvimleri, paydaş teşviklerinin uyumunu sağlamak ve satış baskısı riskini azaltmak için portföy yönetiminde kritik öneme sahiptir.
usageTranslations.fr: Les calendriers de vesting sont essentiels pour aligner les incitations des parties prenantes et limiter les risques de dumping dans la gestion de portefeuille.
usageTranslations.de: Token-Vesting-Pläne sind im Portfoliomanagement entscheidend, um Anreizkonflikte zu vermeiden und Dumping-Risiken zu mindern.
usageTranslations.es: Los calendarios de vesting son críticos para alinear incentivos y mitigar riesgos de dumping en la gestión de portafolios.
usageTranslations.zh: 代币归属时间表对确保利益相关者激励一致、降低抛售风险的投资组合管理至关重要。
usageTranslations.ar: جداول تقيد التوكن ضرورية لضمان توافق حوافز أصحاب المصلحة وتقليل مخاطر البيع المفاجئ في إدارة المحافظ.
usageTranslations.pt: Os cronogramas de vesting são essenciais para alinhar incentivos e mitigar riscos de dumping na gestão de portfólio.
usageTranslations.ru: Графики вестинга токенов критичны для согласования стимулов и снижения рисков быстрой распродажи в управлении портфелем.
usageTranslations.ja: トークンベスティングスケジュールは利害関係者のインセンティブ調整と売却リスク軽減のためポートフォリオ管理で重要です。
usageTranslations.it: I piani di vesting sono cruciali per allineare incentivi e mitigare i rischi di dumping nella gestione di portafoglio.
usageTranslations.vi: Lịch trình vesting token rất quan trọng trong quản lý danh mục để đảm bảo động lực các bên và giảm rủi ro bán tháo.
usageTranslations.hi: टोकन वेस्टिंग शेड्यूल हितधारकों के प्रोत्साहन संरेखण और डंपिंग जोखिम को कम करने के लिए पोर्टफोलियो प्रबंधन में महत्वपूर्ण हैं।
usageTranslations.th: ตารางเวลาการเวสต์โทเค็นสำคัญต่อการจัดการพอร์ตเพื่อประสานแรงจูงใจและลดความเสี่ยงการขายทำกำไร
usageTranslations.id: Jadwal vesting token krusial dalam manajemen portofolio untuk menyelaraskan insentif dan mengurangi risiko dumping.

terms.definition: A sequence of words generated by a wallet that allows recovery of private keys and access to digital assets; critical for portfolio security and disaster recovery.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Proper safekeeping of the seed phrase is mandatory for wallet recovery and protecting portfolio digital assets from loss or theft.

termTranslations.th: วลีเมล็ดพันธุ์

usageTranslations.en: Proper safekeeping of the seed phrase is mandatory for wallet recovery and protecting portfolio digital assets from loss or theft.
usageTranslations.tr: Seed phrase’in doğru korunması, cüzdan kurtarma ve portföy dijital varlıklarının kayıp veya hırsızlığa karşı korunması için zorunludur.
usageTranslations.fr: La bonne conservation de la phrase de récupération est obligatoire pour la récupération de portefeuille et la protection des actifs numériques du portefeuille.
usageTranslations.de: Die sichere Aufbewahrung der Seed Phrase ist zwingend für Wallet-Wiederherstellung und Schutz digitaler Portfoliowerte vor Verlust oder Diebstahl.
usageTranslations.es: El correcto resguardo de la frase semilla es obligatorio para la recuperación de wallets y protección de activos digitales.
usageTranslations.zh: 妥善保管助记词是钱包恢复和保护投资组合数字资产免遭丢失或盗窃的必备措施。
usageTranslations.ar: الحفاظ السليم على عبارة الاسترداد ضروري لاستعادة المحفظة وحماية الأصول الرقمية من الفقدان أو السرقة.
usageTranslations.pt: A guarda adequada da seed phrase é obrigatória para recuperação de wallet e proteção dos ativos digitais do portfólio.
usageTranslations.ru: Надежное хранение seed phrase обязательно для восстановления кошелька и защиты цифровых активов портфеля от потери или кражи.
usageTranslations.ja: シードフレーズの適切な保管はウォレット復旧と資産保護のため必須です。
usageTranslations.it: La corretta custodia della seed phrase è obbligatoria per il recupero del wallet e la protezione degli asset digitali del portafoglio.
usageTranslations.vi: Bảo quản seed phrase đúng cách là bắt buộc để khôi phục ví và bảo vệ tài sản số trong danh mục.
usageTranslations.hi: सीड फ्रेज़ का सही संरक्षण वॉलेट रिकवरी और डिजिटल संपत्तियों की सुरक्षा के लिए अनिवार्य है।
usageTranslations.th: การเก็บรักษาวลีเมล็ดพันธุ์อย่างถูกต้องเป็นข้อบังคับเพื่อกู้คืนวอลเล็ตและปกป้องสินทรัพย์ดิจิทัลในพอร์ต
usageTranslations.id: Penyimpanan seed phrase yang tepat wajib untuk pemulihan wallet dan melindungi aset digital portofolio dari kehilangan atau pencurian.

terms.definition: A blockchain address to which tokens are sent to be permanently removed from circulation, reducing supply and potentially increasing token scarcity and value.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Tokens sent to the burn address are irretrievable, effectively reducing circulating supply and impacting portfolio valuation metrics.

termTranslations.th: ที่อยู่เบิร์น

usageTranslations.en: Tokens sent to the burn address are irretrievable, effectively reducing circulating supply and impacting portfolio valuation metrics.
usageTranslations.tr: Burn adresine gönderilen tokenler geri alınamaz; bu, dolaşımdaki arzı azaltır ve portföy değerleme metriklerini etkiler.
usageTranslations.fr: Les tokens envoyés à l’adresse de burn sont irrécupérables, réduisant l’offre en circulation et influençant les métriques de valorisation du portefeuille.
usageTranslations.de: An die Burn-Adresse gesendete Token sind unwiderruflich und verringern effektiv das Umlaufangebot, was Portfolio-Bewertungskennzahlen beeinflusst.
usageTranslations.es: Los tokens enviados a la dirección de burn son irrecuperables, reduciendo la oferta circulante e impactando métricas de valoración.
usageTranslations.zh: 发送至销毁地址的代币不可恢复，有效减少流通供应并影响投资组合估值指标。
usageTranslations.ar: الرموز المرسلة إلى عنوان الحرق لا يمكن استرجاعها، مما يقلل المعروض المتداول ويؤثر على تقييم المحفظة.
usageTranslations.pt: Tokens enviados ao endereço de burn são irreversíveis, reduzindo o suprimento circulante e impactando métricas de avaliação.
usageTranslations.ru: Токены, отправленные на адрес сжигания, необратимы, что снижает обращение и влияет на метрики оценки портфеля.
usageTranslations.ja: バーンアドレスに送られたトークンは回収不可で、流通供給を減らしポートフォリオ評価に影響を与える。
usageTranslations.it: I token inviati all’indirizzo di burn sono irreversibili, riducendo l’offerta in circolazione e influenzando le metriche di valutazione.
usageTranslations.vi: Token gửi đến địa chỉ burn không thể thu hồi, giảm nguồn cung lưu thông và ảnh hưởng đến định giá danh mục.
usageTranslations.hi: बर्न पते पर भेजे गए टोकन वापस नहीं लिए जा सकते, जो परिसंचारी आपूर्ति को कम करते हैं और पोर्टफोलियो मूल्यांकन को प्रभावित करते हैं।
usageTranslations.th: โทเค็นที่ส่งไปยังที่อยู่เบิร์นจะไม่สามารถเรียกคืนได้ ลดจำนวนหมุนเวียนและส่งผลต่อมูลค่าพอร์ต
usageTranslations.id: Token yang dikirim ke alamat burn tidak dapat dikembalikan, efektif mengurangi suplai beredar dan memengaruhi metrik valuasi portofolio.

terms.definition: A decentralized governance process where votes on protocol decisions are cast and recorded directly on the blockchain, ensuring transparency and tamper resistance.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Onchain voting enables portfolio holders to transparently participate in protocol upgrades, fee changes, and treasury allocations.

termTranslations.th: การลงคะแนนบนเชน

usageTranslations.en: Onchain voting enables portfolio holders to transparently participate in protocol upgrades, fee changes, and treasury allocations.
usageTranslations.tr: Zincir üstü oylama, portföy sahiplerinin protokol yükseltmeleri, ücret değişiklikleri ve hazine tahsislerinde şeffaf şekilde katılımını sağlar.
usageTranslations.fr: Le vote onchain permet aux détenteurs de portefeuille de participer de manière transparente aux mises à jour, changements de frais et allocations de trésorerie.
usageTranslations.de: Onchain-Abstimmungen ermöglichen Portfoliobesitzern eine transparente Teilnahme an Protokoll-Updates, Gebührenerhöhungen und Treasury-Zuweisungen.
usageTranslations.es: La votación onchain permite a los titulares participar transparentemente en actualizaciones, cambios de tarifas y asignaciones del tesoro.
usageTranslations.zh: 链上投票使投资组合持有者能够透明参与协议升级、费用变更和资金分配。
usageTranslations.ar: يُمكّن التصويت على السلسلة أصحاب المحافظ من المشاركة بشفافية في ترقيات البروتوكول وتغييرات الرسوم وتخصيصات الخزانة.
usageTranslations.pt: A votação onchain permite aos detentores participarem transparentemente de atualizações, mudanças de taxas e alocações do tesouro.
usageTranslations.ru: Ончейн-голосование позволяет держателям портфеля прозрачно участвовать в обновлениях протокола, изменениях комиссий и распределении казначейства.
usageTranslations.ja: オンチェーン投票により、ポートフォリオ保有者はプロトコルのアップグレード、手数料変更、財務配分に透明に参加できる。
usageTranslations.it: Il voto onchain consente ai detentori di portafoglio di partecipare in modo trasparente a upgrade, variazioni di fee e allocazioni di tesoreria.
usageTranslations.vi: Bỏ phiếu trên chuỗi giúp chủ sở hữu danh mục tham gia minh bạch nâng cấp giao thức, thay đổi phí và phân bổ quỹ.
usageTranslations.hi: ऑनचेन वोटिंग पोर्टफोलियो धारकों को प्रोटोकॉल अपडेट, शुल्क बदलाव और कोष आवंटन में पारदर्शिता से भाग लेने में सक्षम बनाता है।
usageTranslations.th: การลงคะแนนบนเชนช่วยให้เจ้าของพอร์ตเข้าร่วมอย่างโปร่งใสในการอัปเกรดโปรโตคอล การเปลี่ยนแปลงค่าธรรมเนียม และการจัดสรรคลัง
usageTranslations.id: Voting onchain memungkinkan pemegang portofolio berpartisipasi transparan dalam upgrade protokol, perubahan biaya, dan alokasi treasury.

terms.definition: The collective fund managed by a Decentralized Autonomous Organization (DAO), composed of tokens and assets used for governance decisions, project funding, and ecosystem incentives.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Portfolio managers track DAO treasury allocations to evaluate governance fund usage, project support, and community incentives.

termTranslations.th: คลัง DAO

usageTranslations.en: Portfolio managers track DAO treasury allocations to evaluate governance fund usage, project support, and community incentives.
usageTranslations.tr: Portföy yöneticileri, yönetim fonu kullanımı, proje desteği ve topluluk teşviklerini değerlendirmek için DAO hazinesi tahsislerini izler.
