usageTranslations.fr: Les gestionnaires de portefeuille suivent les allocations du trésor DAO pour évaluer l’utilisation des fonds de gouvernance, le soutien aux projets et les incitations communautaires.
usageTranslations.de: Portfoliomanager verfolgen DAO-Schatzkammer-Allokationen zur Bewertung der Mittelverwendung für Governance, Projektförderung und Community-Anreize.
usageTranslations.es: Los gestores rastrean asignaciones de tesorería DAO para evaluar uso de fondos de gobernanza, apoyo a proyectos e incentivos comunitarios.
usageTranslations.zh: 投资组合经理跟踪DAO金库分配，以评估治理资金使用、项目支持和社区激励。
usageTranslations.ar: يتابع مديرو المحافظ تخصيصات خزينة DAO لتقييم استخدام صندوق الحوكمة ودعم المشاريع وحوافز المجتمع.
usageTranslations.pt: Gestores monitoram alocações do tesouro DAO para avaliar uso de fundos de governança, suporte a projetos e incentivos comunitários.
usageTranslations.ru: Портфельные менеджеры отслеживают распределение казны DAO для оценки использования фондов управления, поддержки проектов и стимулов сообщества.
usageTranslations.ja: ポートフォリオマネージャーはDAOトレジャリーの割り当てを追跡し、ガバナンス資金の使用、プロジェクト支援、コミュニティインセンティブを評価する。
usageTranslations.it: I gestori monitorano le allocazioni del tesoro DAO per valutare l’uso dei fondi di governance, il supporto ai progetti e gli incentivi comunitari.
usageTranslations.vi: Quản lý danh mục theo dõi phân bổ kho bạc DAO để đánh giá sử dụng quỹ quản trị, hỗ trợ dự án và động viên cộng đồng.
usageTranslations.hi: पोर्टफोलियो प्रबंधक DAO ट्रेज़री आवंटन को ट्रैक करते हैं ताकि शासन निधि उपयोग, परियोजना समर्थन और समुदाय प्रोत्साहन का मूल्यांकन किया जा सके।
usageTranslations.th: ผู้จัดการพอร์ตติดตามการจัดสรรคลัง DAO เพื่อประเมินการใช้กองทุนกำกับดูแล การสนับสนุนโครงการ และสิ่งจูงใจชุมชน
usageTranslations.id: Manajer portofolio memantau alokasi kas DAO untuk mengevaluasi penggunaan dana tata kelola, dukungan proyek, dan insentif komunitas.

terms.definition: A reserved portion of tokens or investment rights assigned exclusively to participants on a whitelist during private sales, pre-sales, or exclusive offerings in portfolio projects.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Portfolio managers leverage whitelist allocations to secure preferential token purchase rights ahead of public sales.

termTranslations.th: การจัดสรรรายชื่อขาว

usageTranslations.en: Portfolio managers leverage whitelist allocations to secure preferential token purchase rights ahead of public sales.
usageTranslations.tr: Portföy yöneticileri, halka arz öncesinde tercihli token satın alma hakları için beyaz liste tahsislerini kullanır.
usageTranslations.fr: Les gestionnaires exploitent les allocations de liste blanche pour sécuriser des droits préférentiels d’achat de tokens avant les ventes publiques.
usageTranslations.de: Portfoliomanager nutzen Whitelist-Zuweisungen, um bevorzugte Token-Kaufrechte vor öffentlichen Verkäufen zu sichern.
usageTranslations.es: Los gestores aprovechan las asignaciones de lista blanca para asegurar derechos preferentes de compra antes de ventas públicas.
usageTranslations.zh: 投资组合经理利用白名单分配，在公开销售前获得优先代币购买权。
usageTranslations.ar: يستخدم مديرو المحافظ تخصيصات القائمة البيضاء لتأمين حقوق شراء رموز تفضيلية قبل المبيعات العامة.
usageTranslations.pt: Gestores aproveitam alocações de lista branca para garantir direitos preferenciais de compra antes das vendas públicas.
usageTranslations.ru: Портфельные менеджеры используют выделения из белого списка для получения приоритетных прав покупки токенов до публичных продаж.
usageTranslations.ja: ポートフォリオマネージャーはホワイトリスト割当を活用し、公開販売前に優先的なトークン購入権を確保する。
usageTranslations.it: I gestori sfruttano le allocazioni whitelist per assicurarsi diritti di acquisto preferenziali prima delle vendite pubbliche.
usageTranslations.vi: Quản lý danh mục dùng phân bổ whitelist để đảm bảo quyền mua token ưu tiên trước khi bán công khai.
usageTranslations.hi: पोर्टफोलियो प्रबंधक सार्वजनिक बिक्री से पहले प्रीफरेंशियल टोकन खरीद अधिकार के लिए व्हाइटलिस्ट आवंटन का उपयोग करते हैं।
usageTranslations.th: ผู้จัดการพอร์ตใช้การจัดสรรรายชื่อขาวเพื่อรับสิทธิ์ซื้อโทเค็นก่อนขายสู่สาธารณะ
usageTranslations.id: Manajer portofolio memanfaatkan alokasi whitelist untuk mengamankan hak beli token preferensial sebelum penjualan publik.

terms.definition: A cryptocurrency wallet requiring multiple private keys to authorize transactions, enhancing security for portfolio asset management.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Portfolio custodians utilize MultiSig wallets to ensure that multiple approvals are required for high-value crypto transfers.

termTranslations.ja: マルチシグウォレット
termTranslations.th: กระเป๋าเงินมัลติซิก

usageTranslations.en: Portfolio custodians utilize MultiSig wallets to ensure that multiple approvals are required for high-value crypto transfers.
usageTranslations.tr: Portföy saklayıcıları, yüksek değerli kripto transferleri için çoklu onay gerektiğini sağlamak üzere Çoklu İmza cüzdanlarını kullanır.
usageTranslations.fr: Les dépositaires de portefeuilles utilisent des portefeuilles MultiSig pour exiger plusieurs approbations pour les transferts importants.
usageTranslations.de: Portfolio-Verwahrer nutzen MultiSig-Wallets, damit mehrere Genehmigungen für hohe Transfers nötig sind.
usageTranslations.es: Los custodios de cartera usan billeteras MultiSig para requerir múltiples aprobaciones en transferencias altas.
usageTranslations.zh: 组合托管人使用多重签名钱包，确保高额转账需多方批准。
usageTranslations.ar: يستخدم أمناء المحافظ محافظ متعددة التوقيعات لضمان الموافقات المتعددة.
usageTranslations.pt: Custodiantes de portfólio usam carteiras MultiSig para aprovações múltiplas em transferências.
usageTranslations.ru: Кастодианы портфелей используют мультиподписные кошельки для многократного подтверждения транзакций.
usageTranslations.ja: ポートフォリオ管理者は高額送金に複数承認が必要なマルチシグウォレットを使用。
usageTranslations.it: I custodi di portafoglio utilizzano wallet MultiSig per approvazioni multiple su trasferimenti elevati.
usageTranslations.vi: Người giám sát danh mục sử dụng ví MultiSig để đảm bảo nhiều phê duyệt.
usageTranslations.hi: पोर्टफोलियो कस्टोडियन मल्टीसिग वॉलेट का उपयोग करते हैं ताकि उच्च मूल्य ट्रांसफर के लिए कई अनुमोदन आवश्यक हो।
usageTranslations.th: ผู้ดูแลพอร์ตใช้กระเป๋าเงินมัลติซิกเพื่อให้ต้องมีการอนุมัติหลายครั้งสำหรับโอนเงินมูลค่าสูง
usageTranslations.id: Penjaga portofolio menggunakan dompet MultiSig untuk memastikan beberapa persetujuan diperlukan.

terms.definition: The process of connecting and interoperating between different blockchain networks to enable asset transfer or data sharing for portfolio management.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Chain integration enables portfolio managers to move assets seamlessly across multiple blockchains for diversification.

termTranslations.th: การรวมเชน

usageTranslations.en: Chain integration enables portfolio managers to move assets seamlessly across multiple blockchains for diversification.
usageTranslations.tr: Zincir entegrasyonu portföy yöneticilerinin varlıkları çoklu zincirler arasında sorunsuz taşımalarını sağlar.
usageTranslations.fr: L’intégration de chaînes permet la gestion fluide des actifs à travers plusieurs blockchains.
usageTranslations.de: Kettenintegration ermöglicht nahtlose Asset-Transfers über mehrere Blockchains.
usageTranslations.es: La integración de cadenas permite mover activos entre múltiples blockchains sin problemas.
usageTranslations.zh: 链集成使资产在多链间无缝转移，助力组合多样化。
usageTranslations.ar: تمكن تكامل السلاسل مديري المحافظ من نقل الأصول بسلاسة عبر عدة شبكات.
usageTranslations.pt: A integração de cadeia permite movimentação fluida de ativos para diversificação.
usageTranslations.ru: Интеграция цепочек позволяет менеджерам портфелей беспрепятственно перемещать активы.
usageTranslations.ja: チェーン統合により複数チェーン間で資産移動が可能になる。
usageTranslations.it: L’integrazione di catene consente spostamenti di asset tra blockchain per diversificazione.
usageTranslations.vi: Tích hợp chuỗi giúp quản lý tài sản trên nhiều blockchain dễ dàng hơn.
usageTranslations.hi: चेन इंटीग्रेशन से पोर्टफोलियो प्रबंधक बहु-चेन में सहज लेन-देन कर सकते हैं।
usageTranslations.th: การรวมเชนช่วยให้ผู้จัดการพอร์ตย้ายสินทรัพย์ข้ามเชนได้อย่างราบรื่น
usageTranslations.id: Integrasi rantai memungkinkan perpindahan aset mulus antar blockchain.

terms.definition: A data feed service that supplies external price information to smart contracts or portfolio systems, critical for valuation and risk assessment.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Portfolio valuation algorithms depend on secure price oracles to prevent manipulation and ensure accurate NAV.

termTranslations.th: พรอคอลราคา

usageTranslations.en: Portfolio valuation algorithms depend on secure price oracles to prevent manipulation and ensure accurate NAV.
usageTranslations.tr: Portföy değerleme algoritmaları manipülasyonu önlemek ve doğru NAV için güvenli oracle’lara ihtiyaç duyar.
usageTranslations.fr: Les algorithmes de valorisation dépendent d’oracles sécurisés pour éviter la manipulation.
usageTranslations.de: Bewertungsalgorithmen verlassen sich auf sichere Oracles zur Manipulationsvermeidung.
usageTranslations.es: Los algoritmos de valoración dependen de oráculos seguros para evitar manipulación.
usageTranslations.zh: 组合估值依赖安全价格预言机防止操纵，确保准确净值。
usageTranslations.ar: تعتمد خوارزميات تقييم المحافظ على أوراكل آمن لمنع التلاعب.
usageTranslations.pt: Algoritmos de avaliação dependem de oracles seguros para evitar manipulação.
usageTranslations.ru: Алгоритмы оценки портфеля используют надежные оракулы для предотвращения манипуляций.
usageTranslations.ja: ポートフォリオ評価は安全な価格オラクルに依存する。
usageTranslations.it: Gli algoritmi di valutazione dipendono da oracle sicuri per prevenire manipolazioni.
usageTranslations.vi: Thuật toán định giá dựa vào oracle giá an toàn để tránh thao túng.
usageTranslations.hi: पोर्टफोलियो मूल्यांकन ऑरेकल पर निर्भर करता है ताकि छेड़छाड़ न हो।
usageTranslations.th: อัลกอริทึมประเมินพอร์ตพึ่งพาพรอคอลราคาที่ปลอดภัยเพื่อป้องกันการแทรกแซง
usageTranslations.id: Algoritme valuasi portofolio bergantung pada oracle harga yang aman untuk mencegah manipulasi.

terms.definition: A service that aggregates liquidity and pricing across multiple decentralized exchanges to optimize trade execution for portfolios.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Portfolio managers use DEX aggregators to access best pricing and liquidity for token swaps across multiple platforms.

termTranslations.zh: 去中心化交易所聚合器
termTranslations.th: DEX Aggregator

usageTranslations.en: Portfolio managers use DEX aggregators to access best pricing and liquidity for token swaps across multiple platforms.
usageTranslations.tr: Portföy yöneticileri, token takaslarında en iyi fiyat ve likidite için DEX toplayıcılarını kullanır.
usageTranslations.fr: Les gestionnaires de portefeuille utilisent des agrégateurs DEX pour optimiser les échanges de tokens.
usageTranslations.de: Portfoliomanager nutzen DEX-Aggregatoren für beste Preise und Liquidität.
usageTranslations.es: Los gestores usan agregadores DEX para obtener mejores precios y liquidez.
usageTranslations.zh: 组合经理使用DEX聚合器跨平台获得最佳价格和流动性。
usageTranslations.ar: يستخدم مديرو المحافظ مجمعات DEX للحصول على أفضل الأسعار والسيولة.
usageTranslations.pt: Gestores usam agregadores DEX para melhores preços e liquidez.
usageTranslations.ru: Менеджеры портфеля используют агрегаторы DEX для оптимальных сделок.
usageTranslations.ja: ポートフォリオマネージャーは複数DEXから最良の価格を得る。
usageTranslations.it: I gestori usano aggregatori DEX per migliori prezzi e liquidità.
usageTranslations.vi: Quản lý danh mục sử dụng tổng hợp DEX để có giá và thanh khoản tốt nhất.
usageTranslations.hi: पोर्टफोलियो प्रबंधक DEX एग्रीगेटर का उपयोग करते हैं।
usageTranslations.th: ผู้จัดการพอร์ตใช้ DEX aggregator เพื่อราคาที่ดีที่สุดและสภาพคล่อง
usageTranslations.id: Manajer portofolio menggunakan agregator DEX untuk harga terbaik.

terms.definition: The process of transferring crypto assets from a centralized exchange to an external wallet or portfolio custody.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: CEX withdrawals are logged and reconciled in portfolio custody records to ensure audit trails.

termTranslations.th: ถอน CEX

usageTranslations.en: CEX withdrawals are logged and reconciled in portfolio custody records to ensure audit trails.
usageTranslations.tr: Merkezi borsa çekimleri, denetim için portföy kayıtlarında tutulur ve uzlaştırılır.
usageTranslations.fr: Les retraits CEX sont enregistrés dans les registres de garde du portefeuille.
usageTranslations.de: CEX-Auszahlungen werden zur Auditierung in Portfolioverwahrungsprotokollen erfasst.
usageTranslations.es: Los retiros CEX se registran para auditorías en custodia de portafolio.
usageTranslations.zh: 中心化交易所提币记录用于组合托管审计。
usageTranslations.ar: تُسجل عمليات السحب من البورصة المركزية في سجلات الحفظ.
usageTranslations.pt: Retiradas CEX são registradas para auditoria nos registros de custódia.
usageTranslations.ru: Выводы с CEX фиксируются в отчетах по хранению портфеля.
usageTranslations.ja: CEX出金は監査記録のためポートフォリオに記録される。
usageTranslations.it: I prelievi CEX sono registrati per audit nella custodia del portafoglio.
usageTranslations.vi: Rút CEX được ghi lại trong hồ sơ lưu ký danh mục để kiểm toán.
usageTranslations.hi: CEX निकासी पोर्टफोलियो अभिलेखों में लॉग होती है।
usageTranslations.th: ถอน CEX จะถูกบันทึกในระบบเก็บรักษาเพื่อการตรวจสอบ
usageTranslations.id: Penarikan CEX dicatat dalam catatan kustodi portofolio.

terms.definition: An entity or individual responsible for maintaining a blockchain node, critical for network security and portfolio staking operations.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Portfolio staking rewards depend on reliable node operators maintaining protocol uptime and security.

termTranslations.th: ผู้ดำเนินการโหนด

usageTranslations.en: Portfolio staking rewards depend on reliable node operators maintaining protocol uptime and security.
usageTranslations.tr: Portföy staking ödülleri, güvenilir düğüm operatörlerinin sürekliliğine bağlıdır.
usageTranslations.fr: Les récompenses de staking dépendent d’opérateurs de nœuds fiables.
usageTranslations.de: Staking-Belohnungen hängen von zuverlässigen Node-Betreibern ab.
usageTranslations.es: Las recompensas de staking dependen de operadores de nodo confiables.
usageTranslations.zh: 质押奖励依赖于可靠的节点运营商保障网络安全。
usageTranslations.ar: تعتمد مكافآت الستيكينغ على مشغلي العقدة الموثوقين.
usageTranslations.pt: Recompensas de staking dependem de operadores de nó confiáveis.
usageTranslations.ru: Награды за стейкинг зависят от надежных операторов узлов.
usageTranslations.ja: ステーキング報酬は信頼できるノード運営に依存する。
usageTranslations.it: Le ricompense di staking dipendono da operatori di nodo affidabili.
usageTranslations.vi: Phần thưởng staking phụ thuộc vào nhà vận hành node đáng tin cậy.
usageTranslations.hi: स्टेकिंग रिवॉर्ड विश्वसनीय नोड ऑपरेटर पर निर्भर है।
usageTranslations.th: รางวัล staking ขึ้นอยู่กับผู้ดำเนินการโหนดที่น่าเชื่อถือ
usageTranslations.id: Hadiah staking portofolio bergantung pada operator node yang andal.

terms.definition: A participant responsible for validating and relaying cross-chain transactions over blockchain bridges, critical for asset interoperability.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Bridge validators ensure secure and accurate asset transfers between distinct blockchain networks for portfolio management.

termTranslations.ja: ブリッジバリデーター
termTranslations.th: ผู้ตรวจสอบบริดจ์

usageTranslations.en: Bridge validators ensure secure and accurate asset transfers between distinct blockchain networks for portfolio management.
usageTranslations.tr: Köprü doğrulayıcıları, portföy yönetimi için zincirler arası güvenli transfer sağlar.
usageTranslations.fr: Les validateurs de pont assurent des transferts sécurisés entre blockchains pour la gestion de portefeuille.
usageTranslations.de: Bridge-Validatoren sichern korrekte Übertragungen zwischen Blockchains für Portfolios.
usageTranslations.es: Los validadores de puente aseguran transferencias seguras para la gestión de cartera.
usageTranslations.zh: 跨链验证者保障资产在不同链间安全转移，支持组合管理。
usageTranslations.ar: يضمن محققو الجسر تحويلات آمنة ودقيقة بين الشبكات للمحافظ.
usageTranslations.pt: Validadores de ponte asseguram transferências seguras para portfólios.
usageTranslations.ru: Валидаторы моста обеспечивают безопасные переводы активов для портфелей.
usageTranslations.ja: ブリッジバリデーターは安全なクロスチェーントランザクションを保証。
usageTranslations.it: I validatori bridge garantiscono trasferimenti sicuri per la gestione portafoglio.
usageTranslations.vi: Trình xác thực cầu nối đảm bảo chuyển giao an toàn cho danh mục.
usageTranslations.hi: ब्रिज वैलिडेटर पोर्टफोलियो के लिए सुरक्षित संपत्ति हस्तांतरण सुनिश्चित करता है।
usageTranslations.th: ผู้ตรวจสอบบริดจ์ช่วยให้โอนสินทรัพย์ข้ามเชนปลอดภัยสำหรับพอร์ต
usageTranslations.id: Validator jembatan memastikan transfer aset aman antar blockchain.

terms.definition: A formal submission within a blockchain protocol’s governance system proposing changes or upgrades, impacting portfolio holdings or protocol risks.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Portfolio managers assess governance proposals to evaluate potential impacts on staking rewards and protocol stability.

termTranslations.th: ข้อเสนอการกำกับดูแล

usageTranslations.en: Portfolio managers assess governance proposals to evaluate potential impacts on staking rewards and protocol stability.
usageTranslations.tr: Portföy yöneticileri, staking ödülleri ve protokol istikrarı üzerindeki etkileri değerlendirmek için teklifleri inceler.
usageTranslations.fr: Les gestionnaires examinent les propositions pour évaluer leur impact sur les récompenses de staking.
usageTranslations.de: Portfoliomanager bewerten Governance-Vorschläge bezüglich Staking-Belohnungen und Stabilität.
usageTranslations.es: Los gestores analizan propuestas de gobernanza para evaluar impactos en recompensas y estabilidad.
usageTranslations.zh: 组合经理评估治理提案对质押奖励和协议稳定性的影响。
usageTranslations.ar: يقيم مديرو المحافظ مقترحات الحوكمة لتأثيرها على المكافآت والاستقرار.
usageTranslations.pt: Gestores avaliam propostas de governança para impactos em recompensas e estabilidade.
usageTranslations.ru: Менеджеры портфелей оценивают предложения по управлению для анализа рисков.
usageTranslations.ja: ポートフォリオマネージャーはガバナンス提案を評価する。
usageTranslations.it: I gestori analizzano proposte di governance per impatti su staking e stabilità.
usageTranslations.vi: Quản lý danh mục đánh giá đề xuất quản trị để xem tác động.
usageTranslations.hi: पोर्टफोलियो प्रबंधक गवर्नेंस प्रस्तावों का मूल्यांकन करते हैं।
usageTranslations.th: ผู้จัดการพอร์ตประเมินข้อเสนอการกำกับดูแลเพื่อวิเคราะห์ผลกระทบ
usageTranslations.id: Manajer portofolio menilai proposal tata kelola untuk dampak staking.

terms.definition: A blockchain scaling technology implemented on top of a base chain (Layer 1) to improve throughput and reduce costs, relevant for portfolio asset performance.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Portfolio strategies include investments in Layer 2 solutions to capitalize on improved transaction speeds and lower fees.

termTranslations.ja: レイヤーソリューション
termTranslations.th: โซลูชันเลเยอร์

usageTranslations.en: Portfolio strategies include investments in Layer 2 solutions to capitalize on improved transaction speeds and lower fees.
usageTranslations.tr: Portföy stratejileri, işlem hızları ve düşük ücretlerden yararlanmak için Layer 2 çözümlerine yatırım içerir.
usageTranslations.fr: Les stratégies incluent des investissements dans les solutions Layer 2 pour bénéficier de meilleures vitesses.
usageTranslations.de: Portfoliostrategien beinhalten Investitionen in Layer-2-Lösungen für schnellere Transaktionen.
usageTranslations.es: Las estrategias incluyen inversiones en soluciones Layer 2 para mayor velocidad y menor costo.
usageTranslations.zh: 组合策略包含Layer 2方案投资以提升速度并降低费用。
usageTranslations.ar: تشمل الاستراتيجيات الاستثمار في حلول الطبقة الثانية لتحسين السرعة وتقليل الرسوم.
usageTranslations.pt: Estratégias incluem investimentos em soluções Layer 2 para maior velocidade.
usageTranslations.ru: Стратегии включают вложения в Layer 2 для ускорения транзакций.
usageTranslations.ja: ポートフォリオはレイヤー2ソリューションに投資して高速化を狙う。
usageTranslations.it: Le strategie includono investimenti in soluzioni Layer 2 per velocità e costi inferiori.
usageTranslations.vi: Chiến lược danh mục bao gồm đầu tư vào Layer 2 để tăng tốc độ giao dịch.
usageTranslations.hi: पोर्टफोलियो रणनीतियों में बेहतर गति और कम शुल्क के लिए Layer 2 निवेश शामिल हैं।
usageTranslations.th: กลยุทธ์พอร์ตรวมถึงการลงทุนใน Layer 2 เพื่อความเร็วและค่าธรรมเนียมต่ำ
usageTranslations.id: Strategi portofolio termasuk investasi di Layer 2 untuk kecepatan lebih tinggi.

terms.definition: The process of examining blockchain transactions and data to assess portfolio risks, compliance, and transaction legitimacy.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Compliance teams perform chain analysis to identify suspicious activity related to portfolio transactions.

termTranslations.th: การวิเคราะห์เชน

usageTranslations.en: Compliance teams perform chain analysis to identify suspicious activity related to portfolio transactions.
usageTranslations.tr: Uyum ekipleri, portföy işlemlerine ilişkin şüpheli faaliyetleri tespit etmek için zincir analizi yapar.
usageTranslations.fr: Les équipes conformité réalisent une analyse de chaîne pour détecter des activités suspectes.
usageTranslations.de: Compliance-Teams führen Kettenanalysen zur Erkennung verdächtiger Aktivitäten durch.
usageTranslations.es: Los equipos de cumplimiento realizan análisis de cadena para detectar actividades sospechosas.
usageTranslations.zh: 合规团队通过链分析识别可疑交易活动。
usageTranslations.ar: يقوم فريق الامتثال بتحليل السلسلة للكشف عن نشاط مشبوه.
usageTranslations.pt: Equipes de compliance realizam análise de cadeia para identificar atividades suspeitas.
usageTranslations.ru: Команды комплаенс проводят анализ цепочки для выявления подозрительной активности.
usageTranslations.ja: コンプライアンスチームがチェーン分析で不審な取引を検出。
usageTranslations.it: I team compliance eseguono analisi della catena per attività sospette.
usageTranslations.vi: Đội ngũ tuân thủ thực hiện phân tích chuỗi để phát hiện hoạt động đáng ngờ.
usageTranslations.hi: कंप्लायंस टीम चेन एनालिसिस से संदेहास्पद गतिविधि पहचानती है।
usageTranslations.th: ทีม Compliance วิเคราะห์เชนเพื่อตรวจจับกิจกรรมต้องสงสัย
usageTranslations.id: Tim compliance melakukan analisis rantai untuk aktivitas mencurigakan.

terms.definition: A temporary holding area for unconfirmed blockchain transactions waiting to be included in a block, important for trade execution timing in portfolios.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Portfolio execution systems monitor the transaction pool to optimize confirmation times and reduce slippage.

termTranslations.ja: トランザクションプール
termTranslations.th: พูลธุรกรรม

usageTranslations.en: Portfolio execution systems monitor the transaction pool to optimize confirmation times and reduce slippage.
usageTranslations.tr: Portföy sistemleri, onay sürelerini optimize etmek için işlem havuzunu izler.
usageTranslations.fr: Les systèmes surveillent le pool de transactions pour optimiser les confirmations.
usageTranslations.de: Portfoliosysteme überwachen den Transaktionspool zur Optimierung der Bestätigungszeiten.
usageTranslations.es: Los sistemas monitorean el pool para optimizar tiempos de confirmación.
usageTranslations.zh: 组合执行系统监控交易池以优化确认时间。
usageTranslations.ar: تراقب أنظمة التنفيذ مجموعة المعاملات لتحسين الأوقات.
usageTranslations.pt: Sistemas monitoram pool para otimizar confirmações e reduzir slippage.
usageTranslations.ru: Системы исполнения портфеля следят за пулом транзакций для оптимизации.
usageTranslations.ja: ポートフォリオシステムはトランザクションプールを監視する。
usageTranslations.it: I sistemi monitorano il pool per ottimizzare i tempi di conferma.
usageTranslations.vi: Hệ thống theo dõi bể giao dịch để tối ưu xác nhận.
usageTranslations.hi: पोर्टफोलियो सिस्टम पुष्टि समय बेहतर बनाने के लिए पूल देखते हैं।
usageTranslations.th: ระบบพอร์ตตรวจสอบพูลธุรกรรมเพื่อเพิ่มประสิทธิภาพการยืนยัน
usageTranslations.id: Sistem portofolio memantau kolam transaksi untuk optimasi konfirmasi.

terms.definition: The maximum amount of gas units a user is willing to spend on a transaction in EVM-compatible blockchains, influencing transaction inclusion and cost.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Portfolio transaction builders adjust the gas limit to balance between execution success and cost efficiency.

termTranslations.th: ขีดจำกัดแก๊ส

usageTranslations.en: Portfolio transaction builders adjust the gas limit to balance between execution success and cost efficiency.
usageTranslations.tr: İşlem oluşturucular, başarı ve maliyet dengesi için gas limitini ayarlar.
usageTranslations.fr: Les constructeurs de transactions ajustent la limite de gaz pour optimiser.
usageTranslations.de: Transaktions-Builder passen das Gas-Limit für Erfolg und Kosten an.
usageTranslations.es: Los constructores de transacciones ajustan el límite de gas para equilibrar éxito y costo.
usageTranslations.zh: 交易构建器调整燃气限制以平衡成功率和成本。
usageTranslations.ar: يقوم منشئو المعاملات بضبط حد الغاز لتحقيق التوازن.
usageTranslations.pt: Construtores de transações ajustam limite de gás para equilíbrio.
usageTranslations.ru: Создатели транзакций настраивают лимит газа для оптимизации.
usageTranslations.ja: トランザクション作成者はガスリミットを調整する。
usageTranslations.it: I builder di transazioni regolano il limite gas per bilanciare successo e costo.
usageTranslations.vi: Người tạo giao dịch điều chỉnh giới hạn gas để cân bằng.
usageTranslations.hi: ट्रांजैक्शन बिल्डर गैस लिमिट समायोजित करते हैं।
usageTranslations.th: ผู้สร้างธุรกรรมปรับขีดจำกัดแก๊สเพื่อความสำเร็จและประหยัด
usageTranslations.id: Pembuat transaksi portofolio menyesuaikan batas gas untuk keseimbangan.

terms.definition: A smart contract that holds crypto assets in trust until predefined conditions are met, securing portfolio transactions.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Portfolio transactions involving third parties often use escrow contracts to mitigate counterparty risk.

termTranslations.th: สัญญาเอสโครว์

usageTranslations.en: Portfolio transactions involving third parties often use escrow contracts to mitigate counterparty risk.
usageTranslations.tr: Üçüncü taraf işlemlerinde emanet sözleşmeleri karşı taraf riskini azaltmak için kullanılır.
usageTranslations.fr: Les transactions avec tiers utilisent souvent des contrats d’entiercement.
usageTranslations.de: Transaktionen mit Dritten nutzen oft Treuhandverträge zur Risikominderung.
usageTranslations.es: Las transacciones con terceros usan contratos de depósito en garantía para mitigar riesgos.
usageTranslations.zh: 涉及第三方的组合交易通常采用托管合约以降低对手风险。
usageTranslations.ar: تستخدم العقود الضامنة في التعاملات مع أطراف ثالثة لتقليل المخاطر.
usageTranslations.pt: Transações com terceiros usam contratos de escrow para mitigar riscos.
usageTranslations.ru: Сделки с третьими лицами часто используют эскроу-контракты для снижения рисков.
usageTranslations.ja: 第三者が関与する取引ではエスクロー契約を使用する。
usageTranslations.it: Le transazioni con terzi spesso usano contratti escrow per ridurre il rischio.
usageTranslations.vi: Giao dịch bên thứ ba thường dùng hợp đồng ký quỹ để giảm rủi ro.
usageTranslations.hi: तृतीय पक्ष लेन-देन में एस्क्रो कॉन्ट्रैक्ट का उपयोग होता है।
usageTranslations.th: ธุรกรรมกับบุคคลที่สามมักใช้สัญญาเอสโครว์เพื่อลดความเสี่ยง
usageTranslations.id: Transaksi dengan pihak ketiga menggunakan kontrak escrow untuk mengurangi risiko.

terms.definition: The method by which token holders assign their staking rights to validators or nodes to earn rewards, integral to portfolio staking strategies.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Portfolio managers automate the delegation process to optimize staking rewards and validator selection.

termTranslations.ja: デリゲーションプロセス
termTranslations.th: กระบวนการมอบหมาย

usageTranslations.en: Portfolio managers automate the delegation process to optimize staking rewards and validator selection.
usageTranslations.tr: Portföy yöneticileri, staking ödüllerini optimize etmek için delegasyon sürecini otomatikleştirir.
usageTranslations.fr: Les gestionnaires automatisent le processus pour optimiser les récompenses de staking.
usageTranslations.de: Portfoliomanager automatisieren Delegationsprozesse zur Optimierung von Staking-Belohnungen.
usageTranslations.es: Los gestores automatizan la delegación para optimizar recompensas de staking.
usageTranslations.zh: 组合管理者自动化委托流程优化质押收益和验证节点选择。
usageTranslations.ar: يقوم مديرو المحافظ بأتمتة عملية التفويض لتحسين المكافآت.
usageTranslations.pt: Gerentes automatizam delegação para otimizar recompensas.
usageTranslations.ru: Менеджеры портфелей автоматизируют процесс делегирования для оптимизации доходности.
usageTranslations.ja: ポートフォリオマネージャーはデリゲーションを自動化する。
usageTranslations.it: I gestori automatizzano la delega per ottimizzare le ricompense di staking.
usageTranslations.vi: Quản lý danh mục tự động hóa quy trình ủy quyền để tối ưu phần thưởng.
usageTranslations.hi: पोर्टफोलियो प्रबंधक प्रतिनिधि प्रक्रिया को स्वचालित करते हैं।
usageTranslations.th: ผู้จัดการพอร์ตทำกระบวนการมอบหมายอัตโนมัติเพื่อเพิ่มผลตอบแทน
usageTranslations.id: Manajer portofolio mengotomatisasi proses delegasi untuk optimasi hadiah staking.

terms.definition: The fixed duration or number of blocks defining one epoch cycle in a blockchain network, used for finalizing state, validator rotations, staking rewards distribution, and governance updates.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Portfolio staking rewards are calculated and distributed at the end of each epoch length, requiring precise block tracking and reporting.

termTranslations.th: ระยะเวลาช่วงเอพ็อค

usageTranslations.en: Portfolio staking rewards are calculated and distributed at the end of each epoch length, requiring precise block tracking and reporting.
usageTranslations.tr: Portföy staking ödülleri her epoch süresi sonunda hesaplanır ve dağıtılır; hassas blok takibi ve raporlama gerektirir.
usageTranslations.fr: Les récompenses de staking sont calculées et distribuées à la fin de chaque durée d’époque, nécessitant un suivi précis des blocs et un reporting.
usageTranslations.de: Staking-Belohnungen werden am Ende jeder Epoche berechnet und verteilt, was genaue Blockverfolgung und Berichterstattung erfordert.
usageTranslations.es: Las recompensas de staking se calculan y distribuyen al final de cada duración de época, requiriendo seguimiento y reporte precisos.
usageTranslations.zh: 投资组合质押奖励在每个纪元结束时计算和分发，需精确区块追踪和报告。
usageTranslations.ar: يتم حساب وتوزيع مكافآت الستيكينغ في نهاية كل طول عهد، مما يتطلب تتبع كتلة دقيق والتقارير.
usageTranslations.pt: As recompensas de staking são calculadas e distribuídas ao fim de cada duração de época, exigindo rastreamento e relatórios precisos.
usageTranslations.ru: Вознаграждения за стейкинг рассчитываются и распределяются в конце каждой эпохи, требуя точного отслеживания блоков и отчетности.
usageTranslations.ja: ポートフォリオのステーキング報酬は各エポック終了時に計算・配布され、正確なブロック追跡と報告が必要です。
usageTranslations.it: Le ricompense di staking sono calcolate e distribuite alla fine di ogni durata dell’epoca, richiedendo un tracciamento preciso dei blocchi e report.
usageTranslations.vi: Phần thưởng staking danh mục được tính và phân phối vào cuối mỗi kỷ nguyên, đòi hỏi theo dõi và báo cáo khối chính xác.
usageTranslations.hi: पोर्टफोलियो स्टेकिंग पुरस्कार प्रत्येक एपोक की अवधि के अंत में गणना और वितरण किए जाते हैं, जिसके लिए सटीक ब्लॉक ट्रैकिंग और रिपोर्टिंग आवश्यक है।
usageTranslations.th: รางวัลสเตกกิ้งพอร์ตจะคำนวณและแจกจ่ายเมื่อสิ้นสุดช่วงเอพ็อค ต้องติดตามบล็อกและรายงานอย่างแม่นยำ
usageTranslations.id: Hadiah staking portofolio dihitung dan didistribusikan pada akhir setiap panjang epoch, memerlukan pelacakan blok dan pelaporan yang tepat.

terms.definition: A process by which new token projects gradually establish liquidity pools through incentivized early participation and variable pricing mechanisms to ensure market depth and price discovery.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Portfolio managers monitor liquidity bootstrapping phases to assess token price stability and optimal timing for allocation.

termTranslations.ja: 流動性ブートストラップ
termTranslations.th: การเริ่มต้นสภาพคล่อง

usageTranslations.en: Portfolio managers monitor liquidity bootstrapping phases to assess token price stability and optimal timing for allocation.
usageTranslations.tr: Portföy yöneticileri, token fiyat istikrarını ve tahsis için en uygun zamanı değerlendirmek için likidite başlatma aşamalarını izler.
usageTranslations.fr: Les gestionnaires surveillent les phases de démarrage de liquidité pour évaluer la stabilité des prix et le timing optimal d’allocation.
usageTranslations.de: Portfoliomanager überwachen die Phasen des Liquiditäts-Bootstrappings, um Preisstabilität und optimale Zuteilungszeitpunkte zu beurteilen.
usageTranslations.es: Los gestores monitorean las fases de arranque de liquidez para evaluar estabilidad de precio y momento óptimo de asignación.
usageTranslations.zh: 投资组合经理监控流动性启动阶段，以评估代币价格稳定性和最佳分配时机。
usageTranslations.ar: يراقب مدراء المحافظ مراحل تمهيد السيولة لتقييم استقرار سعر التوكن والتوقيت الأمثل للتخصيص.
usageTranslations.pt: Gestores monitoram fases de bootstrap de liquidez para avaliar estabilidade de preço e tempo ideal para alocação.
usageTranslations.ru: Портфельные менеджеры контролируют этапы запуска ликвидности для оценки стабильности цены токена и оптимального времени распределения.
usageTranslations.ja: ポートフォリオマネージャーは流動性ブートストラップ段階を監視し、トークン価格の安定性と最適な割当タイミングを評価する。
usageTranslations.it: I gestori monitorano le fasi di avvio della liquidità per valutare stabilità del prezzo e tempistiche ottimali di allocazione.
usageTranslations.vi: Quản lý danh mục giám sát giai đoạn khởi động thanh khoản để đánh giá ổn định giá token và thời điểm phân bổ tối ưu.
usageTranslations.hi: पोर्टफोलियो प्रबंधक लिक्विडिटी बूटस्ट्रैपिंग चरणों की निगरानी करते हैं ताकि टोकन मूल्य स्थिरता और आवंटन के लिए सर्वोत्तम समय का आकलन किया जा सके।
usageTranslations.th: ผู้จัดการพอร์ตติดตามช่วงเริ่มต้นสภาพคล่องเพื่อประเมินความเสถียรราคาและเวลาที่เหมาะสมในการจัดสรร
usageTranslations.id: Manajer portofolio memantau fase bootstrapping likuiditas untuk menilai stabilitas harga token dan waktu alokasi yang optimal.

terms.definition: The base blockchain layer responsible for the final and irreversible recording of transactions and asset transfers, providing security and trust for portfolio custody and clearing.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Portfolio transactions rely on the settlement layer for secure and irreversible recording, ensuring finality and auditability of digital asset movements.

termTranslations.th: เลเยอร์การตั้งสถานะ

usageTranslations.en: Portfolio transactions rely on the settlement layer for secure and irreversible recording, ensuring finality and auditability of digital asset movements.
usageTranslations.tr: Portföy işlemleri, dijital varlık hareketlerinin kesinliği ve denetlenebilirliği için güvenli ve geri alınamaz kayıt sağlayan yerleşim katmanına dayanır.
usageTranslations.fr: Les transactions reposent sur la couche de règlement pour un enregistrement sécurisé et irréversible, garantissant finalité et auditabilité.
usageTranslations.de: Portfolio-Transaktionen verlassen sich auf die Abwicklungsschicht für sichere, irreversible Aufzeichnung, die Endgültigkeit und Prüfungsfähigkeit gewährleistet.
usageTranslations.es: Las transacciones de portafolio dependen de la capa de liquidación para registros seguros e irreversibles, asegurando la finalización y auditabilidad.
usageTranslations.zh: 投资组合交易依赖结算层进行安全且不可逆转的记录，确保数字资产流动的终局性和可审计性。
usageTranslations.ar: تعتمد المعاملات على طبقة التسوية للتسجيل الآمن وغير القابل للعكس، مما يضمن النهائيّة وقابلية التدقيق لحركة الأصول الرقمية.
usageTranslations.pt: Transações dependem da camada de liquidação para registros seguros e irreversíveis, garantindo finalização e auditabilidade.
usageTranslations.ru: Транзакции в портфеле зависят от слоя расчетов для безопасной и необратимой записи, обеспечивая окончательность и аудируемость.
usageTranslations.ja: ポートフォリオの取引は安全で不可逆な記録のため決済レイヤーに依存し、確定性と監査可能性を保証する。
usageTranslations.it: Le transazioni di portafoglio si basano sul layer di regolamento per registrazioni sicure e irreversibili, garantendo finalità e auditabilità.
usageTranslations.vi: Giao dịch danh mục dựa vào lớp thanh toán để ghi nhận an toàn, không thể thay đổi, đảm bảo tính cuối cùng và khả năng kiểm toán.
usageTranslations.hi: पोर्टफोलियो लेनदेन सुरक्षित और अपरिवर्तनीय रिकॉर्डिंग के लिए सेटलमेंट लेयर पर निर्भर करते हैं, जो फाइनलिटी और ऑडिटेबिलिटी सुनिश्चित करता है।
usageTranslations.th: ธุรกรรมในพอร์ตพึ่งพาเลเยอร์การตั้งสถานะสำหรับการบันทึกที่ปลอดภัยและไม่ย้อนกลับ เพื่อความสมบูรณ์และตรวจสอบได้
usageTranslations.id: Transaksi portofolio bergantung pada lapisan penyelesaian untuk pencatatan yang aman dan tidak dapat diubah, memastikan finalitas dan auditabilitas.

terms.definition: A liability on an insurer’s balance sheet representing funds set aside to pay claims that have been incurred but not yet settled, including claims reported and IBNR (incurred but not reported).
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Insurers must maintain an adequate loss reserve to ensure sufficient funds are available for outstanding claims obligations and regulatory compliance.

termTranslations.th: เงินสำรองค่าสินไหมทดแทน

usageTranslations.en: Insurers must maintain an adequate loss reserve to ensure sufficient funds are available for outstanding claims obligations and regulatory compliance.
usageTranslations.tr: Sigortacıların, ödenmemiş tazminat yükümlülükleri ve yasal uyum için yeterli fonun bulunmasını sağlamak amacıyla yeterli tazminat karşılığı bulundurması gerekir.
usageTranslations.fr: Les assureurs doivent maintenir une provision pour sinistres adéquate afin de garantir des fonds suffisants pour les obligations de sinistres en cours et la conformité réglementaire.
usageTranslations.de: Versicherer müssen eine ausreichende Schadenrückstellung bilden, um ausstehende Schadenverpflichtungen und regulatorische Anforderungen zu erfüllen.
usageTranslations.es: Las aseguradoras deben mantener una reserva de siniestros adecuada para garantizar fondos suficientes para obligaciones pendientes y cumplimiento normativo.
usageTranslations.zh: 保险公司必须保持充足的未决赔款准备金，以确保有足够资金履行未结赔款义务并符合法规要求。
usageTranslations.ar: يجب على شركات التأمين الاحتفاظ بمخصص المطالبات لضمان توافر الأموال الكافية للالتزامات غير المسددة والامتثال التنظيمي.
usageTranslations.pt: As seguradoras devem manter provisão para sinistros adequada para garantir recursos suficientes para obrigações e conformidade regulatória.
usageTranslations.ru: Страховщики должны поддерживать достаточный резерв убытков для обеспечения исполнения обязательств и соблюдения нормативных требований.
usageTranslations.ja: 保険会社は未決済の損害賠償義務と規制遵守のため、十分な損害準備金を維持しなければならない。
usageTranslations.it: Le compagnie devono mantenere una riserva sinistri adeguata per garantire fondi sufficienti alle obbligazioni pendenti e alla conformità normativa.
usageTranslations.vi: Các công ty bảo hiểm phải duy trì dự phòng tổn thất đầy đủ để đảm bảo đủ quỹ chi trả các khiếu nại chưa giải quyết và tuân thủ quy định.
usageTranslations.hi: बीमा कंपनियों को लंबित दावों और नियामकीय अनुपालन के लिए पर्याप्त दावा आरक्षित बनाए रखना चाहिए।
usageTranslations.th: บริษัทประกันภัยต้องมีเงินสำรองค่าสินไหมทดแทนเพียงพอเพื่อรองรับภาระผูกพันและปฏิบัติตามข้อบังคับ
usageTranslations.id: Perusahaan asuransi harus mempertahankan cadangan kerugian yang memadai untuk memastikan dana cukup bagi kewajiban klaim dan kepatuhan regulasi.

terms.definition: The risk of loss resulting from insurance underwriting activities, including insufficient premiums, inappropriate selection, or adverse claims development.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Underwriting risk is a core component of the Solvency II capital requirement and must be quantified by insurance undertakings.

termTranslations.th: ความเสี่ยงการรับประกันภัย

usageTranslations.en: Underwriting risk is a core component of the Solvency II capital requirement and must be quantified by insurance undertakings.
usageTranslations.tr: Risk kabul riski, Solvency II sermaye gerekliliklerinin temel bir unsurudur ve sigorta şirketleri tarafından nicel olarak hesaplanmalıdır.
usageTranslations.fr: Le risque de souscription est un élément central de l'exigence de capital de Solvabilité II et doit être quantifié par les assureurs.
usageTranslations.de: Das Zeichnungsrisiko ist ein Kernelement der Solvency-II-Kapitalanforderung und muss von Versicherern quantifiziert werden.
usageTranslations.es: El riesgo de suscripción es un componente clave del requisito de capital de Solvencia II y debe ser cuantificado por las aseguradoras.
usageTranslations.zh: 承保风险是偿付能力II资本要求的核心组成部分，保险公司必须对其进行量化。
usageTranslations.ar: مخاطر الاكتتاب هي عنصر أساسي في متطلبات رأس المال Solvency II ويجب على شركات التأمين قياسها كمياً.
usageTranslations.pt: O risco de subscrição é componente central do requisito de capital Solvência II e deve ser quantificado pelas seguradoras.
usageTranslations.ru: Андеррайтинговый риск — ключевой элемент требования к капиталу Solvency II и должен быть количественно оценён страховщиками.
usageTranslations.ja: 引受リスクはソルベンシーII資本要件の中核であり、保険会社はこれを定量化する必要がある。
usageTranslations.it: Il rischio di sottoscrizione è una componente centrale del requisito di capitale Solvency II e deve essere quantificato dagli assicuratori.
usageTranslations.vi: Rủi ro bảo hiểm là thành phần cốt lõi của yêu cầu vốn Solvency II và phải được các công ty bảo hiểm định lượng.
usageTranslations.hi: अंडरराइटिंग जोखिम सॉल्वेंसी II पूंजी आवश्यकता का मुख्य घटक है और बीमा कंपनियों द्वारा इसे मात्रात्मक रूप से आंका जाना चाहिए।
usageTranslations.th: ความเสี่ยงการรับประกันภัยเป็นองค์ประกอบหลักของข้อกำหนดเงินกองทุน Solvency II และบริษัทประกันต้องประเมินปริมาณความเสี่ยงนี้
usageTranslations.id: Risiko underwriting merupakan komponen inti dari persyaratan modal Solvency II dan harus diukur oleh perusahaan asuransi.

terms.definition: Claims Ratio is the percentage of insurance claims paid or incurred in relation to the earned premiums for a given period, serving as a key indicator of underwriting performance and risk exposure.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: A persistently high claims ratio can indicate inadequate pricing or adverse selection in the insurer's portfolio, requiring regulatory attention.

termTranslations.th: อัตราค่าสินไหม

usageTranslations.en: A persistently high claims ratio can indicate inadequate pricing or adverse selection in the insurer's portfolio, requiring regulatory attention.
usageTranslations.tr: Sürekli yüksek hasar oranı, sigorta portföyünde yetersiz fiyatlama veya olumsuz risk seçimini gösterebilir ve düzenleyici müdahale gerektirebilir.
usageTranslations.fr: Un ratio de sinistres élevé de façon persistante peut indiquer une tarification inadéquate ou une sélection adverse dans le portefeuille de l’assureur, nécessitant une attention réglementaire.
usageTranslations.de: Eine dauerhaft hohe Schadenquote kann auf eine unzureichende Prämienkalkulation oder ungünstige Risikoselektion im Portfolio des Versicherers hindeuten und regulatorische Maßnahmen erforderlich machen.
usageTranslations.es: Un índice de siniestralidad persistentemente alto puede indicar precios inadecuados o selección adversa en la cartera del asegurador, requiriendo atención regulatoria.
usageTranslations.zh: 持续较高的赔付率可能表明保险人组合存在定价不足或逆向选择，需要监管关注。
usageTranslations.ar: يمكن أن تشير نسبة المطالبات المرتفعة باستمرار إلى تسعير غير كاف أو اختيار سلبي في محفظة شركة التأمين، الأمر الذي يتطلب تدخلاً تنظيمياً.
usageTranslations.pt: Um índice de sinistralidade persistentemente alto pode indicar precificação inadequada ou seleção adversa na carteira do segurador, exigindo atenção regulatória.
usageTranslations.ru: Постоянно высокий коэффициент убыточности может указывать на неадекватное ценообразование или неблагоприятный отбор рисков в портфеле страховщика, требуя вмешательства регулятора.
usageTranslations.ja: 損害率が持続的に高い場合、保険会社のポートフォリオにおける不適切な料率設定や逆選択を示し、規制当局の対応が必要となる場合がある。
usageTranslations.it: Un rapporto sinistri costantemente elevato può indicare una tariffazione inadeguata o una selezione avversa nel portafoglio dell’assicuratore, richiedendo attenzione regolamentare.
usageTranslations.vi: Tỷ lệ bồi thường cao liên tục có thể cho thấy định phí chưa hợp lý hoặc lựa chọn rủi ro bất lợi trong danh mục bảo hiểm, cần được cơ quan quản lý chú ý.
usageTranslations.hi: लगातार उच्च दावा अनुपात बीमाकर्ता की पोर्टफोलियो में अपर्याप्त मूल्य निर्धारण या प्रतिकूल चयन को दर्शा सकता है, जिसके लिए नियामक ध्यान आवश्यक है।
usageTranslations.th: อัตราค่าสินไหมที่สูงอย่างต่อเนื่องอาจบ่งชี้ถึงการกำหนดราคาที่ไม่เหมาะสมหรือการเลือกความเสี่ยงที่ผิดพลาดในพอร์ตของบริษัทประกันภัย ซึ่งจำเป็นต้องได้รับความสนใจจากหน่วยงานกำกับดูแล
usageTranslations.id: Rasio klaim yang terus-menerus tinggi dapat menunjukkan penetapan harga yang tidak memadai atau seleksi risiko yang merugikan dalam portofolio asuransi, memerlukan perhatian regulator.

terms.definition: A formal assessment of the present value of future policy liabilities and assets by an actuary, based on prescribed methods, used for solvency, funding, and regulatory compliance in insurance and pensions.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: The annual actuarial valuation determines whether an insurer holds sufficient reserves to meet its long-term obligations to policyholders.

termTranslations.ja: アクチュアリアル・バリュエーション
termTranslations.vi: Định Giá Toán Học Bảo Hiểm
termTranslations.th: การประเมินตามหลักคณิตศาสตร์ประกันภัย

usageTranslations.en: The annual actuarial valuation determines whether an insurer holds sufficient reserves to meet its long-term obligations to policyholders.
usageTranslations.tr: Yıllık aktüeryal değerleme, sigortacının uzun vadeli yükümlülüklerini karşılayacak yeterli karşılığı olup olmadığını belirler.
usageTranslations.fr: L’évaluation actuarielle annuelle détermine si l’assureur détient des provisions suffisantes pour honorer ses engagements à long terme envers les assurés.
usageTranslations.de: Die jährliche aktuarielle Bewertung bestimmt, ob ein Versicherer über ausreichende Rückstellungen für seine langfristigen Verpflichtungen verfügt.
usageTranslations.es: La valoración actuarial anual determina si la aseguradora cuenta con reservas suficientes para cumplir sus obligaciones a largo plazo con los asegurados.
usageTranslations.zh: 年度精算评估决定保险公司是否有足够准备金履行对保单持有人的长期义务。
usageTranslations.ar: يحدد التقييم الاكتواري السنوي ما إذا كانت شركة التأمين تمتلك احتياطيات كافية للوفاء بالتزاماتها طويلة الأجل تجاه حملة الوثائق.
usageTranslations.pt: A avaliação atuarial anual determina se a seguradora possui reservas suficientes para cumprir suas obrigações de longo prazo com os segurados.
usageTranslations.ru: Ежегодная актуарная оценка определяет, имеет ли страховщик достаточные резервы для выполнения долгосрочных обязательств перед страхователями.
usageTranslations.ja: 年間のアクチュアリアル・バリュエーションは、保険会社が長期的な契約者責任を履行するための十分な準備金を保有しているかを判断する。
usageTranslations.it: La valutazione attuariale annuale stabilisce se l’assicuratore dispone di riserve sufficienti per far fronte agli obblighi a lungo termine verso gli assicurati.
usageTranslations.vi: Định giá toán học bảo hiểm hàng năm xác định công ty bảo hiểm có đủ dự phòng để đáp ứng các nghĩa vụ dài hạn với bên mua bảo hiểm hay không.
usageTranslations.hi: वार्षिक बीमांकिक मूल्यांकन यह निर्धारित करता है कि क्या बीमाकर्ता के पास पालिसीधारकों के प्रति दीर्घकालिक दायित्वों को पूरा करने के लिए पर्याप्त भंडार है।
usageTranslations.th: การประเมินตามหลักคณิตศาสตร์ประกันภัยประจำปีจะกำหนดว่าบริษัทประกันมีเงินสำรองเพียงพอสำหรับภาระผูกพันระยะยาวต่อผู้ถือกรมธรรม์หรือไม่
usageTranslations.id: Penilaian aktuaria tahunan menentukan apakah penanggung memiliki cadangan yang cukup untuk memenuhi kewajiban jangka panjang kepada pemegang polis.

terms.definition: A non-guaranteed distribution of surplus or profit to eligible participating policyholders, typically in participating life insurance, reflecting the insurer’s performance after meeting contractual obligations.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: This year’s policyholder dividend is based on the insurer’s actual investment earnings and expense experience.

termTranslations.th: เงินปันผลผู้ถือกรมธรรม์

usageTranslations.en: This year’s policyholder dividend is based on the insurer’s actual investment earnings and expense experience.
usageTranslations.tr: Bu yılın poliçe sahibi kâr payı, sigortacının gerçek yatırım getirileri ve gider tecrübesine dayanmaktadır.
usageTranslations.fr: Le dividende d’assuré de cette année est basé sur les résultats réels des placements et des dépenses de l’assureur.
usageTranslations.de: Die diesjährige Versicherungsnehmerdividende basiert auf den tatsächlichen Anlageerträgen und Kosten des Versicherers.
usageTranslations.es: El dividendo al tomador de este año se basa en los rendimientos reales de inversión y los gastos de la aseguradora.
usageTranslations.zh: 今年的保单持有人分红基于保险公司实际投资收益和费用。
usageTranslations.ar: توزيع أرباح حملة الوثائق هذا العام يعتمد على الأرباح الاستثمارية الفعلية والخبرة في النفقات.
usageTranslations.pt: O dividendo ao tomador deste ano baseia-se nos ganhos reais de investimento e despesas do segurador.
usageTranslations.ru: Дивиденд держателю полиса в этом году рассчитывается на основе фактических инвестиционных доходов и расходов страховщика.
usageTranslations.ja: 今年の契約者配当金は、保険会社の実際の投資収益および費用実績に基づいています。
usageTranslations.it: Il dividendo al contraente di quest’anno si basa sui rendimenti effettivi degli investimenti e sulle spese dell’assicuratore.
usageTranslations.vi: Cổ tức chủ hợp đồng năm nay dựa trên thu nhập đầu tư thực tế và chi phí của công ty bảo hiểm.
usageTranslations.hi: इस वर्ष का पॉलिसीधारक लाभांश बीमाकर्ता की वास्तविक निवेश आय और व्यय अनुभव पर आधारित है।
usageTranslations.th: เงินปันผลผู้ถือกรมธรรม์ในปีนี้ขึ้นอยู่กับผลตอบแทนจากการลงทุนและประสบการณ์ค่าใช้จ่ายจริงของบริษัทประกันภัย
usageTranslations.id: Dividen pemegang polis tahun ini didasarkan pada hasil investasi aktual dan pengalaman biaya penanggung.

terms.definition: The maximum amount an insurer will pay for a covered loss under an insurance policy, as specified in the contract terms and conditions.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: If the damages exceed the coverage limit, the insured is responsible for any amount above the policy’s maximum payout.

termTranslations.th: วงเงินคุ้มครอง

usageTranslations.en: If the damages exceed the coverage limit, the insured is responsible for any amount above the policy’s maximum payout.
usageTranslations.tr: Zararlar teminat limitini aşarsa, sigortalı poliçedeki azami ödeme üzerindeki tutardan sorumludur.
usageTranslations.fr: Si les dommages dépassent la limite de garantie, l’assuré est responsable du montant excédentaire.
usageTranslations.de: Übersteigen die Schäden die Deckungsgrenze, haftet der Versicherte für den darüber hinausgehenden Betrag.
usageTranslations.es: Si los daños superan el límite de cobertura, el asegurado es responsable de cualquier importe superior al máximo de la póliza.
usageTranslations.zh: 如果损失超过保障限额，被保险人需承担超出保单最高赔付的部分。
usageTranslations.ar: إذا تجاوزت الأضرار حد التغطية، يكون المؤمن عليه مسؤولاً عن أي مبلغ يزيد عن الحد الأقصى للوثيقة.
usageTranslations.pt: Se os danos excederem o limite de cobertura, o segurado é responsável por qualquer valor acima do pagamento máximo da apólice.
usageTranslations.ru: Если убытки превышают лимит покрытия, за сумму сверх максимальной выплаты по полису отвечает застрахованный.
usageTranslations.ja: 損害額が補償限度額を超える場合、被保険者は保険契約の最大支払い額を超える部分に対して責任を負う。
usageTranslations.it: Se i danni superano il limite di copertura, l’assicurato è responsabile per qualsiasi importo oltre il massimale di polizza.
usageTranslations.vi: Nếu thiệt hại vượt quá giới hạn bảo hiểm, người được bảo hiểm chịu trách nhiệm cho phần vượt mức chi trả tối đa của hợp đồng.
usageTranslations.hi: यदि क्षति बीमा सीमा से अधिक है, तो बीमाधारक अधिकतम भुगतान से ऊपर की राशि के लिए जिम्मेदार है।
usageTranslations.th: หากความเสียหายเกินวงเงินคุ้มครอง ผู้เอาประกันภัยจะต้องรับผิดชอบในส่วนที่เกินจากจำนวนสูงสุดของกรมธรรม์
usageTranslations.id: Jika kerusakan melebihi batas pertanggungan, tertanggung bertanggung jawab atas jumlah di atas pembayaran maksimum polis.

terms.definition: Premium Adequacy refers to the sufficiency of insurance premiums collected to cover expected claims, expenses, and maintain statutory solvency levels.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Regular premium adequacy testing is essential to ensure the insurer can meet all policyholder obligations and remain compliant with solvency regulations.

termTranslations.th: ความเพียงพอของเบี้ยประกัน

usageTranslations.en: Regular premium adequacy testing is essential to ensure the insurer can meet all policyholder obligations and remain compliant with solvency regulations.
usageTranslations.tr: Düzenli prim yeterliliği testi, sigortacının tüm sigortalı yükümlülüklerini yerine getirmesi ve solvent kalması için esastır.
usageTranslations.fr: Un test régulier de l'adéquation des primes est essentiel pour garantir que l’assureur puisse remplir toutes ses obligations envers les assurés et rester conforme aux règles de solvabilité.
usageTranslations.de: Regelmäßige Prüfungen der Prämienangemessenheit sind entscheidend, damit der Versicherer alle Verpflichtungen erfüllen und den Solvenzanforderungen entsprechen kann.
usageTranslations.es: La prueba periódica de suficiencia de primas es esencial para que la aseguradora cumpla con todas sus obligaciones y mantenga la solvencia regulatoria.
usageTranslations.zh: 定期保费充足性测试对于确保保险公司能够履行所有保单责任并符合偿付能力规定至关重要。
usageTranslations.ar: اختبار كفاية الأقساط بشكل منتظم أمر ضروري لضمان قدرة شركة التأمين على الوفاء بجميع التزاماتها تجاه حملة الوثائق والامتثال للوائح الملاءة المالية.
usageTranslations.pt: Testes regulares de adequação do prêmio são essenciais para garantir que a seguradora cumpra todas as obrigações com os segurados e mantenha conformidade com as regulamentações de solvência.
usageTranslations.ru: Регулярное тестирование достаточности премий необходимо для выполнения страховщиком всех обязательств и соблюдения требований по платежеспособности.
usageTranslations.ja: 定期的な保険料の適正性テストは、保険会社がすべての契約者義務を履行し、ソルベンシー規制に準拠し続けるために不可欠です。
usageTranslations.it: Il test regolare dell’adeguatezza dei premi è essenziale affinché l’assicuratore possa adempiere a tutti gli obblighi verso gli assicurati e rimanere conforme alle norme di solvibilità.
usageTranslations.vi: Việc kiểm tra định kỳ tính đủ phí bảo hiểm là cần thiết để đảm bảo doanh nghiệp bảo hiểm đáp ứng các nghĩa vụ với khách hàng và tuân thủ quy định về khả năng thanh toán.
usageTranslations.hi: नियमित प्रीमियम पर्याप्तता परीक्षण यह सुनिश्चित करने के लिए आवश्यक है कि बीमाकर्ता सभी पॉलिसीधारक दायित्वों को पूरा कर सके और सॉल्वेंसी नियमों का पालन कर सके।
usageTranslations.th: การทดสอบความเพียงพอของเบี้ยประกันเป็นประจำมีความสำคัญเพื่อให้บริษัทประกันสามารถปฏิบัติตามข้อผูกพันต่อผู้เอาประกันภัยทั้งหมดและปฏิบัติตามข้อกำหนดด้านความมั่นคงทางการเงิน
usageTranslations.id: Pengujian kecukupan premi secara berkala penting agar penanggung dapat memenuhi seluruh kewajiban pemegang polis dan mematuhi regulasi solvabilitas.

terms.definition: Catastrophe Modeling is the use of advanced statistical and computational methods to estimate the potential financial impact of catastrophic events on insurance portfolios.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Catastrophe modeling enables insurers and reinsurers to quantify risk exposure and optimize reinsurance programs against rare but severe natural disasters.

termTranslations.ja: カタストロフィ・モデリング
termTranslations.th: การสร้างแบบจำลองภัยพิบัติ

usageTranslations.en: Catastrophe modeling enables insurers and reinsurers to quantify risk exposure and optimize reinsurance programs against rare but severe natural disasters.
usageTranslations.tr: Katastrof modelleme, sigorta ve reasürans şirketlerinin nadir fakat şiddetli doğal afetlere karşı risk maruziyetini nicelendirip reasürans programlarını optimize etmesini sağlar.
usageTranslations.fr: La modélisation des catastrophes permet aux assureurs et réassureurs de quantifier l’exposition au risque et d’optimiser les programmes de réassurance face aux catastrophes naturelles rares mais graves.
usageTranslations.de: Katastrophenmodellierung ermöglicht Versicherern und Rückversicherern, das Risikopotenzial zu quantifizieren und Rückversicherungsprogramme für seltene, aber schwere Naturkatastrophen zu optimieren.
usageTranslations.es: La modelización de catástrofes permite a las aseguradoras y reaseguradoras cuantificar la exposición al riesgo y optimizar los programas de reaseguro ante desastres naturales poco frecuentes pero graves.
usageTranslations.zh: 灾难建模使保险公司和再保险公司能够量化风险暴露，并针对罕见但严重的自然灾害优化再保险计划。
usageTranslations.ar: تتيح نمذجة الكوارث لشركات التأمين وإعادة التأمين تحديد حجم التعرض للمخاطر وتحسين برامج إعادة التأمين ضد الكوارث الطبيعية النادرة ولكن الشديدة.
usageTranslations.pt: A modelagem de catástrofes permite que seguradoras e resseguradoras quantifiquem a exposição ao risco e otimizem os programas de resseguro contra desastres naturais raros, porém severos.
usageTranslations.ru: Моделирование катастроф позволяет страховщикам и перестраховщикам количественно оценивать подверженность рискам и оптимизировать программы перестрахования против редких, но серьёзных стихийных бедствий.
usageTranslations.ja: カタストロフィ・モデリングは、保険会社や再保険会社がまれだが重大な自然災害に対するリスク曝露を定量化し、再保険プログラムを最適化するのに役立ちます。
usageTranslations.it: La modellizzazione delle catastrofi consente agli assicuratori e riassicuratori di quantificare l’esposizione al rischio e ottimizzare i programmi di riassicurazione contro eventi naturali rari ma gravi.
usageTranslations.vi: Mô hình thảm họa giúp các công ty bảo hiểm và tái bảo hiểm lượng hóa mức độ phơi nhiễm rủi ro và tối ưu hóa chương trình tái bảo hiểm trước các thảm họa thiên nhiên hiếm gặp nhưng nghiêm trọng.
usageTranslations.hi: आपदा मॉडलिंग बीमाकर्ताओं और पुनर्बीमाकर्ताओं को दुर्लभ लेकिन गंभीर प्राकृतिक आपदाओं के खिलाफ जोखिम को मापने और पुनर्बीमा कार्यक्रमों का अनुकूलन करने में सक्षम बनाती है।
usageTranslations.th: การสร้างแบบจำลองภัยพิบัติช่วยให้บริษัทประกันภัยและบริษัทประกันภัยต่อสามารถวัดความเสี่ยงและปรับโปรแกรมประกันภัยต่อให้เหมาะสมกับภัยธรรมชาติที่เกิดขึ้นน้อยแต่รุนแรง
usageTranslations.id: Pemodelan bencana memungkinkan penanggung dan reasuradur mengukur paparan risiko dan mengoptimalkan program reasuransi terhadap bencana alam yang jarang tetapi berat.

terms.definition: Risk Transfer is the process by which one party shifts the financial consequences of a particular risk to another party, typically via insurance or reinsurance contracts.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Risk transfer is a fundamental concept in insurance, enabling businesses and individuals to protect themselves against financial losses from unforeseen events.

termTranslations.th: การโอนความเสี่ยง

usageTranslations.en: Risk transfer is a fundamental concept in insurance, enabling businesses and individuals to protect themselves against financial losses from unforeseen events.
usageTranslations.tr: Risk transferi, işletmelerin ve bireylerin öngörülemeyen olaylardan kaynaklanan mali kayıplara karşı kendilerini korumalarını sağlayan sigortacılığın temel bir kavramıdır.
usageTranslations.fr: Le transfert de risque est un concept fondamental de l’assurance, permettant aux entreprises et particuliers de se prémunir contre les pertes financières résultant d’événements imprévus.
usageTranslations.de: Der Risikotransfer ist ein zentrales Konzept der Versicherung und ermöglicht Unternehmen und Einzelpersonen, sich vor finanziellen Verlusten durch unvorhergesehene Ereignisse zu schützen.
usageTranslations.es: La transferencia de riesgo es un concepto fundamental en seguros, permitiendo a empresas e individuos protegerse de pérdidas financieras imprevistas.
usageTranslations.zh: 风险转移是保险的基本概念，使企业和个人能够防范意外事件带来的经济损失。
usageTranslations.ar: يعد نقل المخاطر مفهوماً أساسياً في التأمين، حيث يمكّن الشركات والأفراد من حماية أنفسهم من الخسائر المالية الناتجة عن أحداث غير متوقعة.
usageTranslations.pt: A transferência de risco é um conceito fundamental no seguro, permitindo que empresas e indivíduos se protejam contra perdas financeiras imprevistas.
usageTranslations.ru: Передача риска — основной принцип страхования, позволяющий компаниям и частным лицам защититься от финансовых потерь в результате непредвиденных событий.
usageTranslations.ja: リスク移転は保険の基本概念であり、企業や個人が予期せぬ出来事による経済的損失から自らを守ることを可能にします。
usageTranslations.it: Il trasferimento del rischio è un concetto fondamentale nell’assicurazione, che consente a imprese e individui di proteggersi dalle perdite finanziarie causate da eventi imprevisti.
usageTranslations.vi: Chuyển giao rủi ro là khái niệm cơ bản trong bảo hiểm, giúp doanh nghiệp và cá nhân bảo vệ mình trước những tổn thất tài chính do sự kiện bất ngờ.
usageTranslations.hi: जोखिम स्थानांतरण बीमा का एक मौलिक सिद्धांत है, जो व्यवसायों और व्यक्तियों को अप्रत्याशित घटनाओं से होने वाले वित्तीय नुकसान से खुद को सुरक्षित रखने में सक्षम बनाता है।
usageTranslations.th: การโอนความเสี่ยงเป็นแนวคิดพื้นฐานในประกันภัย ซึ่งช่วยให้ธุรกิจและบุคคลสามารถปกป้องตนเองจากความสูญเสียทางการเงินที่ไม่คาดคิด
usageTranslations.id: Alih risiko merupakan konsep dasar dalam asuransi, memungkinkan bisnis dan individu melindungi diri dari kerugian keuangan akibat kejadian tak terduga.

terms.definition: Solvency Margin is the excess of an insurance company's assets over its liabilities, required by regulators as a buffer to ensure policyholder protection and financial stability.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: A healthy solvency margin is critical for an insurer to withstand large claim events and maintain regulatory approval for underwriting new business.

termTranslations.ja: ソルベンシー・マージン
termTranslations.vi: Biên Độ Khả Năng Thanh Toán
termTranslations.th: ส่วนต่างความมั่นคงทางการเงิน

usageTranslations.en: A healthy solvency margin is critical for an insurer to withstand large claim events and maintain regulatory approval for underwriting new business.
usageTranslations.tr: Sağlıklı bir solvabilite marjı, sigorta şirketinin büyük hasar olaylarına dayanabilmesi ve yeni iş için düzenleyici onayı sürdürebilmesi açısından kritiktir.
usageTranslations.fr: Une marge de solvabilité solide est essentielle pour permettre à un assureur de faire face à des sinistres majeurs et de conserver l’agrément réglementaire pour la souscription de nouveaux contrats.
usageTranslations.de: Eine gesunde Solvabilitätsmarge ist entscheidend, damit ein Versicherer große Schadenereignisse übersteht und die aufsichtsrechtliche Zulassung für Neugeschäft behält.
usageTranslations.es: Un margen de solvencia saludable es fundamental para que una aseguradora soporte grandes siniestros y mantenga la aprobación regulatoria para suscribir nuevos negocios.
usageTranslations.zh: 健康的偿付能力边际对于保险公司承受大型理赔事件并维持新业务承保的监管批准至关重要。
usageTranslations.ar: هامش الملاءة الجيد أمر بالغ الأهمية لتمكين شركة التأمين من مواجهة المطالبات الكبيرة والحفاظ على الموافقة التنظيمية للاكتتاب في الأعمال الجديدة.
usageTranslations.pt: Uma margem de solvência saudável é fundamental para que a seguradora suporte grandes sinistros e mantenha a aprovação regulatória para subscrever novos negócios.
usageTranslations.ru: Здоровая маржа платежеспособности необходима страховщику для устойчивости к крупным убыткам и сохранения разрешения на новое андеррайтинг.
usageTranslations.ja: 健全なソルベンシー・マージンは、保険会社が大規模な損害事案に耐え、新規引受に対する規制上の承認を維持するために不可欠です。
usageTranslations.it: Un margine di solvibilità adeguato è essenziale per consentire a un assicuratore di resistere a grandi sinistri e mantenere l’approvazione regolamentare per la sottoscrizione di nuovi affari.
usageTranslations.vi: Biên độ khả năng thanh toán tốt rất quan trọng để doanh nghiệp bảo hiểm vượt qua sự kiện bồi thường lớn và duy trì phê duyệt quy định cho hoạt động khai thác mới.
usageTranslations.hi: एक स्वस्थ सॉल्वेंसी मार्जिन बीमाकर्ता के लिए बड़े दावे की घटनाओं को सहने और नए व्यवसाय के लिए नियामकीय स्वीकृति बनाए रखने के लिए महत्वपूर्ण है।
usageTranslations.th: ส่วนต่างความมั่นคงทางการเงินที่ดีมีความสำคัญอย่างยิ่งสำหรับบริษัทประกันภัยในการรองรับการเรียกร้องค่าสินไหมขนาดใหญ่และรักษาการอนุมัติด้านกฎระเบียบสำหรับการรับประกันธุรกิจใหม่
usageTranslations.id: Margin solvabilitas yang sehat sangat penting agar perusahaan asuransi dapat menahan klaim besar dan mempertahankan persetujuan regulator untuk bisnis baru.

terms.definition: Surrender Charge is a fee imposed by insurers on policyholders who terminate their insurance policy or withdraw funds before a specified period.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: A surrender charge may significantly reduce the cash value received by a policyholder who cancels a life insurance policy in its early years.

termTranslations.th: ค่าธรรมเนียมยกเลิกสัญญา

usageTranslations.en: A surrender charge may significantly reduce the cash value received by a policyholder who cancels a life insurance policy in its early years.
usageTranslations.tr: İptal ücreti, bir hayat sigortası poliçesini ilk yıllarında iptal eden sigortalının alacağı nakit değeri önemli ölçüde azaltabilir.
usageTranslations.fr: Les frais de rachat peuvent réduire de manière significative la valeur de rachat reçue par un souscripteur annulant sa police d’assurance-vie dans les premières années.
usageTranslations.de: Eine Stornogebühr kann den Rückkaufswert für Versicherungsnehmer, die eine Lebensversicherung in den ersten Jahren kündigen, erheblich verringern.
usageTranslations.es: Un cargo por rescate puede reducir significativamente el valor recibido por el titular de una póliza que cancela su seguro de vida en los primeros años.
usageTranslations.zh: 退保费可能大幅减少在保单早期退保的投保人获得的现金价值。
usageTranslations.ar: قد تقلل رسوم الاسترداد بشكل كبير من القيمة النقدية التي يتلقاها حامل الوثيقة الذي يلغي بوليصة التأمين على الحياة في السنوات الأولى.
usageTranslations.pt: A taxa de resgate pode reduzir significativamente o valor recebido pelo segurado que cancela uma apólice de seguro de vida nos primeiros anos.
usageTranslations.ru: Сбор за выкуп может существенно уменьшить сумму, получаемую страхователем при досрочном расторжении полиса страхования жизни.
usageTranslations.ja: 解約控除は、生命保険契約の初期に契約を解約した場合、受け取れる解約返戻金を大幅に減少させる可能性があります。
usageTranslations.it: La penale di riscatto può ridurre significativamente il valore di riscatto ricevuto da un assicurato che annulla una polizza vita nei primi anni.
usageTranslations.vi: Phí rút trước hạn có thể làm giảm đáng kể giá trị tiền mặt nhận được khi khách hàng huỷ hợp đồng bảo hiểm nhân thọ trong những năm đầu.
usageTranslations.hi: समर्पण शुल्क जीवन बीमा पॉलिसी को प्रारंभिक वर्षों में रद्द करने पर पॉलिसीधारक को मिलने वाली नकद राशि को काफी कम कर सकता है।
usageTranslations.th: ค่าธรรมเนียมยกเลิกสัญญาอาจทำให้ผู้ถือกรมธรรม์ได้รับเงินสดน้อยลงอย่างมากหากยกเลิกประกันชีวิตในช่วงปีแรก ๆ
usageTranslations.id: Biaya penyerahan dapat secara signifikan mengurangi nilai tunai yang diterima pemegang polis yang membatalkan asuransi jiwa pada tahun-tahun awal.

terms.definition: Reinsurance Treaty is a formal contract under which a reinsurer accepts a defined portion of risks from a primary insurer, typically covering specified lines of business.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: A reinsurance treaty provides ongoing risk transfer for the insurer and may be automatically renewed each year unless terminated by either party.

termTranslations.th: สนธิสัญญาประกันภัยต่อ

usageTranslations.en: A reinsurance treaty provides ongoing risk transfer for the insurer and may be automatically renewed each year unless terminated by either party.
usageTranslations.tr: Reasürans anlaşması, sigortacı için sürekli risk transferi sağlar ve taraflardan biri feshetmedikçe her yıl otomatik olarak yenilenebilir.
usageTranslations.fr: Un traité de réassurance offre un transfert de risque continu à l’assureur et peut être renouvelé automatiquement chaque année sauf résiliation par l’une des parties.
usageTranslations.de: Ein Rückversicherungsvertrag bietet dem Erstversicherer einen kontinuierlichen Risikotransfer und kann jährlich automatisch verlängert werden, sofern keine Partei kündigt.
usageTranslations.es: Un tratado de reaseguro proporciona transferencia continua de riesgos al asegurador y puede renovarse automáticamente cada año, salvo rescisión de alguna de las partes.
usageTranslations.zh: 再保险合同为保险公司提供持续的风险转移，除非一方终止，否则每年可自动续签。
usageTranslations.ar: توفر اتفاقية إعادة التأمين نقل مخاطر مستمر لشركة التأمين ويمكن تجديدها تلقائيًا كل عام ما لم تنهيها أي من الطرفين.
usageTranslations.pt: Um tratado de resseguro oferece transferência contínua de risco ao segurador e pode ser renovado automaticamente a cada ano, salvo rescisão por qualquer parte.
usageTranslations.ru: Договор перестрахования обеспечивает постоянную передачу риска страховщику и может автоматически продлеваться ежегодно, если одна из сторон не прекратит его.
usageTranslations.ja: 再保険条約は保険会社に継続的なリスク移転を提供し、いずれかの当事者が解除しない限り、毎年自動的に更新されることがあります。
usageTranslations.it: Un trattato di riassicurazione offre un trasferimento continuo del rischio all’assicuratore e può essere rinnovato automaticamente ogni anno salvo risoluzione da parte di una delle parti.
usageTranslations.vi: Hiệp ước tái bảo hiểm cung cấp chuyển giao rủi ro liên tục cho doanh nghiệp bảo hiểm và có thể tự động gia hạn hàng năm trừ khi một trong hai bên chấm dứt.
usageTranslations.hi: पुनर्बीमा संधि बीमाकर्ता को सतत जोखिम स्थानांतरण प्रदान करती है और दोनों पक्षों में से किसी एक द्वारा समाप्त न किए जाने पर हर साल स्वतः नवीनीकृत हो सकती है।
usageTranslations.th: สนธิสัญญาประกันภัยต่อให้การโอนความเสี่ยงอย่างต่อเนื่องแก่บริษัทประกันภัยและอาจได้รับการต่ออายุโดยอัตโนมัติทุกปี เว้นแต่ฝ่ายใดฝ่ายหนึ่งจะยกเลิก
usageTranslations.id: Perjanjian reasuransi memberikan alih risiko berkelanjutan bagi penanggung dan dapat diperpanjang otomatis setiap tahun kecuali dihentikan oleh salah satu pihak.

terms.definition: Exposure Unit is the fundamental measure of risk, such as a vehicle, property, or person, used to determine insurance premiums and aggregate exposure.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Premiums are calculated based on the number of exposure units in force, such as vehicles insured or properties covered within a policy period.

termTranslations.ja: エクスポージャー・ユニット
termTranslations.th: หน่วยความเสี่ยง

usageTranslations.en: Premiums are calculated based on the number of exposure units in force, such as vehicles insured or properties covered within a policy period.
usageTranslations.tr: Primler, sigortalı araç veya sigorta döneminde kapsanan mülk gibi yürürlükteki maruziyet birimi sayısına göre hesaplanır.
usageTranslations.fr: Les primes sont calculées en fonction du nombre d’unités d’exposition en vigueur, comme les véhicules assurés ou les biens couverts pendant la période du contrat.
usageTranslations.de: Prämien werden anhand der Anzahl der im Bestand befindlichen Exponierungseinheiten berechnet, etwa versicherte Fahrzeuge oder gedeckte Immobilien im Versicherungszeitraum.
usageTranslations.es: Las primas se calculan en función del número de unidades de exposición vigentes, como vehículos asegurados o propiedades cubiertas en el periodo de la póliza.
usageTranslations.zh: 保费是根据有效风险单位的数量计算的，例如保单期间受保的车辆或财产。
usageTranslations.ar: يتم حساب الأقساط بناءً على عدد وحدات التعرض السارية مثل المركبات المؤمَّن عليها أو الممتلكات المغطاة خلال فترة الوثيقة.
usageTranslations.pt: Os prêmios são calculados com base no número de unidades de exposição vigentes, como veículos segurados ou propriedades cobertas durante o período da apólice.
usageTranslations.ru: Премии рассчитываются исходя из количества единиц риска, например, застрахованных транспортных средств или объектов недвижимости в течение срока действия полиса.
usageTranslations.ja: 保険料は、保険期間中に保険をかけた車両や対象となる財産など、有効なエクスポージャー・ユニットの数に基づいて算出されます。
usageTranslations.it: I premi sono calcolati in base al numero di unità di esposizione in vigore, come i veicoli assicurati o i beni coperti nel periodo di polizza.
usageTranslations.vi: Phí bảo hiểm được tính dựa trên số lượng đơn vị rủi ro hiện có, như xe được bảo hiểm hoặc tài sản được bảo vệ trong thời hạn hợp đồng.
usageTranslations.hi: प्रीमियम का निर्धारण लागू जोखिम इकाइयों की संख्या के आधार पर किया जाता है, जैसे बीमित वाहन या बीमा अवधि के भीतर शामिल संपत्तियां।
usageTranslations.th: เบี้ยประกันคำนวณจากจำนวนหน่วยความเสี่ยงที่มีผลใช้ เช่น ยานพาหนะที่รับประกันหรือทรัพย์สินที่รับประกันในช่วงระยะเวลาประกันภัย
usageTranslations.id: Premi dihitung berdasarkan jumlah unit paparan yang berlaku, seperti kendaraan yang diasuransikan atau properti yang ditanggung selama masa polis.

terms.definition: A liability established by insurers to cover future claims payments for reported and incurred-but-not-reported (IBNR) losses, representing the estimated amount required to settle all obligations from insurance contracts.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: The insurer increased its loss reserve after a review indicated that existing provisions were insufficient for pending claims.

termTranslations.th: เงินสำรองค่าสินไหมทดแทน

usageTranslations.en: The insurer increased its loss reserve after a review indicated that existing provisions were insufficient for pending claims.
usageTranslations.tr: Sigortacı, mevcut karşılıkların bekleyen talepler için yetersiz olduğunu tespit edince tazminat karşılığını artırdı.
usageTranslations.fr: L'assureur a augmenté sa provision pour sinistres après avoir constaté que les provisions existantes étaient insuffisantes pour les réclamations en cours.
usageTranslations.de: Der Versicherer erhöhte seine Schadenrückstellung, nachdem eine Überprüfung ergab, dass die bestehenden Rückstellungen für ausstehende Ansprüche nicht ausreichten.
usageTranslations.es: La aseguradora aumentó la reserva de siniestros tras constatar que las provisiones existentes eran insuficientes para las reclamaciones pendientes.
usageTranslations.zh: 保险公司在发现现有准备金不足以支付未决理赔后增加了未决赔款准备金。
usageTranslations.ar: زادت شركة التأمين مخصص الخسائر بعد مراجعة أظهرت أن المخصصات الحالية غير كافية للمطالبات المعلقة.
usageTranslations.pt: A seguradora aumentou a provisão para sinistros após revisão indicar insuficiência para os sinistros pendentes.
usageTranslations.ru: Страховщик увеличил резерв убытков после того, как проверка показала, что существующие резервы недостаточны для ожидаемых выплат.
usageTranslations.ja: 保険会社は未払請求に対する既存の引当金が不十分と判明した後、損失準備金を増額した。
usageTranslations.it: L'assicuratore ha aumentato la riserva sinistri dopo aver riscontrato l'insufficienza delle riserve esistenti per i sinistri pendenti.
usageTranslations.vi: Công ty bảo hiểm đã tăng dự phòng bồi thường sau khi xác định các khoản dự phòng hiện tại không đủ cho các yêu cầu bồi thường tồn đọng.
usageTranslations.hi: बीमाकर्ता ने लंबित दावों के लिए मौजूदा प्रावधान अपर्याप्त पाए जाने के बाद हानि आरक्षित निधि बढ़ा दी।
usageTranslations.th: บริษัทประกันภัยได้เพิ่มเงินสำรองค่าสินไหมทดแทนหลังจากพบว่าเงินสำรองเดิมไม่เพียงพอสำหรับการเรียกร้องที่รอดำเนินการ
usageTranslations.id: Perusahaan asuransi meningkatkan cadangan kerugian setelah tinjauan menunjukkan cadangan yang ada tidak cukup untuk klaim yang tertunda.

terms.definition: The maximum amount of risk or loss an insurance company or reinsurer retains on a policy or portfolio before transferring the excess to reinsurance; a key parameter in underwriting and reinsurance treaties.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: The reinsurer will only accept claims above the retention limit agreed upon in the reinsurance contract.

termTranslations.th: วงเงินคงเหลือ

usageTranslations.en: The reinsurer will only accept claims above the retention limit agreed upon in the reinsurance contract.
usageTranslations.tr: Reasürans sözleşmesinde kararlaştırılan muhafaza limiti üzerindeki talepler reasürör tarafından kabul edilir.
usageTranslations.fr: Le réassureur n'acceptera que les sinistres dépassant la limite de rétention convenue dans le contrat de réassurance.
usageTranslations.de: Der Rückversicherer übernimmt nur Schäden, die die vereinbarte Selbstbehaltsgrenze überschreiten.
usageTranslations.es: El reasegurador solo aceptará reclamaciones por encima del límite de retención acordado en el contrato de reaseguro.
usageTranslations.zh: 再保险公司仅接受高于再保险合同约定自留限额的索赔。
usageTranslations.ar: لن يقبل معيد التأمين المطالبات إلا فوق حد الاحتفاظ المتفق عليه في عقد إعادة التأمين.
usageTranslations.pt: O ressegurador só aceitará sinistros acima do limite de retenção acordado no contrato de resseguro.
usageTranslations.ru: Перестраховщик принимает убытки только свыше лимита удержания, согласованного в договоре перестрахования.
usageTranslations.ja: 再保険会社は再保険契約で合意された留保限度額を超える請求のみを受け入れます。
usageTranslations.it: Il riassicuratore accetterà solo i sinistri superiori al limite di ritenzione concordato nel contratto di riassicurazione.
usageTranslations.vi: Nhà tái bảo hiểm chỉ chấp nhận các yêu cầu vượt quá giới hạn giữ lại đã thỏa thuận trong hợp đồng tái bảo hiểm.
usageTranslations.hi: पुनर्बीमाकर्ता केवल पुनर्बीमा अनुबंध में सहमत रिटेंशन सीमा से ऊपर के दावों को स्वीकार करेगा।
usageTranslations.th: บริษัทประกันภัยต่อจะรับเฉพาะเคลมที่สูงกว่าวงเงินคงเหลือตามที่ตกลงในสัญญาประกันภัยต่อ
usageTranslations.id: Reasuradur hanya akan menerima klaim di atas batas retensi yang disepakati dalam kontrak reasuransi.

terms.definition: A statistical chart showing the probability of death for each age group within a population, used by insurers and actuaries to price life insurance and calculate reserves.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: The insurer updated its mortality table to reflect recent demographic trends and longevity improvements.

termTranslations.th: ตารางมรณะ

usageTranslations.en: The insurer updated its mortality table to reflect recent demographic trends and longevity improvements.
usageTranslations.tr: Sigortacı, yeni demografik eğilimler ve yaşam süresi artışlarını yansıtmak için ölüm tablosunu güncelledi.
