terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: The Morningstar style box helps investors identify a fund’s equity style and market cap focus at a glance.

termTranslations.th: สไตล์บ็อกซ์

usageTranslations.en: The Morningstar style box helps investors identify a fund’s equity style and market cap focus at a glance.
usageTranslations.tr: Morningstar style box, yatırımcıya fonun hisse tarzını ve piyasa değeri odaklı olup olmadığını hızlıca gösterir.
usageTranslations.fr: Le style box Morningstar permet d’identifier le style actions et la capitalisation ciblée d’un fonds.
usageTranslations.de: Die Morningstar Style Box zeigt auf einen Blick Stil und Marktkapitalisierung des Fonds.
usageTranslations.es: El style box de Morningstar permite identificar el estilo y capitalización de un fondo.
usageTranslations.zh: 晨星风格箱可快速了解基金的股票风格和市值偏好。
usageTranslations.ar: ستايل بوكس مورنينغستار يوضح نوع الأسهم والتركيز الرأسمالي للصندوق.
usageTranslations.pt: O style box da Morningstar permite visualizar estilo e capitalização de fundos.
usageTranslations.ru: Style Box Morningstar визуализирует стиль и капитализацию фонда.
usageTranslations.ja: モーニングスターのスタイルボックスでファンドの株式スタイルが分かる。
usageTranslations.it: La style box Morningstar aiuta a vedere lo stile azionario del fondo.
usageTranslations.vi: Style box Morningstar giúp nhận biết phong cách đầu tư của quỹ.
usageTranslations.hi: मॉर्निंगस्टार स्टाइल बॉक्स से निवेश की शैली और आकार तुरंत दिखता है।
usageTranslations.th: สไตล์บ็อกซ์ช่วยให้เห็นรูปแบบหุ้นและขนาดกองทุน
usageTranslations.id: Style box Morningstar memudahkan identifikasi gaya ekuitas dan kapitalisasi.

terms.definition: All costs directly or indirectly associated with buying or selling securities, including commissions, spreads, and market impact, as defined in GIPS and MiFID II.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Transaction costs must be disclosed in accordance with GIPS and MiFID II standards in client reporting.

termTranslations.th: ต้นทุนธุรกรรม

usageTranslations.en: Transaction costs must be disclosed in accordance with GIPS and MiFID II standards in client reporting.
usageTranslations.tr: İşlem maliyetleri, müşteri raporlarında GIPS ve MiFID II standartlarına göre açıklanmalıdır.
usageTranslations.fr: Les coûts de transaction doivent être divulgués selon les normes GIPS et MiFID II.
usageTranslations.de: Transaktionskosten sind gemäß GIPS und MiFID II offenzulegen.
usageTranslations.es: Los costes de transacción deben divulgarse conforme a GIPS y MiFID II.
usageTranslations.zh: 交易成本须依GIPS和MiFID II标准披露。
usageTranslations.ar: يجب الإفصاح عن تكاليف المعاملة حسب معايير GIPS وMiFID II.
usageTranslations.pt: Custos de transação devem ser divulgados conforme GIPS e MiFID II.
usageTranslations.ru: Транзакционные издержки раскрываются по стандартам GIPS и MiFID II.
usageTranslations.ja: 取引コストはGIPSとMiFID II基準で開示が必要。
usageTranslations.it: I costi di transazione vanno dichiarati secondo GIPS e MiFID II.
usageTranslations.vi: Chi phí giao dịch cần công bố theo tiêu chuẩn GIPS và MiFID II.
usageTranslations.hi: लेनदेन लागत GIPS और MiFID II मानकों के अनुसार बतानी होगी।
usageTranslations.th: ต้องเปิดเผยต้นทุนธุรกรรมตามมาตรฐาน GIPS และ MiFID II
usageTranslations.id: Biaya transaksi harus diungkapkan sesuai standar GIPS dan MiFID II.

terms.definition: The analytical process of determining the sources of a portfolio’s returns relative to a benchmark, decomposing performance into allocation, selection, and interaction effects.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Performance attribution helps managers and clients understand whether returns came from asset allocation, security selection, or other factors.

termTranslations.ja: パフォーマンスアトリビューション
termTranslations.vi: Phân tích đóng góp hiệu suất
termTranslations.th: การวิเคราะห์สาเหตุของผลตอบแทน

usageTranslations.en: Performance attribution helps managers and clients understand whether returns came from asset allocation, security selection, or other factors.
usageTranslations.tr: Getiri dağılımı analizi, getirinin varlık dağılımı, menkul seçim ya da diğer unsurlardan kaynaklanıp kaynaklanmadığını gösterir.
usageTranslations.fr: L’attribution de performance permet de comprendre l’origine des rendements : allocation, sélection ou autres facteurs.
usageTranslations.de: Performance-Attribution zeigt, ob Renditen aus Allokation, Titelauswahl oder anderen Faktoren stammen.
usageTranslations.es: La atribución de resultados ayuda a entender si las rentabilidades provienen de la asignación, selección de valores u otros factores.
usageTranslations.zh: 业绩归因分析帮助了解收益来源。
usageTranslations.ar: تحليل عوائد الأداء يوضح مصدر الأرباح: توزيع أو انتقاء الأصول.
usageTranslations.pt: Atribuição de performance esclarece se o retorno veio da alocação ou seleção.
usageTranslations.ru: Атрибуция доходности показывает, из чего сложилась прибыль — аллокация или выбор активов.
usageTranslations.ja: パフォーマンスアトリビューションでリターンの要因が分かる。
usageTranslations.it: L’attribuzione della performance mostra la fonte dei rendimenti.
usageTranslations.vi: Phân tích đóng góp hiệu suất giúp xác định nguồn gốc lợi nhuận.
usageTranslations.hi: परफॉर्मेंस एट्रिब्यूशन से पता चलता है रिटर्न का कारण क्या है।
usageTranslations.th: การวิเคราะห์สาเหตุของผลตอบแทนแสดงแหล่งที่มา
usageTranslations.id: Atribusi kinerja membantu memahami sumber imbal hasil.

terms.definition: A blended index consisting of two or more benchmarks, weighted to reflect a portfolio’s strategic asset allocation.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: A composite benchmark aligns with a portfolio’s multi-asset allocation and is required in GIPS-compliant reporting.

termTranslations.ja: コンポジットベンチマーク
termTranslations.th: ดัชนีผสม

usageTranslations.en: A composite benchmark aligns with a portfolio’s multi-asset allocation and is required in GIPS-compliant reporting.
usageTranslations.tr: Kompozit endeks, portföyün çoklu varlık dağılımını yansıtır ve GIPS uyumlu raporlarda gereklidir.
usageTranslations.fr: L’indice composite reflète l’allocation multi-actifs du portefeuille.
usageTranslations.de: Composite-Benchmarks spiegeln die Multi-Asset-Allokation wider und sind GIPS-pflichtig.
usageTranslations.es: El índice compuesto refleja la asignación multi-activo y es obligatorio en informes GIPS.
usageTranslations.zh: 复合基准反映多资产配置，GIPS报告中要求。
usageTranslations.ar: المؤشر المركب يعكس توزيع الأصول المتعدد وهو إلزامي بتقارير GIPS.
usageTranslations.pt: Benchmark composto reflete alocação multiativo, exigido em relatórios GIPS.
usageTranslations.ru: Составной бенчмарк соответствует мультиактивной структуре портфеля.
usageTranslations.ja: コンポジットベンチマークはマルチアセット配分を反映する。
usageTranslations.it: Il benchmark composito riflette la multi-asset allocation richiesta dai report GIPS.
usageTranslations.vi: Chỉ số tổng hợp phản ánh phân bổ đa tài sản, bắt buộc trong báo cáo GIPS.
usageTranslations.hi: कंपोज़िट बेंचमार्क मल्टी-एसेट एलोकेशन दिखाता है और GIPS रिपोर्टिंग में आवश्यक है।
usageTranslations.th: ดัชนีผสมสะท้อนสัดส่วนสินทรัพย์หลากหลายและจำเป็นต่อรายงาน GIPS
usageTranslations.id: Benchmark komposit mencerminkan alokasi multi-aset dan diwajibkan dalam laporan GIPS.

terms.definition: A mechanism that adjusts a fund’s net asset value (NAV) to allocate transaction costs to subscribing or redeeming investors, protecting long-term shareholders from dilution.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Swing pricing helps ensure that transaction costs are borne by investors trading in and out of the fund, not by existing holders.

termTranslations.ja: スイング・プライシング
termTranslations.th: การกำหนดราคาแบบสวิง

usageTranslations.en: Swing pricing helps ensure that transaction costs are borne by investors trading in and out of the fund, not by existing holders.
usageTranslations.tr: Swing pricing, işlem maliyetlerinin fonu alan ya da satan yatırımcılara yansıtılmasını sağlar; mevcut yatırımcıyı korur.
usageTranslations.fr: Le swing pricing permet de répartir les coûts de transaction sur les souscriptions/rachats.
usageTranslations.de: Swing Pricing sorgt dafür, dass Transaktionskosten auf Zu- und Abflüsse entfallen.
usageTranslations.es: El swing pricing asigna los costes de transacción a los que suscriben o reembolsan.
usageTranslations.zh: 摆动定价将交易成本分配给申购和赎回的投资者。
usageTranslations.ar: تسعير متأرجح يضمن أن يتحمل المتداولون تكاليف المعاملة.
usageTranslations.pt: Swing pricing atribui custos de transação a investidores de entrada/saída.
usageTranslations.ru: Swing Pricing перекладывает издержки на входящих и выходящих инвесторов.
usageTranslations.ja: スイング・プライシングは売買投資家にコストを負担させる。
usageTranslations.it: Lo swing pricing fa sì che i costi vadano a chi entra o esce dal fondo.
usageTranslations.vi: Định giá linh hoạt giúp chi phí giao dịch chỉ do nhà đầu tư giao dịch chịu.
usageTranslations.hi: स्विंग प्राइसिंग में लेनदेन लागत ट्रेडिंग निवेशकों पर आती है।
usageTranslations.th: การกำหนดราคาแบบสวิงโอนต้นทุนธุรกรรมให้กับนักลงทุนใหม่/ออก
usageTranslations.id: Swing pricing memastikan biaya transaksi ditanggung investor keluar/masuk.

terms.definition: A separate account or sub-fund used by investment funds, especially hedge funds, to isolate illiquid or hard-to-value assets from the main portfolio, ensuring fair allocation of profits and losses among investors.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: The fund created a side pocket to separate the illiquid distressed debt from the main investment pool to protect ongoing investors.

termTranslations.th: ไซด์พ็อกเก็ต

usageTranslations.en: The fund created a side pocket to separate the illiquid distressed debt from the main investment pool to protect ongoing investors.
usageTranslations.tr: Fon, likit olmayan sorunlu borcu ana yatırım havuzundan ayırmak için yan cep hesabı oluşturdu.
usageTranslations.fr: Le fonds a créé un compte latéral pour isoler la dette illiquide du portefeuille principal.
usageTranslations.de: Der Fonds richtete ein Side Pocket ein, um illiquide notleidende Schulden vom Hauptportfolio zu trennen.
usageTranslations.es: El fondo creó un side pocket para separar la deuda ilíquida del fondo principal.
usageTranslations.zh: 基金设立侧袋账户，将非流动性坏账与主投资池分开。
usageTranslations.ar: أنشأ الصندوق جيبًا جانبيًا لفصل الديون غير السائلة عن المحفظة الرئيسية.
usageTranslations.pt: O fundo criou um side pocket para separar a dívida ilíquida do fundo principal.
usageTranslations.ru: Фонд создал сайд-покет для изоляции неликвидной задолженности от основного портфеля.
usageTranslations.ja: ファンドはサイドポケットを設けて流動性の低い債務を主投資プールから分離した。
usageTranslations.it: Il fondo ha creato un side pocket per separare il debito illiquido dal portafoglio principale.
usageTranslations.vi: Quỹ đã tạo tài khoản phụ để tách nợ xấu kém thanh khoản khỏi danh mục chính.
usageTranslations.hi: फंड ने असंपर्कीय ऋण को मुख्य निवेश से अलग करने के लिए साइड पॉकेट बनाया।
usageTranslations.th: กองทุนได้สร้างไซด์พ็อกเก็ตเพื่อแยกหนี้ที่ขาดสภาพคล่องออกจากกองหลัก
usageTranslations.id: Dana membuat side pocket untuk memisahkan utang bermasalah yang tidak likuid dari portofolio utama.

terms.definition: The risk that the other party in a financial transaction may default on contractual obligations, causing financial loss. In portfolio management, it is a key risk factor in derivatives, securities lending, repo, and OTC contracts.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Portfolio managers must assess counterparty risk before entering into OTC derivatives to ensure compliance with internal risk limits and regulatory requirements.

termTranslations.ja: カウンターパーティーリスク
termTranslations.th: ความเสี่ยงจากคู่สัญญา

usageTranslations.en: Portfolio managers must assess counterparty risk before entering into OTC derivatives to ensure compliance with internal risk limits and regulatory requirements.
usageTranslations.tr: Portföy yöneticileri, dahili risk limitleri ve düzenleyici gerekliliklere uyum sağlamak için tezgah üstü türev işlemlere girmeden önce karşı taraf riskini değerlendirmelidir.
usageTranslations.fr: Les gestionnaires de portefeuille doivent évaluer le risque de contrepartie avant de conclure des dérivés de gré à gré afin d’assurer le respect des limites internes et des exigences réglementaires.
usageTranslations.de: Portfoliomanager müssen das Gegenparteirisiko vor dem Eingehen von OTC-Derivaten bewerten, um die Einhaltung interner Risikolimits und aufsichtsrechtlicher Anforderungen sicherzustellen.
usageTranslations.es: Los gestores de carteras deben evaluar el riesgo de contraparte antes de entrar en derivados OTC para cumplir con los límites internos de riesgo y las regulaciones.
usageTranslations.zh: 投资组合经理在进入场外衍生品交易前，必须评估交易对手风险，以确保符合内部风险限额和监管要求。
usageTranslations.ar: يجب على مديري المحافظ تقييم مخاطر الطرف المقابل قبل الدخول في المشتقات خارج البورصة لضمان الالتزام بالحدود الداخلية للمخاطر والمتطلبات التنظيمية.
usageTranslations.pt: Os gestores de portfólio devem avaliar o risco de contraparte antes de entrar em derivativos de balcão para garantir a conformidade com os limites internos de risco e os requisitos regulatórios.
usageTranslations.ru: Управляющие портфелями должны оценивать риск контрагента перед заключением внебиржевых деривативов для соблюдения внутренних лимитов риска и нормативных требований.
usageTranslations.ja: ポートフォリオマネージャーは、OTCデリバティブに参入する前にカウンターパーティーリスクを評価し、内部リスク制限と規制要件への準拠を確保する必要があります。
usageTranslations.it: I gestori di portafoglio devono valutare il rischio controparte prima di stipulare derivati OTC per garantire il rispetto dei limiti di rischio interni e dei requisiti normativi.
usageTranslations.vi: Các nhà quản lý danh mục phải đánh giá rủi ro đối tác trước khi tham gia vào các công cụ phái sinh OTC để đảm bảo tuân thủ các giới hạn rủi ro nội bộ và quy định pháp lý.
usageTranslations.hi: पोर्टफोलियो प्रबंधकों को आंतरिक जोखिम सीमाओं और नियामक आवश्यकताओं का अनुपालन सुनिश्चित करने के लिए OTC डेरिवेटिव में प्रवेश करने से पहले प्रतिपक्ष जोखिम का आकलन करना चाहिए।
usageTranslations.th: ผู้จัดการพอร์ตโฟลิโอต้องประเมินความเสี่ยงจากคู่สัญญาก่อนเข้าสู่อนุพันธ์ OTC เพื่อให้เป็นไปตามข้อจำกัดความเสี่ยงภายในและข้อกำหนดด้านกฎระเบียบ
usageTranslations.id: Manajer portofolio harus menilai risiko pihak lawan sebelum memasuki derivatif OTC untuk memastikan kepatuhan terhadap batas risiko internal dan persyaratan regulasi.

terms.definition: Digitally represented financial assets such as cryptocurrencies, tokenized securities, or other blockchain-based instruments, recognized as investable instruments by portfolio managers and regulated under financial law.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Institutional investors are increasing their allocation to digital assets, following regulatory clarification and the launch of listed crypto investment products.

termTranslations.th: สินทรัพย์ดิจิทัล

usageTranslations.en: Institutional investors are increasing their allocation to digital assets, following regulatory clarification and the launch of listed crypto investment products.
usageTranslations.tr: Kurumsal yatırımcılar, düzenleyici açıklık ve kripto yatırım ürünlerinin borsada listelenmesinin ardından dijital varlıklara olan tahsislerini artırıyor.
usageTranslations.fr: Les investisseurs institutionnels augmentent leur allocation aux actifs numériques à la suite de clarifications réglementaires et du lancement de produits d’investissement crypto cotés.
usageTranslations.de: Institutionelle Investoren erhöhen ihre Allokation in digitale Vermögenswerte nach regulatorischer Klarstellung und der Einführung börsennotierter Krypto-Investmentprodukte.
usageTranslations.es: Los inversores institucionales están aumentando su asignación a los activos digitales tras la clarificación regulatoria y el lanzamiento de productos de inversión en criptomonedas listados.
usageTranslations.zh: 机构投资者在监管明晰和加密投资产品上市后，正增加对数字资产的配置。
usageTranslations.ar: يزيد المستثمرون المؤسسيون من تخصيصهم للأصول الرقمية بعد توضيح اللوائح وإطلاق منتجات استثمار العملات المشفرة المدرجة.
usageTranslations.pt: Investidores institucionais estão aumentando a alocação em ativos digitais, após a clarificação regulatória e o lançamento de produtos de investimento cripto listados.
usageTranslations.ru: Институциональные инвесторы увеличивают долю цифровых активов после разъяснения регулирования и запуска биржевых криптопродуктов.
usageTranslations.ja: 規制の明確化と暗号投資商品の上場を受けて、機関投資家はデジタル資産への配分を増やしている。
usageTranslations.it: Gli investitori istituzionali stanno aumentando l’allocazione verso gli asset digitali, in seguito a chiarimenti normativi e al lancio di prodotti cripto quotati.
usageTranslations.vi: Các nhà đầu tư tổ chức đang tăng phân bổ vào tài sản số, sau khi có sự rõ ràng về quy định và ra mắt sản phẩm đầu tư crypto niêm yết.
usageTranslations.hi: संस्थागत निवेशक, नियामक स्पष्टता और सूचीबद्ध क्रिप्टो निवेश उत्पादों के लॉन्च के बाद, डिजिटल परिसंपत्तियों में आवंटन बढ़ा रहे हैं।
usageTranslations.th: นักลงทุนสถาบันเพิ่มการจัดสรรในสินทรัพย์ดิจิทัลหลังมีความชัดเจนด้านกฎระเบียบและการเปิดตัวผลิตภัณฑ์ลงทุนคริปโตที่จดทะเบียน
usageTranslations.id: Investor institusional meningkatkan alokasi ke aset digital setelah kejelasan regulasi dan peluncuran produk investasi kripto terdaftar.

terms.definition: An investment strategy that aims to replicate the performance of a benchmark index by holding all or a representative sample of its components, rather than attempting to outperform it through active management.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Passive investing has grown rapidly as investors seek low-cost exposure to broad market indices through ETFs and index funds.

termTranslations.th: การลงทุนแบบพาสซีฟ

usageTranslations.en: Passive investing has grown rapidly as investors seek low-cost exposure to broad market indices through ETFs and index funds.
usageTranslations.tr: Yatırımcılar, ETF’ler ve endeks fonlarıyla düşük maliyetli piyasa temsiline yöneldikçe pasif yatırım hızla büyüdü.
usageTranslations.fr: L’investissement passif s’est rapidement développé à mesure que les investisseurs recherchent une exposition à faible coût aux indices de marché via les ETF et les fonds indiciels.
usageTranslations.de: Passives Investieren ist rasant gewachsen, da Investoren nach kostengünstiger Marktabdeckung durch ETFs und Indexfonds suchen.
usageTranslations.es: La inversión pasiva ha crecido rápidamente a medida que los inversores buscan exposición de bajo coste a índices de mercado amplios mediante ETF y fondos índice.
usageTranslations.zh: 随着投资者通过ETF和指数基金寻求低成本的市场敞口，被动投资迅速增长。
usageTranslations.ar: نمت الاستثمارات السلبية بسرعة مع سعي المستثمرين للحصول على تعرض منخفض التكلفة للمؤشرات السوقية من خلال صناديق المؤشرات المتداولة والصناديق المؤشرة.
usageTranslations.pt: O investimento passivo cresceu rapidamente à medida que os investidores buscam exposição de baixo custo a índices de mercado amplos por meio de ETFs e fundos de índice.
usageTranslations.ru: Пассивное инвестирование быстро выросло, поскольку инвесторы ищут недорогой доступ к широким рыночным индексам через ETF и индексные фонды.
usageTranslations.ja: ETFやインデックスファンドを通じて低コストで幅広い市場インデックスに投資したい投資家が増えたことで、パッシブ運用は急速に成長しています。
usageTranslations.it: L’investimento passivo è cresciuto rapidamente poiché gli investitori cercano un’esposizione a basso costo agli indici di mercato attraverso ETF e fondi indicizzati.
usageTranslations.vi: Đầu tư thụ động phát triển nhanh chóng khi nhà đầu tư tìm kiếm sự tiếp cận chi phí thấp vào các chỉ số thị trường thông qua ETF và quỹ chỉ số.
usageTranslations.hi: ईटीएफ और इंडेक्स फंड के माध्यम से व्यापक बाजार सूचकांकों के लिए कम लागत वाली एक्सपोज़र की तलाश में निवेशकों के कारण निष्क्रिय निवेश तेजी से बढ़ा है।
usageTranslations.th: การลงทุนแบบพาสซีฟเติบโตอย่างรวดเร็วเมื่อผู้ลงทุนมองหาการเข้าถึงดัชนีตลาดต้นทุนต่ำผ่าน ETF และกองทุนดัชนี
usageTranslations.id: Investasi pasif tumbuh pesat karena investor mencari eksposur berbiaya rendah ke indeks pasar melalui ETF dan reksa dana indeks.

terms.definition: An options strategy in which an investor holds a long position in an underlying asset and sells call options on the same asset to generate additional income.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Portfolio managers use covered call strategies to enhance portfolio yield in stable or moderately bullish equity markets.

termTranslations.vi: Quyền chọn mua có bảo đảm
termTranslations.th: คัฟเวอร์คอล

usageTranslations.en: Portfolio managers use covered call strategies to enhance portfolio yield in stable or moderately bullish equity markets.
usageTranslations.tr: Portföy yöneticileri, istikrarlı veya hafif yükseliş eğilimli hisse senedi piyasalarında portföy getirisini artırmak için örtülü alım opsiyonu stratejileri uygular.
usageTranslations.fr: Les gérants de portefeuille utilisent des stratégies de call couvert pour augmenter le rendement du portefeuille dans des marchés actions stables ou modérément haussiers.
usageTranslations.de: Portfoliomanager setzen Covered-Call-Strategien ein, um die Rendite des Portfolios in stabilen oder moderat steigenden Aktienmärkten zu steigern.
usageTranslations.es: Los gestores de carteras utilizan estrategias de venta de call cubierta para mejorar la rentabilidad en mercados de renta variable estables o moderadamente alcistas.
usageTranslations.zh: 投资组合经理在稳定或温和牛市的股票市场中采用备兑看涨期权策略，以提升投资组合收益率。
usageTranslations.ar: يستخدم مديرو المحافظ استراتيجيات بيع خيار الشراء المغطى لتعزيز عائدات المحفظة في الأسواق المستقرة أو الصاعدة بشكل معتدل.
usageTranslations.pt: Gestores de portfólio utilizam estratégias de venda coberta de call para aumentar o rendimento em mercados de ações estáveis ou moderadamente altistas.
usageTranslations.ru: Управляющие портфелями используют стратегии покрытых коллов для увеличения доходности портфеля в стабильных или умеренно бычьих рынках акций.
usageTranslations.ja: ポートフォリオマネージャーは、安定またはやや強気な株式市場でポートフォリオ利回りを高めるためにカバード・コール戦略を用います。
usageTranslations.it: I gestori di portafoglio utilizzano strategie covered call per aumentare il rendimento del portafoglio in mercati azionari stabili o moderatamente rialzisti.
usageTranslations.vi: Nhà quản lý danh mục sử dụng chiến lược covered call để nâng cao lợi suất danh mục trong thị trường cổ phiếu ổn định hoặc tăng nhẹ.
usageTranslations.hi: पोर्टफोलियो प्रबंधक स्थिर या मध्यम रूप से बुलिश इक्विटी बाजारों में पोर्टफोलियो यील्ड बढ़ाने के लिए कवर्ड कॉल रणनीति का उपयोग करते हैं।
usageTranslations.th: ผู้จัดการพอร์ตโฟลิโอใช้กลยุทธ์คัฟเวอร์คอลเพื่อเพิ่มผลตอบแทนพอร์ตในตลาดหุ้นที่นิ่งหรือขาขึ้นแบบพอประมาณ
usageTranslations.id: Manajer portofolio menggunakan strategi covered call untuk meningkatkan hasil portofolio di pasar saham yang stabil atau sedikit bullish.

terms.definition: The proportion of a position that is hedged via derivative instruments, calculated as the value of the hedging instrument divided by the value of the underlying exposure. Used to minimize portfolio risk.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Portfolio managers calculate the hedge ratio to determine the number of futures contracts needed to protect against adverse price movements.

termTranslations.vi: Tỷ lệ phòng ngừa rủi ro
termTranslations.th: อัตราส่วนเฮดจ์

usageTranslations.en: Portfolio managers calculate the hedge ratio to determine the number of futures contracts needed to protect against adverse price movements.
usageTranslations.tr: Portföy yöneticileri, olumsuz fiyat hareketlerine karşı korunmak için gerekli vadeli işlem sözleşmesi sayısını belirlemek amacıyla koruma oranını hesaplar.
usageTranslations.fr: Les gérants de portefeuille calculent le ratio de couverture pour déterminer le nombre de contrats à terme nécessaires pour se protéger contre des mouvements de prix défavorables.
usageTranslations.de: Portfoliomanager berechnen das Hedge Ratio, um die Anzahl der benötigten Futures-Kontrakte zum Schutz vor ungünstigen Kursbewegungen zu bestimmen.
usageTranslations.es: Los gestores de carteras calculan el ratio de cobertura para determinar el número de futuros necesarios para protegerse de movimientos adversos de precios.
usageTranslations.zh: 投资组合经理通过计算对冲比率，确定需要多少份期货合约以防止不利价格波动。
usageTranslations.ar: يقوم مديرو المحافظ بحساب نسبة التحوط لتحديد عدد عقود العقود الآجلة المطلوبة للحماية من تحركات الأسعار السلبية.
usageTranslations.pt: Gestores de portfólio calculam o rácio de cobertura para determinar o número de contratos futuros necessários para se proteger contra movimentos adversos de preços.
usageTranslations.ru: Управляющие портфелями рассчитывают коэффициент хеджирования, чтобы определить количество фьючерсных контрактов для защиты от неблагоприятных ценовых движений.
usageTranslations.ja: ポートフォリオマネージャーは、ヘッジ比率を計算して、不利な価格変動から守るために必要な先物契約数を決定します。
usageTranslations.it: I gestori di portafoglio calcolano il rapporto di copertura per determinare il numero di contratti futures necessari a proteggersi da movimenti di prezzo sfavorevoli.
usageTranslations.vi: Nhà quản lý danh mục tính tỷ lệ phòng ngừa rủi ro để xác định số hợp đồng tương lai cần thiết nhằm bảo vệ khỏi biến động giá bất lợi.
usageTranslations.hi: पोर्टफोलियो प्रबंधक प्रतिकूल मूल्य आंदोलनों से बचाव के लिए आवश्यक फ्यूचर्स अनुबंधों की संख्या निर्धारित करने के लिए हेज अनुपात की गणना करते हैं।
usageTranslations.th: ผู้จัดการพอร์ตโฟลิโอคำนวณอัตราส่วนเฮดจ์เพื่อกำหนดจำนวนสัญญาฟิวเจอร์สที่ต้องใช้ในการป้องกันความเคลื่อนไหวของราคาที่ไม่พึงประสงค์
usageTranslations.id: Manajer portofolio menghitung rasio lindung nilai untuk menentukan jumlah kontrak berjangka yang dibutuhkan guna melindungi dari pergerakan harga yang merugikan.

terms.definition: A specialist service within investment management focused on minimizing cost and risk during the restructuring, liquidation, or transfer of large investment portfolios, often due to changes in mandates or asset managers.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Transition management ensures that portfolio restructurings, manager changes, and large asset movements are executed with minimal tracking error and transaction costs.

termTranslations.ja: トランジション・マネジメント
termTranslations.th: การบริหารการเปลี่ยนผ่าน

usageTranslations.en: Transition management ensures that portfolio restructurings, manager changes, and large asset movements are executed with minimal tracking error and transaction costs.
usageTranslations.tr: Geçiş yönetimi, portföy yeniden yapılandırmalarının, yönetici değişikliklerinin ve büyük varlık hareketlerinin minimum takip hatası ve işlem maliyetiyle gerçekleştirilmesini sağlar.
usageTranslations.fr: La gestion de transition garantit que les restructurations de portefeuille, les changements de gestionnaire et les grands transferts d’actifs sont réalisés avec un minimum d’erreur de suivi et de frais de transaction.
usageTranslations.de: Transition Management stellt sicher, dass Portfolio-Restrukturierungen, Managerwechsel und große Vermögensverschiebungen mit minimalem Tracking Error und geringen Transaktionskosten durchgeführt werden.
usageTranslations.es: La gestión de transición garantiza que las reestructuraciones de carteras, los cambios de gestor y los grandes movimientos de activos se ejecuten con mínimo error de seguimiento y costos de transacción.
usageTranslations.zh: 过渡管理确保投资组合重组、管理人更换和大额资产转移时，跟踪误差和交易成本降至最低。
usageTranslations.ar: تضمن إدارة الانتقال تنفيذ إعادة هيكلة المحافظ وتغييرات المديرين وحركات الأصول الكبيرة بأقل قدر من أخطاء التتبع وتكاليف المعاملات.
usageTranslations.pt: A gestão de transição garante que as reestruturações de portfólios, trocas de gestores e grandes movimentações de ativos sejam realizadas com erro de acompanhamento e custos de transação mínimos.
usageTranslations.ru: Управление переходным периодом обеспечивает проведение реструктуризации портфеля, смену управляющих и крупных перемещений активов с минимальной ошибкой отслеживания и транзакционными издержками.
usageTranslations.ja: トランジション・マネジメントは、ポートフォリオ再構築、運用者交代、大口資産の移動が最小限のトラッキングエラーと取引コストで実行されることを保証します。
usageTranslations.it: La gestione della transizione garantisce che le ristrutturazioni di portafoglio, i cambi di gestore e i grandi movimenti di asset siano eseguiti con errore di tracking e costi di transazione minimi.
usageTranslations.vi: Quản lý chuyển đổi đảm bảo việc tái cấu trúc danh mục, thay đổi quản lý và di chuyển tài sản lớn được thực hiện với sai số bám sát và chi phí giao dịch tối thiểu.
usageTranslations.hi: संक्रमण प्रबंधन यह सुनिश्चित करता है कि पोर्टफोलियो पुनर्गठन, प्रबंधक परिवर्तन और बड़े परिसंपत्ति स्थानांतरण न्यूनतम ट्रैकिंग त्रुटि और लेनदेन लागत के साथ किए जाएं।
usageTranslations.th: การบริหารการเปลี่ยนผ่านทำให้การปรับโครงสร้างพอร์ต การเปลี่ยนผู้จัดการ และการเคลื่อนย้ายสินทรัพย์จำนวนมากดำเนินการด้วยข้อผิดพลาดในการติดตามและต้นทุนการทำธุรกรรมต่ำสุด
usageTranslations.id: Manajemen transisi memastikan restrukturisasi portofolio, pergantian manajer, dan pergerakan aset besar dilakukan dengan kesalahan pelacakan dan biaya transaksi yang minimal.

terms.definition: The process by which a portfolio manager chooses individual securities within a given asset class to achieve the fund’s investment objectives, based on research, valuation, and expected performance.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Effective security selection can significantly improve portfolio returns relative to a benchmark index.

termTranslations.th: การเลือกหลักทรัพย์

usageTranslations.en: Effective security selection can significantly improve portfolio returns relative to a benchmark index.
usageTranslations.tr: Etkili menkul seçimi, portföy getirilerini endekse kıyasla önemli ölçüde artırabilir.
usageTranslations.fr: Une sélection de titres efficace peut nettement améliorer les rendements du portefeuille par rapport à un indice de référence.
usageTranslations.de: Eine effektive Titelauswahl kann die Portfoliorendite gegenüber dem Vergleichsindex deutlich steigern.
usageTranslations.es: Una selección efectiva de valores puede mejorar significativamente los retornos de la cartera frente al índice de referencia.
usageTranslations.zh: 有效的证券选择可以显著提升投资组合相对于基准的收益。
usageTranslations.ar: يمكن أن يؤدي اختيار الأوراق المالية الفعال إلى تحسين عوائد المحفظة مقارنة بالمؤشر المرجعي.
usageTranslations.pt: Uma seleção eficaz de ativos pode melhorar significativamente os retornos do portfólio em relação ao índice de referência.
usageTranslations.ru: Эффективный отбор ценных бумаг может существенно повысить доходность портфеля по сравнению с эталонным индексом.
usageTranslations.ja: 効果的な銘柄選択はベンチマーク指標に対してポートフォリオのリターンを大きく向上させる可能性がある。
usageTranslations.it: Una selezione efficace dei titoli può migliorare significativamente i rendimenti del portafoglio rispetto a un indice di riferimento.
usageTranslations.vi: Việc lựa chọn chứng khoán hiệu quả có thể cải thiện đáng kể lợi nhuận danh mục đầu tư so với chỉ số tham chiếu.
usageTranslations.hi: प्रभावी सिक्योरिटी चयन, पोर्टफोलियो रिटर्न को बेंचमार्क इंडेक्स की तुलना में महत्वपूर्ण रूप से बेहतर बना सकता है।
usageTranslations.th: การเลือกหลักทรัพย์ที่มีประสิทธิภาพสามารถเพิ่มผลตอบแทนของพอร์ตโฟลิโอเมื่อเทียบกับดัชนีมาตรฐานได้อย่างมีนัยสำคัญ
usageTranslations.id: Seleksi sekuritas yang efektif dapat meningkatkan hasil portofolio secara signifikan dibandingkan indeks acuan.

terms.definition: The complete set of securities or assets from which a portfolio manager can select when constructing an investment portfolio, typically defined by mandate, strategy, or benchmark.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: The fund’s investment universe is limited to developed-market equities and investment-grade bonds.

termTranslations.th: จักรวาลการลงทุน

usageTranslations.en: The fund’s investment universe is limited to developed-market equities and investment-grade bonds.
usageTranslations.tr: Fonun yatırım evreni, gelişmiş piyasa hisse senetleri ve yatırım yapılabilir tahvillerle sınırlıdır.
usageTranslations.fr: L’univers d’investissement du fonds se limite aux actions des marchés développés et aux obligations de qualité investissement.
usageTranslations.de: Das Investmentuniversum des Fonds beschränkt sich auf Aktien entwickelter Märkte und Anleihen mit Investment-Grade.
usageTranslations.es: El universo de inversión del fondo se limita a acciones de mercados desarrollados y bonos de grado de inversión.
usageTranslations.zh: 该基金的投资范围仅限于发达市场股票和投资级债券。
usageTranslations.ar: كون الاستثمار للصندوق يقتصر على الأسهم في الأسواق المتقدمة والسندات ذات الدرجة الاستثمارية.
usageTranslations.pt: O universo de investimento do fundo é limitado a ações de mercados desenvolvidos e títulos de grau de investimento.
usageTranslations.ru: Инвестиционная вселенная фонда ограничена акциями развитых рынков и облигациями инвестиционного класса.
usageTranslations.ja: ファンドの投資ユニバースは先進国株式および投資適格債券に限定されている。
usageTranslations.it: L’universo di investimento del fondo è limitato ad azioni di mercati sviluppati e obbligazioni investment grade.
usageTranslations.vi: Vũ trụ đầu tư của quỹ chỉ giới hạn ở cổ phiếu thị trường phát triển và trái phiếu hạng đầu tư.
usageTranslations.hi: फंड का निवेश ब्रह्मांड केवल विकसित बाजारों के इक्विटी और इन्वेस्टमेंट ग्रेड बॉन्ड्स तक सीमित है।
usageTranslations.th: จักรวาลการลงทุนของกองทุนจำกัดเฉพาะหุ้นในตลาดพัฒนาแล้วและตราสารหนี้เกรดลงทุน
usageTranslations.id: Semesta investasi dana dibatasi pada saham pasar maju dan obligasi dengan peringkat investasi.

terms.definition: The risk-reduction effect achieved by holding a mix of assets with imperfect correlations, lowering portfolio volatility relative to holding a single asset class.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: The diversification benefit becomes most apparent during periods of market stress when asset correlations tend to increase.

termTranslations.th: ประโยชน์ของการกระจายความเสี่ยง

usageTranslations.en: The diversification benefit becomes most apparent during periods of market stress when asset correlations tend to increase.
usageTranslations.tr: Çeşitlendirme faydası, varlık korelasyonlarının arttığı piyasa stres dönemlerinde en belirgin hale gelir.
usageTranslations.fr: Le bénéfice de diversification est particulièrement visible en période de tension sur les marchés, lorsque les corrélations augmentent.
usageTranslations.de: Der Diversifikationsvorteil wird in Zeiten von Marktturbulenzen besonders deutlich, wenn die Korrelationen zunehmen.
usageTranslations.es: El beneficio de la diversificación es más evidente en períodos de estrés del mercado, cuando las correlaciones aumentan.
usageTranslations.zh: 分散化效益在市场压力期间最为明显，此时资产相关性上升。
usageTranslations.ar: تظهر فائدة التنويع بشكل أوضح خلال فترات ضغوط السوق عندما تميل الارتباطات إلى الارتفاع.
usageTranslations.pt: O benefício da diversificação torna-se mais evidente em períodos de estresse de mercado, quando as correlações aumentam.
usageTranslations.ru: Преимущество диверсификации наиболее проявляется в периоды рыночного стресса, когда корреляции активов возрастают.
usageTranslations.ja: 分散効果は、市場ストレス時に資産の相関が高まるときに最も顕著になる。
usageTranslations.it: Il beneficio della diversificazione è più evidente nei periodi di stress di mercato, quando le correlazioni tra asset aumentano.
usageTranslations.vi: Lợi ích đa dạng hóa trở nên rõ rệt nhất trong giai đoạn thị trường căng thẳng khi các tài sản có xu hướng tương quan cao hơn.
usageTranslations.hi: विविधीकरण लाभ, बाज़ार तनाव के दौरान जब संपत्तियों की सह-संबंधता बढ़ जाती है, तब सबसे स्पष्ट रूप से दिखाई देता है।
usageTranslations.th: ประโยชน์ของการกระจายความเสี่ยงจะเห็นได้ชัดในช่วงตลาดผันผวนเมื่อความสัมพันธ์ระหว่างสินทรัพย์เพิ่มขึ้น
usageTranslations.id: Manfaat diversifikasi paling jelas terlihat saat pasar mengalami tekanan dan korelasi aset meningkat.

terms.definition: A measure of a bond portfolio’s sensitivity to changes in credit spreads; it quantifies the impact of spread changes on the value of the portfolio, holding interest rates constant.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: An increase in spread duration exposes the portfolio to greater credit spread risk, especially in volatile credit markets.

termTranslations.ja: スプレッドデュレーション
termTranslations.th: ระยะเวลาสเปรด

usageTranslations.en: An increase in spread duration exposes the portfolio to greater credit spread risk, especially in volatile credit markets.
usageTranslations.tr: Spread duyarlılığındaki artış, portföyü özellikle dalgalı kredi piyasalarında daha fazla kredi spread riskine maruz bırakır.
usageTranslations.fr: Une augmentation de la duration de spread expose le portefeuille à un risque de spread de crédit accru, surtout en période de volatilité.
usageTranslations.de: Eine Erhöhung der Spread Duration setzt das Portfolio einem größeren Kreditspread-Risiko aus, insbesondere bei volatilen Kreditmärkten.
usageTranslations.es: Un aumento en la duración de spread expone la cartera a un mayor riesgo de spread de crédito, especialmente en mercados volátiles.
usageTranslations.zh: 利差久期的增加使投资组合暴露于更大的信用利差风险，尤其是在波动的信贷市场中。
usageTranslations.ar: زيادة مدة الفارق تعرض المحفظة لمخاطر أكبر في فروق الائتمان، خاصة في الأسواق المتقلبة.
usageTranslations.pt: O aumento da duração do spread expõe o portfólio a maior risco de spread de crédito, especialmente em mercados voláteis.
usageTranslations.ru: Увеличение спред-дюрации увеличивает подверженность портфеля кредитному риску спреда, особенно на волатильных рынках.
usageTranslations.ja: スプレッドデュレーションが高まると、特に信用市場が不安定な時にポートフォリオはより大きなクレジットスプレッドリスクにさらされます。
usageTranslations.it: Un aumento della duration dello spread espone il portafoglio a un rischio di spread di credito maggiore, soprattutto in mercati volatili.
usageTranslations.vi: Tăng kỳ hạn chênh lệch khiến danh mục đầu tư phải đối mặt với rủi ro chênh lệch tín dụng lớn hơn, đặc biệt là trên thị trường tín dụng biến động.
usageTranslations.hi: स्प्रेड अवधि में वृद्धि, पोर्टफोलियो को अधिक क्रेडिट स्प्रेड जोखिम के लिए उजागर करती है, खासकर अस्थिर बाजारों में।
usageTranslations.th: การเพิ่มระยะเวลาสเปรดทำให้พอร์ตโฟลิโอเผชิญกับความเสี่ยงสเปรดเครดิตมากขึ้น โดยเฉพาะในตลาดที่ผันผวน
usageTranslations.id: Peningkatan spread duration meningkatkan risiko spread kredit portofolio, terutama di pasar kredit yang volatil.

terms.definition: A statistical distortion that arises when only surviving entities are included in performance analysis, causing overestimation of average returns or underestimation of risk in portfolios.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Ignoring defunct funds in a performance study introduces survivorship bias and may mislead investors about historical returns.

termTranslations.ja: サバイバーシップ・バイアス
termTranslations.th: อคติของผู้รอดชีวิต

usageTranslations.en: Ignoring defunct funds in a performance study introduces survivorship bias and may mislead investors about historical returns.
usageTranslations.tr: Performans analizinde kapanan fonları dikkate almamak hayatta kalma yanlılığına yol açar ve yatırımcıları yanıltabilir.
usageTranslations.fr: Ignorer les fonds fermés dans une étude de performance introduit un biais de survivance et peut induire les investisseurs en erreur.
usageTranslations.de: Das Ignorieren aufgelöster Fonds in einer Performance-Analyse führt zum Survivorship Bias und kann Anleger in Bezug auf historische Renditen in die Irre führen.
usageTranslations.es: Ignorar los fondos desaparecidos en un estudio de desempeño introduce un sesgo de supervivencia y puede engañar a los inversores sobre los rendimientos históricos.
usageTranslations.zh: 在业绩研究中忽略已关闭基金会引入存活偏差，并可能误导投资者对历史回报的判断。
usageTranslations.ar: تجاهل الصناديق المنحلة في دراسة الأداء يؤدي إلى تحيز البقاء وقد يضلل المستثمرين بشأن العوائد التاريخية.
usageTranslations.pt: Ignorar fundos extintos em um estudo de desempenho introduz viés de sobrevivência e pode enganar investidores sobre os retornos históricos.
usageTranslations.ru: Игнорирование прекративших существование фондов в исследовании эффективности приводит к смещению выживших и может ввести инвесторов в заблуждение относительно исторической доходности.
usageTranslations.ja: パフォーマンス分析で消滅ファンドを無視するとサバイバーシップ・バイアスが生じ、過去のリターンについて投資家を誤解させる可能性がある。
usageTranslations.it: Ignorare i fondi estinti in un’analisi delle performance introduce il bias di sopravvivenza e può indurre in errore gli investitori sui rendimenti storici.
usageTranslations.vi: Bỏ qua các quỹ đã ngừng hoạt động trong nghiên cứu hiệu suất sẽ tạo ra thiên lệch tồn tại và có thể gây hiểu nhầm về lợi nhuận lịch sử.
usageTranslations.hi: परफ़ॉर्मेंस स्टडी में बंद फंडों को नज़रअंदाज करना सर्वाइवरशिप बायस लाता है और निवेशकों को ऐतिहासिक रिटर्न के बारे में गुमराह कर सकता है।
usageTranslations.th: การละเลยกองทุนที่ยุติการดำเนินงานในการศึกษาผลตอบแทนจะก่อให้เกิดอคติของผู้รอดชีวิตและทำให้นักลงทุนเข้าใจผิดเกี่ยวกับผลตอบแทนในอดีต
usageTranslations.id: Mengabaikan dana yang sudah tidak aktif dalam studi kinerja menyebabkan bias kelangsungan hidup dan dapat menyesatkan investor mengenai imbal hasil historis.

terms.definition: A bias that occurs when historical data are added to a database after favorable performance has already been observed, overstating long-term performance of investment funds or strategies.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Hedge fund indices are especially prone to backfill bias, making performance comparisons with mutual funds problematic.

termTranslations.ja: バックフィル・バイアス
termTranslations.vi: Thiên lệch dữ liệu quá khứ
termTranslations.th: อคติข้อมูลย้อนหลัง

usageTranslations.en: Hedge fund indices are especially prone to backfill bias, making performance comparisons with mutual funds problematic.
usageTranslations.tr: Hedge fon endeksleri, geriye dönük veri yanlılığına özellikle duyarlıdır ve bu durum, karşılaştırmalı performans analizlerini sorunlu hale getirir.
usageTranslations.fr: Les indices de hedge funds sont particulièrement sensibles au biais de backfill, compliquant la comparaison des performances avec les fonds communs de placement.
usageTranslations.de: Hedgefonds-Indizes sind besonders anfällig für Backfill Bias, was Leistungsvergleiche mit Publikumsfonds erschwert.
usageTranslations.es: Los índices de hedge funds son especialmente propensos al sesgo de backfill, dificultando las comparaciones de desempeño con fondos mutuos.
usageTranslations.zh: 对冲基金指数特别容易出现回补偏差，这使得与共同基金的业绩比较变得复杂。
usageTranslations.ar: مؤشرات صناديق التحوط معرضة بشكل خاص لتحيز الملء الرجعي، مما يجعل المقارنات مع الصناديق المشتركة صعبة.
usageTranslations.pt: Índices de hedge funds são especialmente suscetíveis ao viés de backfill, dificultando as comparações com fundos mútuos.
usageTranslations.ru: Индексы хедж-фондов особенно подвержены смещению подстановки, что затрудняет сравнение их доходности с паевыми фондами.
usageTranslations.ja: ヘッジファンド指数はバックフィル・バイアスの影響を受けやすく、ミューチュアルファンドとのパフォーマンス比較が困難になる。
usageTranslations.it: Gli indici degli hedge fund sono particolarmente soggetti al bias di backfill, rendendo problematiche le comparazioni con i fondi comuni.
usageTranslations.vi: Chỉ số quỹ phòng hộ đặc biệt dễ bị thiên lệch dữ liệu quá khứ, làm cho so sánh hiệu suất với quỹ tương hỗ trở nên khó khăn.
usageTranslations.hi: हेज फंड सूचकांक विशेष रूप से बैकफिल बायस के लिए संवेदनशील होते हैं, जिससे म्युचुअल फंड के साथ तुलना करना मुश्किल हो जाता है।
usageTranslations.th: ดัชนีกองทุนเฮดจ์ฟันด์มีแนวโน้มที่จะเกิดอคติข้อมูลย้อนหลัง ทำให้การเปรียบเทียบผลตอบแทนกับกองทุนรวมเกิดปัญหา
usageTranslations.id: Indeks hedge fund sangat rentan terhadap bias backfill, menyulitkan perbandingan kinerja dengan reksa dana.

terms.definition: The process of selecting, valuing, and monitoring collateral to mitigate counterparty credit risk in investment transactions, especially in derivatives, securities lending, and repo markets.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Effective collateral management is crucial for reducing counterparty risk in derivatives and repo transactions.

termTranslations.vi: Quản lý tài sản thế chấp
termTranslations.th: การจัดการหลักประกัน

usageTranslations.en: Effective collateral management is crucial for reducing counterparty risk in derivatives and repo transactions.
usageTranslations.tr: Türev ve repo işlemlerinde karşı taraf riskini azaltmak için etkin teminat yönetimi hayati öneme sahiptir.
usageTranslations.fr: Une gestion efficace des garanties est cruciale pour réduire le risque de contrepartie dans les transactions sur dérivés et pensions.
usageTranslations.de: Effizientes Collateral Management ist entscheidend zur Reduzierung des Kontrahentenrisikos bei Derivaten und Repo-Geschäften.
usageTranslations.es: Una gestión eficaz de colaterales es crucial para reducir el riesgo de contraparte en transacciones de derivados y repos.
usageTranslations.zh: 有效的担保品管理对于降低衍生品和回购交易中的对手方风险至关重要。
usageTranslations.ar: إدارة الضمانات الفعالة أمر بالغ الأهمية لتقليل مخاطر الطرف المقابل في معاملات المشتقات والريبو.
usageTranslations.pt: Uma gestão eficaz de colaterais é fundamental para reduzir o risco de contraparte em operações de derivativos e repo.
usageTranslations.ru: Эффективное управление залогом важно для снижения контрагентского риска при операциях с деривативами и репо.
usageTranslations.ja: 担保管理の徹底は、デリバティブやレポ取引におけるカウンターパーティリスクの低減に不可欠です。
usageTranslations.it: Una gestione efficace delle garanzie è fondamentale per ridurre il rischio di controparte nelle transazioni su derivati e repo.
usageTranslations.vi: Quản lý tài sản thế chấp hiệu quả rất quan trọng để giảm rủi ro đối tác trong các giao dịch phái sinh và repo.
usageTranslations.hi: डेरिवेटिव और रेपो लेन-देन में काउंटरपार्टी रिस्क को कम करने के लिए प्रभावी गिरवी प्रबंधन अत्यंत महत्वपूर्ण है।
usageTranslations.th: การจัดการหลักประกันที่มีประสิทธิภาพเป็นสิ่งสำคัญในการลดความเสี่ยงจากคู่สัญญาในการทำธุรกรรมอนุพันธ์และรีโป
usageTranslations.id: Manajemen kolateral yang efektif sangat penting untuk mengurangi risiko lawan transaksi pada derivatif dan repo.

terms.definition: The exercise of shareholder voting rights on corporate matters through an authorized representative, commonly used by investment funds to vote at company meetings.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Institutional investors use proxy voting to influence corporate governance without attending annual general meetings in person.

termTranslations.th: การลงคะแนนเสียงโดยมอบฉันทะ

usageTranslations.en: Institutional investors use proxy voting to influence corporate governance without attending annual general meetings in person.
usageTranslations.tr: Kurumsal yatırımcılar, genel kurula fiziksel olarak katılmadan şirket yönetimini etkilemek için vekâleten oy kullanır.
usageTranslations.fr: Les investisseurs institutionnels utilisent le vote par procuration pour influencer la gouvernance d’entreprise sans être présents aux assemblées.
usageTranslations.de: Institutionelle Investoren nutzen die Stimmrechtsvertretung, um die Unternehmensführung zu beeinflussen, ohne persönlich an der Hauptversammlung teilzunehmen.
usageTranslations.es: Los inversores institucionales usan la votación por poder para influir en el gobierno corporativo sin asistir en persona a las juntas generales.
usageTranslations.zh: 机构投资者通过代理投票参与公司治理，无需亲自出席股东大会。
usageTranslations.ar: يستخدم المستثمرون المؤسسيون التصويت بالوكالة للتأثير على حوكمة الشركات دون حضور الاجتماعات السنوية شخصيًا.
usageTranslations.pt: Investidores institucionais utilizam o voto por procuração para influenciar a governança corporativa sem comparecer às assembleias.
usageTranslations.ru: Институциональные инвесторы используют голосование по доверенности для влияния на корпоративное управление без личного присутствия на собрании.
usageTranslations.ja: 機関投資家は代理投票を活用し、株主総会に出席せずにコーポレートガバナンスに影響を与える。
usageTranslations.it: Gli investitori istituzionali utilizzano il voto per delega per influenzare la governance aziendale senza partecipare di persona alle assemblee generali.
usageTranslations.vi: Nhà đầu tư tổ chức sử dụng bỏ phiếu ủy quyền để ảnh hưởng đến quản trị doanh nghiệp mà không cần dự họp thường niên.
usageTranslations.hi: संस्थागत निवेशक, वार्षिक आम बैठकों में उपस्थित हुए बिना प्रॉक्सी वोटिंग का उपयोग करते हैं।
usageTranslations.th: นักลงทุนสถาบันใช้การลงคะแนนเสียงโดยมอบฉันทะเพื่อมีอิทธิพลต่อการกำกับดูแลกิจการโดยไม่ต้องเข้าร่วมประชุมใหญ่ด้วยตนเอง
usageTranslations.id: Investor institusi menggunakan voting proxy untuk mempengaruhi tata kelola perusahaan tanpa hadir langsung di rapat umum tahunan.

terms.definition: The negative effect of taxes on portfolio returns, reducing the investor’s after-tax performance due to realized gains, dividends, or interest.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Tax drag can erode long-term returns, especially in jurisdictions with high capital gains or dividend taxes.

termTranslations.th: ผลกระทบจากภาษี

usageTranslations.en: Tax drag can erode long-term returns, especially in jurisdictions with high capital gains or dividend taxes.
usageTranslations.tr: Vergi baskısı, özellikle sermaye kazancı veya temettü vergisinin yüksek olduğu ülkelerde uzun vadeli getirileri azaltabilir.
usageTranslations.fr: Le frottement fiscal peut réduire les rendements à long terme, en particulier dans les juridictions où les impôts sur les plus-values ou les dividendes sont élevés.
usageTranslations.de: Die Steuerlast kann die langfristige Rendite schmälern, insbesondere in Ländern mit hohen Kapitalertrag- oder Dividendensteuern.
usageTranslations.es: El impacto fiscal puede reducir los rendimientos a largo plazo, especialmente en países con impuestos elevados a las ganancias de capital o dividendos.
usageTranslations.zh: 税收拖累会削弱长期收益，尤其是在资本利得或红利税高的司法管辖区。
usageTranslations.ar: يمكن أن يؤدي العبء الضريبي إلى تآكل العوائد طويلة الأجل، خاصة في البلدان ذات الضرائب المرتفعة على الأرباح الرأسمالية أو الأرباح الموزعة.
usageTranslations.pt: O arrasto fiscal pode corroer os retornos de longo prazo, especialmente em jurisdições com altos impostos sobre ganhos de capital ou dividendos.
usageTranslations.ru: Налоговая нагрузка может снизить долгосрочную доходность, особенно в странах с высокими налогами на прирост капитала или дивиденды.
usageTranslations.ja: 税負担は長期的なリターンを減少させる可能性があり、特にキャピタルゲインや配当に高い税金が課される国で顕著です。
usageTranslations.it: Il freno fiscale può erodere i rendimenti a lungo termine, specialmente in paesi con elevate imposte su capital gain o dividendi.
usageTranslations.vi: Ảnh hưởng thuế có thể làm giảm lợi nhuận dài hạn, đặc biệt ở các quốc gia có thuế lãi vốn hoặc cổ tức cao.
usageTranslations.hi: कर बोझ दीर्घकालिक रिटर्न को कम कर सकता है, खासकर उन देशों में जहाँ पूंजीगत लाभ या लाभांश पर उच्च कर है।
usageTranslations.th: ผลกระทบจากภาษีอาจทำให้ผลตอบแทนระยะยาวลดลง โดยเฉพาะในประเทศที่มีภาษีกำไรจากเงินลงทุนหรือเงินปันผลสูง
usageTranslations.id: Beban pajak dapat menggerus hasil jangka panjang, terutama di yurisdiksi dengan pajak capital gain atau dividen yang tinggi.

terms.definition: A measure of the total annual operating expenses of an investment fund, expressed as a percentage of average assets under management. Used by investors and regulators to assess cost efficiency.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Investors often compare the expense ratio of mutual funds and ETFs to identify cost-efficient products and optimize net returns.

termTranslations.th: อัตราส่วนค่าใช้จ่าย

usageTranslations.en: Investors often compare the expense ratio of mutual funds and ETFs to identify cost-efficient products and optimize net returns.
usageTranslations.tr: Yatırımcılar, maliyet etkin ürünleri belirlemek ve net getirileri optimize etmek için genellikle yatırım fonları ve ETF’lerin toplam gider oranlarını karşılaştırır.
usageTranslations.fr: Les investisseurs comparent souvent le ratio des frais des fonds communs de placement et des ETF pour identifier les produits efficaces en coûts et optimiser les rendements nets.
usageTranslations.de: Anleger vergleichen häufig die Gesamtkostenquote von Investmentfonds und ETFs, um kosteneffiziente Produkte zu identifizieren und Nettorenditen zu optimieren.
usageTranslations.es: Los inversores comparan a menudo el ratio de gastos de fondos de inversión y ETFs para identificar productos eficientes en costes y optimizar los rendimientos netos.
usageTranslations.zh: 投资者经常比较共同基金和ETF的费用比率，以识别高效产品并优化净回报。
usageTranslations.ar: غالبًا ما يقارن المستثمرون نسبة المصروفات بين الصناديق المشتركة وصناديق المؤشرات المتداولة لتحديد المنتجات ذات الكفاءة من حيث التكلفة وتحسين العوائد الصافية.
usageTranslations.pt: Os investidores frequentemente comparam a taxa de despesas de fundos mútuos e ETFs para identificar produtos eficientes em custos e otimizar os retornos líquidos.
usageTranslations.ru: Инвесторы часто сравнивают коэффициент расходов паевых фондов и ETF для выявления эффективных продуктов и оптимизации чистой доходности.
usageTranslations.ja: 投資家は、コスト効率の高い商品を特定し純利益を最適化するために、ミューチュアルファンドやETFの経費率を比較することが多い。
usageTranslations.it: Gli investitori spesso confrontano l’indice di spesa di fondi comuni e ETF per individuare prodotti efficienti e ottimizzare i rendimenti netti.
usageTranslations.vi: Nhà đầu tư thường so sánh tỷ lệ chi phí của quỹ mở và ETF để tìm ra sản phẩm tiết kiệm chi phí và tối ưu hóa lợi nhuận ròng.
usageTranslations.hi: निवेशक अक्सर लागत-कुशल उत्पादों की पहचान और शुद्ध प्रतिफल अनुकूलन के लिए म्युचुअल फंड और ETF के व्यय अनुपात की तुलना करते हैं।
usageTranslations.th: นักลงทุนมักเปรียบเทียบอัตราส่วนค่าใช้จ่ายของกองทุนรวมและ ETF เพื่อหาผลิตภัณฑ์ที่มีประสิทธิภาพด้านต้นทุนและเพิ่มผลตอบแทนสุทธิ
usageTranslations.id: Investor sering membandingkan rasio biaya reksa dana dan ETF untuk mengidentifikasi produk efisien dan mengoptimalkan hasil bersih.

terms.definition: The process of determining the appropriate dollar or percentage allocation of each investment within a portfolio to manage risk and optimize return, based on objectives and constraints.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Disciplined position sizing is critical to prevent overexposure to any single asset or security.

termTranslations.ja: ポジションサイジング
termTranslations.vi: Xác định quy mô vị thế
termTranslations.th: การกำหนดขนาดสถานะ

usageTranslations.en: Disciplined position sizing is critical to prevent overexposure to any single asset or security.
usageTranslations.tr: Disiplinli pozisyon büyüklüğü belirleme, herhangi bir varlığa aşırı maruz kalmayı önlemek için kritik öneme sahiptir.
usageTranslations.fr: Un dimensionnement discipliné des positions est essentiel pour éviter une surexposition à un seul actif.
usageTranslations.de: Disziplinierte Positionsgrößenbestimmung ist entscheidend, um eine Überexponierung gegenüber einzelnen Werten zu vermeiden.
usageTranslations.es: El dimensionamiento disciplinado de la posición es fundamental para evitar la sobreexposición a un solo activo.
usageTranslations.zh: 纪律性的头寸规模确定对于防止对单一资产的过度暴露至关重要。
usageTranslations.ar: تحديد حجم المركز بشكل منضبط أمر بالغ الأهمية لتجنب التعرض المفرط لأي أصل.
usageTranslations.pt: Dimensionar posições de forma disciplinada é fundamental para evitar exposição excessiva a um único ativo.
usageTranslations.ru: Дисциплинированное определение размера позиции важно для предотвращения чрезмерной концентрации в одном активе.
usageTranslations.ja: 規律あるポジションサイジングは、単一資産への過度なリスク集中を防ぐ上で不可欠です。
usageTranslations.it: Un dimensionamento disciplinato delle posizioni è fondamentale per evitare una sovraesposizione a un singolo asset.
usageTranslations.vi: Việc xác định quy mô vị thế một cách kỷ luật rất quan trọng để tránh rủi ro tập trung vào một tài sản.
usageTranslations.hi: अनुशासित पोजीशन साइजिंग किसी एक संपत्ति में अत्यधिक जोखिम से बचने के लिए महत्वपूर्ण है।
usageTranslations.th: การกำหนดขนาดสถานะอย่างมีวินัยเป็นสิ่งสำคัญในการหลีกเลี่ยงความเสี่ยงต่อสินทรัพย์ใดสินทรัพย์หนึ่งมากเกินไป
usageTranslations.id: Penentuan ukuran posisi yang disiplin sangat penting untuk menghindari eksposur berlebihan pada satu aset.

terms.definition: A measure of the rate at which assets within a portfolio are bought and sold over a specified period, typically expressed as a percentage of average portfolio value.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: High portfolio turnover may result in increased transaction costs and tax drag, impacting net returns.

termTranslations.ja: ポートフォリオ回転率
termTranslations.vi: Tỷ lệ luân chuyển danh mục
termTranslations.th: อัตราหมุนเวียนพอร์ตโฟลิโอ

usageTranslations.en: High portfolio turnover may result in increased transaction costs and tax drag, impacting net returns.
usageTranslations.tr: Yüksek portföy devir hızı, işlem maliyetlerinin ve vergi baskısının artmasına, dolayısıyla net getirilerin azalmasına neden olabilir.
usageTranslations.fr: Une rotation élevée du portefeuille peut entraîner des coûts de transaction et une charge fiscale accrus, affectant le rendement net.
usageTranslations.de: Hoher Portfolioumschlag kann zu höheren Transaktionskosten und Steuerbelastungen führen, was die Nettorendite beeinträchtigt.
usageTranslations.es: Una alta rotación de cartera puede aumentar los costos de transacción y el impacto fiscal, reduciendo el rendimiento neto.
usageTranslations.zh: 高换手率可能导致交易成本和税收拖累的增加，从而影响净回报。
usageTranslations.ar: قد يؤدي معدل دوران المحفظة المرتفع إلى زيادة تكاليف المعاملات والعبء الضريبي، مما يؤثر على العائد الصافي.
usageTranslations.pt: Alta rotatividade da carteira pode resultar em custos de transação e arrasto fiscal maiores, impactando o retorno líquido.
usageTranslations.ru: Высокая оборачиваемость портфеля приводит к увеличению транзакционных издержек и налоговой нагрузки, снижая чистую доходность.
usageTranslations.ja: ポートフォリオ回転率が高いと取引コストや税負担が増え、純利益率に影響を与える可能性がある。
usageTranslations.it: Una rotazione elevata del portafoglio può aumentare i costi di transazione e il freno fiscale, riducendo i rendimenti netti.
usageTranslations.vi: Tỷ lệ luân chuyển danh mục cao có thể làm tăng chi phí giao dịch và ảnh hưởng thuế, làm giảm lợi nhuận ròng.
usageTranslations.hi: उच्च पोर्टफोलियो टर्नओवर से लेन-देन लागत और कर बोझ बढ़ सकता है, जिससे शुद्ध रिटर्न कम हो सकता है।
usageTranslations.th: อัตราหมุนเวียนพอร์ตโฟลิโอสูงอาจส่งผลให้ต้นทุนธุรกรรมและภาษีเพิ่มขึ้น ซึ่งกระทบผลตอบแทนสุทธิ
usageTranslations.id: Perputaran portofolio yang tinggi dapat meningkatkan biaya transaksi dan beban pajak, sehingga menurunkan hasil bersih.

terms.definition: A predetermined span of time during which investors in a hedge fund, private equity fund, or similar pooled vehicle are prohibited from redeeming or withdrawing their capital. Commonly set to protect fund liquidity and stabilize asset management during initial investment or critical operations phases.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: The lockup period ensures that investors cannot redeem their shares during the fund's initial three years, supporting long-term investment strategy.

termTranslations.th: ระยะเวลา Lock-up

usageTranslations.en: The lockup period ensures that investors cannot redeem their shares during the fund's initial three years, supporting long-term investment strategy.
usageTranslations.tr: Kilitleme süresi, yatırımcıların fonun ilk üç yılı boyunca hisselerini geri çekememesini sağlayarak uzun vadeli yatırım stratejisini destekler.
usageTranslations.fr: La période de blocage garantit que les investisseurs ne peuvent pas racheter leurs parts pendant les trois premières années du fonds, soutenant ainsi une stratégie d'investissement à long terme.
usageTranslations.de: Die Lock-up-Periode stellt sicher, dass Anleger ihre Anteile in den ersten drei Jahren des Fonds nicht zurückgeben können und unterstützt so eine langfristige Anlagestrategie.
usageTranslations.es: El período de lock-up asegura que los inversores no puedan redimir sus participaciones durante los tres primeros años del fondo, apoyando una estrategia de inversión a largo plazo.
usageTranslations.zh: 锁定期确保投资者在基金的前三年内不能赎回其份额，从而支持长期投资策略。
usageTranslations.ar: تضمن فترة الحجز عدم تمكن المستثمرين من استرداد أسهمهم خلال السنوات الثلاث الأولى للصندوق، مما يدعم استراتيجية الاستثمار طويل الأجل.
usageTranslations.pt: O período de lock-up garante que os investidores não possam resgatar suas cotas nos três primeiros anos do fundo, apoiando a estratégia de investimento de longo prazo.
usageTranslations.ru: Период лок-ап гарантирует, что инвесторы не смогут вывести свои доли в первые три года фонда, поддерживая долгосрочную инвестиционную стратегию.
usageTranslations.ja: ロックアップ期間により、投資家はファンドの最初の3年間は持分を換金できず、長期的な投資戦略が維持されます。
usageTranslations.it: Il periodo di lock-up garantisce che gli investitori non possano riscattare le proprie quote durante i primi tre anni del fondo, sostenendo una strategia di investimento a lungo termine.
usageTranslations.vi: Giai đoạn lock-up đảm bảo nhà đầu tư không thể rút vốn trong ba năm đầu của quỹ, hỗ trợ chiến lược đầu tư dài hạn.
usageTranslations.hi: लॉकअप अवधि सुनिश्चित करती है कि निवेशक फंड के प्रारंभिक तीन वर्षों में अपनी हिस्सेदारी नहीं निकाल सकते, जो दीर्घकालिक निवेश रणनीति का समर्थन करती है।
usageTranslations.th: ระยะเวลา Lock-up รับประกันว่านักลงทุนจะไม่สามารถไถ่ถอนหุ้นของตนได้ในช่วงสามปีแรกของกองทุน สนับสนุนกลยุทธ์การลงทุนระยะยาว
usageTranslations.id: Periode lock-up memastikan investor tidak dapat menarik dana mereka selama tiga tahun pertama dana, mendukung strategi investasi jangka panjang.

terms.definition: A measure of a fund’s total annual operating expenses as a percentage of assets under management, critical for assessing cost efficiency in mutual funds and ETFs.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Low expense ratios are a key consideration for institutional investors when constructing cost-efficient portfolios with index funds and ETFs.

termTranslations.th: อัตราส่วนค่าใช้จ่าย

usageTranslations.en: Low expense ratios are a key consideration for institutional investors when constructing cost-efficient portfolios with index funds and ETFs.
usageTranslations.tr: Düşük gider oranları, maliyet etkin portföy oluştururken kurumsal yatırımcılar için kilit bir kriterdir.
usageTranslations.fr: De faibles ratios de frais sont essentiels pour les investisseurs institutionnels lors de la constitution de portefeuilles efficaces avec des fonds indiciels et des ETF.
usageTranslations.de: Niedrige Gesamtkostenquoten sind ein zentrales Kriterium für institutionelle Investoren bei der Erstellung kosteneffizienter Portfolios mit Indexfonds und ETFs.
usageTranslations.es: Las bajas ratios de gastos son clave para los inversores institucionales al construir carteras eficientes con fondos índice y ETFs.
usageTranslations.zh: 低费用比率是机构投资者构建高效投资组合时的关键考量。
usageTranslations.ar: تعد نسب المصروفات المنخفضة اعتبارًا رئيسيًا للمستثمرين المؤسسيين عند بناء محافظ فعالة من حيث التكلفة باستخدام صناديق المؤشرات وصناديق المؤشرات المتداولة.
usageTranslations.pt: Baixas taxas de despesas são uma consideração fundamental para investidores institucionais na construção de portfólios eficientes com fundos de índice e ETFs.
usageTranslations.ru: Низкие коэффициенты расходов — ключевой фактор для институциональных инвесторов при формировании эффективных портфелей с индексными фондами и ETF.
usageTranslations.ja: 低い経費率は、インデックスファンドやETFでコスト効率の良いポートフォリオを構築する際に機関投資家が重視する要素です。
usageTranslations.it: Bassi indici di spesa sono una considerazione chiave per gli investitori istituzionali nella costruzione di portafogli efficienti con fondi indicizzati e ETF.
usageTranslations.vi: Tỷ lệ chi phí thấp là yếu tố then chốt đối với nhà đầu tư tổ chức khi xây dựng danh mục đầu tư hiệu quả chi phí với quỹ chỉ số và ETF.
usageTranslations.hi: निम्न व्यय अनुपात, इंडेक्स फंड्स और ETF के साथ लागत-प्रभावी पोर्टफोलियो बनाते समय संस्थागत निवेशकों के लिए एक प्रमुख विचार है।
usageTranslations.th: อัตราส่วนค่าใช้จ่ายต่ำเป็นปัจจัยสำคัญสำหรับนักลงทุนสถาบันเมื่อสร้างพอร์ตโฟลิโอที่มีประสิทธิภาพด้วยกองทุนดัชนีและ ETF
usageTranslations.id: Rasio biaya rendah adalah pertimbangan utama bagi investor institusi saat membangun portofolio yang efisien dengan reksa dana indeks dan ETF.

terms.definition: An investment strategy that seeks to capture gains through the analysis of an asset’s momentum in a particular direction, commonly used in managed futures and systematic funds.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Trend following strategies are widely used by commodity trading advisors and hedge funds to systematically exploit price momentum.

termTranslations.th: ตามแนวโน้ม

usageTranslations.en: Trend following strategies are widely used by commodity trading advisors and hedge funds to systematically exploit price momentum.
usageTranslations.tr: Trend takibi stratejileri, fiyat momentumu sistematik olarak değerlendirmek için emtia danışmanları ve hedge fonlar tarafından yaygın olarak kullanılır.
usageTranslations.fr: Les stratégies de suivi de tendance sont largement utilisées par les conseillers en matières premières et les hedge funds pour exploiter systématiquement la dynamique des prix.
usageTranslations.de: Trendfolgestrategien werden von Rohstoffhändlern und Hedgefonds genutzt, um systematisch Kursdynamiken auszunutzen.
usageTranslations.es: Las estrategias de seguimiento de tendencia son ampliamente utilizadas por asesores de materias primas y fondos de cobertura para explotar sistemáticamente el momentum de precios.
usageTranslations.zh: 趋势跟随策略被商品交易顾问和对冲基金广泛采用，以系统性地利用价格动量。
usageTranslations.ar: تُستخدم استراتيجيات اتباع الاتجاه على نطاق واسع من قبل مستشاري تداول السلع وصناديق التحوط لاستغلال زخم الأسعار بشكل منهجي.
usageTranslations.pt: Estratégias de seguimento de tendência são amplamente usadas por consultores de commodities e fundos de hedge para explorar sistematicamente o momentum dos preços.
usageTranslations.ru: Стратегии следования за трендом широко используются советниками по товарным рынкам и хедж-фондами для системного использования ценового импульса.
usageTranslations.ja: トレンドフォロー戦略は、コモディティ・トレーディング・アドバイザーやヘッジファンドによって価格モメンタムを体系的に活用するために広く利用されています。
usageTranslations.it: Le strategie trend following sono ampiamente utilizzate dai consulenti di commodity e dagli hedge fund per sfruttare sistematicamente il momentum dei prezzi.
usageTranslations.vi: Chiến lược theo xu hướng được các cố vấn giao dịch hàng hóa và quỹ phòng hộ sử dụng rộng rãi để khai thác động lượng giá một cách có hệ thống.
usageTranslations.hi: ट्रेंड फॉलोइंग रणनीतियाँ वस्तु ट्रेडिंग सलाहकारों और हेज फंडों द्वारा मूल्य गतिशीलता का व्यवस्थित रूप से लाभ उठाने के लिए व्यापक रूप से उपयोग की जाती हैं।
usageTranslations.th: กลยุทธ์ตามแนวโน้มถูกใช้โดยที่ปรึกษาการซื้อขายสินค้าโภคภัณฑ์และกองทุนเฮดจ์อย่างแพร่หลายเพื่อใช้ประโยชน์จากโมเมนตัมของราคาอย่างเป็นระบบ
usageTranslations.id: Strategi trend following banyak digunakan oleh penasihat perdagangan komoditas dan hedge fund untuk secara sistematis mengeksploitasi momentum harga.

terms.definition: The effect that a trade or series of trades has on the price of a security or asset, a critical consideration in execution and transaction cost analysis.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Algorithmic trading models aim to minimize market impact by breaking large orders into smaller transactions executed over time.

termTranslations.ja: マーケット・インパクト
termTranslations.th: ผลกระทบต่อตลาด

usageTranslations.en: Algorithmic trading models aim to minimize market impact by breaking large orders into smaller transactions executed over time.
usageTranslations.tr: Algoritmik işlem modelleri, büyük emirleri zamana yayarak küçük işlemlere bölerek piyasa etkisini en aza indirmeyi hedefler.
usageTranslations.fr: Les modèles de trading algorithmique visent à minimiser l’impact de marché en divisant les gros ordres en petites transactions sur la durée.
usageTranslations.de: Algorithmische Handelsmodelle zielen darauf ab, den Markteinfluss zu minimieren, indem große Aufträge in kleinere Transaktionen aufgeteilt werden.
usageTranslations.es: Los modelos de trading algorítmico buscan minimizar el impacto de mercado al dividir grandes órdenes en transacciones más pequeñas ejecutadas en el tiempo.
usageTranslations.zh: 算法交易模型通过将大订单拆分为小笔交易分时执行，旨在减少市场冲击。
usageTranslations.ar: تهدف نماذج التداول الخوارزمية إلى تقليل تأثير السوق من خلال تقسيم الأوامر الكبيرة إلى معاملات أصغر تُنفذ بمرور الوقت.
usageTranslations.pt: Modelos de negociação algorítmica visam minimizar o impacto de mercado dividindo grandes ordens em transações menores executadas ao longo do tempo.
usageTranslations.ru: Алгоритмические торговые модели стремятся минимизировать рыночное воздействие, разбивая крупные заявки на более мелкие сделки.
usageTranslations.ja: アルゴリズム取引モデルは、大口注文を複数回に分けて執行することでマーケット・インパクトを最小化します。
usageTranslations.it: I modelli di trading algoritmico mirano a minimizzare l’impatto di mercato suddividendo grandi ordini in transazioni più piccole.
usageTranslations.vi: Mô hình giao dịch thuật toán nhằm giảm thiểu tác động thị trường bằng cách chia nhỏ các lệnh lớn thành nhiều giao dịch nhỏ thực hiện theo thời gian.
usageTranslations.hi: एल्गोरिदम ट्रेडिंग मॉडल बड़े ऑर्डरों को छोटे लेनदेन में विभाजित करके बाजार प्रभाव को न्यूनतम करने का प्रयास करते हैं।
usageTranslations.th: โมเดลการซื้อขายอัลกอริทึมมีเป้าหมายเพื่อลดผลกระทบต่อตลาดโดยแบ่งคำสั่งซื้อขนาดใหญ่ออกเป็นธุรกรรมเล็ก ๆ ที่ดำเนินการทีละน้อย
usageTranslations.id: Model perdagangan algoritmik bertujuan meminimalkan dampak pasar dengan memecah pesanan besar menjadi transaksi kecil yang dieksekusi secara bertahap.

terms.definition: A fundamental investment strategy focused on buying securities that are undervalued relative to their intrinsic value, often using financial statement analysis.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Value investing seeks to exploit pricing inefficiencies by purchasing stocks trading below their estimated intrinsic value.

termTranslations.th: การลงทุนเน้นคุณค่า

usageTranslations.en: Value investing seeks to exploit pricing inefficiencies by purchasing stocks trading below their estimated intrinsic value.
usageTranslations.tr: Değer yatırımı, tahmini içsel değerinin altında işlem gören hisseleri alarak fiyatlama verimsizliklerinden yararlanmayı amaçlar.
usageTranslations.fr: L’investissement value vise à exploiter les inefficiences de prix en achetant des actions cotant sous leur valeur intrinsèque estimée.
usageTranslations.de: Value Investing nutzt Preisineffizienzen durch den Kauf von Aktien, die unter ihrem geschätzten inneren Wert gehandelt werden.
usageTranslations.es: La inversión en valor busca explotar ineficiencias de precios comprando acciones por debajo de su valor intrínseco estimado.
usageTranslations.zh: 价值投资通过购买低于其估算内在价值的股票来利用定价低效。
usageTranslations.ar: يهدف الاستثمار القيمي إلى استغلال عدم كفاءة التسعير بشراء الأسهم التي يتم تداولها بأقل من قيمتها الجوهرية المقدرة.
usageTranslations.pt: O investimento em valor busca explorar ineficiências de preço comprando ações negociadas abaixo do valor intrínseco estimado.
usageTranslations.ru: Инвестирование в стоимость направлено на извлечение выгоды из неэффективности ценообразования путем покупки акций по цене ниже их внутренней стоимости.
usageTranslations.ja: バリュー投資は、推定本質価値を下回る株式を購入することで価格の非効率性を活用しようとします。
usageTranslations.it: Il value investing mira a sfruttare inefficienze di prezzo acquistando azioni scambiate al di sotto del loro valore intrinseco stimato.
usageTranslations.vi: Đầu tư giá trị tìm cách khai thác sự kém hiệu quả về định giá bằng cách mua cổ phiếu giao dịch dưới giá trị nội tại ước tính.
usageTranslations.hi: मूल्य निवेश का उद्देश्य अनुमानित आंतरिक मूल्य से कम पर व्यापार करने वाले शेयरों को खरीदकर मूल्य निर्धारण अक्षमताओं का लाभ उठाना है।
usageTranslations.th: การลงทุนเน้นคุณค่ามุ่งใช้ประโยชน์จากความไม่มีประสิทธิภาพของราคาโดยซื้อหุ้นที่มีราคาต่ำกว่ามูลค่าที่แท้จริงที่ประเมินไว้
usageTranslations.id: Value investing berusaha memanfaatkan inefisiensi harga dengan membeli saham yang diperdagangkan di bawah nilai intrinsik yang diperkirakan.

terms.definition: An equity investment strategy that targets companies with above-average expected earnings or revenue growth, focusing on capital appreciation rather than income.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: Growth investing focuses on companies with high earnings growth potential, often accepting higher valuation multiples.

termTranslations.th: การลงทุนเน้นการเติบโต

usageTranslations.en: Growth investing focuses on companies with high earnings growth potential, often accepting higher valuation multiples.
usageTranslations.tr: Büyüme yatırımı, yüksek kazanç büyüme potansiyeline sahip şirketlere odaklanır ve genellikle daha yüksek değerleme çarpanlarını kabul eder.
usageTranslations.fr: L’investissement de croissance cible les entreprises à fort potentiel de croissance des bénéfices, acceptant souvent des multiples de valorisation plus élevés.
usageTranslations.de: Growth Investing konzentriert sich auf Unternehmen mit hohem Gewinnwachstumspotenzial und akzeptiert häufig höhere Bewertungsmultiplikatoren.
usageTranslations.es: La inversión en crecimiento se centra en compañías con alto potencial de crecimiento de ganancias, aceptando a menudo múltiplos de valoración más altos.
usageTranslations.zh: 成长型投资关注具有高盈利增长潜力的公司，通常愿意接受更高的估值倍数。
usageTranslations.ar: يركز الاستثمار في النمو على الشركات ذات إمكانات النمو العالي للأرباح، وغالبًا ما يقبل مضاعفات التقييم الأعلى.
usageTranslations.pt: O investimento em crescimento foca em empresas com alto potencial de crescimento de lucros, geralmente aceitando múltiplos de avaliação mais altos.
usageTranslations.ru: Инвестирование в рост ориентировано на компании с высоким потенциалом роста прибыли, часто принимая более высокие коэффициенты оценки.
usageTranslations.ja: グロース投資は、収益成長の高い企業に注目し、しばしば高いバリュエーション倍率を容認します。
usageTranslations.it: Il growth investing si concentra su aziende con alto potenziale di crescita degli utili, spesso accettando multipli di valutazione più elevati.
usageTranslations.vi: Đầu tư tăng trưởng tập trung vào các công ty có tiềm năng tăng trưởng lợi nhuận cao, thường chấp nhận hệ số định giá cao hơn.
usageTranslations.hi: ग्रोथ निवेश उन कंपनियों पर केंद्रित है जिनमें उच्च आय वृद्धि की क्षमता है, और अक्सर उच्च मूल्यांकन गुणक स्वीकार करता है।
usageTranslations.th: การลงทุนเน้นการเติบโตจะเน้นบริษัทที่มีศักยภาพการเติบโตของกำไรสูง มักยอมรับตัวคูณการประเมินมูลค่าที่สูงกว่า
usageTranslations.id: Growth investing berfokus pada perusahaan dengan potensi pertumbuhan laba tinggi, seringkali menerima kelipatan valuasi yang lebih tinggi.

terms.definition: A regulatory process by which investment firms determine if a financial product or portfolio strategy matches the investor’s risk profile, objectives, and constraints.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: MiFID II and FINRA require investment advisors to conduct a suitability assessment before recommending financial instruments to retail clients.

termTranslations.th: การประเมินความเหมาะสม

usageTranslations.en: MiFID II and FINRA require investment advisors to conduct a suitability assessment before recommending financial instruments to retail clients.
usageTranslations.tr: MiFID II ve FINRA, yatırım danışmanlarının bireysel müşterilere finansal ürün önermeden önce uygunluk değerlendirmesi yapmasını zorunlu kılar.
usageTranslations.fr: MiFID II et la FINRA exigent que les conseillers financiers procèdent à une évaluation de l’adéquation avant de recommander des instruments financiers aux clients particuliers.
usageTranslations.de: MiFID II und FINRA verlangen von Anlageberatern, eine Geeignetheitsprüfung durchzuführen, bevor Finanzinstrumente an Privatkunden empfohlen werden.
usageTranslations.es: MiFID II y FINRA exigen que los asesores de inversiones realicen una evaluación de idoneidad antes de recomendar instrumentos financieros a clientes minoristas.
usageTranslations.zh: MiFID II和FINRA要求投资顾问在向零售客户推荐金融工具前进行适合性评估。
usageTranslations.ar: تشترط MiFID II و FINRA على مستشاري الاستثمار إجراء تقييم للملاءمة قبل التوصية بأدوات مالية للعملاء الأفراد.
usageTranslations.pt: A MiFID II e a FINRA exigem que consultores de investimentos realizem uma avaliação de adequação antes de recomendar instrumentos financeiros a clientes de varejo.
usageTranslations.ru: MiFID II и FINRA требуют, чтобы инвестиционные консультанты проводили оценку соответствия перед рекомендацией финансовых инструментов частным клиентам.
usageTranslations.ja: MiFID IIやFINRAは、投資アドバイザーがリテール顧客に金融商品を勧める前に適合性評価を実施することを義務付けています。
usageTranslations.it: MiFID II e FINRA richiedono ai consulenti finanziari di effettuare una valutazione di adeguatezza prima di raccomandare strumenti finanziari ai clienti retail.
usageTranslations.vi: MiFID II và FINRA yêu cầu các cố vấn đầu tư thực hiện đánh giá phù hợp trước khi khuyến nghị sản phẩm tài chính cho khách hàng cá nhân.
usageTranslations.hi: MiFID II और FINRA निवेश सलाहकारों से खुदरा ग्राहकों को वित्तीय उपकरण सुझाने से पहले उपयुक्तता मूल्यांकन की मांग करते हैं।
usageTranslations.th: MiFID II และ FINRA กำหนดให้นักวางแผนการลงทุนต้องทำการประเมินความเหมาะสมก่อนแนะนำเครื่องมือทางการเงินแก่ลูกค้ารายย่อย
usageTranslations.id: MiFID II dan FINRA mengharuskan penasihat investasi melakukan penilaian kesesuaian sebelum merekomendasikan instrumen keuangan kepada nasabah ritel.

terms.definition: A securities transaction in which an investor sells a security at a loss and repurchases a substantially identical security shortly before or after, typically to claim a tax loss. Often disallowed by tax authorities.
terms.source: CFA Institute, IFRS Foundation, FASB (GAAP), Basel III Framework
terms.usage: The IRS disallows tax deductions for losses resulting from a wash sale if the same security is repurchased within 30 days.

termTranslations.th: วอชเซล

usageTranslations.en: The IRS disallows tax deductions for losses resulting from a wash sale if the same security is repurchased within 30 days.
usageTranslations.tr: Wash sale işlemlerinde, aynı menkul kıymet 30 gün içinde tekrar alınırsa vergi avantajı tanınmaz.
usageTranslations.fr: L'IRS interdit la déduction fiscale des pertes issues d'une vente de compensation si le même titre est racheté dans les 30 jours.
usageTranslations.de: Die IRS verbietet Steuerabzüge für Verluste aus Wash Sales, wenn das Wertpapier innerhalb von 30 Tagen zurückgekauft wird.
usageTranslations.es: La IRS no permite deducciones fiscales por pérdidas de una venta de compensación si se recompra el valor en 30 días.
usageTranslations.zh: 如果在30天内回购相同证券，IRS不允许冲销交易损失的税务扣除。
usageTranslations.ar: تمنع مصلحة الضرائب خصم خسائر الصفقات المغسولة إذا تم إعادة شراء الورقة المالية خلال 30 يومًا.
usageTranslations.pt: A Receita Federal dos EUA não permite dedução fiscal de perdas de wash sale se houver recompra em 30 dias.
usageTranslations.ru: Налоговая служба США не разрешает вычеты по убыткам от wash sale, если ценные бумаги выкуплены в течение 30 дней.
usageTranslations.ja: ウォッシュセールで同じ証券を30日以内に再購入すると、米国税務当局は損失控除を認めません。
usageTranslations.it: Il fisco americano non consente la detrazione delle perdite se la security è riacquistata entro 30 giorni dalla vendita di compensazione.
